name: Team AOC
subject: Do you think it’s responsible policy to let teenagers take out a hundred thousand dollar loan?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
body:
Alexandria shared her own story with student debt to highlight the moral failure it is to profit off the insurmountable and crushing educational debt of our nation’s students.
# [](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/143?refcode=em20211207-2675-header&t=1&akid=2675%2E2526796%2E_cRDnA)
**Alexandria joined her colleagues last week on the House floor to speak up for canceling student debt:**
_“I am 32 years old, a first generation college graduate on my mom’s side, and growing up I was told ‘your destiny is to go to college. That’s what’s going to lift our family up and out. That’s our future.’_
_17 years old when college recruiters started coming to my high school saying ‘this is worth it.’ And we still do that today.”_
As a nation, we give 17 year olds — _teenagers_ — the ability and responsibility to sign up for what is often hundreds of thousands of dollars of debt. And we think that’s responsible policy?
It’s unacceptable. And, that’s why Alexandria shared her own story with student debt — to highlight the moral failure it is to profit off the insurmountable and crushing educational debt of our nation’s students.
[Do you have a student debt story? If so, will you share how student loan debt has impacted you, your family, or your plans for your future?](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/survey/student-debt-story/?source=em20211207-2675-P_ENG_SUR_LEG&t=2&akid=2675%2E2526796%2E_cRDnA)
**Your story will help us keep up the pressure on President Biden to use his executive authority to finally cancel student loan debt for millions of Americans.**
**[Share your story](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/survey/student-debt-story/?source=em20211207-2675-P_ENG_SUR_LEG&t=3&akid=2675%2E2526796%2E_cRDnA)**
This isn’t just an issue of a debt crisis. This is an educational crisis in the United States of America. If we want to remain competitive as a nation, if we want to remain innovative, and if we want to develop the technological investments necessary to address issues like climate change, we need an educated country.
**Our current system actively disincentivizes higher education with its high cost.** That’s backwards. And the least we can do — and we have a moral, economic, and political obligation to do — is to cancel student loan debt.
We have seen the benefits that student loan cancellation could have during the year and nine months of the emergency COVID-19 forbearance in effect. It has given people the breathing room to take care of their families and to start investing in their futures.
**No person should have to go into debt in order to get an education. It’s wrong. It’s backwards. And, it doesn’t help us as a country.**
[We’re collecting stories about how student loan debt has impacted individuals and families across the country, because it’s these stories that portray the reality of educational debt and help us keep up the pressure on President Biden to cancel it. Share your story today »](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/survey/student-debt-story/?source=em20211207-2675-P_ENG_SUR_LEG&t=4&akid=2675%2E2526796%2E_cRDnA)
Your story will help clarify who is being impacted by crushing student loan debt.
We know it’s not a billionaire’s child who is taking out student loans. It’s working- or middle-class people who are trying to make a living.
So, let’s get real, and let’s cancel it.
Thank you,
Team AOC
**[Share your story](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/survey/student-debt-story/?source=em20211207-2675-P_ENG_SUR_LEG&t=5&akid=2675%2E2526796%2E_cRDnA)**

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ocasio-campaign?refcode=em20211207-2675-P_ENG_SUR_LEG&t=6&refcode2=2675_2526796__cRDnA&akid=2675%2E2526796%2E_cRDnA)** | **[Merch](https://shop.ocasiocortez.com/?utm_source=em-footer-20211207-2675-P_ENG_SUR_LEG&t=7&akid=2675%2E2526796%2E_cRDnA)**
---|---
[](https://www.facebook.com/OcasioCortez/?t=8&akid=2675%2E2526796%2E_cRDnA) | [](https://twitter.com/AOC?t=9&akid=2675%2E2526796%2E_cRDnA) | [](https://www.instagram.com/aoc/?t=10&akid=2675%2E2526796%2E_cRDnA)
---|---|---
Email us: [us@ocasiocortez.com](mailto: us@ocasiocortez.com)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, PO Box 680080, Corona, NY 11368.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/signup/did-your-information-change/?t=11&akid=2675%2E2526796%2E_cRDnA)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=12&akid=2675%2E2526796%2E_cRDnA)

Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress

He has published numerous books on conservation, ethical fair chase hunting and fishing, and the outdoors. It’s not just what Jack does, it’s who he is. Jack is from the mold of the hunter/conservationist who understands Montana’s wildlife, wild lands, and tradition of ethical, fair chase hunting, fishing, and conservation. It’s a sharp contrast from Matt Rosendale, who has voted against key conservation measures that conserved lands and wildlife habitats throughout his political career. Hey Fellow Conservative,

You know me as “America’s Toughest Sheriff,” a strong supporter of President Trump, and an unapologetic, tough-on-crime conservative. **You’ve stood by my side through thick and thin and I couldn’t be more grateful.**

Since the beginning of my career, I’ve always believed that local government is better at solving our problems instead of bloated bureaucracies forced on us by the federal or state government.

That’s why it’s so important to get involved and to serve wherever you can, especially now with so many of our cities being taken over by anti-police radicals and woke politicians looking to impose their brand of politics on our children and grandchildren.

**Because of this, I’m answering the call of duty to serve my community of Fountain Hills and running to be the next Mayor.** Right now, we’re suffering from a horrible lack of leadership, and if you’re anything like me, I’m sure you can understand how frustrating it is when you have elected officials who don’t serve the people. It’s wrong and I won’t stand for it, and [**that’s why I need your help.**](http://links.joearpaioformayor.com/u/click?_t=276ab81dbdad41a49f491c265baacc02&_m=91a0b6ca7779464397f7910ea7b9e3c9&_e=ldLW9OC8VlYWsA2TKVI9ALLtHrmTM4uC5EcDPXArMZ3o6xc9OO2OMfZs2ZH4dxvIF9LWZXKkNmcN-03Cf7-OqyQCa5K2FbsJIG60KXlrKQLeku3uHrmXRO8I2JbhVIsov2Qldtj0AWgkSENl1ICFN3T50EtEUHYalMN-Ssm3rRnhSyECcPppYWhJFmSWVuVZ98ZTHENP_3kXeVXkQ9ARRxGMxlBXesKFfd9g-dim8VSqtjRvBfcYZrAxa76nJxAk3AB77jWVbBRQzVr2KWQSVnUTUgWUmt35kH6R_2HMO0eMGKBYFIrc5NKXV15KeX4m8bqZvEMkNHQyIamBV9Y_JfVma1_J_tzFo9F_AZLrTH0JCdcZUH9A7o844giGGOmcpv8H33Rh4qRfw3nLfnK0QxiV99ZxRBKd-TP2ox0Yb8s%3D)

[** HELP JOE ARPAIO FIGHT FOR BETTER LOCAL GOVERNMENT **](http://links.joearpaioformayor.com/u/click?_t=276ab81dbdad41a49f491c265baacc02&_m=91a0b6ca7779464397f7910ea7b9e3c9&_e=ldLW9OC8VlYWsA2TKVI9ALLtHrmTM4uC5EcDPXArMZ3o6xc9OO2OMfZs2ZH4dxvIF9LWZXKkNmcN-03Cf7-OqyQCa5K2FbsJIG60KXlrKQLeku3uHrmXRO8I2JbhVIsov2Qldtj0AWgkSENl1ICFN3T50EtEUHYalMN-Ssm3rRnhSyECcPppYWhJFmSWVuVZ98ZTHENP_3kXeVXkQ9ARR4cGGbs_0L5-gaNwuFEbXMQt080JrJx1PPgwl7ydBDwu_X4hTQvNdlNSoa_HwJgQP4VyPbZkT_41gLDv-0aQzozTaTO8L9A8xhgY0vyV77bkoh3u6HvwpxpWzbdvRS_bOXPqbyGmYWLZfp9SDFIvXQTDD-EvRDV774QISjNnrv2sb4ILL5g_hbRLF6_KRztwBPSDqfCFVL-iAW16EOUzrfw%3D)
I know you’ve supported me in the past when I was the Sheriff of Maricopa County, and when I was running for higher office. [**That's why I’m asking for your support again.**](http://links.joearpaioformayor.com/u/click?_t=276ab81dbdad41a49f491c265baacc02&_m=91a0b6ca7779464397f7910ea7b9e3c9&_e=ldLW9OC8VlYWsA2TKVI9ALLtHrmTM4uC5EcDPXArMZ3o6xc9OO2OMfZs2ZH4dxvIF9LWZXKkNmcN-03Cf7-OqyQCa5K2FbsJIG60KXlrKQLeku3uHrmXRO8I2JbhVIsov2Qldtj0AWgkSENl1ICFN3T50EtEUHYalMN-Ssm3rRnhSyECcPppYWhJFmSWVuVZ98ZTHENP_3kXeVXkQ9ARR_knHdMVKJ6o9B7EqMiTIZY6dYUu31NYwYlcwJ10qTJykNc0p2hgICQpG9FDNhYRrSqifhbyM5JxaQ63HmyWXZ44P9oKGdASDg8Tk74zXpK27flSr2R4DXBXiRSpTkDh6XVwpqInUeHbDb1g_DO4j9_yZP954EBgiClVsslMcA4r8TLr5SDLnoMzgxyD236gXteiHFkGVd5Z6zkgop3llMA%3D)

**We have to fight for our neighbors, for our values, and we have to make sure our foundations at the local level are solid. If we don’t do that then we turn into places likes San Francisco, Chicago, and New York.**

Stand with me today so I can fight for the type of community we all want. [**Pitch in today and help me bring real leadership to a community in need.**](http://links.joearpaioformayor.com/u/click?_t=276ab81dbdad41a49f491c265baacc02&_m=91a0b6ca7779464397f7910ea7b9e3c9&_e=ldLW9OC8VlYWsA2TKVI9ALLtHrmTM4uC5EcDPXArMZ3o6xc9OO2OMfZs2ZH4dxvIF9LWZXKkNmcN-03Cf7-OqyQCa5K2FbsJIG60KXlrKQLeku3uHrmXRO8I2JbhVIsov2Qldtj0AWgkSENl1ICFN3T50EtEUHYalMN-Ssm3rRnhSyECcPppYWhJFmSWVuVZ98ZTHENP_3kXeVXkQ9ARR9PCu-ceq7DmtdNe4zmQAvGTAqSHJwmojs7lBof_FmtmuZIfgZKS-etz2BnKIX2Y47NuQuWDwwdTCORhaJ1SUn34DMXm0Ge7oXAkz1XYZvsn2yIw5ifIHdYFQqTEjxx6mLVjjbk3PBUTgE8gtqzxWdiNKdwKhRVtYm7CHyLTP1cN-vtxG4SajPJLb_3Njhy23i4_7TUP5yDmQjoNKtVCeXk%3D)

clean_body: The call to serve has come, and I’m answering that call. Will you stand with me again? | No longer want to receive emails from Joe? You may . Hey Fellow Conservative, You know me as “America’s Toughest Sheriff,” a strong supporter of President Trump, and an unapologetic, tough-on-crime conservative. You’ve stood by my side through thick and thin and I couldn’t be more grateful. Since the beginning of my career, I’ve always believed that local government is better at solving our problems instead of bloated bureaucracies forced on us by the federal or state government. That’s why it’s so important to get involved and to serve wherever you can, especially now with so many of our cities being taken over by anti-police radicals and woke politicians looking to impose their brand of politics on our children and grandchildren. Because of this, I’m answering the call of duty to serve my community of Fountain Hills and running to be the next Mayor. Right now, we’re suffering from a horrible lack of leadership, and if you’re anything like me, I’m sure you can understand how frustrating it is when you have elected officials who don’t serve the people. It’s wrong and I won’t stand for it, and I know you’ve supported me in the past when I was the Sheriff of Maricopa County, and when I was running for higher office. We have to fight for our neighbors, for our values, and we have to make sure our foundations at the local level are solid. If we don’t do that then we turn into places likes San Francisco, Chicago, and New York. Stand with me today so I can fight for the type of community we all want. Thank you, Joe Arpaio Candidate for Mayor of Fountain Hills Experience. Principles. Leadership. | | Paid for by Joe Arpaio for Fountain Hills, Arizona Mayor. Authorized by Joe Arpaio.

| [](http://links.colinschmitt.com/u/click?_t=2efbf9f7f9b54008ada1569759c619c2&_m=6222cfef5f164f308e050eee0c8551e9&_e=oobVQcXCC2RNBDSg0svVq9ppoP83MhLByW0Wi9kfj92IhYa0RTefC4iq-Yjf7sDuTb9e5v65dUpB-LDOpr3SfoE3OV3eJQqm1zrxNaZB1GXrkGjf-k1ENRATVFK4VSfEmFPypnGGAO6elpnr8WNA1CCx-B5jkG2EYV0Fk71Hj9-JyLcbqGtzrViEILEp9ESDdiKpGbeB-MDan58cV9NrMjLHmTCXbWhjrpP0HENLkyCjClHdZNcD3aVshpRmiQdIueDddPZqcZHHTfohYsPJLs-e02tMqtSbCATvi5C8KmCusEku613PtrKbh-N8xryzdCKxIdbHoD6RenvJmIGK_h5qOOH1-Mthcn0pSs9x9KH__188xi2YtbTNE_r2tQzRcFd7jztwiAhUC28t3dPHVwPdHUp48k5X301SJ4rsfz1MyzZMlsqXlDhg5q88tCByL172dy5sVcZJsq2uaPKFW7x-vlz7fzXnuzpg8QKc9hU%3D)

Friends,

I have been calling for a federal investigation into ex-Gov. Cuomo and now action is finally being taken to hold him accountable.

Cuomo was more focused on multi-million dollar self-congratulatory book deals and his own power than serving the people of New York prior to his disgraceful resignation!

And now that Cuomo’s abuses are catching up to him, it’s even more clear... we need to leave the days of the Cuomo Administration **COMPLETELY** behind us! | [**PITCH IN FOR NEW LEADERSHIP IN NY!**](http://links.colinschmitt.com/u/click?_t=2efbf9f7f9b54008ada1569759c619c2&_m=6222cfef5f164f308e050eee0c8551e9&_e=oobVQcXCC2RNBDSg0svVq9ppoP83MhLByW0Wi9kfj92IhYa0RTefC4iq-Yjf7sDuTb9e5v65dUpB-LDOpr3SfoE3OV3eJQqm1zrxNaZB1GXrkGjf-k1ENRATVFK4VSfEmFPypnGGAO6elpnr8WNA1CCx-B5jkG2EYV0Fk71Hj9-JyLcbqGtzrViEILEp9ESDdiKpGbeB-MDan58cV9NrMjLHmTCXbWhjrpP0HENLkyCjClHdZNcD3aVshpRmiQdIkt7U4Lm7vn6BoqiHkqaWoCruuwSF0swMXshuT5lcT7-13h5ib2cmYUcVU-4GWBlR1IBhtEgRVdz9hdjf6XhvJfr9ezpRa34mR4NuZDtx3PKLPJzyeLZGMTca-_BsIwWdq7d6hJjSKf1U2n4CRVlkhPqZTp1RQ8MVbOf4aaMAt94GbG06crRGrbCV96h22yxXwjI3RrN-uYwLcM9TFIzrjWPeB-vmMbhu7So2dog1UiqYI71zMbbv1pJjl3BwEmEw)

clean_body: Ex-Gov. Cuomo under federal probe | Friends, I have been calling for a federal investigation into ex-Gov. Cuomo and now action is finally being taken to hold him accountable. Cuomo was more focused on multi-million dollar self-congratulatory book deals and his own power than serving the people of New York prior to his disgraceful resignation! And now that Cuomo’s abuses are catching up to him, it’s even more clear... we need to leave the days of the Cuomo Administration COMPLETELY behind us! | With a federal probe now looking into Cuomo, it’s clear that we need to move on. We’re not going to Save Our State by leaving the legacy of Cuomo’s chaos - we need to leave his abuses in the past and restore New York to glory! | | ---|---|--- | | Thanks for your support, Colin Schmitt Republican Candidate in New York’s 18th Congressional District Paid for by Schmitt for Congress Our mailing address is: Schmitt For Congress PO Box 67 South Salem, NY 10590 Don't want to receive our emails anymore?

This is why President Donald J. Trump has endorsed my campaign. This moment is too big for Republicans to be joining sides with the radical left Democrats. When I am elected, I will always put America First.

name: Darrell Issa
subject: This Republican seat could be erased
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Darrell Issa for Congress

clean_body: Inflation continues to rise while Democrats do nothing! | | | | | | | | | Friends, Radical Democrat policies are ruining our country one day at a time! The cost of everyday goods are at record highs and inflation rates seem to be rapidly increasing! The Democrats are ignoring the problem and not doing anything to fix it! That’s why I’m running for Congress - to stop this absurd spending spree. As a small business owner in Henrico County, I understand how these issues are impacting everyday life. The Radical Left wants you to believe that massive spending bills are the answer, when in reality, they are making the issues worse. We must support fiscally responsible leaders for public office or our kids will not have a successful future. By voting for the Socialist Spending Package , Abigail Spanberger proved that she supports record inflation rates and does not care about the future of this country! - With your support, we will take back Virginia’s 7th Congressional District and get the Commonwealth back on track! Thanks for your support, Del. The Senate race in Georgia will go down to the wire. Democrats are going to spend whatever it takes to keep their politician in the Senate. Take a look at the panicked email they recently sent:

[](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=bc0d89caa9444ff9ae20d671afde6c73&_e=xfInQAIwe2y19QBXrWiqDKjwVU-K8yzwdQitMEVHaL70b3LmtEKm2-9l6XRBkO5ReUV9klf_llxjTHUaYT83UKL8igraorzfwLgGS3VbWpF3QTzx74ZreoHVvrdmBzjruFdhmqv45RiLEfc0-Qf78sZ2vHCY7uA9e49uM2uoaMoiSSv12aoXJvsHChmnEcxeyYdaAI1aRkulAy4YV4QhyM-WAo2VW4xl76FFx4jE1seRmtCwuwsltGNEl4j_zLslvbrc-3dzqwuMLfT3025OTsADTE6mUAIYiu7oDZKp9_-XCDvRy7Rl-lUPcdMv7TeoA7UuuJ-t7zWkhqmrsy--kZL0ZIKcaU_BacGBcPsO-N-F8L7MskWZGZ42XZZXd0cb64MYwcAZiZcYAgbGcXW6wvqESavvvZI24QicPV0Yh-QTK6kxifHIsGolo1VQu9rOCpwdPVMazdrbv9ymszssvQ%3D%3D)
The Democrats are on a roll with their fundraising. Their supporters understand what's at stake - control of the U.S. Senate and the fate of the Biden-Schumer-Pelosi agenda. In Georgia, we're running against the #1 fundraising senator in the country who already has $17 million in his campaign war chest.

Our campaign is being aggressive in our fundraising, but we're behind our December goal - by a significant amount. We hate writing emails like this nearly a year from Election Day, **but we must hit every fundraising goal along the way if we're going to have the necessary funds to win next November.**

**[In an effort to get back on course, we're asking 1,500 conservatives to make a donation of $10 or more before midnight tonight.](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=bc0d89caa9444ff9ae20d671afde6c73&_e=xfInQAIwe2y19QBXrWiqDKjwVU-K8yzwdQitMEVHaL70b3LmtEKm2-9l6XRBkO5ReUV9klf_llxjTHUaYT83UKL8igraorzfwLgGS3VbWpF3QTzx74ZreoHVvrdmBzjruFdhmqv45RiLEfc0-Qf78sZ2vHCY7uA9e49uM2uoaMoiSSv12aoXJvsHChmnEcxeyYdaAI1aRkulAy4YV4QhyM-WAo2VW4xl76FFx4jE1seRmtCwuwsltGNEl4j_zLslnZCxfo295nfdvJ7ExlDtjRoF33gNLKZFO0anqnB7ZIHf5ZUQ6OaF0GKTmygMzkyh52yTTXRcGGTybujyeUbsvR5fe-_jmzdaSJdItU_AoJ6Sn8KHvBaDnZs4Ll62C0_xk3mcAuX3FAi_hKOVrM0r9XEa5P28A7uMG7gtuh-xATsIUyzqoQsPh7Q0Os-lVISc5ZhYBjeu1Lfd_3xBdAeWQw%3D%3D)**

_The last thing that we want is for complacency to set in. While some conservatives believe we have the wind at our back after Republicans swept the top races in Virginia, that doesn't translate into automatic victory next year. Far from it._

**We must block, tackle, and excel at the basics of campaigning - like raising money, organizing volunteers, and registering voters - to win. **

Soon, Election Day will be here too. The future of the country is on the line, so we are humbly asking for you to help us get back on track today. Thank you, Herschel Walker Republican Candidate for Senate | | PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC. Don't want to receive any more of our emails? We hate to see you go, but .

subject: Check out your record

body:
Every single donation to this campaign — no matter the amount — brings us one step closer to flipping Texas blue.
#
**Our race to elect Beto as Texas' next governor couldn't be more urgent.** The future of our democracy, reproductive rights, health, and safety are all at risk if Greg Abbott stays in power.
To ensure we can compete with Abbott's $55 million war chest and super PAC donations, our finance team is working hard to make sure we have the grassroots resources we need to travel across Texas, advertise online, and hire campaign staff.
We took a look this morning, and here's what we saw next to your name in our supporter records:
**Supporter Email:** dpwillis67@gmail.com **Supporter ID:** 444211 **Past donations:** **Not yet!******* **Suggested contribution:** $3 **[Contribute $3](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/50390?refcode=ema20211207-165917&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=165917%2E444211%2Effi1Lh)**
---
_*This data only reflects donations made online with this email address. If you’ve made a previous contribution via check or with a different email address, you may not see it below — but know that Beto and our entire team are deeply grateful for your support._
To defeat Abbott and his dangerous policies, we're going to build the largest grassroots campaign Texas has ever seen. We'll need the support of as many people as possible — including you! **But according to our records, it looks like you have yet to chip in directly to power this campaign.**
[To be honest with you, every single donation to this campaign — no matter the amount — brings us one step closer to flipping Texas blue. Will you make your first contribution today?](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/50390?refcode=ema20211207-165917&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=165917%2E444211%2Effi1Lh)

Right now, Beto is on the road across Texas meeting folks and listening to their stories. We're working our way through all 254 Texas counties because Beto is going to be a governor for ALL Texans.
Our friends and neighbors in Texas deserve a big, bold vision for their state. Big enough for our dreams and big enough to make them happen.
[If you’re able, please donate $3 or more today to help elect Beto as the next governor of Texas.](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/50390?refcode=ema20211207-165917&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=22&akid=165917%2E444211%2Effi1Lh)

Finance Team

name: Jake Duesenberg
subject: Give Back the $10 Billion Surplus
body:
| [ ](http://www.action4liberty.com/?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=_10_billion_surplus_give_back&n=1)
---
December 7th, 2021
## Give Back the $10 Billion Surplus
The state government owes you A LOT of money! We found out today that politicians in St Paul overtaxed us by over $10 Billion according to the [Economic Forecast released today](https://www.action4liberty.com/minnesota_gov_t_overtaxed_us_by_10_billion_give_it_back?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=_10_billion_surplus_give_back&n=2). And as expected, Governor Tim Walz is celebrating while he rolls out his plan to spend the surplus funds on more wasteful government projects. The budget surplus is reported by many to be $7.7 Billion, but the liberal media and others HIDE the budget reserve funds (aka rainy day funds) which totals nearly $2.5 Billion. A rainy day fund is a fine concept for a fiscally conservative family but it is NOT to be used by a bloated and heavy-handed government. Our money will only be wasted if we do not fight to get it back. A surplus by the government is a deficit on the taxpayer. **Action 4 Liberty is calling for every penny of the $10 Billion to be returned to the people. Minnesota is one of the worst taxed states in the country and that severely hurts the private sector. Many are struggling with unemployment due to vaccine mandates and could use this money to pick themselves back up.** With 2.5 Million taxpayers in the state, the government has over $4,000 of each taxpayer's money. GIVE IT BACK!
## Sign the petition:
[](https://www.action4liberty.com/give_it_back?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=_10_billion_surplus_give_back&n=3) **Jake Duesenberg** **Action 4 Liberty** | [](https://www.action4liberty.com/donate_stop_vaccine_mandates?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=_10_billion_surplus_give_back&n=4 "Support Us") [Support Us](https://www.action4liberty.com/donate_stop_vaccine_mandates?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=_10_billion_surplus_give_back&n=4)
---

This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com). To stop receiving emails, [click here](https://www.action4liberty.com/unsubscribe?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=_10_billion_surplus_give_back&n=5).
You can also keep up with Jake Duesenberg on [Facebook](https://www.action4liberty.com/r?u=27Ax0UmWOX2J8J_QwK9Z6nyVoJL5zCIi1gu8lCoYmQrA8P7rhuOjJmdy-IRmglie&e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=_10_billion_surplus_give_back&n=6).
Created with [NationBuilder](https://www.action4liberty.com/r?u=8ZU0Lizkf4ldaLE4eHvP4jrdVLeo6TMxn9HZ_FOKnho&e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=_10_billion_surplus_give_back&n=7), software for leaders.

** Volunteers Needed For The GUN SHOW.
------------------------------------------------------------

Dear Patriots,

The Melissa Martz Campaign is in need of volunteers to man our table and collect signatures at the Gun Show (details below). If you are able to volunteer for half a day, a whole day or both days --- please reply to this email. Thank you very much, to those who have already volunteered their time and talent to the Campaign's effort to preserve our Republic!

DATES: December 18th and 19th
TIMES: Sat. - 8:45AM - 5PM; Sun. - 9:45AM-4PM
LOCATION: South Florida Fairgrounds (West Palm Beach)

* If you are able to volunteer for a whole day, a stipend for lunch will be provided. *

Stay Free,

Melissa Martz Campaign

Friend,

There’s not an easy way to say this... **I came up short of my November fundraising goal and Nancy Pelosi has taken notice.** She’s not worried about the American people, she’s worried about making sure her Blue Wave washes away conservative stronghold states like Iowa.

I refuse to let that happen. Between the Left’s pork barrel spending on their Socialist pet projects and complete disregard for our Southern Border’s security, Joe Biden’s plan for America has failed at every turn.

That’s why we have to Take Back the House. We’ve got to make sure no more of his plans take action and that we start putting America First again, not the Socialist Agenda. Will you help me catch up and rush what you can right now to stop Nancy Pelosi and Joe Biden’s radical plans for America?

clean_body: | | | | Economist expectations undershot. | “The Labor Department said in its monthly payroll report released Friday that payrolls in November rose by just 210,000, well below the 550,000 jobs forecast...” - Megan Henney| FOXBusiness (12/3/2021) Unfortunately, this comes as no surprise, friend. Under Biden, Harris, and a Democrat-controlled Congress our nation continues to suffer. They still have been unable to come close to President Trump’s America First Economy. Our country is still almost 1,000,000 jobs short of what Biden promised back in March during his American Rescue Act. Yet, the Democrats continue to spend tax-payer money on their liberal agenda that only hurts jobs! Look at what it has done to America’s oil industry and Alaska’s energy sector. It’s time for Kelly’s plan to revive our economy : KELLY WILL MAKE THE TRUMP TAX CUTS PERMANENT KELLY WILL PUSH FOR A WORKFORCE DEVELOPMENT PIPELINE KELLY WILL SUPPORT EFFORTS TO EXPLORE AND DEVELOP OIL AND GAS IN ANWR KELLY WILL CUT REGULATIONS AND RED TAPE THAT ARE STRANGLING OUR ECONOMY We cannot allow Americans to suffer under the Democrat’s failing economy. Thanks, Team Tshibaka | | | | ==

clean_body: | | | | Will you join us? Friend, President Trump personally asked me to bring my top supporters to Mar-a-Lago to meet him. I told him that YOU have been a champion of the America First agenda, and I want you by my side when I go to Mar-a-Lago on February 10th. President Trump and I know how much you mean to the America First movement, that is why we chose you. You have been fighting for us, and now we want to meet you. We are picking a winner soon. Make sure it’s YOU by donating today so we can RETIRE and DEFEAT Liberal Lisa Murkowski once and for all! Thanks, Kelly | | | | ==

Right now, we’re just $264 away from reaching our $25,000 goal! And I know I can count on this team to help us close the gap tonight. [Will you chip in $5, or any amount you can?](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zlDPxDHCSe8GlVxjXZtZRtmEfGB8YWhzh1TFdE2u9VNW6_nhjN6OUqrqYagiS3GlhBjFfhrUQJPxKPpfQC-Uzz-djO5RAeCgABXyzvccWS4CAWFfM8Ob45sA0LS4WdDPMKVv8UeT-_AR4nOj0jsEUNNCCkt12264OzAjSdikLYRWardsbyDc6lCg-bIyHjsRGLLL8xRoGCLZIHAmYlsxW6mT_NZ0qn2tjYlAAIxBwouoFS60RDxWdrAyqJhgzRfpNs9UnP-FzJi7KfvUWk_DuR0B2gVCZzcsqMmRH4Dh5s0vbj6_PXX3tO74JYAytpDKs5ZKfTTKuYc2WUlb1vPbIxVi73yfq--URAds9hnBCFMg/3ho/BTrbFluyTxe9qGtJT_43NA/h1/yPd3GR0NXxUBSRvKjWknFMoZyJdu5gL8Gfn15uZC4wk) | | | [Chip in $5 >>](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zlDPxDHCSe8GlVxjXZtZRtmEfGB8YWhzh1TFdE2u9VNW6_nhjN6OUqrqYagiS3GlhBjFfhrUQJPxKPpfQC-Uzz-djO5RAeCgABXyzvccWS4CAWFfM8Ob45sA0LS4WdDPNWjTwMeqLGGlwFcXAo4OwN5m6ZhlTy9E_5Jf718_mOoXXQ-w4WnR8NlpHbpaLVfEO_OAeAVDfD_dKf3ZL-T2OOKan32IR_iGHYusFbd93HOlftrjHKEgKFVy4KBYqWmPWiyY-oYWjwbXnX2tn8BOZKgCLx2IsvOCyD0dcvOpk5E6HgULoAsRj0ZgRPymDKEQNsbdPkxG3sUuIgmjGwXx7H8hma1PkCViISXKc2mtigyA/3ho/BTrbFluyTxe9qGtJT_43NA/h2/XRYY3KyuNYMSaDtRPbabDkipagpdcHTUgFKo2XqHACY)

I won’t sugarcoat it: **if we don’t meet this goal, we’re at risk of not being able to keep up with my 6 Republican opponents and the GOP war chest.**
We have a huge public fundraising deadline coming up at the end of the year and every one of us is in a race to come out on top. That’s why I’m asking for your help, to send a message that this grassroots movement is keeping Nevada blue.

Peter - Democrats know it. And we know it, too.

The Senate race in Georgia will go down to the wire. Democrats are going to spend whatever it takes to keep their politician in the Senate. Take a look at the panicked email they recently sent:

[](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=128495bb89414c7d80ce7605d235d077&_e=G24wefySYgsbvF8OK9e0x3VzLBuStcteZaYVWsT6gVmcGtZKqCDUXn72UyTQGkDgy7fUbySXkm3zF7C5b-lCCzjaKSv-0As6UXd5EgRAQryrdOELNSjaAn12ATxtAyjqMGw1yNobzKcT6T2sUZFebrMVY_WLthWPaftFnfPY1NNtf_m9RDn7Acgw4uAdafcbs_KF8YJz5mLnwXINXoKo6JwxTE__DuKF5sNl3W0w0jhGmY9d0Sna29ORwFXGfyxR61KSaEh7T6DwnaqHEI0vo_YaXIVbL3PiT5yYsEi_HMcoKgEHNfUbNOdgEQxI6lJ_jBR0WwE3U-ST-vv43486eLO70E3yfkjC2SumBELRh1V0pQ_wFWGN8O_l5TIecUYk074NKeZLl1xMjv2hFo0fIdwqiYZYNpTMG3IBALaalcNYyAehbgsV2OTXggVFPtZToyPBuxNb3MsprES-AHLW1A%3D%3D)
The Democrats are on a roll with their fundraising. Their supporters understand what's at stake - control of the U.S. Senate and the fate of the Biden-Schumer-Pelosi agenda. In Georgia, we're running against the #1 fundraising senator in the country who already has $17 million in his campaign war chest.

Our campaign is being aggressive in our fundraising, but we're behind our December goal - by a significant amount. We hate writing emails like this nearly a year from Election Day, **but we must hit every fundraising goal along the way if we're going to have the necessary funds to win next November.**

**[In an effort to get back on course, we're asking 1,500 conservatives to make a donation of $10 or more before midnight tonight.](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=128495bb89414c7d80ce7605d235d077&_e=G24wefySYgsbvF8OK9e0x3VzLBuStcteZaYVWsT6gVmcGtZKqCDUXn72UyTQGkDgy7fUbySXkm3zF7C5b-lCCzjaKSv-0As6UXd5EgRAQryrdOELNSjaAn12ATxtAyjqMGw1yNobzKcT6T2sUZFebrMVY_WLthWPaftFnfPY1NNtf_m9RDn7Acgw4uAdafcbs_KF8YJz5mLnwXINXoKo6JwxTE__DuKF5sNl3W0w0jjMvVZy-jjFAZG7TwP8PJd0jJCq0G62Lzo6_KHjqmTdymprd9mYLhvFFzQxVa3A9NC0T2aqqbtH7hEIFgM3tUebgxg4lHo9l785hmZ2mI8dgFQ0hOacr37pge5hM15kSoNls14Wlvf7FH4rRbU7hEXmAnWe6SDcBbagUUZ6cDSQ4gz2CKr2184TH_dj36FVcxYzUuJnBjvjHXv709hEBBuN9_1tVftMx8ZXIJcrOROjPQ%3D%3D)**

_The last thing that we want is for complacency to set in. While some conservatives believe we have the wind at our back after Republicans swept the top races in Virginia, that doesn't translate into automatic victory next year. Far from it._

**We must block, tackle, and excel at the basics of campaigning - like raising money, organizing volunteers, and registering voters - to win. **

[**Chip in $10 ->**](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=128495bb89414c7d80ce7605d235d077&_e=G24wefySYgsbvF8OK9e0x3VzLBuStcteZaYVWsT6gVmcGtZKqCDUXn72UyTQGkDgy7fUbySXkm3zF7C5b-lCCzjaKSv-0As6UXd5EgRAQryrdOELNSjaAn12ATxtAyjqMGw1yNobzKcT6T2sUZFebrMVY_WLthWPaftFnfPY1NNtf_m9RDn7Acgw4uAdafcbs_KF8YJz5mLnwXINXoKo6Md-8VrgBZz8_CRV1LCYwX84QxTt7AMs429XOX9b2jMi4AaBSeHIWr-IosLBdsBeHri5rGjNIPreq1OZtJ2TXTjMWPYcDNlj7pdz0WpC6pdbgVvkyLXfWISLgYaaPQPSsd_ylXfhnJbcMRfKjBZv3NpMISf3PWvoFr63nrH59VQBxXj4y0wlDJFRnGRU-CQaPKY9mNkzIIXJOYysXf4SnYJeeT1wd48rHgb_gaTidNjD8uZXnbb4Skkq8QaCBpIDjQ%3D%3D)

name: Culp for Congress
subject: Pearl Harbor: 80th Anniversary
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CULP FOR CONGRESS
body:
View online [https://app.getresponse.com/view.html?x=a62b&m=BQpGYP&mc=rr&s=Bttw6dS&u=Q96gS&z=EI6q9rp&]

[https://m.gr-cdn-6.com/getresponse-Q96gS/photos/8254ebc4-6d01-4a7a-92b4-3f3904892488.png]

December 7th, 1941 “a date which will live in infamy.”

80 years ago our country was attacked by Japanese forces. Thousands of Americans died that day. That attack is what launched the United States of America into the Second World War.

Though Americans were shocked and reeling from the loss of life, the direct attacks to our country, and suffering from the worst economic times in American history, Americans bonded together and fought against a tyrannical enemy. Americans didn't roll over and take it even when times were hard and they did what Americans have always done. We fought against evil!

We cannot forget the sacrifices of those who served our country. As Americans we must remember that American exceptionalism is unique. We cherish freedom, love our country, are willing to die in defense of our homeland, and we want the world to know what it means to be free.

[https://m.gr-cdn-6.com/getresponse-Q96gS/photos/48e4c364-7fe2-467b-857d-20502529dfe6.jpg]

Americans have always proven to be strong and resilient.

On September 11th, 2001 our country was again attacked by enemy forces. Once again we rose to the challenge and "We the People" united because we love our country and respect our neighbor. In those moments we were all just Americans.

Our country is currently going through difficulty. We all know it and can feel a shadow over our nation, but just as we have done in the past, "we the people" are stepping up and showing the world what it means to be an American.
We're standing up to defendfreedom and freedom’s innate rightfulness. We're standing up for America, we're defending her, and we will win!

Honored to Serve

Loren

The Senate race in Georgia will go down to the wire. Democrats are going to spend whatever it takes to keep their politician in the Senate. Take a look at the panicked email they recently sent:

[](http://links.americansfordjt.com/u/click?_t=aff9c7dfb71242f8abc6b00341ebfdb2&_m=bd2c7030efd94d7d8909969f5bd0509b&_e=IGr4q8IVxbWg92Ni6SVANWddVIwggkBvZPzZw2ZqgPNwY9duxkx7dY80_wsLhEGDeFQZdKV-m8FQfNnJTkKtyBzUxEcq7PZHSK3FBKonnMdTgPLvPsyAXRw5-KoAwPAUMa_mYUrxc_5oTkdUkTu5a4aORRLk42F8lVfJBcOO9KfVf98u2zSXTrl-8rQA3Mx_dZPzM67jjW-mSkOHT6a6sX3anVKumgGzbERExJf2UbWpM05x0Vf-_e1P0uRNo7o-zeewNblV7qdH8HQihDyazpAkBO0Q9wEol83RyaC2LuoAB8dL7pywRB5LPMWC1T0MfDhjz-PMrpf-PZ7rBz-XWvtL_Yz4k_qNYCw0L6lB9Sg7FjKiuOsxTPw54l8Q1piXaxZt9RCDGUzDYloVxnkLJDqfrqjeXlufgtj98SjP0EPLKUuOiLo5jR1W6ufyhvRh)

clean_body: If we’re going to have the necessary funds to compete with the top Democrat fundraiser in the country, then we cannot miss our fundraising goals. If we're going to have the necessary funds to compete with the top Democrat fundraiser in the country, then we cannot miss our fundraising goals. | Fellow American - Democrats know it. And we know it, too. The Senate race in Georgia will go down to the wire. Democrats are going to spend whatever it takes to keep their politician in the Senate. Take a look at the panicked email they recently sent: The Democrats are on a roll with their fundraising. Their supporters understand what's at stake - control of the U.S. Senate and the fate of the Biden-Schumer-Pelosi agenda. In Georgia, we're running against the #1 fundraising senator in the country who already has $17 million in his campaign war chest. Our campaign is being aggressive in our fundraising, but we're behind our December goal - by a significant amount. We hate writing emails like this nearly a year from Election Day, but we must hit every fundraising goal along the way if we're going to have the necessary funds to win next November. The last thing that we want is for complacency to set in. While some conservatives believe we have the wind at our back after Republicans swept the top races in Virginia, that doesn't translate into automatic victory next year. Far from it. We must block, tackle, and excel at the basics of campaigning - like raising money, organizing volunteers, and registering voters - to win. We know the holiday season is upon us. Soon, Election Day will be here too. The future of the country is on the line, so we are humbly asking for you to help us get back on track today. Thank you, Herschel Walker Republican Candidate for Senate | | PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC. Don't want to receive any more of our emails? We hate to see you go, but ._

name: Eli Bremer
subject: A Day of Remembrance.
body:
| | | | [](https://eliforcolorado.cmail19.com/t/t-l-cklurdl-ykykmujid-y/)
---
[Visit our website](https://eliforcolorado.cmail19.com/t/t-l-cklurdl-ykykmujid-j/)
| | |
**“December 7th, 1941; a date which will live in infamy.”**
President Franklin D. Roosevelt encapsulated America’s sentiment eighty years ago today.
The attack on Pearl Harbor launched us into a war that would change the course of history.
As the decades pass by, the attacks on Pearl Harbor drift further from American minds. Many feel less connected with those who experienced that day in person.
**We shouldn’t let that be the case.****Today, take time to thank and recognize the generations before us who fought against true evil to**** _protect freedom at home and abroad.
_**

---
| | **Signed,**
---
**Eli Bremer**
| | | |
---

we're spreading our message [](https://dhcampaign.cmail20.com/t/t-l-ckrjkul-yuykitnyh-r/) Fellow Patriot, I'm excited to announce our new **[statewide TV ad campaign](https://dhcampaign.cmail20.com/t/t-l-ckrjkul-yuykitnyh-y/).** [](https://dhcampaign.cmail20.com/t/t-l-ckrjkul-yuykitnyh-j/) We have made so much progress since launching this campaign, and I am excited to enter this next stage. Everywhere I go, supporters tell me how much our message resonates with their families and neighbors. With this new ad, I am confident that our platform will be met with enthusiasm from Texans hearing of our campaign.I want to express my gratitude to you, and all of our supporters that have done so much to spread our message. This race is a referendum on RINO politics. When patriotic Texans like you stand up, the establishment can't win. _**[Please consider donating $5, $25, $50, or even $500 to help us stay on TV and keep the flame of liberty burning bright in Texas.](https://dhcampaign.cmail20.com/t/t-l-ckrjkul-yuykitnyh-t/)**_ When I am governor, I will fight as hard for them as they are fighting for me.For Texas, [](https://dhcampaign.cmail20.com/t/t-l-ckrjkul-yuykitnyh-i/) Don Huffines for Governor

name: Donald J. Trump
subject: Stacey Abrams doesn't want you to see this, Peter📰
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Perdue for Governor, Inc
body:
I have big news.

**
From the Desk of Donald J. Trump**
_45th President of the United States_

Peter,

As one of my top supporters, I wanted you to be among the first to know that **I am giving my _complete and total endorsement_ to David Perdue as the next Governor of the great state of Georgia**.

David is a true patriot who is committed to getting Georgia back on track, but this is going to be a very tough fight. Stacey Abrams and the radical Left have been laying the groundwork and building up their war chests to flip Georgia blue since her embarrassing loss three years ago.

_I am asking you to rush in a donation of any amount to David 's campaign so he can get a head start in what will be the biggest fundraising race anyone has ever seen. _

**Become a Trump Georgia Patriot - Donate in the next 15 minutes:**

****[DONATE $500](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58958242:J6ia4sENJ:m:1:3253819041:8C7CC0ABC8631BD88A20347AF0FD419A:r)****
****

******[DONATE $250](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58958243:J6ia4sENJ:m:1:3253819041:8C7CC0ABC8631BD88A20347AF0FD419A:r)******
********

********[DONATE $100](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58958244:J6ia4sENJ:m:1:3253819041:8C7CC0ABC8631BD88A20347AF0FD419A:r)********

**********[DONATE $25](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58958245:J6ia4sENJ:m:1:3253819041:8C7CC0ABC8631BD88A20347AF0FD419A:r)**********

**********[DONATE A CUSTOM AMOUNT](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58958246:J6ia4sENJ:m:1:3253819041:8C7CC0ABC8631BD88A20347AF0FD419A:r)**********

I cannot be any more clear: Georgia will be GROUND ZERO in 2022.

All eyes have been on Georgia since Stacey REFUSED to concede her race in 2018 -- she still thinks she's Governor!

**It 's time for strong, principled, CONSERVATIVE leadership in Georgia, which is why I back David one hundred percent.** I could always count on David to fight for the American people and me in the U.S. Senate, and I know that as Governor, he will deliver on his promises and make Georgia great again!

**David is not afraid to go toe-to-toe with the Woke Democrats and stand up for what 's right. What about you, Peter?**

[**< < RUSH DONATE >>**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58958246:J6ia4sENJ:m:1:3253819041:8C7CC0ABC8631BD88A20347AF0FD419A:r)

I am asking you personally to join our movement -- don't let me down.

Donald J. Trump
45th President of the United States

name: Jim Jordan
subject: We need only 6000 donations to close out the books
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jim Jordan for Congress
body:
| [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58959652:6KC75sEFN:m:1:3298722022:12ED94F7855CDFFF1F3E3F9C2989FE45:r)
---

Peter,

Before we ask you to **[make a contribution of $3 or more today](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58959652:6KC75sEFN:m:1:3298722022:12ED94F7855CDFFF1F3E3F9C2989FE45:r)** , we want you to know just how incredibly thankful we are that you're a part of our team. You're invaluable.

Conservatives like you donate to campaigns like ours for many different reasons. Perhaps it's the candidates themselves you like. Or maybe you really dislike the member of Congress who represents you, so you give to their opponent. Whatever the reason, more than 194,000 conservatives have made a contribution to our campaign to take back the House this year.

**All I can say is that your support humbles me**. ** **

Having said that, we've not yet met our goal for the year. **With just one month left before we close out the books on 2021, we 're still in need of finding 6,000 additional donations to meet our yearly goal of 200,000 contributions!**

If you've donated this year already, thank you.**[Would you consider matching your previous donation](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58959652:6KC75sEFN:m:1:3298722022:12ED94F7855CDFFF1F3E3F9C2989FE45:r)** once more before the end of the month (**tonight at midnight**)?

Maybe you've read our emails without having ever made a contribution, so for those of you in that boat I want to share some quick donation statistics:

_**The average donation to our operation is $29.75**_**
_The average donor donates 3.55 times over the course of time_
_On average, the time between donations is 244 days!_**

If every single person who opened this email today were to make a contribution of**[even just $1](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58959652:6KC75sEFN:m:1:3298722022:12ED94F7855CDFFF1F3E3F9C2989FE45:r)** , we'd hit our yearly donor goal by this evening. On average, about 60,000 individuals read our emails, so you might see how that would add up quickly!

We're humbly asking for you to help us hit our 2021 goal of 200,000 contributions by making a gift today. Time is running short. **[Are you able to make your gift right now](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58959652:6KC75sEFN:m:1:3298722022:12ED94F7855CDFFF1F3E3F9C2989FE45:r)**?

[**MAKE DONATION #200,000 ->**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58959652:6KC75sEFN:m:1:3298722022:12ED94F7855CDFFF1F3E3F9C2989FE45:r)

Thank you,
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58959652:6KC75sEFN:m:1:3298722022:12ED94F7855CDFFF1F3E3F9C2989FE45:r)
Jim

| | Paid for by Jim Jordan for Congress

PO BOX 355
Delaware, OH 43015

name: Rebecca Kleefisch
subject: I was attacked -
disclaimer_text: Paid for by People for Rebecca
body:
For saying Republicans need to get serious about winning this battleground state.
| [](https://email.granitelists.com/ct/59280857:WNegYEHKN:m:1:1155937413:FD5B59A77E33BD208949C13339454524:r)
---
Peter,
---
For years, Democrats have used ballot harvesting to win critical elections -- and like it or not, it's worked. The game the Left is playing is dirty... plain and simple.
---
But my determination to FIRE radical liberal Tony Evers and take back the great state of Wisconsin for conservatives is steadfast.
---
**_In order to create change we MUST be willing to do everything legal we can to WIN, including beating the Left at their own game._**
---
_Anyone who attacks us for that determination lacks the will to win this fight. We cannot fix a broken system from the outside. First, we need to win this TOSS-UP governor's race._
---
**[Please make a contribution to help me mobilize the voters we need to FIRE Tony Evers by beating him at his own game.](https://email.granitelists.com/ct/59280857:WNegYEHKN:m:1:1155937413:FD5B59A77E33BD208949C13339454524:r)**
---
**[CONTRIBUTE $25](https://email.granitelists.com/ct/59280858:WNegYEHKN:m:1:1155937413:FD5B59A77E33BD208949C13339454524:r)**
---
**[CONTRIBUTE $50](https://email.granitelists.com/ct/59280859:WNegYEHKN:m:1:1155937413:FD5B59A77E33BD208949C13339454524:r)**
---
**[CONTRIBUTE $75](https://email.granitelists.com/ct/59280860:WNegYEHKN:m:1:1155937413:FD5B59A77E33BD208949C13339454524:r)**
---
**[CONTRIBUTE $100](https://email.granitelists.com/ct/59280861:WNegYEHKN:m:1:1155937413:FD5B59A77E33BD208949C13339454524:r)**
---
**[CONTRIBUTE $250](https://email.granitelists.com/ct/59280862:WNegYEHKN:m:1:1155937413:FD5B59A77E33BD208949C13339454524:r)**
---
**[CONTRIBUTE OTHER AMOUNT](https://email.granitelists.com/ct/59280857:WNegYEHKN:m:1:1155937413:FD5B59A77E33BD208949C13339454524:r)**
---
We already have a clear edge among registered Wisconsin voters, Peter.
---
Wisconsin's most conservative congressional district has nearly __100,000 more__ registered voters than its liberal counterpart.
---
But we can't allow this advantage to go to waste...
---
If we become complacent while the Left plays by a different set of rules, it doesn't matter how many voters we register.
---
That's why I'm counting on YOUR sustained support to get the infrastructure in place to mobilize every last conservative voter and ensure their ballots are counted.
---
**[So please, make a contribution to help me mobilize the voters we need to FIRE Tony Evers and FLIP the battleground state of Wisconsin.](https://email.granitelists.com/ct/59280857:WNegYEHKN:m:1:1155937413:FD5B59A77E33BD208949C13339454524:r)**
---
Thank you,

name: Herschel Walker
subject: Down to the wire
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC
body:
If we're going to have the necessary funds to compete with the top Democrat fundraiser in the country, then we cannot miss our fundraising goals. |
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58958297:6F5g0sE_N:m:1:3253819041:B223D56BBBC08FA5616C593D29F29B61:r)

---
Peter - Democrats know it. And we know it, too.

The Senate race in Georgia will go down to the wire. Democrats are going to spend whatever it takes to keep their politician in the Senate. Take a look at the panicked email they recently sent:

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58958297:6F5g0sE_N:m:1:3253819041:B223D56BBBC08FA5616C593D29F29B61:r)
The Democrats are on a roll with their fundraising. Their supporters understand what's at stake - control of the U.S. Senate and the fate of the Biden-Schumer-Pelosi agenda. In Georgia, we're running against the #1 fundraising senator in the country who already has $17 million in his campaign war chest.

Our campaign is being aggressive in our fundraising, but we're behind our December goal - by a significant amount. We hate writing emails like this nearly a year from Election Day, **but we must hit every fundraising goal along the way if we're going to have the necessary funds to win next November.**

**[In an effort to get back on course, we're asking 1,500 conservatives to make a donation of $10 or more before midnight tonight.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58958297:6F5g0sE_N:m:1:3253819041:B223D56BBBC08FA5616C593D29F29B61:r)**

_The last thing that we want is for complacency to set in. While some conservatives believe we have the wind at our back after Republicans swept the top races in Virginia, that doesn't translate into automatic victory next year. Far from it._

**We must block, tackle, and excel at the basics of campaigning - like raising money, organizing volunteers, and registering voters - to win. **

[**Chip in $10 ->**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58958298:6F5g0sE_N:m:1:3253819041:B223D56BBBC08FA5616C593D29F29B61:r)
[**Chip in $34 ->**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58958299:6F5g0sE_N:m:1:3253819041:B223D56BBBC08FA5616C593D29F29B61:r)
[**Donate _MORE_ ->**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58958297:6F5g0sE_N:m:1:3253819041:B223D56BBBC08FA5616C593D29F29B61:r)
We know the holiday season is upon us. Soon, Election Day will be here too. The future of the country is on the line, so we are humbly asking for you to help us get back on track today.

Thank you,

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58958297:6F5g0sE_N:m:1:3253819041:B223D56BBBC08FA5616C593D29F29B61:r)
Herschel Walker
Republican Candidate for Senate

[**Donate Today ->**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58958297:6F5g0sE_N:m:1:3253819041:B223D56BBBC08FA5616C593D29F29B61:r)

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58958300:6F5g0sE_N:m:1:3253819041:B223D56BBBC08FA5616C593D29F29B61:r) [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58958301:6F5g0sE_N:m:1:3253819041:B223D56BBBC08FA5616C593D29F29B61:r) [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58958302:6F5g0sE_N:m:1:3253819041:B223D56BBBC08FA5616C593D29F29B61:r) [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58958303:6F5g0sE_N:m:1:3253819041:B223D56BBBC08FA5616C593D29F29B61:r)

| | PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC.

Hello,
I don’t want the NRA’s money. The only thing I want from them is an “F” rating so I can wear it like a badge of honor. But not my opponent Chuck Grassley.
Less than 90 days ago, Grassley took yet another check from the NRA. And last week, the NRA got exactly what they paid for: **Days after 4 more kids were murdered in a school shooting, Chuck Grassley stood up and BLOCKED a bill requiring universal background checks for gun purchases.** Most Americans find his actions deplorable.
There is a gun violence epidemic in this country, and we need to finally pass meaningful gun safety reform. The only way we’ll get it done, though, is by electing more bold Democrats willing to stand up to the NRA and all their blood money.
**I’m running against Chuck Grassley, and the polls show we can win. But I need your help if we’re going to defeat Grassley and the NRA:**
[**Please, before our fundraising deadline at midnight tonight, will you chip in $5 or whatever you can afford to my campaign? Peter, The Oxford School shooting is a horrific tragedy.

And the Radical Left is trying to use this event to enact gun control, engage in fear-mongering, and chip away at our liberties.

It’s time for Republicans to lead and stand up to the Radical Left who cheer on “gun-free school zones” that leave our children and teachers defenseless.

I’m officially introducing legislation in Michigan to arm teachers who wish to defend their students. No more sitting back and caving to RINOs and the do-nothing Democrats. Our children need America-First leadership. However... since I made this announcement all hell has broken loose. I made a simple statement that Democrats and the media want to use to destroy my campaign, _"When tragedy occurs in our schools, we need to be more prepared to defend our children... not less!"._

It’s time for Republicans to lead and stand up to the Radical Left who cheer on “gun-free school zones” that leave our children and teachers defenseless. I’m officially introducing legislation in Michigan to arm teachers who wish to defend their students. No more sitting back and caving to RINOs and the do-nothing Democrats. Our children need America-First leadership. However... since I made this announcement all hell has broken loose. I made a simple statement that Democrats and the media want to use to destroy my campaign, "When tragedy occurs in our schools, we need to be more prepared to defend our children... not less!". My legislation is generating headlines on several local news outlets including WLNS, ABC 12News, and Fox 17 West Michigan. We must empower teachers to FIGHT BACK in the event of a shooting. Sitting back and watching tragedy unfold is not a solution. And yet, that is EXACTLY what the Radical Left is proposing. I am fighting to keep our schools safer, empower teachers, and advance the Second Amendment. I expect to receive major backlash in the media and from Democrats who wish to destroy me. This is why I am officially announcing my End-of-Year fundraising drive with a goal of raising $50,000 from online supporters before December 31st at 11:59 PM. Please help me FIGHT for the Second Amendment and win this primary by donating below: | | | | | | | Help me WIN this fight by making a donation to my campaign. I am counting on your help. Will you step up to this fight? Steve Carra Michigan Candidate for Congress Personal cell phone number: 269-267-4641 | | | Steve Carra for Congress, PO Box 404, Three Rivers, MI 49093, United States

In the weeks to come, everyone -- from the national media to Gov. DeSantis himself -- will be watching to see if we’ve got what it takes to win this election.

name: Mark Kelly
subject: A humble request
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Seth Moulton for Congress
body:
| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39459725/319933476/1927938479?refcode=20211208_MK_split&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NmJhMGM1My0zNzU4LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=BHJn8UyZRb2DmOqLvxZUSgX2mF37NkaWPudrw8WLDdc=)
Friends — In just a moment, I’m going to ask you to contribute to my re-election campaign before midnight tonight. Please give me a chance to explain why this request — especially today — is so important. Here’s the truth: We’re less than one year out from Election day. And our December deadline is nearly here. But this goal is important for a few more reasons. First, a National Republican Super PAC is running ads to defeat me in this race, and we need the resources to withstand the attack. Now, the reason we’re facing so many attacks is because CNN ranks this seat as one of the most likely to flip in 2022. And our official race ranking just changed from Lean Democratic to Pure Toss Up. But our secret weapon against the corporate special interests is you. Because if we have the resources we need, we’re going to win. It would be the honor of a lifetime to serve Arizona for a full term, but I can’t do that alone. So here’s where I ask: [**Can you please split a contribution to Seth Moulton and our campaign before the December fundraising deadline comes to an end? I would not ask if it weren’t so important. **](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39459726/319933477/1927938479?refcode=20211208_MK_split&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NmJhMGM1My0zNzU4LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=BHJn8UyZRb2DmOqLvxZUSgX2mF37NkaWPudrw8WLDdc=) [Donate](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39459727/319933478/-1534947712?refcode=20211208_MK_split&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NmJhMGM1My0zNzU4LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=BHJn8UyZRb2DmOqLvxZUSgX2mF37NkaWPudrw8WLDdc=)
Thank you, —Mark

So here’s where I ask: = = Thank you, —Mark = If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please . | Paid for by Seth Moulton for Congress Contributions to Seth Moulton For Congress are not deductible as charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes. An individual or federal PAC may contribute up to $2,900 per election; $5,800 per cycle. Contributions from corporations, labor unions, federal government contractors, and foreign nationals (non-citizens without “green cards”) are prohibited. Federal law requires our best efforts to obtain and report the name, address,occupation, and employer of individual contributors. Seth Moulton for Congress PO Box 2013 Salem, MA 01970 United States

name: Eden, Megan, Jimena, and Annie
subject: 2 PACs. 4 women with a dream.
body:
Nice to meet you, Peter! 👋

| | | [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/39460281/319936093/1300596418?refcode=211208_FR_welcome1dreamteam_logo&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg5Mzc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImY4MzYyNTE5LTM4NTgtZWMxMS05NGY2LTAwNTBmMmU2NWU5YiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=jJNjUttbzTD_T_NdwMlaAPvYA5_RQtnMidphAuDOQPg=)
---
Peter,

At _**Barrier to Entry PAC**_ and _**Pay Your Interns PAC**_ , we pride ourselves in authentically living our values as we work together to build a more equitable, inclusive government -- starting with dismantling socioeconomic barriers to entry into the political space.

Our two sister PACs began as a passion project. Led by a dream team of four determined young women who share the vision of achieving meaningful social change through lifting up the voices of everyday people, in just 6 months, we have built a community dedicated to making sure working-class people have a seat at the table in Democratic politics.

_**And as a truly scrappy, grassroots movement, your advocacy and support is critical to our success -- which is why we want to make sure you feel like part of the team by personally introducing ourselves to you today!**_ [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/39460284/319936101/1300596418?refcode=211208_FR_welcome1dreamteam_imghead&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg5Mzc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImY4MzYyNTE5LTM4NTgtZWMxMS05NGY2LTAwNTBmMmU2NWU5YiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=jJNjUttbzTD_T_NdwMlaAPvYA5_RQtnMidphAuDOQPg=) [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/39460286/319936110/1300596418?refcode=211208_FR_welcome1dreamteam_img1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg5Mzc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImY4MzYyNTE5LTM4NTgtZWMxMS05NGY2LTAwNTBmMmU2NWU5YiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=jJNjUttbzTD_T_NdwMlaAPvYA5_RQtnMidphAuDOQPg=)
**Eden McKissick-Hawley, Founder**
After working as a campaign manager and finance director for women running for office, Eden saw the impacts of a system designed to keep working people on the sidelines. Time and time again, she heard the same questions being asked of her candidates by national groups: “How much money can you put into your own campaign?” “How quickly can you quit your job and campaign full time?” “How much money can you raise out of your personal network?” After the 2020 election cycle, she started an organization specifically designed to address systemic issues. Her ultimate goal is to lift up working-class and middle-class change makers rather than discouraging them from being a part of the political system. When Eden is not in a fit of rage over the state of American politics, she can be found making bagels, cooking, and spending time outside.
* * *
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/39460288/319936123/1300596418?refcode=211208_FR_welcome1dreamteam_img2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg5Mzc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImY4MzYyNTE5LTM4NTgtZWMxMS05NGY2LTAwNTBmMmU2NWU5YiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=jJNjUttbzTD_T_NdwMlaAPvYA5_RQtnMidphAuDOQPg=)
**Megan Nien-Yun Clark, Digital Director**
As an advocate for a variety of social causes in her community and a former teacher who saw the effects of socioeconomic inequalities first-hand starting in the education system, Megan returned to grad school to get her Master’s Degree in Digital Communications from Syracuse University with a vision to leverage cause-driven messaging across online platforms. She comes to BTE/PYI from a digital consulting firm that specialized in fundraising for progressive campaigns and nonprofits. Having built comprehensive digital programs for members of Congress, state delegation officials, as well as up-and-coming political outsiders, Megan is excited to continue pursuing her passions for social impact and creative digital strategy with us. In her spare time, Megan loves hanging with her dog Butters, kayaking, hiking, reading, and yoga.
* * *
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/39460291/319936140/1300596418?refcode=211208_FR_welcome1dreamteam_img3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg5Mzc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImY4MzYyNTE5LTM4NTgtZWMxMS05NGY2LTAwNTBmMmU2NWU5YiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=jJNjUttbzTD_T_NdwMlaAPvYA5_RQtnMidphAuDOQPg=)
**Jimena Esparza, Social Media Coordinator**
Jimena worked as a college and career advisor where she saw the massive socioeconomic inequalities that exist in our low-income communities and beyond. With several years of community organizing, Jimena comes to BTE/PYI with the firsthand knowledge of the deep distrust lower-income communities have with our elected officials on either side. Having seen the disconnect between our elected officials and working class communities, Jimena hopes to take part in transforming the system so that more people that look like members of the communities that shape our country can be represented in our election systems. In her spare time, Jimena enjoys hiking, camping, riding her bike, and cuddling with her cats, Walter and Nina.
* * *
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/39460293/319936153/1300596418?refcode=211208_FR_welcome1dreamteam_img3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg5Mzc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImY4MzYyNTE5LTM4NTgtZWMxMS05NGY2LTAwNTBmMmU2NWU5YiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=jJNjUttbzTD_T_NdwMlaAPvYA5_RQtnMidphAuDOQPg=)
**Annie Savage, Creative Director**
With a passion for creativity and fundraising, Annie joined the political space in 2020 after graduating with a degree in communications. During her time as a campaign intern, she was humbled to be able to work unpaid hours but quickly began to realize that was not the case for everyone. Her eyes were opened to the financial burdens the political industry put on hard-working people. It fueled her involvement with BTE/PYI in hopes of transforming the political space in a creative way. Annie wants to continue her growth of knowledge while putting a fun twist on its visual look. Annie's childhood hero was Elenor Roosevelt and today admires progressives like AOC and Cori Bush. She hopes to someday make an impact like them through her art. Fun Fact: she loves classic rock and was definitely born in the wrong decade.
* * *
**While the four of us might be at the helm of this movement, we know that in order to have a powerful impact, we must continue expanding our team with like-minded, passionate, and talented individuals who reflect our values.**

[**That’s why we’re asking you today to pitch in anything you can to help us recruit volunteers, mobilize supporters, hire more staff, and garner as much grassroots advocacy as we can. Will you rush a contribution right now to help strengthen our movement and support our growing team?**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/39460296/319936166/1300596418?refcode=211208_FR_welcome1dreamteam_L1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg5Mzc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImY4MzYyNTE5LTM4NTgtZWMxMS05NGY2LTAwNTBmMmU2NWU5YiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=jJNjUttbzTD_T_NdwMlaAPvYA5_RQtnMidphAuDOQPg=) **______[DONATE](https://click.everyaction.com/k/39460297/319936173/1300596418?refcode=211208_FR_welcome1dreamteam_b1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg5Mzc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImY4MzYyNTE5LTM4NTgtZWMxMS05NGY2LTAwNTBmMmU2NWU5YiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=jJNjUttbzTD_T_NdwMlaAPvYA5_RQtnMidphAuDOQPg=)** Thanks for standing with us! **_Eden, Megan, Jimena, and Annie_**

While the four of us might be at the helm of this movement, we know that in order to have a powerful impact, we must continue expanding our team with like-minded, passionate, and talented individuals who reflect our values. = ____= Thanks for standing with us! **That starts by putting a strong, conservative fighter in charge, which is why I am very proud to endorse David Perdue as the next Governor of Georgia.**

I know the Woke Democrats and Fake News Liberal Media are going to start their attacks on David and me before you even finish reading this email, so I am asking you to DOUBLE DOWN on your support by donating to David's campaign before Midnight so we can show the Left we're not afraid of a fight.

body:
| **REMINDER:** We’re hosting a virtual event tonight, December 8th at 8:00 p.m. EST with special guest Ken Jeong!

[Click here to give $50 and claim your spot at the event!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39463075/319946996/-596807632?source=AA_EM_INV_1MO_211208_1_2&refcode2=&contactdata=hB8vHL3ruTJI2El8Y0t5ofwdfjXpLCcNRpuF7g5VbLih1lUK%2FUtHO3FSwuOVHzwi&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzk0MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMTI4ZGFiOC0zYjU4LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xC1DQtqQKRVii9qzhb5_0Hf_MN8GSWShjNrq2vKeFcU=)
* * *
**_Original message from Dr. Annie:_**

I’m running for Congress because now more than ever, we need elected officials who put their trust in doctors and scientists.

I’ve been overwhelmed by the support from the scientific community for our campaign — including from Dr. Ken Jeong, who you probably know best as an actor and comedian from _The Hangover_ and _The Masked Singer_. Ken was a doctor before his acting career began, and he’s still a licensed physician today.

[I’d love to have you join me and Ken Jeong for a virtual event this Wednesday, December 8. Will you give $50 to secure your spot at this exclusive event?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39463076/319946997/-596807632?source=AA_EM_INV_1MO_211208_1_2&refcode2=&contactdata=hB8vHL3ruTJI2El8Y0t5ofwdfjXpLCcNRpuF7g5VbLih1lUK%2FUtHO3FSwuOVHzwi&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzk0MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMTI4ZGFiOC0zYjU4LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xC1DQtqQKRVii9qzhb5_0Hf_MN8GSWShjNrq2vKeFcU=)

name: News Wire
subject: EXCLUSIVE: Roger Stone Asserts Fifth Amendment Rights in Jan 6 Probe, Citing Congressional Partisanship and a History of Leaks and Lies
body:
| [](https://DIQ27272.trk.directiq13.com/click/?sid=00ab0c0ppmpk2aok2o2wkpm&linkid=0&link=229390316c13474ea869837634680196)
---
| [
](https://DIQ27272.trk.directiq13.com/click/?sid=00ab0c0ppmpk2aok2o2wkpm&linkid=1&link=d6a76027f660492087ebf8f68c0b0205) Longtime political operative and Trump advisor Roger Stone has formally notified **the secretive (and highly partisan)** January 6th Committee of the United States House of Representatives that he will not comply with their document request or demands for a deposition asserting his Fifth Amendment Rights, **according to a two-page letter Stone 's lawyer sent to the Committee which was obtained by The Gateway Pundit.** Stone has said repeatedly that he was not on The Ellipse, did not march to the Capitol and was not present at the Capitol on January 6th. Various fake news outlets have attempted to utilize the technique of "Guilt by Association" in order to falsely connect Stone to the illegal events of January 6th. In fact, Reuters reported in August that senior FBI officials had investigated and [found no evidence that Roger Stone was involved](https://DIQ27272.trk.directiq13.com/click/?sid=00ab0c0ppmpk2aok2o2wkpm&linkid=2&link=bf515b3ad093457bb51dffb125c25570) in the January 6th incidents at the Capitol. Stone has also objected to broad attempts by Democrats and those in the media to falsely claim that Stone's appearances at two legally-permitted events on January 5th somehow led to the illegal actions of a handful on January 6th. "_They are trying to criminalize perfectly legal and constitutionally protected political activity, " Stone has said. "On January 5th, I exercised my right to Free Speech, Free Assembly in petitioning the government for redress of grievances,_" Stone said. In the letter, signed by longtime Stone attorney Grant Smith, he highlights his clients constitutionally protected right to assert the Fifth Amendment, citing first **Watkins v. United States (1957)** to remind them of the longstanding legal precedent regarding the fifth amendment, especially as it relates to testimonies before congress. Additionally, Smith cites an additional case, **Ohio vs. Reiner (2001).** When it comes to Ohio v. Reiner, the Supreme Court affirmed that the Fifth Amendment "protects innocent men who might be ensnared by ambiguous circumstances". **Here, given the current leaks from the Select Committee regarding Mr. Stone surfacing in press, in Congress, and, according to news reports, within the Department of Justices ' offices, Mr. Stone certainly has a reasonable basis to protect himself from the "ambiguous circumstances" that clearly exist and many have embraced.** The letter slammed the document request of the January 6th Committee as a "**fishing expedition** " that is overbroad and overreaching, including requests that are "imprecise" and "**undefined**." Smith argues that such requests, given the fact that the press has stated that Stone is "**under investigation** " by the FBI and DOJ, would amount to a "testimonial act," which would defeat the purpose Mr. Stone asserted based on his constitutionally protected Fifth Amendment rights. The letter goes on to discuss the January 6th Committee's chief purpose, which includes the investigation of the events leading up to January 6th, as a false premise that legally protected free speech and the right to petition the government for redress of grievances somehow lead to the illegal acts of January 6th. The letter closes by reminding the January 6th Committee Chairman Bernie Thompson of Mr. Stone's previous interaction with the House Permanent Select Committee on Intelligence (HPSCI), where Stone testified before in 2017. **In the weeks, months, and years following his appearance, Mr. Stone was subjected to a torrent of leaks regarding his classified testimony, in violation of House Rules.** At this point, a reference is made to Congressman Adam Schiff, who is a member of the HPSCI and the January 6th Committee, for "**relentlessly misinterpreting** " the evidence regarding Mr. Stone, including "**wholly unsubstantiated allegations regarding alleged Russian collusion** ," that not even the Mueller team could substantiate. Stone specifically claims that Schiff repeatedly violated both House Rules and the law by leaking details of Stone's testimony which were classified. Schiff openly misrepresented Stone's testimony in various media appearances, also a flagrant violation of House Rules. Stone called out Schiff's illegal leaks in a 2020 [op-ed for The Daily Caller](https://DIQ27272.trk.directiq13.com/click/?sid=00ab0c0ppmpk2aok2o2wkpm&linkid=3&link=3e191950163042518fe8f92130653fdd). Stone's attorney also calls out January 6th Committee Chairman Bernie Thompson for his rabid anti-Trump bias, [citing a lawsuit that Thompson and other far-left Trump-hating Democrats filed over January 6th](https://DIQ27272.trk.directiq13.com/click/?sid=00ab0c0ppmpk2aok2o2wkpm&linkid=4&link=03f660b292454fe590fbf0c7bc401324) before the creation of the committee. Rightfully so, Stone's legal team also has concerns over the committee membership, which only includes two Republicans, **notable Trump-hating lunatics Liz Cheney and Adam Kinzinger**. House Speaker Pelosi famously denied any Republican that was pro-Trump a seat on the committee. Stone told this Gateway Pundit journalist. The Gateway Pundit reported this previously. Those looking to help Roger's legal defense against yet another witch-hunt fueled by Trump-hating Marxists may donate to his [legal defense fund here](https://DIQ27272.trk.directiq13.com/click/?sid=00ab0c0ppmpk2aok2o2wkpm&linkid=5&link=a4c139b89c724fd8aa8a9546dca5ef55). His wife Nydia, who has been tragically diagnosed with Stage 4 cancer, is fighting for her life and you may also help her by contributing to the [Stone Family Fund](https://DIQ27272.trk.directiq13.com/click/?sid=00ab0c0ppmpk2aok2o2wkpm&linkid=6&link=cb2b2f3f730b47c7bc19b57a5fb19083). [](https://DIQ27272.trk.directiq13.com/click/?sid=00ab0c0ppmpk2aok2o2wkpm&linkid=7&link=a270fd21b8d94e66a965b19950b83ff9)
---

[One-Click Unsubscribe](https://DIQ27272.trk.directiq13.com/unsubscribe/?sid=00ab0c0ppmpk2aok2o2wkpm) [Report Spam](https://DIQ27272.trk.directiq13.com/unsolicited/?sid=00ab0c0ppmpk2aok2o2wkpm) [Web Version](https://www.directiq13.com/IO/viewer3.aspx?sid=00ab0c0ppmpk2aok2o2wkpm)
---

body:
| My team wasn’t joking, friends — I really do need you to free me from call time. Take a look at their email below for what I’m talking about. Lucky for me (more importantly, lucky for Florida’s 15th District, and democracy for that matter), we’ve raised about 500 bucks towards our mid-month $2,000 goal! [_**Will you make a donation now to help us keep pace with our insurrectionist opponent, and get me off the phones?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39466290/319964692/-847830488?refcode=fl_email_fr_20211208freeeddie2_EG_main_xx_l1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjIyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiYTQ2YmE2Ny00NjU4LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=IHUy0nMBCQHro19o6SWTcQIMk_5qBoEBsNv6Vtx1zUQ=) | [Donate ➞](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39466291/319964693/-847830488?refcode=fl_email_fr_20211208freeeddie2_EG_main_xx_btn&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjIyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiYTQ2YmE2Ny00NjU4LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=IHUy0nMBCQHro19o6SWTcQIMk_5qBoEBsNv6Vtx1zUQ=)

I’ll just be here, dialing away but driven by the fact that our current representative is anti-choice, anti-labor, AND anti-democracy. I’m doing my best to fix it, and if that means I have to call another 48 people before dinner, so be it.
Thanks for your support!
Eddie

Hey friends —
One of the really unsexy things about running for Congress is ... *dun* *dun* *dunnn* ... **call time.**
As you may know, all campaigns rely on a combination of grassroots support (that’s you!) and “call time,” which is where a candidate calls through a list of reliable Democratic donors and asks them to contribute. And those two things make up the bulk of our fundraising sources, since Eddie won’t accept a dime of the corporate PAC money that is the bread and butter of our corrupt opponent.
[Donate ➞](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39466293/319964695/-847830488?refcode=fl_email_fr_20211208freeeddie2_EG_main_xx_btn2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjIyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiYTQ2YmE2Ny00NjU4LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=IHUy0nMBCQHro19o6SWTcQIMk_5qBoEBsNv6Vtx1zUQ=)
---
Unfortunately, fundraising has been tough the last few weeks, and we’re hitting a wall financially. Which means we have to force poor Eddie to spend endless hours locked in a windowless room with only a landline, a list of phone numbers, and fundraising goals that he _must_ hit before we let him out.
**What Eddie wants, more than anything, is to spend more time with people out in the community (safely and with proper COVID-19 protocols!).** But we also absolutely have to raise cash to be able to take on Scott Franklin’s dark money machine and flip this seat for Democrats.
[**And that’s where you come in—will you chip in to help Eddie spend less time dialing for dollars and more time out in the community? We need to raise $2,000 from grassroots donations by the middle of the month to keep pace with our opponent, and any amount goes a long way!**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39466294/319964696/-847830488?refcode=fl_email_fr_20211208freeeddie2_EG_main_xx_l2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjIyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiYTQ2YmE2Ny00NjU4LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=IHUy0nMBCQHro19o6SWTcQIMk_5qBoEBsNv6Vtx1zUQ=)

body:
