_Do you believe Roe v. Wade should be the law of the land?_** | [YES](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39466736/319967654/496553084?refcode=ea.52dfd947-4858-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ms=ea.52dfd947-4858-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MmRmZDk0Ny00ODU4LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9zAghcJSLqlGjNifSf40VeLN64M9aLh6nRPeb5yHNoc=&emci=287abc9a-8457-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&emdi=52dfd947-4858-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ceid=1049176) | [NO](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39466742/319967658/496553084?refcode=ea.52dfd947-4858-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ms=ea.52dfd947-4858-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MmRmZDk0Ny00ODU4LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9zAghcJSLqlGjNifSf40VeLN64M9aLh6nRPeb5yHNoc=&emci=287abc9a-8457-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&emdi=52dfd947-4858-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ceid=1049176)
---|---
Peter —
The U.S. Supreme Court recently heard arguments over Mississippi’s 15-week abortion ban, setting up what might be the most consequential ruling on reproductive rights in a generation.
As it stands, the conservative-majority Court appears ready to _overturn_ _Roe v. Wade_ — despite the fact that _Roe_ is the Court’s own precedent.
If (and when) _Roe_ is overturned, 21 states have laws that would immediately ban abortion in all or most cases. **Radical right-wingers are closer than ever to achieving their decades-long goal of defeating the constitutional right to abortion.**
Here in North Carolina, if Republicans gain supermajorities in Raleigh, they could institute an abortion ban for our state as well. With that in mind, we want to hear from you right now: Do you believe _Roe v. Wade_ should remain the law of the land?
[YES](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39466745/319967664/496553084?refcode=ea.52dfd947-4858-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ms=ea.52dfd947-4858-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MmRmZDk0Ny00ODU4LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9zAghcJSLqlGjNifSf40VeLN64M9aLh6nRPeb5yHNoc=&emci=287abc9a-8457-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&emdi=52dfd947-4858-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ceid=1049176) | [NO](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39466757/319967666/496553084?refcode=ea.52dfd947-4858-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ms=ea.52dfd947-4858-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MmRmZDk0Ny00ODU4LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9zAghcJSLqlGjNifSf40VeLN64M9aLh6nRPeb5yHNoc=&emci=287abc9a-8457-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&emdi=52dfd947-4858-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ceid=1049176)

name: Justin Atkins
subject: Contact your senators: Pass the For the People Act and John Lewis Voting Rights Act.
body:
This holiday season, we’re asking for voting rights protections.

| | | We’re doubling down on our fight to protect and expand voting rights. Urge the Senate to join us in this commitment.
---
| [Act now](https://click.everyaction.com/k/39466928/319967972/930511452?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNTkcvMS81NjE1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiYzEzZGU0ZC00ODU4LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=iSQn3AyLhPL8ZoM0_q_5YtriIQocHXyTBGYsbmQFZik=&emci=37e064e8-c456-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&emdi=bc13de4d-4858-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ceid=6787172) |
|
Friend,
**Every eligible American should be able to vote. Republicans have made it clear that they reject this fundamental premise of our democracy. **
They won’t stop us as we demand expanded ballot access nationwide.
**The Freedom to Vote Act and John Lewis Voting Rights Act** are a real chance at safeguarding our elections and promoting fair representation. The reforms proposed under these bills respond to our need for our voices to be heard in the decisions that govern our lives.
**They would make voting easier and more accessible, stop racist disenfranchisement tactics before they start, ban partisan gerrymandering, and put an end to the dangerous influence of dark money.**
Democrats must move swiftly to pass these transformative pieces of legislation or else we won’t have time to counter the attacks on our voting rights before the 2022 elections and before a decade of partisan gerrymandering takes hold.
**[Send a message, make a call, or both: Contact your senators to urge passage of the For the People Act and John Lewis Voting Rights Act.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/39466929/319967975/-635572489?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNTkcvMS81NjE1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiYzEzZGU0ZC00ODU4LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=iSQn3AyLhPL8ZoM0_q_5YtriIQocHXyTBGYsbmQFZik=&emci=37e064e8-c456-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&emdi=bc13de4d-4858-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ceid=6787172) **
Voting rights are under attack across this country and our democracy requires repair. The urgency for reform in this moment ahead of critical contests in 2022 is clear. We have a historic opportunity for sweeping voting rights protections — and we will not squander it.
**[Join us: Use our voting rights hub page to choose how you want to get involved in passing transformative voting rights legislation.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/39466931/319967976/2093310866?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNTkcvMS81NjE1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiYzEzZGU0ZC00ODU4LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=iSQn3AyLhPL8ZoM0_q_5YtriIQocHXyTBGYsbmQFZik=&emci=37e064e8-c456-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&emdi=bc13de4d-4858-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ceid=6787172) **

clean_body: This holiday season, we’re asking for voting rights protections. | | | We’re doubling down on our fight to protect and expand voting rights. Urge the Senate to join us in this commitment. | | | Friend, Every eligible American should be able to vote. Republicans have made it clear that they reject this fundamental premise of our democracy. They won’t stop us as we demand expanded ballot access nationwide. The Freedom to Vote Act and John Lewis Voting Rights Act are a real chance at safeguarding our elections and promoting fair representation. The reforms proposed under these bills respond to our need for our voices to be heard in the decisions that govern our lives. They would make voting easier and more accessible, stop racist disenfranchisement tactics before they start, ban partisan gerrymandering, and put an end to the dangerous influence of dark money. Democrats must move swiftly to pass these transformative pieces of legislation or else we won’t have time to counter the attacks on our voting rights before the 2022 elections and before a decade of partisan gerrymandering takes hold. Voting rights are under attack across this country and our democracy requires repair. The urgency for reform in this moment ahead of critical contests in 2022 is clear. We have a historic opportunity for sweeping voting rights protections — and we will not squander it. "CTA Button" Thanks for your time, Justin Atkins National Political Manager NextGen America | NextGen America 268 Bush St. #2919 San Francisco CA 94104-3503 This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com | =

name: Tobias Read
subject: Crisis
body:
If you read one campaign email today, let it be this one.
---
| | Dear Peter, I took some time yesterday to attend **[the opening of a new transitional housing shelter in Salem](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39467741/319971746/2095748170?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NzI2MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MmViMTYzYS00YTU4LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=CR-Uk1Gg6F77rDdc-AmQjU691oG3XAfyr75bepW9I5k=&emci=d9916c54-4858-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&emdi=92eb163a-4a58-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ceid=30662126)**. We’ve all read the news and heard the stories. But being there in person and listening to these Oregon stories firsthand allowed me to put reality to the statistics we hear every day. It’s heartbreaking. These are our neighbors, family and friends who are struggling every day, and our state has failed to act with the urgency that reflects the true scale of this crisis. **And it is a crisis.** We hear so often about the public safety and economic impacts of the homelessness crisis. But we don’t often hear about the people who are struggling, and who need some help to get back on their feet. People need housing, they need jobs, and they need healthcare. So many people I have spoken with have lived “normal” lives, but one crisis or untreated condition caused them to lose their housing and be forced out onto the streets and into shelters. **It’s clear what we’ve been doing isn’t working.** And while the opening I attended was certainly cause for celebration, we need a lot more such openings. As your Governor, I’ll be honest about the scope of the problem and resolute about what needs to be done to tackle it. I’ll hold people accountable, and require state agencies and local governments to act with urgency and make meaningful progress, not just empty promises. The good thing is that we have dollars available to address this crisis. Now we need commitment and focus. Not only will we help those who need it, but we’ll also be able to improve public health, public safety, and the economic strength of our cities and towns in the process. Let’s get this done.

Thank you,

---

---

Add your name now if you care about working families.
#
Peter,
**[Add your name now and join me in calling on EVERY Democratic Senator to support Build Back Better and expand access to pre-K, child care, and home health for our seniors.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39468048/319972999/-1472650260?ms=dd_em_211208_1&refcode=dd_em_211208_1&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Peter&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Peter&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODQ4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NThmMzg4NC00YjU4LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=6qhJky6XLgdvEJ3jcpp9_XpaMxIbZ3XYEJ91azWegmk=&emci=1186358f-9657-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&emdi=658f3884-4b58-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ceid=2727974)**
Let’s get real. Our economy is unequal. It’s time to Build Back Better.
**If anything is clear coming out of 2021, it’s that the decades-old Republican strategy of cutting taxes for the ultra-wealthy has led us nowhere.**
Mitch McConnell is trying to convince families that the best plan for our economy is for wealthy Americans to rebuild, but that’s just not the case.
Everyone, from single-mothers to our nation’s top economists, can tell you that the best way to stabilize our economy is by supporting working families.
**It’s time to raise taxes on the wealthiest and provide tax breaks for working families _UNLIKE_ the GOP tax cuts from four years ago.**
**[Do you agree that American families deserve better, Peter? Sign now if you think it’s time for every Democratic Senator to get on board and support Build Back Better.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39468049/319973000/-1472650260?ms=dd_em_211208_1&refcode=dd_em_211208_1&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Peter&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Peter&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODQ4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NThmMzg4NC00YjU4LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=6qhJky6XLgdvEJ3jcpp9_XpaMxIbZ3XYEJ91azWegmk=&emci=1186358f-9657-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&emdi=658f3884-4b58-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ceid=2727974)**
My best,
Dick Durbin

---
| It's been a bad couple of weeks for the Democrat Party's talking heads on cable news...
With Chris Cuomo's ethics fiasco, and with both Kyle Rittenhouse AND Matt Gaetz being vindicated recently after months of shameless Fake News smears, we were reminded once again that the mainstream media truly is the enemy of the people.

name: Diehl for Massachusetts
subject: Let's work together to empower parents and fix our public schools
body:
| | | |
---
---
---
|
---
Dear Friend,
I believe strongly that school should be a place of learning, not a social experiment.
Recently, I read an [article](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001nHcCoS8eHVqgthiluk2tbZIjUBdn1QTOZ2FUFgdrXORD2XRpgeju6CQwFVGNRFSRaZttSGvOAoGzKwAZoNNBbuxW7ChIUVkEW4qlsrP9wnGG1Vogm1ft92Lj5bkGFeaTg4qyD00a0Pr3plbiFgjcjRZPbBEwt4vf1_UVdllkZEH49ImPFIKzJ5Sl2Zx2sV5gYqTXKqUJgxuq1Hcwc4Fng3n9irqEViuiXa9FtbNL-Ff22wxHH4YRtQ==&c=x-BpT6lVxwJ2ac6h04kr92eGkCvmwWtv4rbmbAhCBRRpKP3aTcDy5w==&ch=ozrsqvSea-W9M2jwdHHZVjN0Y4X2F1KbYT95L44Prxlr_5d9mW1K6Q==) talking about how schools in California are going in the wrong direction. We can't afford to let the same thing happen here.
As your next Governor, I will keep educational curricula motivated by political agendas out of Massachusetts schools. And, I will support your rights to an innovative educational system, one that implements a rich and strong curriculum adapted for all children.
We need to provide our kids with the perspective of a bright future. And, we need to empower parents to make education decisions for their children.
There are [recent reports](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001nHcCoS8eHVqgthiluk2tbZIjUBdn1QTOZ2FUFgdrXORD2XRpgeju6CQwFVGNRFSRf-tIGD9drLOGHrJAFrsJ7xgN6tpKoVOdJvuUOf2By0yZWO_eln_3C5aSDtMvkuDHVefhihPAj_mvjYpfGYr6TvHv5X-Kb9rz2C9VbRTgor9rX7gk3YqNpsX4o2N6dpsEqcwe7hhP1qOp4D7nBZbUEiK5zer8JcJ4aSSsLy5LXQhpEwj-MuMANw==&c=x-BpT6lVxwJ2ac6h04kr92eGkCvmwWtv4rbmbAhCBRRpKP3aTcDy5w==&ch=ozrsqvSea-W9M2jwdHHZVjN0Y4X2F1KbYT95L44Prxlr_5d9mW1K6Q==) that enrollment in Massachusetts public schools is declining, quickly. That's unacceptable. Public education has strong roots here in Massachusetts, and our schools should be the pride of the nation.
Let's reverse the downward trend by making better education choices for our students and by including parents in the decision-making process.
Thanks, as always, for your support!
Sincerely,
---
---
Geoff Diehl Republican Candidate for Governor
---
---
|
---
| To Support the Geoff Diehl for Governor Campaign:
Send a check made payable to "Diehl for Massachusetts," to 7 Cataumet Street, Worcester, MA 01606. Or, you can donate online to: [Donate to Diehl! ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001nHcCoS8eHVqgthiluk2tbZIjUBdn1QTOZ2FUFgdrXORD2XRpgeju6KLYjKH6pbxQrYy_AhtO_oIOyO98VOFaj5HEIjMm0y27I4rHarLTyJAf4-mHyQs-wG_e1YdP9Ne63tDvtlBegcJ5kZzoCt0278MbbMela5dwuQ6Y3L2936-TJOZnmlHaXA==&c=x-BpT6lVxwJ2ac6h04kr92eGkCvmwWtv4rbmbAhCBRRpKP3aTcDy5w==&ch=ozrsqvSea-W9M2jwdHHZVjN0Y4X2F1KbYT95L44Prxlr_5d9mW1K6Q==)

name: Team Kilmer
subject: Good news for our democracy
disclaimer_text: Paid for by People for Derek Kilmer
body:
Peter,

Good news! The House is expected to take up the Protecting Our Democracy Act for a vote this week. Derek was proud to help introduce this legislation to strengthen our democratic institutions against future presidents who may seek to abuse the office's power.

During Donald Trump's presidency, he repeatedly endangered our democracy. He willfully obstructed justice, encouraged foreign interference in our elections, incited an insurrection, and tried to undermine the presidential election results. We need Congress to prevent future corruption like this from happening again by restoring the guardrails of our democratic systems.

The Protecting Our Democracy Act would start that work by restoring the government's system of checks and balances, strengthening accountability and transparency, and protecting America's elections from foreign interference. Now Derek needs your help showing strong support for this package of necessary reforms.

[**Will you show your support for the Protecting Our Democracy Act by adding your name as a citizen co-sponsor today? Add your name » **](https://act.myngp.com/el/H8PmkSYOxQWKJq_jO6QBO-IJGXkbhcniwece2UePe3c=/b9PxNbLMXOiHhGrfy8tIiOHv-ywICa1kGveOz8ns_hc=?ms=em21_211208_POD_adv_gq_act___TK_ettx&refcode=em21_211208_POD_adv_gq_act___TK_ettx&source=em21_211208_POD_adv_gq_act___TK_ettx&utm_campaign=em21_211208_POD_adv_gq_act___TK_ettx&utm_medium=email&contactdata={{ContactData}}
)

Even though Donald Trump is no longer president, his corruption exposed cracks in our democracy that need fixing to keep our democracy functioning. If we're going to preserve our democracy for future generations, we can take steps NOW to ensure no president gets away with undermining our institutions for personal gain.

Derek is committed to doing everything he can to ensure our democracy is strong. The Protecting Our Democracy Act will help restore, protect, and strengthen our democracy.

[**Sign on now to support Derek 's efforts to safeguard our democracy by passing the Protecting Our Democracy Act. Add your name as a citizen co-sponsor before the House brings it to a vote.**](https://act.myngp.com/el/H8PmkSYOxQWKJq_jO6QBO-IJGXkbhcniwece2UePe3c=/b9PxNbLMXOiHhGrfy8tIiOHv-ywICa1kGveOz8ns_hc=?ms=em21_211208_POD_adv_gq_act___TK_ettx&refcode=em21_211208_POD_adv_gq_act___TK_ettx&source=em21_211208_POD_adv_gq_act___TK_ettx&utm_campaign=em21_211208_POD_adv_gq_act___TK_ettx&utm_medium=email&contactdata={{ContactData}}
)

Thank you,

Team Kilmer

disclaimer_text: Paid for by Marcus for Georgia
body:
Marjorie Taylor Greene: Jan. 6 Defendants Are Being Taught Critical Race Theory In Jail

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39468242/319974027/-825069922?refcode=20211017_tf_biglie&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODkwNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMTgzZWU3ZC00YzU4LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=K8SfCHefzJm2_GtCxbvFfa2eSkaIslkP3wAEh9jMd5M=)

**Marjorie Taylor Greene: Jan. 6 Defendants Are Being Taught Critical Race Theory In Jail** Team, Marjorie Taylor Greene is at it again. Yesterday, she led fellow Trumpists Matt Gaetz (Fla), Louie Gohmert (Texas), and Paul Gosar (Ariz.) at a press conference to complain that the rioters charged in the January 6th Capitol insurrection are being “persecuted” in jail. **In the hour-long press conference, she claimed these rioters were “being taught critical race theory” and that they’re being subjected to “cramped” conditions.

It’s obvious that Marjorie Taylor Greene thinks it’s her responsibility in Congress to fight on behalf of MAGA-obsessed insurrectionists. name: Abby Finkenauer
subject: personally reaching out to you to say what your support would mean to me
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Abby for Iowa Abby for Iowa
body:
I know that with lots of hard work and unwavering grassroots support, we will flip this Senate seat blue.
| | |
---
Hi Peter,

I'm writing to you from my home in Cedar Rapids. I hope you had a wonderful Thanksgiving and are gearing up for a great holiday season. I'm reaching out to you personally today to ask that you make your very first contribution by donating $5. I promise it will make a meaningful impact in our race to defeat Sen. Chuck Grassley (R-IA). I hope you'll allow me a moment to explain.
Right now, polling from the Des Moines Register shows Sen. Grassley has a record-low approval rating with Iowa voters. He's vulnerable, and Republicans know that he's on thin ice. It's probably why the Senate Republican campaign arm has been actively attacking me, and they have nearly $30 million in the bank to go on attacking me and protecting their Trump-endorsed incumbent. I want you to hear this from me: I have every intention of winning this race, but I cannot do it without an unprecedented movement made up of people like you donating $5, $10, or $20 at a time. Your hard-earned dollars build up this movement.
Nearly $30 million in Republican money is a lot to compete with. The full backing of Mitch McConnell and Donald Trump is a lot to compete with. But we _can_ compete and win if we build up the strongest grassroots movement possible! That's why, ahead of our last public FEC reporting deadline of the year, it's so important that you make your first contribution of $5 or whatever you can spare to defeat Sen. Grassley. The best link to donate is right here: **[https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/abby-finkenauer-email](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39468558/319975595/805649176?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk482-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MzU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ZjhlYWE0Ni00ZjU4LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=t_CDRe9j8cuXDC1w3F2FM7veutRfC62gxNr3u0tdIlI=)**
I am not someone who backs down from a challenge, and I've gone up against people like Sen. Grassley before: I won an election against a man double my age, flipped a House seat blue and became the youngest woman to pass legislation through the House. Still, as a young woman in public service, I can't count the number of times I've been underestimated or counted out.
The pundits and so-called experts will say what they want to say, but at the end of the day, I know that with lots of hard work and unwavering grassroots support, we will flip this Senate seat blue.
This is personal. Right now, working families in communities across Iowa are being failed by a senator who has left them behind. Those families are _my_ family. Dad was a union pipefitter-welder, and Mom worked for the Dubuque public school system. They inspired me to show up for my community, which is exactly why I'm running to defeat Sen. Grassley. It's time to lift up the voices of Iowa's working families in the Senate.
Peter, I appreciate you sticking with me as I write about what this race means to me. I'm going to bring this email to a close. But before I do, I've got to press the importance of building up a grassroots movement again. When you chip in $5, along with hundreds of other people, it adds up to something powerful. It adds up to a campaign that can compete and win. So please, will you make your first donation to help me win in Iowa and defeat Sen. Grassley? Here's that link again: **[https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/abby-finkenauer-email](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39468560/319975597/805649176?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk482-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MzU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ZjhlYWE0Ni00ZjU4LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=t_CDRe9j8cuXDC1w3F2FM7veutRfC62gxNr3u0tdIlI=)**
With so much gratitude,

Abby

clean_body: I know that with lots of hard work and unwavering grassroots support, we will flip this Senate seat blue. | | | Hi Peter, I'm writing to you from my home in Cedar Rapids. I hope you had a wonderful Thanksgiving and are gearing up for a great holiday season. I'm reaching out to you personally today to ask that you make your very first contribution by donating $5. I promise it will make a meaningful impact in our race to defeat Sen. Chuck Grassley (R-IA). I hope you'll allow me a moment to explain. Right now, polling from the Des Moines Register shows Sen. Grassley has a record-low approval rating with Iowa voters. He's vulnerable, and Republicans know that he's on thin ice. It's probably why the Senate Republican campaign arm has been actively attacking me, and they have nearly $30 million in the bank to go on attacking me and protecting their Trump-endorsed incumbent. I want you to hear this from me: I have every intention of winning this race, but I cannot do it without an unprecedented movement made up of people like you donating $5, $10, or $20 at a time. Your hard-earned dollars build up this movement. Nearly $30 million in Republican money is a lot to compete with. The full backing of Mitch McConnell and Donald Trump is a lot to compete with. But we can compete and win if we build up the strongest grassroots movement possible! That's why, ahead of our last public FEC reporting deadline of the year, it's so important that you make your first contribution of $5 or whatever you can spare to defeat Sen. Grassley. The best link to donate is right here: = I am not someone who backs down from a challenge, and I've gone up against people like Sen. Grassley before: I won an election against a man double my age, flipped a House seat blue and became the youngest woman to pass legislation through the House. Still, as a young woman in public service, I can't count the number of times I've been underestimated or counted out. The pundits and so-called experts will say what they want to say, but at the end of the day, I know that with lots of hard work and unwavering grassroots support, we will flip this Senate seat blue. This is personal. Right now, working families in communities across Iowa are being failed by a senator who has left them behind. Those families are my family. Dad was a union pipefitter-welder, and Mom worked for the Dubuque public school system. They inspired me to show up for my community, which is exactly why I'm running to defeat Sen. Grassley. It's time to lift up the voices of Iowa's working families in the Senate. Peter, I appreciate you sticking with me as I write about what this race means to me. I'm going to bring this email to a close. But before I do, I've got to press the importance of building up a grassroots movement again. When you chip in $5, along with hundreds of other people, it adds up to something powerful. It adds up to a campaign that can compete and win. So please, will you make your first donation to help me win in Iowa and defeat Sen. Grassley? Here's that link again: = With so much gratitude, Abby | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. To receive fewer emails, please click #!. To unsubscribe from this email list, please click . Paid for by Abby for Iowa Abby for Iowa PO Box 1843 Cedar Rapids, IA 52406 United States |

name: Ras Smith
subject: Roe v. Wade
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ras Smith for Governor
body:
If the Justices side with Mississippi, it will end Roe v. Wade and leave abortion law up to the states -- effectively banning the procedure in 26 states. |
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39468711/319976335/692104027?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODg5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1OWJjODI5ZC01MDU4LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=b5-G8tAmnXF0QsHQqegz9fXh4RinruKYpPwYbGts3k0=)
Friend,

Last week, the US Supreme Court heard oral arguments on a Mississippi law that bans abortion after 15 weeks. If the Justices side with Mississippi, it will end _Roe v. Wade_ and leave abortion law up to the states -- effectively banning the procedure in 26 states.

**Here in Iowa, we know all too well that women's reproductive rights are far too important to be left up to Republicans in the state legislature.** Earlier this year, they passed a law in an attempt to "clarify" that Iowans have no Constitutional right to abortion.

In a floor speech, I shared the story of my wife Amelia's ectopic pregnancy. The best case scenario was that she would lose her ability to be pregnant, and at the worst, she'd lose her life.

It was a harrowing experience for us both, and I'm glad we had a choice to protect her life. That choice isn't always available to all women, and will be legally restricted in many states if SCOTUS sides with Mississippi.

Today, I'm urging the US Senate to pass the **Women's Health Protection Act** \-- a bill recently passed by the House. It protects the right to access reproductive care at the federal level.

[**Will you add your name next to mine in support of the Women's Health Protection Act? I'm aiming to get 1,000 supporters signed on in support by tonight. We must support women's reproductive rights in the face of this challenge.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39468712/319976336/-1889318571?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODg5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1OWJjODI5ZC01MDU4LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=b5-G8tAmnXF0QsHQqegz9fXh4RinruKYpPwYbGts3k0=&emci=52bc829d-5058-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&emdi=59bc829d-5058-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ceid=21044445)
| **[Add your name →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39468713/319976337/-1889318571?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODg5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1OWJjODI5ZC01MDU4LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=b5-G8tAmnXF0QsHQqegz9fXh4RinruKYpPwYbGts3k0=&emci=52bc829d-5058-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&emdi=59bc829d-5058-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ceid=21044445)**
---

Thanks in advance,

Ras Smith
Democrat for Governor

clean_body: If the Justices side with Mississippi, it will end Roe v. Wade and leave abortion law up to the states -- effectively banning the procedure in 26 states. | = Friend, Last week, the US Supreme Court heard oral arguments on a Mississippi law that bans abortion after 15 weeks. If the Justices side with Mississippi, it will end Roe v. Wade and leave abortion law up to the states -- effectively banning the procedure in 26 states. Here in Iowa, we know all too well that women's reproductive rights are far too important to be left up to Republicans in the state legislature. Earlier this year, they passed a law in an attempt to "clarify" that Iowans have no Constitutional right to abortion. In a floor speech, I shared the story of my wife Amelia's ectopic pregnancy. The best case scenario was that she would lose her ability to be pregnant, and at the worst, she'd lose her life. It was a harrowing experience for us both, and I'm glad we had a choice to protect her life. That choice isn't always available to all women, and will be legally restricted in many states if SCOTUS sides with Mississippi. Today, I'm urging the US Senate to pass the Women's Health Protection Act \-- a bill recently passed by the House. It protects the right to access reproductive care at the federal level. | Thanks in advance, Ras Smith Democrat for Governor = | | Paid for by Ras Smith for Governor Ras Smith for Governor P. O. Box 1651 Waterloo, IA 50704 United States If you'd like to make a contribution to Ras' grassroots campaign, please chip in = If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please .

Peter,

Last month, President Biden and the Democrats in Congress passed the Bipartisan Infrastructure Framework (BIF) into law.

This landmark legislation is a critical first step to stronger, more resilient, and cleaner infrastructure for our communities across Colorado and the United States.

**But Colorado has a C- from the American Society of Civil Engineers on our infrastructure report card.**

As a med school graduate — and the first in her family to go to college — we know Dr. Caraveo does not like to see those kinds of grades.

Thanks to the BIF, our grades could improve! Colorado will receive billions in funding to improve our highways, public transportation, high-speed broadband and airports, all while becoming more resilient to extreme weather and fighting the climate crisis.

As a grassroots movement, we make decisions as a team. And we want your input as we inform our campaign moving forward.

**[Do you approve of the BIF? Let us know in this quick survey >>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39468853/319977304/2138950816?refcode=ea.827464af-5058-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ms=ea.827464af-5058-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjUwOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4Mjc0NjRhZi01MDU4LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=YXneuwQKYul2KoSqpXR0T3LLq6ocwPr5_KhGO1OcCJs=&emci=762803c7-4358-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&emdi=827464af-5058-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ceid=12666102)**

He's lied about COVID from the very beginning. He lied about masks. He lied about funding gain of function research.

name: Brent Bozell
subject: The Art Of Taking Down A Leftwing Media Scumbag
body:
Allow me to break down how the Media Research Center took down Chris Cuomo from CNN. The Art Of Taking Down a Leftwing Media Sc
[View this message in your browser](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z43fbl9aed2n2n619sbpkp3jo02lhuirak0ovv9o_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf99jksrr0s3iekr79c9l6eon9d1hmej3fddnkgp7cc5kmdqjf972u9hf0sb3m5o7ddhhcaoncs9he4rr5cpkmpqe4o3nmcrbdc9h6phbcclm6ap70p1gmurt4s3ic9j71cj6e3ib6or0eao6csln6kpmfchhcoqm1cj6c3gbaor0s2qj2cdl66qn48d245p25oh4cdj61p70sdgm8ob24no)
[](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z9n4erlk67sv1nk5mvkima6ni5k0ggm6k1h9r8e0_rp22sh2s8i66pj0sjge6ob4c5h2bs)
Friend,

Allow me to break down how the Media Research Center took down Chris Cuomo from CNN.

**The Art Of Taking Down a Leftwing Media Scumbag: A Step By Step Guide**

* **FIRST:** Chris Cuomo used his position as a host on CNN to cover up his brother, New York Governor Andrew Cuomo's, total failures during the pandemic... but that's not the worst part.

Chris Cuomo used his position at CNN to LIE about Gov. Andrew Cuomo's sexual harassment allegations in order to keep him in elected office and save his career.

* **NEXT:** The Media Research Center (MRC) quickly realized Chris Cuomo was abusing his position at CNN to cover up his brother's disgusting actions as governor and as a sexual predator. MRC recorded every hour of Cuomo's coverage and EXPOSED his lies on social media.

Over the past several months, MRC has tracked every move the Cuomo's have made in coordination with each other and mounted a public pressure campaign to hold these men accountable. We have DOZENS OF HOURS of his lies recorded on video, tracked his statements, and it's all documented on our websites.

* **FINALLY:** After MONTHS of demanding answers and pressuring the media to hold Chris Cuomo accountable for his biased and unethical coverage, the network finally FIRED Chris Cuomo from his role at CNN.

[** The Media Research Center is the ONLY conservative organization exposing the Leftwing media's bias, holding them accountable, and WINNING the fight. Please invest in MRC's efforts by donating $20.22, $35, $50, $100, $250, $500, $1,000 or any amount today >>>**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zp9a4lunmtfp2a864r8opt9o55i0o0e5lt4savgg_rp22sh2s8i66pj0sjge6ob4c5h2bs)

While MRC has successfully shattered the trust the American people have in the media... the media have become more agenda-driven and even more influential.

Fake News machines such as the New York Times, CNN, MSNBC, and NBC are attempting to determine our elections, enact socialism, keep sexual predators in office (such as Andrew Cuomo), and pass legislation.

The Leftwing media has become one of our Republic's greatest threats.

As the Founder and President of the Media Research Center, I have committed my life's work to exposing leftwing bias in the media.

Americans must know the truth about these media outlets.

Cancel culture, Big Tech, and the Leftwing media must be stopped... and the Media Research Center can do it.

Friend, my goal is to raise $10,000 to empower the MRC to expose more liars like Chris Cuomo and restore integrity in the media. Please help me reach this goal by using one of the donation links I've copied below:

[** Donate $20.22 >>>
Donate $35 >>>
Donate $50 >>>
Donate $100 >>>
Donate $250 >>>
Donate $500 >>>
Donate $1,000 >>>
Donate Any Amount >>>**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zgk8hvnj9ig3mgks7434cm68pl0eitaidjqh44m8_rp22sh2s8i66pj0sjge6ob4c5h2bs)

Removing Chris Cuomo from CNN is an amazing victory.

However, you and I must realize there are more 'Chris Cuomos' on major networks or serving as editors for online media.

What else are they covering up?

If CNN was willing to help keep Andrew Cuomo in office, a man who is responsible for killing elderly patients in nursing homes and sexually harassing women, what else are they capable of?

This is NOT the time to step off the gas pedal.

MRC is doubling down and determined to expose more liars like Chris Cuomo.

[** Please join us by helping us reach our goal of raising $10,000 before our big deadline. You can click here to donate any amount. **](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z4u31dpl0ohl3vv0fkhq5futunhs32njq0tb5eo0_rp22sh2s8i66pj0sjge6ob4c5h2bs)

Thank you,

Brent Bozell
Founder & President of MRC

If dpwillis67@gmail.com should not be subscribed or if you need to change your subscription information for GOP Presidential, [please use this preferences page](http://e.goppresidential.com/prefs/9z2z2hhvlirgqqeg63fh2vek40qhq2flrmdoitbtoqo).
625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314
[](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z9cp5sto397eln3inrfp2u5dam972tkhj7frmm08_rp22sh2s8i66pj0sjge6ob4c5h238h5e8he49h666qbcdli6uon49fg)

clean_body: The people of Massachusetts have been ready for new leadership, and now is our best shot to elect a real progressive to the Governor's office. | | | | | Team, Last week, in an announcement that shocked the Massachusetts political scene, Governor Baker announced he would not seek reelection. The people of Massachusetts have been ready for new leadership, and now is our best shot to elect a real progressive to the Governor's office. = For far too long, those in power have asked working families to wait for change — despite a growing affordable housing crisis, inaccessible and expensive child and health care, the existential threat of climate change, and long-standing racial injustice. We don’t have time to wait any longer. Our next Governor has to take on challenges, especially when those challenges are hard. Sonia is that candidate — she has a proven record of winning bold, systemic change on Beacon Hill. It’s why she’s running — because no matter who her opponent is, she knows how to lead. We’re building a grassroots movement that represents all of Massachusetts — across age, class, and faith — to put power back in the hands of the people and to elect a governor who's not afraid to fight for our values. = Thanks, Team Sonia | | | | | = | | | | | ---|---|---|--- | | | ---|---|---|--- | | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you believe you received this email in error or wish to no longer receive emails from us, . | Paid for by the Committee to Elect Sonia Chang-Díaz

body:
It's important that I know who is with me in wanting to make this historic investment a reality.

|

[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39469757/319981446/1995090618?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZjQwM2UwNi01MzU4LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xn4XtNgdp4oiEnUpI8Uv6y1xNJy1dfSFFVTYjZXTetA=&emci=325bc5c2-3e58-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&emdi=8f403e06-5358-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ceid=4568237)

| | Derek, It is time for us to pair the once in a generation investment in our nation’s infrastructure that we passed last month with a once in a generation investment in our nation’s people. I’m asking everyone in Virginia who supports the Build Back Better bill to share their support with us to help make that happen as we enter the final push towards passage so that every one of my colleagues on both sides of the aisle understands the support this bill has. **_[Sign our petition: It’s time to pass the Build Back Better bill in the Senate. ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39469758/319981447/-1408946998?ms=mw_em_211208_1&refcode=mw_em_211208_1&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Derek&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZjQwM2UwNi01MzU4LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xn4XtNgdp4oiEnUpI8Uv6y1xNJy1dfSFFVTYjZXTetA=&emci=325bc5c2-3e58-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&emdi=8f403e06-5358-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ceid=4568237)_** There isn’t a part of life in the United States that won’t be touched by this bill. Build Back Better expands access to education at every level, including big investments in early childhood education and community college. It helps ease the burden on parents with young children by expanding access to childcare. It improves access to healthcare and lowers prescription drug prices. It continues our crucial investments in clean energy. While we iron out the final details of this bill, it's important that I know who is with me in wanting to make this historic investment a reality. **_[Take a moment to sign our petition in support of the Build Back Better bill.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39469759/319981448/-1408946998?ms=mw_em_211208_1&refcode=mw_em_211208_1&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Derek&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZjQwM2UwNi01MzU4LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xn4XtNgdp4oiEnUpI8Uv6y1xNJy1dfSFFVTYjZXTetA=&emci=325bc5c2-3e58-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&emdi=8f403e06-5358-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ceid=4568237)_** Thank you, Mark **[Sign the Petition](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39469760/319981449/-1408946998?ms=mw_em_211208_1&refcode=mw_em_211208_1&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Derek&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZjQwM2UwNi01MzU4LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xn4XtNgdp4oiEnUpI8Uv6y1xNJy1dfSFFVTYjZXTetA=&emci=325bc5c2-3e58-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&emdi=8f403e06-5358-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ceid=4568237)**

For our next Treason Caucus Spotlight, we've decided to highlight the embarrassment of Texas, Senator Ted Cruz.

Throughout the pandemic, we have seen Republicans including Cruz accuse the brave members of the medical community of pushing a grand conspiracy of betrayal and complete denial of evidence based medicine.

Last month, Cruz went on a public media war with beloved resident of 123 1⁄2 Sesame Street and alleged deep state propagandist, Big Bird himself. Then, he called for the prosecution of Dr. Fauci, despite his own _very prosecutable_ actions on January 6th.

In a recent interview with CBS's Margaret Brennan, Dr. Fauci was made aware of Cruz's call for his conviction and responded "Yeah, I have to laugh at that. I should be prosecuted? **What happened on January 6, senator?"**

The truth is, however much Ted may try to deny it, we all know he played a role in the January 6th storming of the Capitol. Not only did Senator Cruz perpetuate the Big Lie -- he was a key figure the terrorists looked to for inspiration when attempting their failed coup.

Senator Cruz has continually spread dangerous lies that threaten to destabilize our democracy. We must show him that we will not stand for his lies.

Peter,

Just last week, the Supreme Court heard arguments in the most consequential abortion rights case in 50 years after all but green lighting Texas' heinous abortion ban.

I am not exaggerating when I say the future of _Roe_ hangs in the balance. **It's _critical_ that _we_ use our power to elect Democratic governors, who will fight like hell to protect reproductive freedom and uphold our values -- no matter what the Court decides.**

**That’s why I’m asking you to join me in supporting Tom Perez for Maryland Governor.

[Tom has championed reproductive freedom his entire career, and he'll continue to do so as Maryland's governor. As a country, we have a lot of work to do to realize a future where our lives, bodies, work, and families are safe and protected. **I know Tom Perez is the right person to take on this monumental challenge.**

He championed reproductive freedom as the head of the Civil Rights division in the Department of Justice, where he aggressively enforced the Freedom of Access to Clinic Entrances (FACE) Act, and protected women’s access to critical health services. He expanded health care for workers as Labor Secretary. And he stood shoulder to shoulder with organizers from across the country to defeat Donald Trump in 2020.

I’ve seen him lead with determination, grit, and compassion countless times in our work together, and I know he’ll bring the same fire to Annapolis. **I could not be more proud to endorse him for Governor. I hope you’ll join me in supporting him, too.**

**[Chip in now to support Tom’s campaign for Governor and elect a champion for reproductive freedom here in Maryland.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39470154/319983624/-633456140?refcode=bpi-em-20211208-cecileendorse-ND-NO&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTMyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmZjU4ZTdmOC01NjU4LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-eXxhuXSy5tHX_ZCO6Zem6pWJw7G9FmzHQuVWvDgqsk=)**

Let’s go,

Cecile Richards

I know Tom Perez is the right person to take on this monumental challenge. He championed reproductive freedom as the head of the Civil Rights division in the Department of Justice, where he aggressively enforced the Freedom of Access to Clinic Entrances (FACE) Act, and protected women’s access to critical health services. He expanded health care for workers as Labor Secretary. And he stood shoulder to shoulder with organizers from across the country to defeat Donald Trump in 2020. I’ve seen him lead with determination, grit, and compassion countless times in our work together, and I know he’ll bring the same fire to Annapolis. I could not be more proud to endorse him for Governor. I hope you’ll join me in supporting him, too. = Let’s go, Cecile Richards ****=** Authority: Tom Perez for Maryland, Stanley J. Botts, Treasurer. Tom Perez for Maryland PO BOX 5389 TAKOMA PARK, MD 20913-5389 United States

name: Protect Freedom PAC
subject: PRESS: Protect Freedom PAC endorses Mike Moon for Congress in MO-07.
body:
---
| | | | | |
---
| FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE: December 7, 2021
---
| Contact: Michael Biundo michael@ascent-strategic.com, 202-809-6014
---
| |
---
| Protect Freedom PAC Endorses Mike Moon in MO-07
---
|
---
| Athens, GA - Protect Freedom PAC, an independent organization dedicated to supporting pro-liberty and freedom-minded candidates, has endorsed Missouri State Senator Mike Moon for election to Missouri's 7th Congressional District.
Protect Freedom PAC has had independent expenditure campaigns totaling $11.5 million since 2018.
Protect Freedom PAC spokesman Michael Biundo stated:
"Mike Moon is a strong advocate for liberty, and as a state representative and state senator, Mike has been one of the greatest protectors of freedom in all of Missouri. Mike was voted the #1 constitutional conservative in the Missouri General Assembly because he has been a staunch opponent to attacks on our God-given constitutional rights. He has stood up to the Democrats in Jefferson City, and if elected to Congress, we know he will stand up to them in Washington D.C., too."
Protect Freedom PAC endorsed and supported candidates for statewide and federal offices in 2018 and 2020 and looks to expand its reach for the 2022 cycle. The organization was founded by a team of veterans of the Donald Trump, Ron Paul, and Rand Paul campaigns for President.
---
| | |
---
| Protect Freedom PAC was founded for the purpose of supporting pro-freedom and liberty-minded candidates using the tactics, technology, and strategy that best fits each race individually. PFP was founded by seasoned political veterans with decades of national campaign experience, which includes working on the campaigns of both Ron and Rand Paul.
---
| |
---
| ###
---
|
---
| | Protect Freedom PAC | 196 Alps Rd, Ste 2-244, Athens, GA 30606
---

name: Sheriff Joe Lombardo
subject: Keeping Nevada Safe from rising crime
body:
I answered the call to serve my community as a law enforcement officer over 30 years ago.
---
| | | | | | |
---
[ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0018eEE1_xnE7M-bew8Fbv-IRDhilN-TA4MAI_eyBVlDAwNDh3ZHMKCkVjj0PNfAXAavPwUk7IFAGWfBVGR7oGm05vZMBTnJBeZN_ujFcMskKHyXg4c3hXifD26urtkuPNo8TM-iq9jnSKBE72kd8FoJr8jO_RXW9e9e2Z6S3TVXU78eqSs1VnspwIbvKwjeOpCXZJy0ZKaTbSWq3oHdcV8n_76b68Ka0RI-Zr0DB5V0xY=&c=kj5_B-XQMcrhmZat3UHkA83QEkje8PlNoKi-zNm3NdI9Zx2yrYI-Hg==&ch=1XjwgW_3gKESUYm7Rdvcef_Tp8_yBdtx46bhe4VtDdpJaso_DO-IDQ==)

|
---
| Peter,

I answered the call to serve my community as a law enforcement officer over 30 years ago.
Since then, I've learned just how much goes into keeping innocent people safe from crime spikes. It's something that too many elected officials have sadly taken for granted recently.
As a result, communities across the country have suffered - Antifa and other anarchists have created their own autonomous zones and destroyed great American cities thanks to the lawless policies and rhetoric of left-wing politicians.
We CANNOT let this reckless approach become the norm here in Nevada!
---
| | | [HELP ME KEEP NEVADA SAFE!](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0018eEE1_xnE7M-bew8Fbv-IRDhilN-TA4MAI_eyBVlDAwNDh3ZHMKCkVjj0PNfAXAavPwUk7IFAGWfBVGR7oGm05vZMBTnJBeZN_ujFcMskKHyXg4c3hXifD26urtkuPNo8TM-iq9jnSKBE72kd8FoJr8jO_RXW9e9e2Z6S3TVXU78eqSs1VnspwIbvKwjeOpCXZJy0ZKaTbSWq3oHdcV8n_76b68Ka0RI-Zr0DB5V0xY=&c=kj5_B-XQMcrhmZat3UHkA83QEkje8PlNoKi-zNm3NdI9Zx2yrYI-Hg==&ch=1XjwgW_3gKESUYm7Rdvcef_Tp8_yBdtx46bhe4VtDdpJaso_DO-IDQ==)
---
| [ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0018eEE1_xnE7M-bew8Fbv-IRDhilN-TA4MAI_eyBVlDAwNDh3ZHMKCkVjj0PNfAXAavPwUk7IFAGWfBVGR7oGm05vZMBTnJBeZN_ujFcMskKHyXg4c3hXifD26urtkuPNo8TM-iq9jnSKBE72kd8FoJr8jO_RXW9e9e2Z6S3TVXU78eqSs1VnspwIbvKwjeOpCXZJy0ZKaTbSWq3oHdcV8n_76b68Ka0RI-Zr0DB5V0xY=&c=kj5_B-XQMcrhmZat3UHkA83QEkje8PlNoKi-zNm3NdI9Zx2yrYI-Hg==&ch=1XjwgW_3gKESUYm7Rdvcef_Tp8_yBdtx46bhe4VtDdpJaso_DO-IDQ==)
---
| One place that didn't burn in the riots of 2020 was Clark County.
That's because I realized that the rights and safety of innocent Americans should be the priority - I focused on arresting and prosecuting those who broke the law!
We need that direction coming from Carson City... not the upside-down policies of Steve Sisolak. And we must also realize that Defunding the Police is nothing more than a radical left-wing effort focused on improving the lives of CRIMINALS while putting the rest of us at greater risk!
If you'd like to see this safer Nevada, [your support can make it a reality! Join me, and together we'll stop rising crime from hurting innocent folks here in this great state.](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0018eEE1_xnE7M-bew8Fbv-IRDhilN-TA4MAI_eyBVlDAwNDh3ZHMKCkVjj0PNfAXAavPwUk7IFAGWfBVGR7oGm05vZMBTnJBeZN_ujFcMskKHyXg4c3hXifD26urtkuPNo8TM-iq9jnSKBE72kd8FoJr8jO_RXW9e9e2Z6S3TVXU78eqSs1VnspwIbvKwjeOpCXZJy0ZKaTbSWq3oHdcV8n_76b68Ka0RI-Zr0DB5V0xY=&c=kj5_B-XQMcrhmZat3UHkA83QEkje8PlNoKi-zNm3NdI9Zx2yrYI-Hg==&ch=1XjwgW_3gKESUYm7Rdvcef_Tp8_yBdtx46bhe4VtDdpJaso_DO-IDQ==)
---
| | | [JOIN THE MISSION!](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0018eEE1_xnE7M-bew8Fbv-IRDhilN-TA4MAI_eyBVlDAwNDh3ZHMKCkVjj0PNfAXAavPwUk7IFAGWfBVGR7oGm05vZMBTnJBeZN_ujFcMskKHyXg4c3hXifD26urtkuPNo8TM-iq9jnSKBE72kd8FoJr8jO_RXW9e9e2Z6S3TVXU78eqSs1VnspwIbvKwjeOpCXZJy0ZKaTbSWq3oHdcV8n_76b68Ka0RI-Zr0DB5V0xY=&c=kj5_B-XQMcrhmZat3UHkA83QEkje8PlNoKi-zNm3NdI9Zx2yrYI-Hg==&ch=1XjwgW_3gKESUYm7Rdvcef_Tp8_yBdtx46bhe4VtDdpJaso_DO-IDQ==)
---
| Thank you, Sheriff Joe Lombardo
---
|
---
| Lombardo for Governor | [Visit our website](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0018eEE1_xnE7M-bew8Fbv-IRDhilN-TA4MAI_eyBVlDAwNDh3ZHMKCkSzwczPYdgi8dBNp_CJ0IFh9ZIlJsEhPYuABH7Ma5xkPGKD202gkcMU2HjxSHWz7Vvrq9lYj-S4IhwmY1DvEx4wm_mMTIux6xQ==&c=kj5_B-XQMcrhmZat3UHkA83QEkje8PlNoKi-zNm3NdI9Zx2yrYI-Hg==&ch=1XjwgW_3gKESUYm7Rdvcef_Tp8_yBdtx46bhe4VtDdpJaso_DO-IDQ==)

name: Peter Franchot
subject: My plan to create jobs and invest in infrastructure
body:
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP10/1/81826/images/FAWlogo_Blue%404x.png]Dear Peter,
As we continue to weather the aftershocks of the worst economic crisis of our lifetimes, it is no surprise that the economy is the top issue among voters in a recently-released Goucher Poll. Our working families and small businesses have been financially decimated by this pandemic, and many still continue to struggle. As we look ahead towards our economic recovery, we need to make sure that no one is left behind.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/franchotinfrastructure?amount=20.22 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/franchotinfrastructure?amount=20.22]If I’m blessed to be your next Governor, I’ll build our economy back even stronger than before by creating 100,000 new family-supporting jobs in 100 weeks in industries of the future.
It is high time that we shore up our economy for the 21st century. That’s exactly what I’ll do by investing in statewide 5G, world-class public transit, and renewable energy. These projects will create good-paying jobs that offer the security of health care coverage, retirement benefits, and pathways to home ownership. They’ll also transform your quality of life in ways that you can see and feel, and make Maryland an even more competitive destination for the high-tech, high-skill industries of the future.
In addition to boldly expanding our state’s public works, I’ll partner with unions and the private sector to establish a one-stop-shop employment program that houses, trains, and places job seekers in these emerging opportunities. I’ll also champion the interests of Maryland’s small businesses by ensuring that they have better access to capital, as well as state and federal contracts.
I’m incredibly excited about transforming Maryland’s economy in the years to come. But in order to do that, I’m first going to need your help to win this competitive election. If you want to help make my vision to invest in major infrastructure projects like statewide transit, 5G, and renewable energy a reality, will you chip in to help me meet my fundraising goal for December?
CHIP IN $10 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/franchotinfrastructure?amount=10] CHIP IN $20.22 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/franchotinfrastructure?amount=20.22] CHIP IN $50 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/franchotinfrastructure?amount=50] CHIP IN $100 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/franchotinfrastructure?amount=100] CHIP IN ANOTHER AMOUNT [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/franchotinfrastructure]Any amount, whether large or small, will make a big difference in helping my team meet our fundraising goal for this month. This is a highly competitive election, and we will need all-hands-on-deck in order to stay ahead in this race. Your contribution will help us hire more organizers, print more literature and yard signs, run more digital ads, and ultimately build the critical mass of support that we need to win this election.
Maryland’s working families and small businesses are counting on us. Together, we’re going to kickstart Maryland’s economic growth, create 100,000 new jobs, and raise all Marylanders into the high quality of life that they deserve.
Thank you,
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP10/1/81826/images/Franchot%20Signature.png]
DONATE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/franchotinfrastructure?amount=20.22]By Authority: Friends of Peter Franchot; Tom Gentile, Treasurer
Friends of Peter Franchot
P.O. Box 6648
Annapolis, MD 21401
United States
If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: https://email.ngpvan.com/unsubscribeUnique/c9918dec-4f51-ec11-9820-a085fc31ac93/c73ccd11-5958-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MTgyNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjNzNjY2QxMS01OTU4LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=UvnysB53hIYotNdTJYxycgY4gbcopjPvzfIRA4uXLjU=&id=136194660 .
We're building a grassroots movement -- so make sure to forward this email to a friend!
Want to receive email updates from Team Franchot? Then click here [https://secure.ngpvan.com/MCeSEGOJC0GwhHyQim-AWg2] to sign up!

subject: Did you see the news?
body:
Crime on the rise, shooting galleries, what’s next. | |
---
|
---
| [ ](https://robastorino.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fc77541c2ac6ac3b6b1a237b3&id=9959abb07a&e=3ca66fc65a)
---
| Friend,

The _lawlessness_ that is taking place in New York City is **OUT OF CONTROL.**

So far, we have seen a man who shoved a woman on subway tracks set free, another NYC man who robbed multiple people at knifepoint walk away without handcuffs, and even a bank robber walked free.

The _out of touch, out of mind_ , New York City Leftists are _DESTROYING_ New York with No Cash Bail.

And now, Mayor Bill de Blasio and the rest of his cronies have decided to open city-run “shooting galleries.” This isn’t for target practice. It’s not that kind of shooting. This is for drug addicts to legally “shoot” their heroin and other drugs into their veins - no questions asked.
**WE NEED TO CLEAN UP NEW YORK**
It’s a sad surrender to addiction, illegal activity and lawlessness that will surely backfire. It doesn’t help the addict and it certainly won’t help the families who live in the neighborhood.

This is why we need a **STRONG LEADER** like Rob Astorino to fix the mess that Albany has allowed. Rob will repeal the dangerous “No Cash Bail” law, invest in our police - not defund them - and _CLOSE_ the New York City shooting galleries.

When Rob was Westchester County Executive, he created a “Safer Communities” initiative that created community based solutions to address the opioid crisis, domestic violence, and mental health.

[**Make a contribution of ANY AMOUNT to join Rob and Team Astorino as we FIGHT to clean up New York. >>**](https://robastorino.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fc77541c2ac6ac3b6b1a237b3&id=b22a2129fe&e=3ca66fc65a)

| _Rob Astorino is running for governor of New York. A former two-term Westchester County Executive who currently works as a business and media consultant, and serves as an independent director on two company boards. In 2014, Astorino was the Republican nominee for Governor of New York. Astorino stunned everyone by holding Andrew Cuomo to only 54%, the closest election of Cuomo’s career. Astorino is a lifelong resident of Westchester. He and his wife, Sheila, are the parents of three children.

With your help, we can build a better New York, Peter.

As the people’s lawyer, I’ve _always_ put the needs of the powerless and vulnerable above all else. I’ve dedicated myself to fighting for everyday, working New Yorkers, and I haven’t hesitated to take the fight to Donald Trump, the gun lobby, or Big Pharma. **I refuse to be bought or intimidated. **

I intend to keep up the fight as your governor, but I need your help to get there. **That’s why I’ve created the Build a Better New York Fund. We’ve set a goal to raise $100,000 by Thursday, December 9, but we’re already falling short. [Please, will you rush a donation of $5 to our Build a Better New York Fund right now?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39471334/319989259/2067680334?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&amount=5&refcode=jtk221-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ZGUxNjRiZi01OTU4LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=cIxuj-h2yLlJRbUxoBb7che88KPVrQsyUrUNTjkBcR8=)**
**Here’s why your immediate donation is so important:**

New York is at a crossroads. The tragedy of COVID-19 combined with generations of racial and economic inequality has created a system where a small group of people thrive at the expense of everyone else. _If we continue to do nothing, this inequality will only grow worse.
_
I refuse to let that happen. Together, we _will_ heal our great state and bring all New Yorkers together, but first I need your support. [**We’re falling drastically short of our $100,000 goal, so please, Peter, will you rush a donation of $5 now to the Build a Better New York Fund?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39471336/319989272/2067680334?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&amount=5&refcode=jtk221-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ZGUxNjRiZi01OTU4LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=cIxuj-h2yLlJRbUxoBb7che88KPVrQsyUrUNTjkBcR8=)

Thank you so much for standing by my side.

_\----- Original Message from Mike Collier, December 6, 2021 -----_
Folks,
Winter is coming — and Republicans are at it again.
As we head into winter, our state’s gas infrastructure is no more prepared for cold temperatures than it was during the freeze in February.
Meanwhile, the Texas Railroad Commission (RRC) continues to fail Texans by doing the absolute least.
Reminder: The RRC recently voted to let consumers pay off $3.4 billion of the profits made by corporations during the winter storm. This bailout will be added to Texans’ energy bills for the next 30 years, an estimated $350 per household. And now, the RRC just approved a rule that allows numerous energy companies to be able to opt out of winterization requirements for just $150.
Make it make sense — bet ya can’t. Because how can we expect our state leaders to fix the damn grid while they cash checks from the folks that made money from the grid failure?
Dan Patrick himself got record donations from the same corporations that made BILLIONS during the winter storm. And one thing is for sure: If he’s taking their money, he’s not holding them accountable.
**As an energy expert, you have my word that I will fix the damn grid to serve Texas families — not corporations. These corporate handouts paid for by Texas families and get-out-jail-free cards that keep our state’s power grid unstable will be put to an end once I’m elected. **
And unlike Dan Patrick, I _will_ _not_ take a penny from corporate PACs because the Lt. Governor ought to serve the people of Texas alone.
[**So that’s why I’m asking you personally today: Can you chip in just $5 to support my campaign so we can finally fix the damn grid? Anything you can spare would mean the world to me.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39471350/319989296/1189302780?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=AU_MC_FR_MER_GEN_AC_20211208_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTc3MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MmUxNjRiZi01OTU4LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wc5r0ZqwqxwggnIAxTexbPey-8D0dIf3cwkDRfzrtsc=)

Every election cycle, we hear something along the lines of “Why would I need to chip in, there’s plenty of time before Election Day!” **So, let us explain why it’s important to chip in now:**
* Susie’s district is the _**most competitive in the country.**_
* We’re already in the fight against **Susie’s four far-right opponents.**

name: Gwen Moore
subject: SHAME ON YOU KEVIN MCCARTHY!
disclaimer_text: Paid for and Authorized by Gwen Moore for Congress
body:
Crazy-wing extremist GOP Congresswoman Lauren Boebert’s racist, bigoted comments towards Congresswoman Ilhan Omar are unacceptable, and she is unfit to serve in any elected office. And rather than stand up and do what’s right, Wanna-Be-Speaker Kevin McCarthy chooses to be the definition of a spineless, scared little man.

Join me in sending McCarthy and Boebert a crystal-clear message: BIGOTRY HAS NO PLACE IN CONGRESS: https://secure.ngpvan.com/KWtFy4WnH0C37bsZ88SHNQ2

This hateful language has real-world consequences and is fueling the division we see across our nation.
Kevin McCarthy is willfully sacrificing our democracy in hopes of becoming the next Speaker of the House. Let’s send him a message.

Add your name: https://secure.ngpvan.com/KWtFy4WnH0C37bsZ88SHNQ2

Together #WeRepresent,
Gwen Moore
Proudly representing Wisconsin's Fourth Congressional District
Proud Co-Lead of the Violence Against Women Act
100% Pro-Choice
Stay Connected! Text "GWEN" to 313131 for campaign updates!
Chip in: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gwennovember21?refcode=113021

Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/gwenmooreforcongress/

clean_body: A small donation goes a long way = Hi Peter, My team relies on grassroots fundraising to build our campaign and ensure our operations are running smoothly. When my supporters chip in $5 here and $10 there, it adds up and makes a huge difference in this race. = | = Grassroots supporters from every corner of this district make up this people-powered campaign: Judith S. from Dubuque, IA chipped in $5 Michael B. from Cedar Rapids, IA donated $10 Eric L. from Cedar Falls, IA even chipped in $50! = This district is going to be one of the most closely watched in the country, and to keep my campaign competitive, we need to fundraise as much as possible. My opponent already has the help and support from right-wing special interest groups and the National GOP, Peter. = = = Around the holidays, fundraising traditionally slows. But 2022 is right around the corner, so it’s important we don’t see a dip in our online donations. I’m counting on my grassroots team to make sure we have the resources we need to win in one of the most competitive races in the country. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately. = | = ---|--- = | = = | = = Thank you, Liz Mathis Candidate for Congress, IA-02 Liz Mathis is a lifelong Iowan, State Senator, and former local news reporter running to represent Iowa's 2nd Congressional District in Congress. = | = | Liz Mathis is running to represent Iowa's 2nd Congressional District. name: Patrick Murphy
subject: Our big event is tonight and more than THIRTEEN members of Congress will be there. JOIN US!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Taking The Hill PAC
body:
Peter,

We are so honored to welcome more than a dozen current and former members of Congress tonight (_there 's a rumor that Speaker Pelosi might even join_)! Like us, they believe that honor and integrity matters - and that our veteran and military family member candidates are the best way to bring that back to Congress.

Now it's up to us - [_**let 's show Washington and the world the strength of our support**_](https://act.myngp.com/el/k8lxCgUSH3FuqPvWelPgrCc7ONK3xSKwrN9ZWpvttR4=/PJZ4nSEXzdZWD01h_4ACpNHWca67qndfeWcmbojYA0U=) by packing the event and raising as much as we can to [_**guarantee victory!**_](https://act.myngp.com/el/k8lxCgUSH3FuqPvWelPgrCc7ONK3xSKwrN9ZWpvttR4=/PJZ4nSEXzdZWD01h_4ACpNHWca67qndfeWcmbojYA0U=)

[_**Click here to RSVP your ticket right now.**_](https://act.myngp.com/el/k8lxCgUSH3FuqPvWelPgrCc7ONK3xSKwrN9ZWpvttR4=/PJZ4nSEXzdZWD01h_4ACpNHWca67qndfeWcmbojYA0U=) Even if you can't attend, [_**we need your help with a donation now to get our candidates the support they need.**_](https://act.myngp.com/el/k8lxCgUSH3FuqPvWelPgrCc7ONK3xSKwrN9ZWpvttR4=/PJZ4nSEXzdZWD01h_4ACpNHWca67qndfeWcmbojYA0U=)

[_****_](https://act.myngp.com/el/k8lxCgUSH3FuqPvWelPgrCc7ONK3xSKwrN9ZWpvttR4=/PJZ4nSEXzdZWD01h_4ACpNHWca67qndfeWcmbojYA0U=)

Thanks to those who have chipped in or gotten their tickets already. See you tonight!

Warmly,
Patrick

_Hon. Patrick J. Murphy_
_32nd Under Secretary of the Army_
_Former Congressman (PA-01)_
[_@PatrickMurphyPA_](https://act.myngp.com/el/k8lxCgUSH3FuqPvWelPgrCc7ONK3xSKwrN9ZWpvttR4=/58qZkik1uTGHCO4YFJt3BAqMOMlT_V5CBFyCwFbfJz0=)

name: Brent Bozell
subject: Removing Chris Cuomo from CNN is an amazing victory.
body:
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58963146:JWtnATENC:m:1:3253819041:22ECE632A4A771E8A4783F2384C540D0:r)
Peter,

Allow me to break down how the Media Research Center took down Chris Cuomo from CNN.

**The Art Of Taking Down a Leftwing Media Scumbag: A Step By Step Guide**

* **FIRST:** Chris Cuomo used his position as a host on CNN to cover up his brother, New York Governor Andrew Cuomo's, total failures during the pandemic... but that's not the worst part.

Chris Cuomo used his position at CNN to LIE about Gov. Andrew Cuomo's sexual harassment allegations in order to keep him in elected office and save his career.

* **NEXT:** The Media Research Center (MRC) quickly realized Chris Cuomo was abusing his position at CNN to cover up his brother's disgusting actions as governor and as a sexual predator. MRC recorded every hour of Cuomo's coverage and EXPOSED his lies on social media.

Over the past several months, MRC has tracked every move the Cuomo's have made in coordination with each other and mounted a public pressure campaign to hold these men accountable. We have DOZENS OF HOURS of his lies recorded on video, tracked his statements, and it's all documented on our websites.

* **FINALLY:** After MONTHS of demanding answers and pressuring the media to hold Chris Cuomo accountable for his biased and unethical coverage, the network finally FIRED Chris Cuomo from his role at CNN.

[**The Media Research Center is the ONLY conservative organization exposing the Leftwing media 's bias, holding them accountable, and WINNING the fight. Please invest in MRC's efforts by donating $20.22, $35, $50, $100, $250, $500, $1,000 or any amount today >>>**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58963146:JWtnATENC:m:1:3253819041:22ECE632A4A771E8A4783F2384C540D0:r)

While MRC has successfully shattered the trust the American people have in the media... the media have become more agenda-driven and even more influential.

Fake News machines such as the New York Times, CNN, MSNBC, and NBC are attempting to determine our elections, enact socialism, keep sexual predators in office (such as Andrew Cuomo), and pass legislation.

The Leftwing media has become one of our Republic's greatest threats.

As the Founder and President of the Media Research Center, I have committed my life's work to exposing leftwing bias in the media.

Americans must know the truth about these media outlets.

Cancel culture, Big Tech, and the Leftwing media must be stopped... and the Media Research Center can do it.

FIRSTNAME, my goal is to raise $10,000 to empower the MRC to expose more liars like Chris Cuomo and restore integrity in the media. Please help me reach this goal by using one of the donation links I've copied below:

[**Donate $20.22 >>>
Donate $35 >>>
Donate $50 >>>
Donate $100 >>>
Donate $250 >>>
Donate $500 >>>
Donate $1,000 >>>
Donate Any Amount >>>**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58963146:JWtnATENC:m:1:3253819041:22ECE632A4A771E8A4783F2384C540D0:r)

Removing Chris Cuomo from CNN is an amazing victory.

However, you and I must realize there are more 'Chris Cuomos' on major networks or serving as editors for online media.

What else are they covering up?

If CNN was willing to help keep Andrew Cuomo in office, a man who is responsible for killing elderly patients in nursing homes and sexually harassing women, what else are they capable of?

This is NOT the time to step off the gas pedal.

MRC is doubling down and determined to expose more liars like Chris Cuomo.

[**Please join us by helping us reach our goal of raising $10,000 before our big deadline. You can click here to donate any amount. **](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58963146:JWtnATENC:m:1:3253819041:22ECE632A4A771E8A4783F2384C540D0:r)

Thank you,

Brent Bozell
Founder & President of MRC

name: Laura Loomer
subject: They’re doing all they can to stop me!
body:
I’ve kept quiet about this for a long, long time.
| | | [](https://libersend.lauraloomerforcongress.com/l/jaHkxHkvgw3mMH3vyc0Hsw/cy5CPiZj76763IrKX6Zr0892Cg/bfKYysJSZSdPWDLQ7pDLlA)
Patriot,

[](https://libersend.lauraloomerforcongress.com/l/jaHkxHkvgw3mMH3vyc0Hsw/cy5CPiZj76763IrKX6Zr0892Cg/bfKYysJSZSdPWDLQ7pDLlA) I’ve kept quiet about this for a long, long time.

The world of politics is tiny – especially conservative politics, and just like in business, you want to give people the benefit of the doubt and work to reconcile things – **but I’m done holding my tongue**.

So, here’s what I’m dealing with: **Ever since I announced my intent to run against a Do-Nothing Incumbent Republican, the Establishment circled their wagons to do everything they can to stop me**.

[**Help me bypass the control of the Establishment by supporting my campaign today.**](https://libersend.lauraloomerforcongress.com/l/jaHkxHkvgw3mMH3vyc0Hsw/cy5CPiZj76763IrKX6Zr0892Cg/bfKYysJSZSdPWDLQ7pDLlA)

**The world of campaigns is RUN by consultants, vendors and marketing agencies.**

Just like a gas station needs someone to deliver gas, bags of chips, sodas and process credit card payments, campaigns need a variety of services to succeed.

We need access to donors, technology platforms, voting data, and equal opportunity to attend Republican events.

**And the moment I began running against Do-Nothing Dan Webster, my campaign was put on a BLACKLIST by the companies and consultants that work for the Establishment . . . which is 95% of them.**

And trust me, they’re the “big boys” that raise hundreds of millions of dollars for candidates each election cycle. **Without them, you have to reinvent the wheel.**

So that’s what I partially did last year when I ran against Democrat Lois Frankel – but this year, it’s far different. My business is losing income each month while my campaign is having a tough time reaching new donors because it’s considered taboo to primary a Republican incumbent.

That’s why it’s so important that I don’t lose you, Patriot, and [**you continue to support my campaign so I can DOUBLE your donation by finding new donors to support my race**](https://libersend.lauraloomerforcongress.com/l/jaHkxHkvgw3mMH3vyc0Hsw/cy5CPiZj76763IrKX6Zr0892Cg/bfKYysJSZSdPWDLQ7pDLlA).

December is the end of the fundraising quarter and the end of the fundraising year, **and I have to finish BIG!**

Will you [**donate right now**](https://libersend.lauraloomerforcongress.com/l/jaHkxHkvgw3mMH3vyc0Hsw/cy5CPiZj76763IrKX6Zr0892Cg/bfKYysJSZSdPWDLQ7pDLlA) to kick off December strong with whatever amount you can contribute?

Thanks so much for all that you do, and thank you for [**_your continued support_**](https://libersend.lauraloomerforcongress.com/l/jaHkxHkvgw3mMH3vyc0Hsw/cy5CPiZj76763IrKX6Zr0892Cg/bfKYysJSZSdPWDLQ7pDLlA).

Respectfully,

Laura Loomer

Paid for by Laura Loomer for Congress Inc Contributions to Laura Loomer for Congress Inc are not tax deductible for federal income tax purposes. Contributions from corporations, labor unions, federal contractors, and foreign nationals are prohibited.

---
Laura Loomer for Congress Inc
720 Lucerne Ave, #1465
LAKE WORTH, FL. 33460
[Unsubscribe](https://libersend.lauraloomerforcongress.com/unsubscribe/wJCYyn7638HXOcoR8928MiNxO5nXTgGo6s7D8pT0763BW8929so/0zt892892sGgF1vXY892mEa9qbyQ/bfKYysJSZSdPWDLQ7pDLlA)
[Web Version](https://libersend.lauraloomerforcongress.com/w/jaHkxHkvgw3mMH3vyc0Hsw/0zt892892sGgF1vXY892mEa9qbyQ/bfKYysJSZSdPWDLQ7pDLlA)

---

Friend,

In the past two months our Bikers have driven 1,000s of miles supporting President Trump and combating violent Leftist voter intimidation.

We're the only grassroots organization with the determination to directly take on the violent BLM and ANTIFA radicals at any moment's notice. **But if we can't keep our gas tanks filled, our Bikers aren't going anywhere.**

Because of Bidenflation, our biggest cost is the gas to fuel up our bikes. [**If you care about stopping ANTIFA and BLM from harassing our voters, rush your contribution so our Bikers can fuel up their Bikes and hit the road.**](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zfgg4of2gso4156rmencjcacpck8clio62t7a95g_rp22sh2s8i66pj0sjie4o31cph2bs)

Skyrocketing gas prices is a serious emergency that threatens the biggest advantage we have over the Left - _**mobility!**_

If you want to stop radical Leftist voter intimidation, our Bikers need to be on the road prepared to do the hard work everyone else is afraid to do.

Do not ignore this email. Bikers for Trump is supported entirely by grassroots supporters like you. Thank you,
[](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zvf5mq9mtjqln32ggs5nt27qmmg4btmff4bsi84o_rp22sh2s8i66pj0sjie4o31cph2bs)
**Chris Cox**
_Bikers for Trump_

body:

Peter,

Soon President Trump and Melania Trump will be celebrating Christmas with their family, and we want to make this holiday season as special as we can for them.

That’s why we’re inviting you to wish President Donald J. Trump and Melania Trump a Merry Christmas... [**by signing our Golden 5th Annual Christmas Card to them!**](http://links.action.greatamerica4usa.com/u/click?_t=b93111d5faf54ad99e89d66d6b494312&_m=5951a21f1cdd48fbabfa1be30bc5bf58&_e=qX3w0aBtEXoRDj5Vq4jyJZsIbnsVmrLEsJU4yjrg0WKEj3LkyBm4q_SOtZt-9KMPB4ONDvC5S5BRjfeFZwWLbotsDogTZwB7YdvMVLyzEIXtH58CYsjxruhD8yNYo_ESWmpNhQdHAO4cNy6dBPt0p1FE9hdO61pyQvXyZFt_H_V81LrAdaddaVGmLnDXmoqE2hwZSk64Yv_Pl8ivpa_sssO5i3Z7Lv3MxcqIEclx-4Z74J6-bPITYztypZNqtRHumK5biYigIoIb4k9oKihx6ykGWCyyrvgqRulx3xZGXDSYtg13bxZfZASUxdNtW2XMj9WwNhQvq6DVI2hRQn66WbOASbemtKMYzR82NeelSRMcSznoBERCHO_-V5_niNJ282t8FmSfeAspOi1sGVxrNIUBWOMRjPPwNuu66Ng6b7c1HSpPoB8r0ODWt65nted7)

name: Wade Herring
subject: My mom deserves access to voting
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Wade Herring for Congress
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/herringvoting [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/herringvoting] [https://als-totem.s3.amazonaws.com/core/spacer.gif]
Peter,
My mom is 86 – she doesn’t drive, she doesn’t use a computer, she doesn’t have easy access to a copy machine, and she cannot stand in long lines at her polling place.
The laws passed in Georgia make it harder for my mom and other folks to vote.
To hear more about my beliefs on the fundamental right to vote, check out the video below:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/herringvoting [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/herringvoting]
Georgia deserves a representative who will work to ensure that everyone’s voice is heard and protected.
Change in Washington starts here in Georgia’s 1st District.
In service,
Wade
[https://als-totem.s3.amazonaws.com/core/spacer.gif] Contribute Today [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/herringvoting] [https://als-totem.s3.amazonaws.com/core/spacer.gif]
Wade Herring, lawyer and community volunteer, is running for Congress in Georgia’s First Congressional District. Wade grew up in Macon, Georgia. He has worked with the law firm of HunterMaclean since 1985. Among other volunteer positions, Wade has served as president of the Savannah Bar Association, chair of the trustees at Wesley Monumental United Methodist Church, and board member of Georgia Appleseed. Wade is a graduate of Dartmouth College and the University of Georgia School of Law.Wade lives in Savannah, Georgia with his wife Susan of 39 years. Wade and Susan are the parents of two children, a son who is a lawyer in Atlanta, and a daughter who is a doctor in Winston-Salem, North Carolina.
https://www.facebook.com/wadeherringga1 [https://www.facebook.com/wadeherringga1] https://twitter.com/wadeherringga1 [https://twitter.com/wadeherringga1] https://www.instagram.com/wadeherringga1/ [https://www.instagram.com/wadeherringga1/]
www.WadeHerringForCongress.com [http://www.WadeHerringForCongress.com] | Info@WadeHerringForCongress.com
