name: Jerry Dickinson
subject: Our newest endorsements
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Dickinson for Congress Committee
body:
| | |
---
| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39472629/319994333/-632576040?utm_source=headerlogo&utm_medium=email&refcode=em_20211208-fr-JD-endorsements-all&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDAwMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNmJkZDViOS01ZjU4LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=IAjhN6GgX-91WTU6N9EcOdnbkuuFGYcRKklhgSXs8k0=&emci=a3917374-ab56-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&emdi=d6bdd5b9-5f58-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ceid=25561085)
---
| Support for Jerry is coming in from all of the commonwealth... Friend, Recently our campaign has been receiving a lot of great endorsements from local leaders and activists... here are just a few of many: [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39472630/319994334/-2042008336?refcode=em_20211208-fr-JD-endorsements-all&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDAwMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNmJkZDViOS01ZjU4LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=IAjhN6GgX-91WTU6N9EcOdnbkuuFGYcRKklhgSXs8k0=) **“Jerry is a proven champion of those who have been left behind. He brings a fresh perspective to politics that is sorely needed in Washington.”** — Paul Klein, Allegheny City Council **“As a constitutional law professor and a community advocate, Jerry Dickinson brings the kind of expertise this moment in our national politics requires. We can’t afford leaders who lay low. We need someone like Jerry to represent us on the local and national level.”** — Jim Burn, Former Chair PA Dems **“I’m supporting Jerry Dickinson because I know he is ready to fight for all of us in southwestern Pennsylvania, but especially those of us who live in Pennsylvania's 18th district... I know he will do everything possible to bring resources and funds back to the city and the county to do the work and create the jobs that will push our whole region forward, not just a _select few_.”** — Liv Bennett, Allegheny County Council District 13 **“First he showed up in my neighborhood, then he showed up in my life... He truly gets it. I am so thankful he is running for Congress, and I couldn’t be happier to support him.”** — Michelle Kenny, Mother of Antwon Rose Jr. I’m honored to receive the endorsements of local leaders who I’ve looked up to the past few years. Jim and Liv are pillars of our Allegheny community and have worked tirelessly to uplift every single person in the 18th district. Jim knows national politics inside and out—his confidence in my abilities to represent Pennsylvania at a national level is an immense honor. And Michelle Kenney—Michelle represents everything I love about our community. Her strength, her drive, her passion, and her resilience. I spoke with her a few years ago and listened to the heartbreaking story of losing her son to senseless violence. His experience was so similar to my own story of racial profiling by the police; we found out we had a lot in common and became fast friends. Her endorsement means the world to me. [**And if you’d like to help us make positive, lasting change in Pennsylvania’s 18th district, consider donating to our campaign today.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39472631/319994335/-2042008336?refcode=em_20211208-fr-JD-endorsements-all&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDAwMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNmJkZDViOS01ZjU4LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=IAjhN6GgX-91WTU6N9EcOdnbkuuFGYcRKklhgSXs8k0=) Thanks for your support, Jerry Dickinson
**_**_**[DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39472632/319994336/-2042008336?refcode=em_20211208-fr-JD-endorsements-all&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDAwMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNmJkZDViOS01ZjU4LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=IAjhN6GgX-91WTU6N9EcOdnbkuuFGYcRKklhgSXs8k0=)**_**_**
---
|
---
| Emails like this are often the best way for us to stay in contact with supporters like you. If you no longer wish to receive email communications, you can [unsubscribe here](https://email.ngpvan.com/unsubscribeUnique/a3917374-ab56-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b/d6bdd5b9-5f58-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDAwMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNmJkZDViOS01ZjU4LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=IAjhN6GgX-91WTU6N9EcOdnbkuuFGYcRKklhgSXs8k0=&id=129004134).

name: Aadland For Senate
subject: A dose of the truth
body:
Socialist government is destructive of the human spirit
---
| | | | | | Volume 19 | December 8, 2021
---
|
---
| A Word From Erik
---
| | |
---|---
|
Politics is an ugly game, and our government is a reflection of society. Unfortunately, the stakes are high--especially this election cycle--and we all pay a price when we ignore what is happening today.

If you look around, you can be discouraged. Society has grown sick and corrupt, weak and cowardly, lacking in honor and virtue. The left has no restraint in spending, to the peril of you and me. Some days it seems their intent is to enslave the American people, stripping their rights and enslaving them to government programs. But I have hope. I am committed to rebuilding what Ronald Reagan once called the Shining City on a Hill.

But no such city can be built upon sand. It cannot be built on lies, or deception, or rottenness. It cannot be built on division or hatred. No, it must be built on truth and principle and goodness.

To build the Shining City on the Hill, society itself must change. Government is not our savior, yet the radical left wants to replace our freedom with dependence upon socialist handouts and redistributing wealth. It robs each of us the joy and dignity of life.

My goal in running for the U.S. Senate is to be able to put power back into the hands of the people. I believe you should be able to live your life without the heavy hand of government tell you what do to, taking your hard earned money, and spending it the way it sees fit. Each day I serve in office I want to be able to look myself in the mirror, knowing I did what was right and good--restoring freedom to the people.

If we truly and thoughtfully consider the leftist agenda, we cannot help but realize it is one of division. It is an ideology that aims to disempower the individual, and view life through the lens of color, pitting us one against another.

Together we must stand against anyone who would separate us from our God-given rights and from each other. We must stop the government from taxing us and spending our money as it sees fit. Stand with me today by donating to this cause. Together we can hold back the tide of the leftist agenda, ensuring a firm foundation for that Shining City on a Hill.
In Service,
|
---
| | |
---
| | |
---
| Stop the foreign invasion
---
| [ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001w9Otu2pehoXPhiZf93cz7U9Ng-ToCczqTevWnSg-SJqXxs4ODIeQHz7mlDIF0PXzs9rQZpRDNu5q4q9YLb0kgBo639T25WHJM-re6uSHViuDU_Mc6FvS9YToAt0QfgWV_1gay8ZkOWC3MKhEAoVbGCFXxy8gcGn-G2AU_GWuIDWLCdTzJaqckZFT0ytDqW649CgYB9PiKsw=&c=ZjD6AgQ6FWxDargS4d-WZezNkxtMO3D9lfpxFXx0x94E8I5DQDXX5Q==&ch=vp0bHnR1dZbqdM5KGlHL5AALvTWAnoalVQQOA3cRY-39a2cKgwQmyA==)
---
| | |
---
| Campaign Update
---
| |
---|---
|
This week, I will be visiting the Foothills Republican Club and then attending the Broomfield Lincoln Day Dinner.

I will also be traveling south to Alamosa County to visit with our wonderful supporters there.

I sincerely hope to see you soon on the trail!
| | |
---
| Every bit can help
---
| Erik's effort to represent Colorado in the U.S. Senate is a true grass-roots campaign. There is no family fortune behind this drive. No generations of beer barons, or Fat-Cat donors from California and New York backing our organization.
There's just us...and you. Anything you can spare will help Erik secure the nomination. Please consider a donation today.
Help Erik right this ship! Join the cause and share what you can spare. With our gratitude, Aadland for U.S. Senate Staff
---
|
---
|
---

Saturday, December 11th at 6:00 PM: the Broomfield County Lincoln Day Dinner. Location: Broomfield Community Center (Lakeshore 3), 280 Spader Way Broomfield, CO, 80020 Tickets are $60.
Sunday, December 12th at 4:00 PM: The Alamosa GOP Christmas Party Meet & Greet. Location: The Reeds at Cattails Golf Course at 500 Cottonwood Drive, Alamosa, CO 81101 (Erik will be one of several candidates in attendance). There may be a ticket cost at the door.

name: Patty Murray
subject: Mitch McConnell’s “Toddler Takeover”
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY PEOPLE FOR PATTY MURRAY
body:
The Republicans are shaking in their boots because they’re so worried Democrats’ child care plan will actually help working families.
#
Peter,
On the Senate floor, Mitch McConnell called my child care plan in Build Back Better a “toddler takeover.”
As a former preschool teacher, I can say with certainty there is no risk of a toddler takeover in the U.S. Senate -- and the fact that Mitch McConnell is starting to spread misinformation and lies about what my policy will do means one thing: Republicans are afraid we’re going to get something done that will truly help family budgets.
**Republicans’ goals are clear. They want to block progress and make sure working families don’t get the support they need and have earned. That’s why we just can’t let them get back control of the Senate.**
**[I set a crucial $20,000 mid-month fundraising goal and I need each of you to step up and help me get there. Will you donate $20.22 or any amount now to meet this goal?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39473266/319999621/-325901596?refcode=pm_em_211208_1&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=Peter&lastname=&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNDg1ZDQwYy02MjU4LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=eNVSSpbqTg1QIc0Mq8xMrGdG7Yh4fdH5nuHpa7HiaH4=)**
When I talk to working parents across Washington state, the high costs of child care always come up. This is top of mind for families, makes it harder for small businesses to hire, and hurts local economies. That’s why I fought so hard to make sure Build Back Better will address this crisis by lowering child care costs for families, increasing wages for child care workers, and helping child care providers keep their doors open.
What I learned a long time ago is that if someone tells you you can’t do something, it’s because they’re afraid you will. And Republicans are shaking in their boots because they know Democrats are close to getting this bill across the finish line and delivering for families.
**[We absolutely can’t let Mitch McConnell and his strategy of falsehoods take back control of the Senate. Pitch in $20.22 or anything you can to protect our Democratic Senate majority next year.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39473267/319999622/-325901596?refcode=pm_em_211208_1&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=Peter&lastname=&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNDg1ZDQwYy02MjU4LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=eNVSSpbqTg1QIc0Mq8xMrGdG7Yh4fdH5nuHpa7HiaH4=)**
If we stand together now, we can continue making progress for working families and defend and expand our Democratic Senate majority in 2022.
Thank you,
Patty
** **

name: Vote 4 Rus
subject: Stocking Stuffer Campaign Dec 2021
body:
$5 Stocking Stuffer Shout-out! Happy Holidays to everyone! Help keep the campaign rolling by pitching in $5 (the cost of a stocking stuffer present)
| |
---
[](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/369581?id=5980.105.1.03e684fbca5dea99fcc77ec15912bc6a) |
---
| | [ $5 Stocking Stuffer Shout-out! ](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/369581?id=5980.106.1.3cbe77d6c8aa7285cc6cbbf1f6d666cd)
---
|
---
---
Happy Holidays to everyone! Help keep the campaign rolling by pitching in $5 (the cost of a stocking stuffer present) for gas money this season! I’ve been all over Arkansas talking about the 4 E's - Education reform, Economic growth, Environmental preservation, and Equity for all. More than that, we need the 1 biggest E
EVERYONE. I will continue reaching out to all Arkansans by showing my support in person, at meetings, at potlucks, in Christmas parades, listening rather than talking, seeking to understand the diverse needs, and raising awareness of the real issues facing our citizens. Not fighting meaningless culture wars. Not stoking fear for political gain. Listening to the people who live here so that we can work TOGETHER to find solutions for our state that will sustain and propel us into the future. Arkansas can't afford to continue being run by the high-dollar elite who answer to their big-money donors, corporate backers, and national committees. We need real people who are in touch with communities across our state at every economic level. Thank you for your time and support and I hope that you and yours have a wonderful and safe holiday season this year. Here's to making 2022 a turning point back in the right direction.
---

---
-James “Rus” Russell, III Democratic Candidate for Governor of AR 2022

subject: Vic Mensa spins for Dr. Ameena!

body:
Vic Mensa will be spinning a fundraiser for Dr. Ameena on December 13th @ 7pm. | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/73fd3ba8a009/vic-mensa-spins-for-dr-ameena?e=5fba611a2c)
---
| |
---
| |
# Vic Mensa spins a fundraiser for Dr. Ameena on December 13th @ 7pm

We have exciting news! We have a pop-up fundraiser to announce!

It's hard to run as a progressive - Dr. Ameena will not take corporate donations or money from industry PACs. Yet, we still need to invest in technology, staff, and marketing to reach as many people as possible in the 1st District.

This is why we are excited to announce that rap phenomenon [Vic Mensa will be DJ'ing a fundraiser for Dr. Ameena.](https://drameena.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=9e8541e883c7e489c2cd5d45b&id=556d929c19&e=5fba611a2c) Vic has been vocal about the need for criminal justice reform and investment into our community. And we are so grateful for his support. We hope you can join us on December 13th at 7 pm at the Promontory.

That's not all! [Shameeka Jones is our opening act](https://drameena.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=9e8541e883c7e489c2cd5d45b&id=d65dc6e023&e=5fba611a2c). And our campaign swag bags will include amazing delights from [Ms. P Gluten Free](https://drameena.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=9e8541e883c7e489c2cd5d45b&id=98a721c941&e=5fba611a2c).

Tickets are $20. For $50, supporters will also get a campaign swag bag. And we invite those who can to join our host committee for $500. Being one of our hosts will get you reserved space near the stage and an opportunity to meet our performers.

If you can't make it on Monday, [please consider donating](https://drameena.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=9e8541e883c7e489c2cd5d45b&id=cf29c52b9c&e=5fba611a2c). Help us end the quarter strong!

In Solidarity,

Jessica
---

name: Mike Gibbons
subject: Did my GOP Primary opponent vote for Hillary Clinton?
body:
JD Vance is not on our side. He wants Republicans, conservatives, Trump supporters, and everyone to believe he's an America-First Trump supporter... Well, that isn't true.
---
| | | | | | [ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001sI1nTEqTtCsV6gv_SSoEiH6CaIh8Tco1Jg96_nyDcFGWQ-xPrwNB3g--8BGbM3xi8LEnEGh0CaRf6i1KhO5Cv06J7ygu62tZnSlh65UaQ8zKySyb70lWcAaPXPb6UGeS1YJp1HL1BbHtoAmUqGa6eRjeF-nNtDE3gVp2_vRqLfl1HYjbRUGQMBXi_kX61XnH&c=VJAl2KUiD-X06ilP2odcx8Zqe7UqK8PrAyipISfi9EcZyVa0q6Ve4g==&ch=I7ysL04RHl0ac_5kxnEsfkVomGVBLde5EAZ-JN9rl7TIYo-GQK-GPw==)
---
| Peter,
JD Vance is not on our side.
He wants Republicans, conservatives, Trump supporters, and everyone to believe he's an America-First Trump supporter... Well, that isn't true.
We have JD Vance ON VIDEO saying, "I'm a Never-Trump guy. I never liked him".
That's not even the worst part...
He also stated, "I might have to hold my nose and vote for Hillary Clinton".
[You can watch JD Vance expose himself as a Never-Trumper in my new ad by clicking here or below:](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001sI1nTEqTtCsV6gv_SSoEiH6CaIh8Tco1Jg96_nyDcFGWQ-xPrwNB3g--8BGbM3xi8LEnEGh0CaRf6i1KhO5Cv06J7ygu62tZnSlh65UaQ8zKySyb70lWcAaPXPb6UGeS1YJp1HL1BbHtoAmUqGa6eRjeF-nNtDE3gVp2_vRqLfl1HYjbRUGQMBXi_kX61XnH&c=VJAl2KUiD-X06ilP2odcx8Zqe7UqK8PrAyipISfi9EcZyVa0q6Ve4g==&ch=I7ysL04RHl0ac_5kxnEsfkVomGVBLde5EAZ-JN9rl7TIYo-GQK-GPw==)
---
| [ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001sI1nTEqTtCsV6gv_SSoEiH6CaIh8Tco1Jg96_nyDcFGWQ-xPrwNB3g--8BGbM3xi8LEnEGh0CaRf6i1KhO5Cv06J7ygu62tZnSlh65UaQ8zKySyb70lWcAaPXPb6UGeS1YJp1HL1BbHtoAmUqGa6eRjeF-nNtDE3gVp2_vRqLfl1HYjbRUGQMBXi_kX61XnH&c=VJAl2KUiD-X06ilP2odcx8Zqe7UqK8PrAyipISfi9EcZyVa0q6Ve4g==&ch=I7ysL04RHl0ac_5kxnEsfkVomGVBLde5EAZ-JN9rl7TIYo-GQK-GPw==)
---
| I admit... I am new to politics and am NOT a campaign expert.
But I do know lying to people and pretending to be something you're not is a failing strategy.
I am proud to be a Trump supporter, believe in the Constitution, and defend the principles of liberty.
These are unwavering beliefs of mine. I'm not going to let what is popular in the news next week change my principles.
Please help me expose JD Vance, with his own words, to the voters as a Never-Trumper! You can help me reach my End-of-Year fundraising goal of $25,000 from online supporters by donating below.

Thank you, Don Bolduc Brigadier General (ret.), U.S. Army Republican Candidate for U.S. Senate \- - \- - Forwarded Message - - - - From: Don Bolduc Date: Thursday, October 21, 2021 Subject: WATCH: To: dpwillis67@gmail.com Friend, I served in the U.S. Army for 33 years, I fought the Taliban on horseback, and now I’m fighting to SAVE our country by flipping the 50-50 Senate. To win this TOSS-UP race and FLIP the 1 SEAT needed to end Kamala’s 50-50 Senate majority, we need to ensure grassroots patriots see our America First message with their own eyes. But with the FIRST ad-buy deadline just hours away, we still need to raise another $19,275 to get our ad up far and wide. As the 1 seat needed to flip the 50-50 Senate, the race for New Hampshire's MUST-WIN Senate seat will no doubt draw the attention of Kamala, the DSCC, and liberal megadonors like George Soros. The radical Left will spend MILLIONS to try and save Kamala’s 50-50 Senate majority. We must be prepared to FIGHT BACK. We can’t afford to allow the Left’s imminent attacks to go unanswered... That’s why it’s absolutely critical that we raise the necessary funds before tonight's ad-buy deadline. If we fall short, our chances of taking back the 50-50 Senate from Kamala are shot. Thank you, Don Bolduc Brigadier General (ret.), U.S. Army Republican Candidate for U.S. Senate Paid For By Bolduc 2022, Inc. Military images and information do not imply endorsement by DOD [Department of Defense] or any service branch. P.O. Box 5211, Manchester, NH 03108, United States 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

Major Media
Immediately following Kyle Rittenhouse's acquittal, Blake went on [Tucker Carlson Tonight](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001WLijtrpXP_2oT-8g3-YHF83tIljvjIXvExFctAxiXxjnF4VX54icnT719NCA_MJ-qpnOpe0WqQX70RMFWiYvSnczUmZ355G8r_eY6JkwLTPP4i1YnksgqyGgQy2rYTk_qbmpjVPL66TwSGy4ryrXzqn9v-uFFL6ZA89TNum3qdg9DAviCTl1v4yF8-1TinY89MSQJD-BuDo=&c=3ExbpC6TLMe7pVx-KjyeoWY0MS-uxbXSpnK1Jz-kieJ3f50oRrtj-A==&ch=lpAx2uwhx7UDN3jpY-M1sGgu9Jbtwj8a7PTD-Rj_fraW2uSrESySfg==). Blake praised the verdict but pointed out that our justice system is deeply flawed and that the Left is out for blood.
Blake sat down with [Steve Bannon](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001WLijtrpXP_2oT-8g3-YHF83tIljvjIXvExFctAxiXxjnF4VX54icnVE8Tshz1FnVhkVwGb74Ctv7p7S80Jp9b1qRsudsc4hyjPeBaakIcYTL3dEc_vhLOuBbvrvHbVNDmhaVIOzUox_5i3n7vK40pUS5GHFNwcFg1nAELhHjlcGkkbRET6o8Cns19kNwZuIp5rRW-UvoUtVZcCu9aqeirY2PpaX8RGgr&c=3ExbpC6TLMe7pVx-KjyeoWY0MS-uxbXSpnK1Jz-kieJ3f50oRrtj-A==&ch=lpAx2uwhx7UDN3jpY-M1sGgu9Jbtwj8a7PTD-Rj_fraW2uSrESySfg==) to discuss the Democrats' insane agenda in Congress, as well as his role on President Trump's 2016 transition team.
Blake joined [Steve Cortes and Jenn Pellegrino](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001WLijtrpXP_2oT-8g3-YHF83tIljvjIXvExFctAxiXxjnF4VX54icnVE8Tshz1FnVCGVa8eZ1WRaFHAaWc6pRgyxAvMSb3gMPZr_PWXTrU5V-0DGYDgsaZ0q_vP_-ADxWYNHN-gsMk9Olyt0t0b6LLXwJqo-XHXwXbFJ5I-w6Vc6v2mHJyho-OvffjCrkIDe-gOEVvt6r4AM=&c=3ExbpC6TLMe7pVx-KjyeoWY0MS-uxbXSpnK1Jz-kieJ3f50oRrtj-A==&ch=lpAx2uwhx7UDN3jpY-M1sGgu9Jbtwj8a7PTD-Rj_fraW2uSrESySfg==) on Newsmax to discuss corporate wokeness. He attacked the cottage industry of fake complaints and bogus civil rights lawsuits.
On Newsmax, Blake joined [Rob Schmitt](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001WLijtrpXP_2oT-8g3-YHF83tIljvjIXvExFctAxiXxjnF4VX54icnVE8Tshz1FnVEBOB7_TIJ2QNvPNqCmjXIlrOvfoAdxWEmZr617Z5M2Zl_ImYkKipd0tiR5Upu86-IRl9xpelf9zHslzMON7E3w==&c=3ExbpC6TLMe7pVx-KjyeoWY0MS-uxbXSpnK1Jz-kieJ3f50oRrtj-A==&ch=lpAx2uwhx7UDN3jpY-M1sGgu9Jbtwj8a7PTD-Rj_fraW2uSrESySfg==) to discuss the dire state of the economy under the Biden Administration.
Blake joined the Daily Wire's [Michael Knowles](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001WLijtrpXP_2oT-8g3-YHF83tIljvjIXvExFctAxiXxjnF4VX54icnVE8Tshz1FnVRcXs8fFbONGttEWO62ZfPkX3U4plAkPNWUuRmZTRCNTaLfwjLNXTFiEnk8YOWM7zEr0MGVnbjVnmHYs0IgMtzq2Fw22jnbRiFmOUDDKcFf8T7SvUUfQeE1oq9bB9hNjUnmROjKVZZjd8dUd2kPsd00vBPW9H50e8&c=3ExbpC6TLMe7pVx-KjyeoWY0MS-uxbXSpnK1Jz-kieJ3f50oRrtj-A==&ch=lpAx2uwhx7UDN3jpY-M1sGgu9Jbtwj8a7PTD-Rj_fraW2uSrESySfg==) on the Daily Wire to discuss how to shape the country's future by honoring its past, the dire need for election integrity, and rebuilding the American family.
Blake joined Robert Barnes and Viva Frei's [sidebar](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001WLijtrpXP_2oT-8g3-YHF83tIljvjIXvExFctAxiXxjnF4VX54icnVE8Tshz1FnViaArbAElNPcOpRPlHrCjFkXHsLaDQ3CT1lxcaNKi4AdE0D8NZeFjlBip49yJqczAcWBwU9BC9-kb-UY6Uahu8ZqYFeb8sMaE8jNga1h__00WTNBC8m2mQFhQkuLwENGf&c=3ExbpC6TLMe7pVx-KjyeoWY0MS-uxbXSpnK1Jz-kieJ3f50oRrtj-A==&ch=lpAx2uwhx7UDN3jpY-M1sGgu9Jbtwj8a7PTD-Rj_fraW2uSrESySfg==) for a lengthy interview that discussed the Rittenhouse trial, the future of the GOP, Blake's views on technology, and much more.
Recent Headlines
The Daily Wire's Frank Camp [interviewed](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001WLijtrpXP_2oT-8g3-YHF83tIljvjIXvExFctAxiXxjnF4VX54icnVE8Tshz1FnVzjGYs0taK3S9B6TZf5-H5oDGU-bQFHFwm0JJVkGleetL9Mr8eQRtr_guau7c0wAywnkoZPaMbRg-9UTWGuJveI0zwQy2vgobqGtMZqk32ceVyvFak6tyF29IsJdYXwUtliuAxFkYIkdTHGTDa0Do9jRIfA74QzFY9MESGGfygiHjzbs-uw5pViNPkBZaZZx0ydkwnVotjqGTJ7IAE4Bes2O6UAuSuCVu-UuKitUB7NY=&c=3ExbpC6TLMe7pVx-KjyeoWY0MS-uxbXSpnK1Jz-kieJ3f50oRrtj-A==&ch=lpAx2uwhx7UDN3jpY-M1sGgu9Jbtwj8a7PTD-Rj_fraW2uSrESySfg==) Blake. The interview covered the border crisis, big tech, election integrity, and more.
The National Review ran a [profile of Blake](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001WLijtrpXP_2oT-8g3-YHF83tIljvjIXvExFctAxiXxjnF4VX54icnVE8Tshz1FnViIkZ2_E9nsJmQS8CMholzAsEzOSNkz7rg2ArZo-DP4eltvfm4jT8pzSRXZF-NaxTlVAbD5Y3QzebVzG-hhWpT3QmPetg4XuHjkpyW_PcttFrB7hy4znJ6zdMtH17QPnY6Rs3s30W9d4=&c=3ExbpC6TLMe7pVx-KjyeoWY0MS-uxbXSpnK1Jz-kieJ3f50oRrtj-A==&ch=lpAx2uwhx7UDN3jpY-M1sGgu9Jbtwj8a7PTD-Rj_fraW2uSrESySfg==), in which Blake discussed his vision and his intent to disrupt decades of bipartisan failures.
The infamous anti-Republican Lincoln Project, [attacked](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001WLijtrpXP_2oT-8g3-YHF83tIljvjIXvExFctAxiXxjnF4VX54icnVE8Tshz1FnVJyz5Rw3XFp1RWFT03oTZJfYynHBvz9zeXn-jbvzm_cItbLzqjym8JucHu7Kix6aSQ6ldpgSUGzl8PAef6nOOgCfEAYS7sKjDIWNj0j8UX4g1vw5fDduYikBP8-oSK8f0m9jj1rhtr1SUPcMfCCmEug==&c=3ExbpC6TLMe7pVx-KjyeoWY0MS-uxbXSpnK1Jz-kieJ3f50oRrtj-A==&ch=lpAx2uwhx7UDN3jpY-M1sGgu9Jbtwj8a7PTD-Rj_fraW2uSrESySfg==) Blake. That's how you know he's doing something right...

| [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/39473780/320002966/765663662?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRlAvMS84NTQ3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NDU2NGJiZS02NjU4LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=EtjMvqBi2OTXKdcVlelPzr1QX23jKdG_UJk9bOYwRZY=&emci=e9dc58ec-5d58-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&emdi=94564bbe-6658-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ceid=561582) | | | Hi Team — By now, you’ve probably seen that the Supreme Court is considering _upholding_ a Mississippi abortion ban that would significantly reduce people’s access to reproductive health care. The case, _Dobbs v. Jackson Women’s Health Organization_ , also has devastating implications for _Roe v. Wade_ — **the historic ruling could be reduced in scope and power _or completely overturned_.** **We firmly believe SCOTUS’ potential interference with people’s personal, private healthcare decisions would be extremely harmful.** Abortion _is_ health care, full stop. [**If you also believe that the ability to make personal reproductive decisions is a critical part of health care, can you sign on to our petition?**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/39473781/320002967/-273536682?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRlAvMS84NTQ3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NDU2NGJiZS02NjU4LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=EtjMvqBi2OTXKdcVlelPzr1QX23jKdG_UJk9bOYwRZY=&emci=e9dc58ec-5d58-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&emdi=94564bbe-6658-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ceid=561582) [SIGN ON →](https://click.everyaction.com/k/39473782/320002968/-273536682?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRlAvMS84NTQ3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NDU2NGJiZS02NjU4LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=EtjMvqBi2OTXKdcVlelPzr1QX23jKdG_UJk9bOYwRZY=&emci=e9dc58ec-5d58-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&emdi=94564bbe-6658-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ceid=561582) **A decision that upholds the Mississippi rule could shut down _hundreds_ of clinics across the country.** _Just taking up this case_ has already sent mobilizing signals to the anti-reproductive health care base. _Dobbs_ — even though it has not yet been decided — is already making itself felt. clean_body: | | | | Hi Team — By now, you’ve probably seen that the Supreme Court is considering upholding a Mississippi abortion ban that would significantly reduce people’s access to reproductive health care. The case, Dobbs v. Jackson Women’s Health Organization , also has devastating implications for Roe v. Wade — the historic ruling could be reduced in scope and power or completely overturned. We firmly believe SCOTUS’ potential interference with people’s personal, private healthcare decisions would be extremely harmful. Abortion is health care, full stop. A decision that upholds the Mississippi rule could shut down hundreds of clinics across the country. Just taking up this case has already sent mobilizing signals to the anti-reproductive health care base. Dobbs — even though it has not yet been decided — is already making itself felt. We’re taking a stand in this fight. We know when we ask voters to stand up for health care we win. Thanks for your support, team. — The Fairness Project = Thanks to grassroots supporters like you, our team at The Fairness Project has won 23 people-powered ballot measure campaigns since 2016, changing over 17 million lives by expanding health care, raising wages, guaranteeing paid leave, and ending predatory lending directly at the ballot box when politicians refuse to act. Your support allows us to make this progress possible. name: Alek Skarlatos
subject: Permanent indoor mask mandate likely

body:
As long as Dr. Fauci is in Joe Biden’s ear, life in the United States won’t fully return to normal. I stopped a terrortist attack on a train to Paris, now I'm ready to serve the great state of Oregon in Congress. | Peter,

If health officials in Oregon get their way, Oregon will soon have an “indefinite” indoor mask mandate.

Masks until authorities say “no more” is just absolutely ridiculous. To have a state office or a federal office is crazy.

**Isn’t it incredibly hypocritical that Nancy Pelosi and Joe Biden can’t even obey their own mask mandates, but expect ordinary Americans to bend to their will and obey pointless mandates at their discretion?**

[](http://links.alekskarlatosforcongress.com/u/click?_t=7e7d86e0b42141418fdbf0bb715c41e9&_m=fd53cd1b5961484d93a64d4a7cf03acd&_e=KNCfy4-EAxeHgkiKhpX-Q_x8_n4C0kCZKymfyqupU-pSAh_XYK4KPumxSusOBKDuuQ7MVUp8lZXNrpJ2YC7r3km5v0DsWTP0NgxUMb39qYNjQ6pV2W3iN0uwKtDHbfplyvKLaPNR74N4NeIUTVLTto5LA8fYA0-zqWwGOeVHoOQvrLRiRB55DOAAnUHQKvj2yObq8R2Kmj9ntITncdzVwwTj46z6GGxNIOGrN7SOYzCKFmGIB5VOK_cC0Umfewai5XpuMxcqbaFKMxLiT1CrVvAbG0LfFoTgYHPwGx3jv70vC3yIdtZIgl3pdAaceXnaMGaxtdBL3cJudPMhynjY32sBOBZTH8UfGo9hL-iyNjwrU7Ft1BsuTCRQeBQQBTOjYQeIsD4-bMZf-_LnsQyTF0bnkrG515JUGuwDiGAft2Q5yHGXXjYvFa6Yc86HZ2W9l1kZ6NvGowMwjRT29jnbJ_jo9tETCPCJBvA3T1nh62oDCBDZBMQoz3m0b5iDgLpmheOP9LbO1t1pUsKIMZ8b1iGj-ez6d9brrsJd3N6UEmqWmYwiooeOTcAaazoqvecEAMa6rdoCV-XdZ522bws8Xb92RvUOYwO6DkVylUfNmn4%3D)

You may not live in Oregon – where this is a current indoor mask mandate – or even in a state where masks are required in indoor settings, but just because you don’t have a **mask mandate today** doesn’t mean you won’t sometime this winter.

As long as Democrats are in control in Washington there is going to be a constant threat to our liberties.

**As long as Dr. Fauci is in Joe Biden’s ear** , life in the United States won’t fully return to normal.

Watch my interview on Fox and then let me know if you would comply with any future mask mandates if one were issued in your area

Thanks,
Alek Skarlatos
Republican for Congress

body:
|

Team, Here's a quick update on where our campaign is right now. We always want to be transparent, so here's the truth: We’re expecting a bit of a slump in fundraising until the end of the year that could force us to roll back on critical campaign investments, just as the race ramps up in January. During this time of year, people are heading offline and spending extra time with their loved ones. Campaigns and politics are often the last things on their minds. But as I look over our fundraising numbers this quarter, I’m worried we might be heading into 2022 behind where we need to be. The last thing I want to do is scale back our campaign, but these months are notoriously slow for grassroots campaigns like ours that reject money from corporate PACs and federal lobbyists. Once we enter January we’ll be in a full-on sprint to Election Day 2022, and so will Michael’s opponents; your support today makes a huge difference. You see, the National GOP could pour millions of the $75 million they’ve raised so far this year into this race to take back the Senate and undo the progress Michael and Democrats have made this year. **So I’m humbly asking for your help right now: Will you pitch in just $10 today? I want to get ahead of this winter slump so we can end the year strong and defend Michael’s seat.** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ **** | | | ****[Donate $10 now](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39474150/320004750/-625499226?express_lane=true&amount=10&&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&employer=&occupation=&refcode=AU_MFB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20211208_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZDg3ZDVhZS02OTU4LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=oQsiv4wAwbk1xrwY-nMkT6Vyy--gW1MJT-DuIzGUXLo=)****

clean_body: | = Team, Here's a quick update on where our campaign is right now. We always want to be transparent, so here's the truth: We’re expecting a bit of a slump in fundraising until the end of the year that could force us to roll back on critical campaign investments, just as the race ramps up in January. During this time of year, people are heading offline and spending extra time with their loved ones. Campaigns and politics are often the last things on their minds. But as I look over our fundraising numbers this quarter, I’m worried we might be heading into 2022 behind where we need to be. The last thing I want to do is scale back our campaign, but these months are notoriously slow for grassroots campaigns like ours that reject money from corporate PACs and federal lobbyists. Once we enter January we’ll be in a full-on sprint to Election Day 2022, and so will Michael’s opponents; your support today makes a huge difference. You see, the National GOP could pour millions of the $75 million they’ve raised so far this year into this race to take back the Senate and undo the progress Michael and Democrats have made this year. So I’m humbly asking for your help right now: Will you pitch in just $10 today? I want to get ahead of this winter slump so we can end the year strong and defend Michael’s seat. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: ** | | | = ** | **= | | = ** | **= | | = ** | **= Thanks for all your support, Justin Justin Lamorte Campaign Manager Bennet for Colorado Bennet for Colorado PO Box 3078 Denver, CO 80201 United States | mailto:info@michaelbennet.com | Paid for by Bennet for Colorado ** By clicking the links above, you certify that you are responsible for paying all charges incurred in using the debit or credit card to be charged, and that your personal funds will be the true source of the contribution.

subject: This case could determine the future of Roe v. Wade

body:
Last week, the Supreme Court heard oral arguments in a case regarding Mississippi's abortion ban. The ruling in this case could undo Roe v. Wade and roll back reproductive rights for millions of Americans. Reproductive rights are in serious jeopardy, Peter.

Last week, the Supreme Court heard oral arguments in a case regarding Mississippi's abortion ban. The ruling in this case could undo _Roe v. Wade_ and roll back reproductive rights for millions of Americans.

While we won't know the outcome for several months, Kim is fighting back now to ensure reproductive rights are protected and prevent states from enacting medically unjustified barriers to accessing abortion care. As the only woman doctor in Congress, she has led on the Women’s Health Protection Act, which has passed the House and would codify _Roe v. Wade_ into law. Are you with her?

**[Add your name right away to join Kim in the fight to defend reproductive rights.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39474241/320005286/-49512390?ms=em21_211208_roe2_fnd_gq_act___ts_ettx&refcode=em21_211208_roe2_fnd_gq_act___ts_ettx&source=em21_211208_roe2_fnd_gq_act___ts_ettx&utm_campaign=em21_211208_roe2_fnd_gq_act___ts_ettx&utm_medium=email&contactdata=W2atPUkPauFThg0yJSw%2Fy%2FP0rID460jHG6rpnGtmK6Ebo1Gp9EJpBTzpO4qqidKB78HqtZuV7TYQv4x9DXzJ8dlH6P735MCMEb8outLqsGBBiIxOoy1jn8GY13x5yez8m%2FyMHj1pvnXxkzM%2BN5yHZXndR%2FM%2BylKb%2Fr4OQaV1jYg%3D&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTExMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4Y2UyYTdkNC02OTU4LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=sAsBx-cRJDxaxcXVVGP5PVAsnpfcIzBF0JKmG0g_0jo=&emci=fa34bf0d-3e58-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&emdi=8ce2a7d4-6958-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ceid=15820338)**

\----------Begin Forwarded Message----------
From: Team Schrier
Subject: "Supreme Court signals support for Mississippi 15-week abortion ban with Roe v. Wade in balance"
Date: Saturday, December 4, 2021
**Supreme Court signals support for Mississippi 15-week abortion ban with Roe v. Wade in balance**
_\-- USA Today, 12/1/21_
Team,

The Supreme Court heard oral arguments in _Dobbs v. Jackson Women's Health Organization_ earlier this week -- a case that could decide the fate of _Roe v. Wade_. With a 6-3 conservative majority on the Court, it's clear that our reproductive rights are in serious danger.

Republicans see this case as the opportunity they've been waiting for to roll back abortion rights for millions of Americans. Already this year, Republicans in state legislatures across the country have passed restrictive abortion legislation at a record pace, and if the Supreme Court ruling overturns _Roe_ , access to a safe and legal abortion would be banned or limited in 22 states overnight.

**We can't let that happen.**

As the only pro-choice woman doctor in Congress, Kim knows how important it is that every person has access to the reproductive health care they need. That's why she was proud to help pass the Women's Health Protection Act to protect _Roe_ and block states from enacting medically unjustified barriers to accessing abortion care.

Kim will always fight to ensure these deeply personal decisions remain between a patient and their doctor only -- but we need the Senate to act.

**[If you agree we need to act now to defend reproductive rights, join Kim by adding your name today>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39474243/320005288/-49512390?ms=em21_211208_roe2_fnd_gq_act___ts_ettx&refcode=em21_211208_roe2_fnd_gq_act___ts_ettx&source=em21_211208_roe2_fnd_gq_act___ts_ettx&utm_campaign=em21_211208_roe2_fnd_gq_act___ts_ettx&utm_medium=email&contactdata=W2atPUkPauFThg0yJSw%2Fy%2FP0rID460jHG6rpnGtmK6Ebo1Gp9EJpBTzpO4qqidKB78HqtZuV7TYQv4x9DXzJ8dlH6P735MCMEb8outLqsGBBiIxOoy1jn8GY13x5yez8m%2FyMHj1pvnXxkzM%2BN5yHZXndR%2FM%2BylKb%2Fr4OQaV1jYg%3D&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTExMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4Y2UyYTdkNC02OTU4LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=sAsBx-cRJDxaxcXVVGP5PVAsnpfcIzBF0JKmG0g_0jo=&emci=fa34bf0d-3e58-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&emdi=8ce2a7d4-6958-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ceid=15820338)** | [ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39474244/320005290/-49512390?ms=em21_211208_roe2_fnd_gq_act___ts_ettx&refcode=em21_211208_roe2_fnd_gq_act___ts_ettx&source=em21_211208_roe2_fnd_gq_act___ts_ettx&utm_campaign=em21_211208_roe2_fnd_gq_act___ts_ettx&utm_medium=email&contactdata=W2atPUkPauFThg0yJSw%2Fy%2FP0rID460jHG6rpnGtmK6Ebo1Gp9EJpBTzpO4qqidKB78HqtZuV7TYQv4x9DXzJ8dlH6P735MCMEb8outLqsGBBiIxOoy1jn8GY13x5yez8m%2FyMHj1pvnXxkzM%2BN5yHZXndR%2FM%2BylKb%2Fr4OQaV1jYg%3D&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTExMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4Y2UyYTdkNC02OTU4LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=sAsBx-cRJDxaxcXVVGP5PVAsnpfcIzBF0JKmG0g_0jo=&emci=fa34bf0d-3e58-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&emdi=8ce2a7d4-6958-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ceid=15820338)

Friend,
[**Abortion is under attack and I need your help to fight back.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39474545/320006366/558373307?refcode=X_120821_AbortionUnderAttack&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MjcwOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMWU2ZTMzZi02YTU4LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=V5yJ_tIAQMsZyZ2cqLwNTSscpjQiMPewKokhkZFlpj0=)
The Supreme Court is now stacked with conservative judges hellbent on rolling back the protections granted by _Roe v. Wade_. If the Supreme Court is going to undo a 50 year old precedent and gut _Roe v. Wade_ , Congress must step in and take action to guarantee this right.
**People should have the right to access safe, legal abortion without fear, shame, or apology.**
While we won’t know the official outcome until next year, we do know the future of abortion rights is at stake for millions across the country. **The only way we're going to protect abortion access is by electing unapologetically pro-choice candidates, who will help protect this right through federal legislation.**
As a state legislator, I have always fought to protect reproductive rights, and I will continue to do so in Congress.
[**I invite you to please join me in the fight to defend reproductive rights by chipping in today.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39474546/320006367/558373307?refcode=X_120821_AbortionUnderAttack&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MjcwOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMWU2ZTMzZi02YTU4LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=V5yJ_tIAQMsZyZ2cqLwNTSscpjQiMPewKokhkZFlpj0=)

Hey friends,

As we wrap up 2021, we're gearing up for a busy year ahead.

The Pennsylvania Senate race is heating up, and our country is facing some urgent challenges -- defeating the pandemic, rebuilding our economy, protecting the right to vote and the right to choose, and fighting climate change, just to name a few.

And you ignored us. Our team authorized me to extend the deadline, but JUST for you! You now have until midnight TONIGHT. We're really disappointed in you that you missed your first deadline! We NEED good and true Conservatives like YOU to stand with Trump and House Conservatives! "Let us know we can still count on you by renewing your membership by MIDNIGHT tonight!" If you act NOW, you could be one of the FIRST loyal Trump patriots to become a 2022 member. | | | "PRE-ORDER NOW" This is the LAST time we can extend the deadline for this very special pre-sale. Please don't let us down! I need you to get in contact with Fellow Conservative ASAP! Can you make sure they saw our message about their 2021 supporter status? name: Hoan Huynh
subject: Over 1,000 murders in Chicago in 2021 - We Need Action Now!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Citizens for Hoan
body:
image of ... [https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP21/1/89231/images/Web%20Cover%20%20%281%29.png]Hi Peter,
We have seen over 1,000 homicides this past year in our neighborhoods all throughout Chicago and Cook County. Gun violence continues to have a impact on the public safety of our families and our children, and on our local economy and small businesses.
Over 4,100 individuals have been shot in Chicago and Cook County this past year, 69% more than in the previous year. The youngest - a 1-month-old boy. The oldest, a senior citizen in his 80s.
This is simply unacceptable. Yet year after year, we have career politicians using the same old playbook to solve these challenges and they have failed us.
We are living through an economic crisis and mental health crisis exacerbated by this pandemic. We need to build forward and invest in fresh, new, innovative ideas to end gun violence in our communities, protect our kids, support our small businesses, and provide economic opportunities for those struggling to get by.
Ending gun violence in our neighborhoods, protecting our families, and ensuring public safety is a priority of mine. Help our campaign get the word out to more voters by chipping in today!
Chip in $49 Today! [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hoan_for_congress]Chip in $49 today to help us reach more voters and fight to end gun violence in our communities!
Thank you so much!
In Solidarity,
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP21/1/89231/images/Hoan%20Sig.JPG]Hoan Huynh

Gun violence continues to have a impact on the public safety of our families and our children, and on our local economy and small businesses. Over 4,100 individuals have been shot in Chicago and Cook County this past year, 69% more than in the previous year. The youngest - a 1-month-old boy. The oldest, a senior citizen in his 80s. This is simply unacceptable. Yet year after year, we have career politicians using the same old playbook to solve these challenges and they have failed us. We are living through an economic crisis and mental health crisis exacerbated by this pandemic. We need to build forward and invest in fresh, new, innovative ideas to end gun violence in our communities, protect our kids, support our small businesses, and provide economic opportunities for those struggling to get by. Ending gun violence in our neighborhoods, protecting our families, and ensuring public safety is a priority of mine. Help our campaign get the word out to more voters by chipping in today! Chip in $49 Today! [ in $49 today to help us reach more voters and fight to end gun violence in our communities! Thank you so much! In Solidarity, [ Huynh [] [] [] [] Paid for by Citizens for Hoan Citizens for Hoan PO Box 408158 Chicago, IL 60640 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: .

name: Aadland For Senate
subject: A dose of the truth
body:
Socialist government is destructive of the human spirit
---
| | | | | | Volume 19 | December 8, 2021
---
|
---
| A Word From Erik
---
| | |
---|---
|
Politics has become an ugly game and our government is a reflection of society. In reality, it is not a game, but a high stakes arena with extremely impactful results; we all pay a price when we ignore what the government is doing.

If you look around, it is easy to be discouraged. Society, and therefore our government, has grown sick and corrupt, weak and cowardly, lacking in honor and virtue. The Left has no restraint in spending, has lost respect for the rule of law, and no longer feels accountable to the American people; to the peril of you and me. Some days it seems their intent is to enslave the American people, stripping us of our rights and making us proxies of the state. But I have hope that the American Spirit is not dead, but only slumbers, ready to be reawakened. I am committed to rebuilding what Ronald Reagan once called the Shining City on a Hill. It is the same vision our founders had, and I know that we can build the Shining City on a Hill if only we come together as American people united on the principles of freedom and the US Constitution.

Yet no such city can be built upon sand. It cannot be built on lies, or deception, or rottenness. It cannot be built on division or hatred. No, it must be built on truth and sound principle and goodness. To build the Shining City on the Hill, society itself must change. It must become moral again

Government is not our savior, yet the Radical Left wants to replace our freedom with dependence upon socialist handouts and the redistribution of wealth. This is not a virtuous path; rather it is destructive of the human spirit, and robs each of us the joy and dignity of life.

My goal in running for the U.S. Senate is to be able to put power back into the hands of the people. I believe you should be able to live your life without the heavy hand of government constantly telling you what do to, taking your hard-earned money, and spending it for its own benefit. Each day I serve in office, I will be able to look myself in the mirror, knowing I did what was right and good--restoring freedom to the people.

If we truly and thoughtfully consider the Leftist agenda, we cannot help but realize it is one of division. It is an ideology that aims to disempower the individual, forcing us to view life through the lens of color or other superficial differences, pitting each of us against one another.

Together we must stand against anyone who would separate us from our unalienable rights and divide Americans against each other. We must stop the government from taxing us and spending our money in an endless death spiral. Stand with me today by donating to this cause.

Together we will reverse the tide of the Leftist agenda, establishing a firm foundation for that Shining City on a Hill, one built on rock.
|
---
| | |
---
| | |
---
| Stop the foreign invasion
---
| [ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001IHBooM7hK098fbvLlO5XJkrDzwaaeO8OuSMSD9gA6IIlGn3yilFGcd-0d6PjRbG8JdRIlaVWYbZSHbdjDtdglZatLyW0iKbP1F3aFNcu6J2GP36PXHZ-eNY8U9kOFcR8bx3nqPmRLRcHmXylfW3TDKtkkc7in3XSrsB6jBirGuYsh2TjgLEdav5dj1IxvIBwWPNFjVaaegg=&c=KTlcN_bIUWDME0-zC00bTTWeipzMF-DNQtvyoiWNA0kSfGCP79wDmw==&ch=DsPsDDdVCE1HFcUiISLIL2TgSW1ZCC4Z51Kz0te03LbtiKG604gRfg==)
---
| | |
---
| Campaign Update
---
| |
---|---
|
This week, I will be visiting the Foothills Republican Club and then attending the Broomfield Lincoln Day Dinner.

I will also be traveling south to Alamosa County to visit with our wonderful supporters there.

I sincerely hope to see you soon on the trail!
| | |
---
| Every bit can help
---
| Erik's effort to represent Colorado in the U.S. Senate is a true grass-roots campaign. There is no family fortune behind this drive. No generations of beer barons, or Fat-Cat donors from California and New York backing our organization.
There's just us...and you. Anything you can spare will help Erik secure the nomination. Please consider a donation today.
Help Erik right this ship! Join the cause and share what you can spare. With our gratitude, Aadland for U.S. Senate Staff
---
|
---
|
---
| | [Make a Donation](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001IHBooM7hK098fbvLlO5XJkrDzwaaeO8OuSMSD9gA6IIlGn3yilFGcWPfhksS8ZXq-yNRVVJv7uJevmUTWzF89rEheW2cqMPY2hydsLofj-m8UubOplz0UdzoMmnI1Tm1QIhTbzgNZBee7uXiE6ye-1fqzMFrTfBcAJapWK836MjEnFe7u5qhTtP9s-atbVoGezii1hGmPK_-yIIGR6GCrwAflJQgr5u5-l8S-_zQvZs9h5lTOHGjaCmpuQxeKwJF&c=KTlcN_bIUWDME0-zC00bTTWeipzMF-DNQtvyoiWNA0kSfGCP79wDmw==&ch=DsPsDDdVCE1HFcUiISLIL2TgSW1ZCC4Z51Kz0te03LbtiKG604gRfg==)
---
| | |
---
|
---
| Upcoming Events
---

Saturday, December 11th at 6:00 PM: the Broomfield County Lincoln Day Dinner. Location: Broomfield Community Center (Lakeshore 3), 280 Spader Way Broomfield, CO, 80020 Tickets are $60.
Sunday, December 12th at 4:00 PM: The Alamosa GOP Christmas Party Meet & Greet. Location: The Reeds at Cattails Golf Course at 500 Cottonwood Drive, Alamosa, CO 81101 (Erik will be one of several candidates in attendance). There may be a ticket cost at the door.

name: Katie
subject: Preserving the dignity of a hard day’s work
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Britt for Alabama, Inc
body:
Launching: Farmers for Katie Britt **“Farmers feed and clothe Alabama, the nation, and**** _the_********_world_****.”** **Katie Britt** Peter, Our state would be nothing without the farmers and their families who **work day in and day out** to ensure we all have the basic necessities we need to **survive and thrive.**
I am so proud to launch the Farmers for Katie Britt Coalition, a group dedicated to the advancement of some of our state’s hardest workers. I entered this Senate race because our country is going in the wrong direction.
* The costs of food, gasoline, and heating fuel are skyrocketing.
* We can't keep store shelves stocked heading into the holidays due to supply chain problems or lack of workers.
* Brazen criminals are on smash-and-grab crime sprees in cities across the country.
* And around the world, our friends don't trust us and our enemies don't fear us after President Biden abandoned Americans and our allies in Afghanistan in a hasty pull-out against military advice.

**We've got to get this country back on the right track.**

The Democrats are determined to defeat our campaign because they know if Republicans WIN in Georgia - we'll WIN BACK the Senate majority and STOP the Biden-Pelosi-Schumer agenda.

Our campaign is being outraised by our opponent, and we need your help to pick up the pace. | Fellow American, We were just reviewing a campaign update that our finance team sent over, and we wanted to personally follow up with you. Our Democrat opponent in the Georgia Senate race is off to a record-breaking fundraising pace, and he already has $17 MILLION in his war chest. If 450 new grassroots supporters will chip in just $3 right now, it will give our conservative campaign the boost it needs to WIN! I entered this Senate race because our country is going in the wrong direction. The costs of food, gasoline, and heating fuel are skyrocketing. We can't keep store shelves stocked heading into the holidays due to supply chain problems or lack of workers. Brazen criminals are on smash-and-grab crime sprees in cities across the country. And around the world, our friends don't trust us and our enemies don't fear us after President Biden abandoned Americans and our allies in Afghanistan in a hasty pull-out against military advice. We've got to get this country back on the right track. The Democrats are determined to defeat our campaign because they know if Republicans WIN in Georgia - we'll WIN BACK the Senate majority and STOP the Biden-Pelosi-Schumer agenda. So how about it? body:
Breaking news in the investigation of Trump's January 6th insurrection...
| | | [](https://go.dscc.org/go/5970?ask=5&t=4&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50%2C100%2C150%2C250&code=DPE-ND-20211208-InsurrectionAccountabilityUpdate-Jan6-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20211208-InsurrectionAccountabilityUpdate-Jan6-Pros-sl1&akid=2194%2E9716520%2EtPAOlL)

**UPDATE via CNN: "January 6 committee subpoenas issued for 5 Trump allies"**

_Donald Trump is trying to BLOCK the investigation into the attack on the Capitol, but Democratic lawmakers are fighting back -- and we need to prove that we stand with them._ **So tell us now:**

**Do you support the investigation into the January 6th insurrection?**

| | | [Yes](https://go.dscc.org/go/5970?ask=5&t=5&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50%2C100%2C150%2C250&code=DPE-ND-20211208-InsurrectionAccountabilityUpdate-Jan6-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20211208-InsurrectionAccountabilityUpdate-Jan6-Pros-sl1&akid=2194%2E9716520%2EtPAOlL)

---

Team -- The GOP has been fighting tooth and nail for MONTHS to stop the truth of what happened on January 6th from being revealed, but this is a new low:

**Trump’s legal team has indicated he could soon ask the conservatives on the Supreme Court to help him BLOCK key documents and testimony!**

Trump and his allies are hoping we won't stand up to his delays, distractions, and distortions -- so let's step up TODAY and prove them wrong.

**It's time to show that Americans DO CARE about the rule of law, even if Trump doesn't -- so please tell us by midnight tonight:**

**Do you support the investigation into the January 6th insurrection?**

| | [Yes](https://go.dscc.org/go/5970?ask=5&t=7&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50%2C100%2C150%2C250&code=DPE-ND-20211208-InsurrectionAccountabilityUpdate-Jan6-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20211208-InsurrectionAccountabilityUpdate-Jan6-Pros-sl1&akid=2194%2E9716520%2EtPAOlL)

name: Team Harder
subject: Deep dive: misinformation and Latinos
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Harder for Congress
body:
| [](https://act.myngp.com/el/51ZGoT1wISuyqA3LTCv2OupVvFFiFgGKit6wElvuzFw=/4HQlBwcgMO-hbvIChBNXHGrZVQOKJfFGRJp51nIgLPg=?refcode=E12828-20211208-LatinoMisinformation-header-GOP-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=15) | Hi Peter, Did you see this new **[Associated Press report](https://act.myngp.com/el/51ZGoT1wISuyqA3LTCv2OupVvFFiFgGKit6wElvuzFw=/y860IbZe7d3iqWDOxM0moFRV3CsL0MSBsytMX0tq-xI=)** about the GOP's strategy to target Latinos with misinformation? This is a big red flag for us here in the Valley and we want to share why. _(Ok, here goes a deep dive into misinformation tactics, stick with us ...)_ As you know, the Valley is incredibly diverse: Latinos make up over 40% of our community, including 10,000 Dreamers. Josh has made listening to our Latino community a top priority - in fact, one of our first hires was our Latino Constituency Director (thanks to your help!). However, Republicans see an opportunity. According to the AP, the GOP is waging an aggressive misinformation campaign to turn Latinos against Josh and Democrats. All this is happening online, in Spanish, and under the radar of Facebook's oversight. The ads range from asserting President Biden is a communist (a salient hit for parts of our Latino community) to pushing false voter fraud conspiracy theories. And Facebook barely notices - **misinformation in Spanish is only caught 29% of the time, compared to 70% of the time when it 's in English.** The GOP has free rein to lie online with little to no consequences. [](https://act.myngp.com/el/51ZGoT1wISuyqA3LTCv2OupVvFFiFgGKit6wElvuzFw=/4HQlBwcgMO-hbvIChBNXHGrZVQOKJfFGRJp51nIgLPg=?refcode=E12828-20211208-LatinoMisinformation-graphic-GOP-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=15) Peter, it's clear that social media platforms aren't prepared to deal with the slew of Spanish-language disinformation out there. In fact, **an internal Facebook memo admitted that the website 's ability to detect disinformation is "basically non-existent" in non-English comments.** And meanwhile, Google is estimated to make nearly $6 million off of ads targeted to websites that peddled COVID-19 disinformation in Spanish this year. This misinformation is extremely dangerous not only to Democrats, but literally to our democracy. Here on Team Harder, we're passionate about uplifting Latino voices and these misinformation tactics are at the core of what is wrong with politics. We're confident that our Latino organizing program (both online and offline) can be successful, but we need your help keeping it funded. If you're as upset and frustrated as we are, [**please consider chipping in $15 to help us continue to do the real, grassroots work of listening and organizing within our Latino community.**](https://act.myngp.com/el/51ZGoT1wISuyqA3LTCv2OupVvFFiFgGKit6wElvuzFw=/4HQlBwcgMO-hbvIChBNXHGrZVQOKJfFGRJp51nIgLPg=?refcode=E12828-20211208-LatinoMisinformation-SL-GOP-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=15) Thanks for standing with us, Team Harder
---
* * *

[](https://act.myngp.com/el/51ZGoT1wISuyqA3LTCv2OupVvFFiFgGKit6wElvuzFw=/OfosRNcqauawCnTsNvuTd6oW1G3feXQF-0TmAn_iZ5U=) [](https://act.myngp.com/el/51ZGoT1wISuyqA3LTCv2OupVvFFiFgGKit6wElvuzFw=/wsuKljiQsGqtu5iBPdR-MNStIu-qqXUyGbWm1MgmwIM=)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com because CA-10 is one of our nation's most pivotal tossup districts. But if you'd like to receive fewer emails, we understand. You can click [**here**](https://act.myngp.com/el/51ZGoT1wISuyqA3LTCv2OupVvFFiFgGKit6wElvuzFw=/BvhDi8DlLZK3DOtjuFAPQOVaCkOSP-il_chx4YPYpYM=?recipientId=JGP1LIgKX8KYGR8WifkGL1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com) to get only the most important updates, or you can [unsubscribe](https://act.myngp.com/el/51ZGoT1wISuyqA3LTCv2OupVvFFiFgGKit6wElvuzFw=/xYItetcWnD2bzf7mWXRPD2YyZeE74DXG67dxyT6fls8=) here.
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/51ZGoT1wISuyqA3LTCv2OupVvFFiFgGKit6wElvuzFw=/4HQlBwcgMO-hbvIChBNXHGrZVQOKJfFGRJp51nIgLPg=?refcode=E12828-20211208-LatinoMisinformation-graphic-GOP-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=15)
[DONATE](https://act.myngp.com/el/51ZGoT1wISuyqA3LTCv2OupVvFFiFgGKit6wElvuzFw=/4HQlBwcgMO-hbvIChBNXHGrZVQOKJfFGRJp51nIgLPg=?refcode=E12828-20211208-LatinoMisinformation-SB-GOP-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=15)

Josh and his wife Pam live in Turlock where Josh grew up and delivered newspapers for the Turlock Journal. Josh was re-elected to Congress on behalf of families in the Central Valley where he's fighting to hold our government accountable, pass COVID-19 relief, and deliver on our progressive values. **[Will you help him keep up the fight in Congress by making a contribution today?](https://act.myngp.com/el/51ZGoT1wISuyqA3LTCv2OupVvFFiFgGKit6wElvuzFw=/4HQlBwcgMO-hbvIChBNXHGrZVQOKJfFGRJp51nIgLPg=?refcode=E12828-20211208-LatinoMisinformation-footer-GOP-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=15)**

One of the reasons Mark was able to win in 2020 was because we campaigned in ALL of Arizona.
#

Friends —
The only way Mark Kelly wins re-election is if we campaign in ALL of Arizona.
That means registering and talking to voters in each and every county in Arizona. This is going to be an extremely close race, and every last vote will count.
When this month ends, we’re legally required to report our fundraising numbers. And right now, we’re finalizing our plans to reach voters with our 15 County Plan.
But we’ll only have what we need to win if everyone chips in. So we’re asking:

subject: re: is the Omicron variant here to scare you

body:
the COVID hysteria has already gone on too long... And these power-hungry bureaucrats don’t want to let go! That’s p
| _Sponsored message_ |
---|---|---
_**DEFEND LIBERTY: REJECT COVID HYSTERIA**_ **[CHIP IN NOW >>](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zs1fsrs54d6rq8sthp7lqmd7tkgvdobbab8hob58_rp22sh2s8i66pj0sjie9o30cjh2bs)** [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zulbc12lqo4gjvoark03r5ucmeou72l9gfuebmbg_rp22sh2s8i66pj0sjie9o30cjh2bs) | |
---
Friend, the COVID hysteria has already gone on too long...

And these power-hungry bureaucrats don’t want to let go!

That’s probably why we’re hearing a lot about this new _spooky_ “omicron variant.”

But let’s be clear \- the omicron variant in South Africa, and now, California, is reported as an illness with MILD symptoms and no one has been hospitalized for it at this point.

**_But of course, Dr. Fauci and Joe Biden are using this as an excuse to take your freedoms before we even know the facts._**

We must stand strong on the side of science and refuse to allow another lockdown, more regulation, or more useless rules._If you ask me, enough is enough! If you agree, please chip in today to join my fight. _
**_By donating below, you are making an immediate contribution_**
__
[**ONE CLICK DONATE: $100 **](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z5a13b63fcjkl3r4cs8okgq1431nmnv8e2etvqqg_)
[**ONE CLICK DONATE: $75 **](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z62o06nv3al55vfn3poo8243lll4497b0i403aeo_)
[**ONE CLICK DONATE: $50 **](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zfs0j307uh4ojr7phf091pj4olcs04as98lbqosg_)
[**ONE CLICK DONATE: $25 **](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z2kuhfem61tlrj6l4pitn7j0dsk1b0cn3agh51r8_)
**_If you've saved payment information with Revv, your donation will go through automatically._**
__
Friend, if we allow this nonsense of the "safety at all costs" narrative to continue, we're never going to be a free country again.

There's no vaccine, no law, and no regulation that will satisfy power-hungry leaders like Biden and Fauci. EVER.

No matter what “variant” they’re trying to scare us with, freedom must prevail.

That's why I'm putting my foot down. I will not believe the hype. I refuse to allow this chaos to become permanent, friend.

I have real power as a U.S. Senator to expose these bureaucrats and their endless theatrics, but I can't do it alone.

I need to show strength against the bureaucracy. [**Would you please chip in $100, $50, $25, or $10 to help out?**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z8u0ergncjnu3m771dep8ahbs51rfpoqh84veg98_rp22sh2s8i66pj0sjie9o30cjh2bs)

Together, I know you and I can stop them. And we can't give up until we do.

In Liberty,
Rand Paul
__

He's running for Congress in California's 22nd District to replace Devin Nunes -- a far-right, MAGA Republican who just abandoned the Central Valley. Phil is a champion for real working families and will fight to protect health care access, keep guns out of the wrong hands, and stand up to traitorous Republicans who are working to ruin our Democracy.

One more thing: MAGA Republicans are desperate to keep this open seat red with Devin Nunes stepping down. We came so close in 2020, even though Nunes outspent our campaign four-to-one. body:
|
---

[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39475372/320010662/922507959?refcode=em21_emailheader&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDc2NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ZDI1Yzc5MC03MDU4LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XXQi7BP1KH7SMS9Qbc139019NYiNUP-ONCvfKGA_DCc=)

Team,

With President Biden's first year in office coming to a close, we wanted to reach out to everyone and get **your** sense of how well he's addressing your top priorities.

There's no shortage of pundits and pollsters sharing their opinions in the news, but we'd rather hear directly from you, team.

**[With that in mind, can you take a few moments out of your day to fill out this super brief survey about President Biden? We want to know what you think of Biden's 1st year, especially if you think there's room for improvement.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39475373/320010663/-1360912479?ms=em21_211208_bidensurvey1&refcode=em21_211208_bidensurvey1&noskip=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDc2NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ZDI1Yzc5MC03MDU4LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XXQi7BP1KH7SMS9Qbc139019NYiNUP-ONCvfKGA_DCc=&emci=9ec5e167-7f57-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&emdi=9d25c790-7058-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ceid=25369896)** [TAKE THE SURVEY](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39475374/320010664/-1360912479?ms=em21_211208_bidensurvey1&refcode=em21_211208_bidensurvey1&noskip=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDc2NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ZDI1Yzc5MC03MDU4LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XXQi7BP1KH7SMS9Qbc139019NYiNUP-ONCvfKGA_DCc=&emci=9ec5e167-7f57-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&emdi=9d25c790-7058-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ceid=25369896) Republican obstructionists, led by Mitch McConnell and Kevin McCarthy, have done everything they can to impede President Biden's legislative priorities. Nevertheless, President Biden and congressional Democrats are doing what they can to deliver for working people, small business owners, and families.

From passing a historic infrastructure package to the Child Tax Credit, which has given millions of working families the relief they need -- we are moving forward. **I think a great example of this is in the recent job creation numbers; take a look:**
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39475375/320010665/-1360912479?ms=em21_211208_bidensurvey1&refcode=em21_211208_bidensurvey1&noskip=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDc2NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ZDI1Yzc5MC03MDU4LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XXQi7BP1KH7SMS9Qbc139019NYiNUP-ONCvfKGA_DCc=&emci=9ec5e167-7f57-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&emdi=9d25c790-7058-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ceid=25369896)

I'm certainly impressed; millions of jobs were created in President Biden's first year of office? Better than the past four Republican presidents? Even better.

**[Stats are great, but your input is better. Can you take a few minutes to fill out our brief survey on Biden's 1st year in office, team?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39475376/320010666/-1360912479?ms=em21_211208_bidensurvey1&refcode=em21_211208_bidensurvey1&noskip=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDc2NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ZDI1Yzc5MC03MDU4LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XXQi7BP1KH7SMS9Qbc139019NYiNUP-ONCvfKGA_DCc=&emci=9ec5e167-7f57-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&emdi=9d25c790-7058-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ceid=25369896)**

Thanks and take care,

Kelley,
Campaign Manager

name: Tim Baxter
subject: The DCCC attacks me for supporting gun rights
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BAXTER FOR CONGRESS** ](https://email

The five members of the U.S. House of Representatives arrived in Taiwan on Thursday night for a previously unannounced two-day trip, the second time in a month U.S. lawmakers have visited._ [](http://links.mikeforwisconsin.com/u/click?_t=958424c79255456c93ed32354ec81cfd&_m=d1ed6e49596b44aeb71b20dff91e766c&_e=Ef95HY90PeQuoAqzXHkuR8o3datb_rQpqkrXBFZ6kSBbM5km9BSlHcd0BBan-Dr9y9NlBsQS1KDihWl5eKoBqZ0b1WnY1DhMuEv0S6QOYm713CBUuRGNuMDAjGZQMpRKrsSTzB7BzGBuDdi3vItrJuyjBeH4BEfZeLTxgzaLybnk-YJqehf30anyKkW8IQK1fijUyQcN-KtiocGX_DkH2FFKdrPKAPd-iT2uCfY-t4acB67xXZe78N27hprSM4kr2OFyb425imDUq3z9UkZsVc3PnQL4c9aW1viuVqZoAWnDtFedWC4oJ2HxrD2aEoAj0wVA2eKTeZ5aLkfenuxxo7OZtKgsrkVr835Q46EDubmGQUl1u248WNe93eO_dkZlpcKURhsJ_u3mcCl7LjChcTXJeylyPNSU7Y5nJmwFJ1HAMSkGUBUBtvh7AuM6VbtS-Pvgau0Wd2JyuBuQLuhlrZL8HZ1vOeZA_DxN_bfjTDs%3D) **Bottom Line:**_The Biden administration_ _announced Thursday that it is ready to re-implement the Trump-era "Remain-in-Mexico" policy in response to a court order to do so, after making changes to secure the agreement of the Mexican government – while still seeking to abolish the program entirely.”_ Thank you for reading this month’s edition of the Foreign Policy Newsletter –– we’ll be in touch soon as we monitor developing stories from around the globe. –– Gallagher Foreign Policy HQ [**DONATE**](http://links.mikeforwisconsin.com/u/click?_t=958424c79255456c93ed32354ec81cfd&_m=d1ed6e49596b44aeb71b20dff91e766c&_e=Ef95HY90PeQuoAqzXHkuRxI5ZSanBfuGsMgS3p5eMbkHA95LhqZCcUErot1wFL35UkBIaQ8biw08ceatiRAyqX64mnTZCm_5aFDTHSh16IPC5o4iBQ3WV2UDsNx6mpEo4wsoUIc4gsaTIR6Lf8PayE0sFXZoV3erY2rAFBonixuuYA6_MJTsrwopHroCEK04gVN28-lg5_H2AmzJKmwjS8NOYcjGl8kkcXWJ19pJLHFkAP3gVhMVVjxwmM_4O5KCIHABuiesiExnrY9L6XGa90XkWI1AFr4k2jqhRkoU88LEN3BqoZZ71Cqjkc6UTwLKtRjTZ4cLZQzFpsnMiWSi2cCKwHg59epVigmRESRRPlSZnXQ4uEyYY4bVKRT1OJRjGWGEt0jrjaCzZJsfuRInj8LQOwZ47v3R5QQGNfpjNx0%3D) | |

| | Hi folks -- Susie Lee here. This election cycle is going to be tough for Democratic candidates across the country. Republicans are determined to flip Nevada red and roll back all the progress Governor Sisolak has accomplished in the past 3 years. **_It’s up to us to stop them._** Just like I’ve worked in Congress for bipartisan solutions, Steve Sisolak has worked tirelessly to bring real change to our state. From guiding our state through a global pandemic, to expanding voting rights for all Nevadans, to boosting funding for our public schools, Steve has made a brighter future a reality for millions in our state. **Steve has six MAGA Republican opponents vying to unseat him -- and Donald Trump just announced that he’s joining their fight to flip Nevada red, too.** On top of all of this, **the Cook Political Report just moved Steve's race from 'Lean Democrat' to 'Toss-up'** , signaling to Republicans that Gov. clean_body: | | | | | Hi folks -- Susie Lee here. This election cycle is going to be tough for Democratic candidates across the country. Republicans are determined to flip Nevada red and roll back all the progress Governor Sisolak has accomplished in the past 3 years. It’s up to us to stop them. Just like I’ve worked in Congress for bipartisan solutions, Steve Sisolak has worked tirelessly to bring real change to our state. From guiding our state through a global pandemic, to expanding voting rights for all Nevadans, to boosting funding for our public schools, Steve has made a brighter future a reality for millions in our state. Steve has six MAGA Republican opponents vying to unseat him -- and Donald Trump just announced that he’s joining their fight to flip Nevada red, too. On top of all of this, the Cook Political Report just moved Steve's race from 'Lean Democrat' to 'Toss-up' , signaling to Republicans that Gov. Sisolak is vulnerable. Steve just exited a multi-week fundraising blackout, and it’s up to this team to help his campaign get back on track. | | | | | | | | | | | | | Thank you for all your support, Susie Lee | | If you'd like to support Steve Sisolak for Governor, you can | Paid for and Authorized by Committee to Elect Steve Sisolak Steve Sisolak for Governor P.O. body:
This Is Your Chance To Join GOP Leadership in Wisconsin.

| [ ](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=BJAgHetUUIqrbBbKj3z09j9OpIZbBzc5g2-7VwfHf34&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=rli_fellow_3&n=1) | |

Friend \-- **_Are you a natural born leader?_** **_Are you ready to show your Conservative support?_** **_Do you want to join a team of fellow leaders working to WIN in 2022?_** If your answer to ALL of these questions is a resounding **YES** , then Friend, you are the perfect candidate for the Republican Leadership Initiative Fellowship. | [](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=8XjJBZzwzEB0R7ehhI4t7gzdOzA1rW1ARWBKRrWZFfC8zKM-wKIB4JtCKtTdC2eiVjWKKpTXPUBFoqqKvSf9bA&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=rli_fellow_3&n=2 "Apply Today >>") [Apply Today >>](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=8XjJBZzwzEB0R7ehhI4t7gzdOzA1rW1ARWBKRrWZFfC8zKM-wKIB4JtCKtTdC2eiVjWKKpTXPUBFoqqKvSf9bA&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=rli_fellow_3&n=2)

As a Republican Leadership Initiative Fellow you’ll work alongside experienced GOP operatives. During this **exclusive six week program starting on January 5th**, you will have the opportunity to:
* Master cutting-edge campaign technology
* Develop crucial leadership skills
* Build a dedicated volunteer network

Upon completion, our leadership fellows will be prepared and equipped to interview for staff positions before the upcoming critical midterm election.
_This is a virtual, statewide training program_ \-- no matter where you are you can participate! Fellowship training will occur on every Wednesday with exciting guest speakers and new topics each week.
[**_Submit your resume and APPLY TODAY!_**](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=8XjJBZzwzEB0R7ehhI4t7gzdOzA1rW1ARWBKRrWZFfC8zKM-wKIB4JtCKtTdC2eiVjWKKpTXPUBFoqqKvSf9bA&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=rli_fellow_3&n=3)

Our campaign is no stranger to unwarranted criticisms from the right. However, there's one GOP candidate in particular whose comments are too ridiculous to ignore.

This is not the kind of leader we need. Instead, we need leaders like Mayor Lori Lightfoot, who is not only working to improve our communities, but is PROUD to call this great city home. _The worst part? _This candidate has _already amassed an $11 million dollar war chest thanks to his west coast special interests. _
