name: =?utf-8?Q?Becky=20Edwards=20for=20U.S.=20Senate?=
subject: The remaining 4 Days of Voting
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Becky Edwards for U
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/9645be5a5c78/campaign-update-yellow-couch-tour-flag-day-and-juneteenth-5328034?e=10c1db3257)
---
| | [ ](https://beckyforutah.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=cb6d6dad27d2e4a00e5c44525&id=558dcfea30&e=10c1db3257)
---
| Dear Friends, We are officially in the holiday season! I couldn’t be more excited about this time of year. I love hearing the music, visiting with friends and family, and most of all, the desserts - there’s so much to be grateful for. On the campaign front, we have some great momentum, and we’re looking forward to ending the year on a high note. It’s also a critical time to look ahead at some of the big projects I’ll need your support on to have a successful campaign. Most immediately, we need as much support as we can get to help gather signatures beginning January 3. There are more details below. I hope you are all enjoying this festive time of year, and I appreciate your continued support.
---
|
---
|
# 12 Days of Voting
---
|
---
|
---
| We are 8 days into our 12 Days of Voting! As a reminder, here are the prompts for December 9-12:
---
|
---
|
# December 9: **Donate**
---
|
---
| It takes a lot of money to keep a campaign competitive. Every dollar donated helps spread our campaign message across the state. Making a contribution not only helps support this campaign but gives you a vested interest in the race. Donate to bring better politics to Washington.
---
| [DONATE](https://beckyforutah.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=cb6d6dad27d2e4a00e5c44525&id=614a6077a0&e=10c1db3257 "DONATE")
---
|
---
|
# December 10: **Spread the word about our newsletter**
---
|
---
| Every week we send a newsletter with campaign updates and thoughts on the news and information that impacts Utahns. Tell your friends and family that [subscribing to the newsletter](https://beckyforutah.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=cb6d6dad27d2e4a00e5c44525&id=dc91eeccc9&e=10c1db3257) is the best way to stay in the loop.
---
|
---
|
# December 11: **Subscribe to Better With Becky**
---
|
---
| Our podcast Better with Becky is a weekly conversation about the latest campaign news and current events. [Subscribe](https://beckyforutah.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=cb6d6dad27d2e4a00e5c44525&id=376ad1548e&e=10c1db3257) to get a more in-depth discussion of the news of the week and campaign updates.
---
|
---
|
# December 12: Mark your calendar for the Republican primary election!
---
|
---
| Give yourself the gift of a new senator in 2022! Mark your calendar for June 28 and remember to vote in the Republican primary election!
---
|
---
| To catch up on the December 1-7 prompts, find our posts on [Facebook](https://beckyforutah.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=cb6d6dad27d2e4a00e5c44525&id=44f404cb62&e=10c1db3257), [Twitter](https://beckyforutah.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=cb6d6dad27d2e4a00e5c44525&id=dc24c8d85d&e=10c1db3257), and [Instagram](https://beckyforutah.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=cb6d6dad27d2e4a00e5c44525&id=b1f4620e31&e=10c1db3257).
---
|
---
|
# **Signature-Gathering Locations**
---
|
---
|
---
| Starting January 3, we will have a number of signature-gathering events around the state. We need 28,000 signatures to ensure a place on the Republican primary election ballot. **Mark your calendar for one of the days and times listed**[**here**.](https://beckyforutah.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=cb6d6dad27d2e4a00e5c44525&id=e9bc79085d&e=10c1db3257) Signers need to meet the following criteria to sign a signature packet:
---
|
---
|
---
|
# **Happy Hanukkah**
---
|
---
|
---
| (My husband John and I with Governor Cox and Rabbi Benny Zippel)

During the four years our family lived in NYC, some of our dearest friends brought us into their Jewish community and made us feel right at home. This year we had the honor of attending the menorah lighting at the Utah Capitol and it felt like that same coming home in many ways. It was a beautiful ceremony full of commitment to the community and deep respect for miracles that bring light to all our lives.
---
|
---
|
# **Give the Gift of a Yard Sign**
---
|
---
|
---
| Our campaign just received a new shipment of yard signs! This holiday season, show your support of my campaign to your neighbors by placing a sign in your yard. Request a sign [here](https://beckyforutah.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=cb6d6dad27d2e4a00e5c44525&id=b41eaedf0b&e=10c1db3257) and tell your friends and family to do the same.
---
|
---
|
# **Mental Health Roundtable**
---
|
---
| Last week I had the opportunity to participate in a mental health roundtable with state leaders, physicians, and advocates to discuss behavioral health and suicide prevention. I appreciated the important conversations I had with those trying to better behavioral health resources, and I look forward to being a partner for a positive impact in the mental health space on the federal level.
---
|
---
|
# **Contact Me**
---
|
---
| I want to know the stories that are on your mind. I believe that the only way to truly represent you right is to know you first, so reach out! You can follow me on [Twitter](https://beckyforutah.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=cb6d6dad27d2e4a00e5c44525&id=6e7f5b5cb7&e=10c1db3257), [Facebook](https://beckyforutah.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=cb6d6dad27d2e4a00e5c44525&id=b8d959f2e5&e=10c1db3257), and [Instagram](https://beckyforutah.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=cb6d6dad27d2e4a00e5c44525&id=77eb6ad28f&e=10c1db3257) where my DMs are always open, and you can email me becky@beckyforutah.com.
---
| I hope you have a wonderful Thanksgiving! Thank you again for all your support.
---

No contribution is too small when we’re a people-powered grassroots movement.
# [](https://act.morganharper.org/go/1512?refcode=em20211208-443-footer-ak&t=2&akid=443%2E90090%2Eh7lBtc)
Get this: [_**A one time, $1 donation from you right now can change the face of this race and we’ll tell you how.**_](https://act.morganharper.org/go/17198?t=3&akid=443%2E90090%2Eh7lBtc)
**[Contribute $1](https://act.morganharper.org/go/17199?refcode=em20211208-443-el&t=4&akid=443%2E90090%2Eh7lBtc)**
Our team has been so intentional about building a people-powered, grassroots movement for Ohio. We’re women, people of color, and first-generation folks, and this is the type of movement that we _wished_ we could’ve seen growing up.
Morgan — and many of us on her team — have experienced growing up working class or low-income. Whether you’ve donated before, or you’ve only been able to volunteer, phone-bank, or subscribe to our mailing list to get emails like this one, _you’re a valuable member of our Morganize team_.
This movement is for all of us to build a better Ohio that supports communities across the state, not just the rich and well-resourced. [**_That’s why today we’re asking you for a $1 donation_**](https://act.morganharper.org/go/17198?t=5&akid=443%2E90090%2Eh7lBtc)[.](https://act.morganharper.org/go/17198?t=6&akid=443%2E90090%2Eh7lBtc) Thousands of people giving just $1 can give our campaign the resources we need to get out and mobilize voters, fuel up our car and travel across the state to visit communities across Ohio, allow us to update our website, and run ads online.
As you can see, your $1 goes a long way. We’re a people-powered movement and we don’t depend on huge million-dollar corporate donations for our campaign.
We run on small-dollar donations for thousands of folks across the state and country who believe in our bold, progressive platform that our systems should work for and uplift the everyday person, not just the wealthy elite.
[**_So what do you say_****? Can we count on your $1 contribution today? It’s going to take all of us to create a better Ohio.**](https://act.morganharper.org/go/17198?t=7&akid=443%2E90090%2Eh7lBtc)
**[Contribute $1](https://act.morganharper.org/go/17199?refcode=em20211208-443-el&t=8&akid=443%2E90090%2Eh7lBtc)**
Thank you for being with us,
The Finance Team
[](https://act.morganharper.org/go/17198?t=9&akid=443%2E90090%2Eh7lBtc)
Morgan Harper for U.S. Senate
**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mh-email?refcode=em20211208-443-footer&t=10&refcode2=443_90090_h7lBtc&akid=443%2E90090%2Eh7lBtc)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/mh4oh/) | [](https://twitter.com/mh4oh) | [](https://www.instagram.com/mh4oh)
Email us: contact@morganharper.org
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch, so thank you for reading to the end. Grassroots donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Morgan Harper for Ohio, P.O. Box 15008, Columbus, OH 43215.

name: Team Leahy
subject: Do you have a story to share?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Leahy for U
body:
As the senator wraps up his decades of public service, we want to hear from you.

| [](https://links.e.leahyforvermont.) Friend, Senator Leahy recently announced that he won't be seeking reelection next year after serving Vermont in the Senate for 47 years. **As the senator prepares to wrap up his decades of public service, we 'd love to hear from folks across Vermont and across the nation about how his service has impacted your or your loved ones' lives. ** [**Do you have any personal stories or words of appreciation you 'd like us to pass onto Senator Leahy? Share your story with us here.**](https://links.e.leahyforvermont.) [](https://links.e.leahyforvermont.) From creating farm to school lunch programs for kids to protecting the civil liberties of every American, Senator Leahy has been a strong moral voice in the Senate for so many years. And through his Senate work, he has had the privilege to meet thousands of Americans over the years and touched many lives in our country and around the world. [**We know that the senator would so appreciate hearing any personal anecdotes or comments you have speaking to his years in the Senate. Just click here to share your story, and we 'll be sure to pass it onto the senator. **](https://links.e.leahyforvermont.) On behalf of the senator's whole team, thank you so much for your support over the years. Sincerely, Team Leahy | [SHARE YOUR STORY »](https://links.e.leahyforvermont.com/els/v2/D_zeSG2NPxQ3/NVc5Sk9oSCt2TEQramFObHZmallUeHk4ZlZLaDY0YVVyU1h3RjFPWFZYQjlKYWRBeUJCaUR2ZEV5WGxkRDJ1a3d3alc1ZnZoTkFteU1LZkJ4TVhEeXZhTTlSSEtFVENROHN2OEsrNVVLeFk9S0/REdiNzRWNVQveURPNzAvMWR6ZEdmKzdpa1dYQ1RtOVJ1b0VVWW8xbVp6RXlFZjl5SVdLb3hMNGJXWFZWdFNZNUZuT1RMbktpcmduV2NlOWEvWmt0WFNuWllIM3V1aTBMS0)

I wanted to make sure you saw this important news, friend.

**I officially announced my campaign for Congress in Texas' brand-new 37th Congressional District.** It's critical that we win big in this Democratic-leaning Austin district in order to flip Texas blue up and down the ticket.

[**Our filing deadline to get on the ballot is less than a week away and unfortunately we’re still a bit behind on our fundraising. It would mean the world to me if you could help me get on the ballot. Can I count on you to chip in $15 right now?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39476374/320015923/1898666321?refcode=em-12821-nopens-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NjQ2OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2YzRiN2Y2My03NjU4LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=z9M2KS2q-HpklxqTzhWgRiQeseOY2DDy_Vel3HIV_kI=)

---

I'm running for Congress because working families need representation to fight out-of-control income inequality.

Early in my career, I witnessed my company move manufacturing to Mexico and lay off the assembly workers. Many of them had no career options and struggled to work a decent paying job again.

I led a non-profit that provides free education and job training. We helped thousands, but I realized we need to do more.

When most people think of Texas, they think of Greg Abbott and the furthest right-wing who make headlines. **But the real story is that we're home to a fast growing and diverse population -- where single-payer health care, debt-free education, and wage increases are _extremely_ popular and much-needed.**

This new district is our chance to shape the future of our state, and Texas’ 37th district is our BEST SHOT to make progress for working families in this state. This is how we flip Texas blue. But right now, I need your help to get on the ballot:

[**We need to raise another $9,199 to keep pace toward our end-of-week goal. If you have the means, please rush in $5, $15, or even $35 to keep my campaign running strong.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39476377/320015925/1898666321?refcode=em-12821-nopens-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NjQ2OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2YzRiN2Y2My03NjU4LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=z9M2KS2q-HpklxqTzhWgRiQeseOY2DDy_Vel3HIV_kI=)

clean_body: Texas is home to one of the fastest growing and most diverse populations in the country. | We're alerting Democrats about Donna Imam -- a computer engineer, former education non-profit president, and Democrat running for Texas' new Democratic-leaning Congressional District 37 in Austin, Texas. To support Donna's campaign,= We'd hate to see you go, but you can click here if you'd like to . = I wanted to make sure you saw this important news, friend. I officially announced my campaign for Congress in Texas' brand-new 37th Congressional District. It's critical that we win big in this Democratic-leaning Austin district in order to flip Texas blue up and down the ticket. = | = I'm running for Congress because working families need representation to fight out-of-control income inequality. Early in my career, I witnessed my company move manufacturing to Mexico and lay off the assembly workers. Many of them had no career options and struggled to work a decent paying job again. I led a non-profit that provides free education and job training. We helped thousands, but I realized we need to do more. When most people think of Texas, they think of Greg Abbott and the furthest right-wing who make headlines. But the real story is that we're home to a fast growing and diverse population -- where single-payer health care, debt-free education, and wage increases are extremely popular and much-needed. This new district is our chance to shape the future of our state, and Texas’ 37th district is our BEST SHOT to make progress for working families in this state. This is how we flip Texas blue. But right now, I need your help to get on the ballot: = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = Thanks in advance, Donna = | = Donna Imam is a a computer engineer, former education non-profit president, and Democrat running for Texas' new Democratic-leaning Congressional District 37 in Austin, Texas. If you'd like to learn more, you can visit Donna's website here: Consider supporting Donna's campaign by = If you'd prefer to send a check, our address is: PO BOX 170305 Austin, TX 78717. Please make the check payable to Donna Imam for Congress. We'd hate to see you go, but you can click here if you'd like to . Donna Imam For Congress PO BOX 170305 Austin, TX 78717 United States

Folks, my priority is delivering for New Mexico and our country. Right now, that means working day in and day out to pass the _Build Back Better Act_. **The _Build Back Better Act_ will create 1.5 million jobs each year for the next decade, cut costs and taxes for the middle class, and directly take on the climate crisis.** From jumpstarting climate careers with the Civilian Climate Corps, to putting money back in your pockets when you purchase and install emission-reducing electric appliances, the once-in-a-generation _Build Back Better Act_ is our best chance to address the existential threat of climate change and create good-paying jobs at the same time. **We need to pass this bill to make life better for folks _right now_ while also protecting our planet for future generations. Big Oil has spent decades spending billions of dollars spreading anti-science propaganda to distract the public from the climate crisis. Through at least 2018, Exxon's explicit strategy was to fund climate denial campaigns. And even as their strategy has become more subtle, this leak proves that Exxon and Big Oil don't care about the science. They just care about the money.
And when it comes to money, they have a lot of it. But as the American people increasingly feel the impact of the climate crisis in our own backyards, we are going to keep passing legislation and building this movement for bold climate action -- and we are going to win.
[_**But to succeed and continue my work to end the climate crisis -- here in Washington state and across the globe -- I need your help to hit this $50,000 Beat the Freeze goal before Friday at midnight. clean_body: Big Oil doesn't care about science. Just money. | I wanted to make sure you saw this, friend. Erik Oswald, a vice president and registered lobbyist for Exxon, was caught red-handed calling climate change not "catastrophic" or "inevitable": | "Is it catastrophic inevitable risk? Not in my mind." -Erik Oswald, Exxon Vice President & Lobbyist While Big Oil and their lobbyists are going to keep spending millions to spread more propaganda just like this, in just a couple days I 'll enter Washington state's fundraising freeze as we head towards the upcoming legislative session. If you 've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | | | | | | Big Oil has spent decades spending billions of dollars spreading anti-science propaganda to distract the public from the climate crisis. Through at least 2018, Exxon's explicit strategy was to fund climate denial campaigns. And even as their strategy has become more subtle, this leak proves that Exxon and Big Oil don't care about the science. They just care about the money. And when it comes to money, they have a lot of it. But as the American people increasingly feel the impact of the climate crisis in our own backyards, we are going to keep passing legislation and building this movement for bold climate action -- and we are going to win. Very truly yours, Jay

---
_Hey there — our end-of-year fundraising deadline is fast approaching. This email is long, but I’m going to talk about how my mom inspired me to run. If you’re already with me,[**could you chip in $10 or $25 before the day ends?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39476602/320016366/-550609136?refcode=fl_email_fr_20211208mymom_MO_full_SLA_l1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjU2NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmODVjYmNlNS03NjU4LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=SgC7vKXSnm0T9AmP6ppECiC-eAwl3ujZsD1pWLKCiyo=)
Thanks! — Mike_ Friend, It’s funny how people are really quick to say that you’ll succeed by “pulling yourself up by your bootstraps,” especially when it comes to immigrants and migrant workers. The concept of The American Dream is one that my own parents clung to when they came to the United States — however that looked like. **Unfortunately, that’s just not reality.** Take it from me, I was born to a mom who “did everything right.” She’d been told that if she did everything by the books and stayed out of trouble, she’d be rewarded with prosperity and success. Instead, she got a lifetime of hardship due to the current systems in place here. No matter how much she tried to climb the ladder, capitalism, racism, and xenophobia were right around the corner to kick the ladder and knock her down. At the end of it all, she lost her vision, her teeth, and her agency. It doesn’t have to be this way. My mom’s story is hardly unique by any means — if anything, I’m only one of thousands, if not millions, of first-generation Americans with stories like this one. But it’s this way because of the people elected into office who hold incredible power over the lives of so many. And yet, so many of them refuse to pass life-saving legislation like Medicare For All. Imagine a world where my mom didn’t have to lose her vision or teeth if she was able to have access to quality, affordable healthcare. Or maybe you, or someone you know, avoided going to the doctor so many times because of the exuberant costs of an office visit. [**That’s why as soon as I’m elected into office, I’m going to do everything I can to pass Medicare For All so that we never have to hear stories like this ever again. Friend****, I’ll need your help to get there — can you rush in a $10 or $25 donation before the day ends?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39476603/320016367/-550609136?refcode=fl_email_fr_20211208mymom_MO_full_SLA_l2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjU2NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmODVjYmNlNS03NjU4LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=SgC7vKXSnm0T9AmP6ppECiC-eAwl3ujZsD1pWLKCiyo=) | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:

No matter how much she tried to climb the ladder, capitalism, racism, and xenophobia were right around the corner to kick the ladder and knock her down. At the end of it all, she lost her vision, her teeth, and her agency. It doesn’t have to be this way. My mom’s story is hardly unique by any means — if anything, I’m only one of thousands, if not millions, of first-generation Americans with stories like this one. But it’s this way because of the people elected into office who hold incredible power over the lives of so many. And yet, so many of them refuse to pass life-saving legislation like Medicare For All. Imagine a world where my mom didn’t have to lose her vision or teeth if she was able to have access to quality, affordable healthcare. Or maybe you, or someone you know, avoided going to the doctor so many times because of the exuberant costs of an office visit. = | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = | = | = ---|---|--- = | = | = In solidarity // En solidaridad, Mike | Mike Ortega is a Democrat running for Congress in CA-46 to fight for all working people who call America home. Mike is a lifelong organizer and a biomedical engineer who has worked on the ground to fight for his community and in the lab to save lives. | | Paid for by Ortega For Congress Ortega For Congress PO Box 1271 Anaheim, CA 92815 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please .

[](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=ecca04e78236481eab83794e470c5bf2&_e=sC5s9yaVz9NuYu8ocu10FsSIcbyTx-dZXa7QMoOiGN_8L-wUqQ8C8jRGEWZUD0DxRikPxBZ3j-6aFSeiEqnvEYzqY23y0lQULUXxldZYT3ujpg3UlIn5u14vQXxyW3slbdNSbN3KqGarlSbZRD4vNYMmqT9r2JWlVvFn4Us-zLXeawTlCF3A7kZ8oCCxL2rFSMp4hBdJwGVtfCUD37wXPDBqfYcZ2IL6YdonWDMLM7_80dWFukAOBhQIx_8vmy6qvmBVvTHL_fOHkeryez9SHsQAGaaL2k9fZGgbi76MRU614p5ITR2QmU1ITWNtEYA2I7IRNZooqQFxVHxjwS3RWgegU4aW8CX8xhHLbMojn382oqFK7iS7WYDmhpHTdJfJe558ySGQRmDcdrRHFVIRcw%3D%3D)

Peter,

We have been working hard for several months to reach the voters of Texas with my winning message of strong, effective conservative leadership for our state. Recently I officially filed my candidacy for Governor with the office of the Secretary of State.

[](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=ecca04e78236481eab83794e470c5bf2&_e=sC5s9yaVz9NuYu8ocu10FsSIcbyTx-dZXa7QMoOiGN_8L-wUqQ8C8jRGEWZUD0DxRikPxBZ3j-6aFSeiEqnvEYzqY23y0lQULUXxldZYT3ujpg3UlIn5u14vQXxyW3slbdNSbN3KqGarlSbZRD4vNYMmqT9r2JWlVvFn4Us-zLX8SrtBlhOGjl6zH5e8ML0eT-jW_oPdBFtlMP-zgohdoWK93QgX-dyLpDSEP49n_uptm_LZF2P8Atl44rji6tHiBdCJYOZoKfqMFAOz_xJjvY0EMcH7prxDtQuj6DTdvhKfaXWAutV7yfEC8nIGFreXldwTwghiTMOaQpNcq9a8R6x7y7mWq10ow9Eumfp8uNOrTayFs8BvXyAwbezPbYGd5KbNDwwdlbwu69oSDH1B8A%3D%3D)
So, it is time to really shift this campaign into top gear and utilize the time we have to make our case to Texas Republicans that the future of our state - and this great country - are on the line in the next few months.

That is why I hope you will also take action today - join me on the ramparts of freedom - and support my campaign for Governor of Texas!

There are many ways you can do that, Peter - you can pray, which costs nothing but time. You can share our campaign content online and speak to friends and family about what is at stake. You can volunteer and make a difference in person.

[**And, you can make your own endorsement of my campaign - and empower us with the resources we need to build a successful foundation for the tough race ahead with a 2022 Allen West for Governor - with a generous grassroots contribution of $25, $50, $75, $100 or whatever you can afford right now.**](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=ecca04e78236481eab83794e470c5bf2&_e=sC5s9yaVz9NuYu8ocu10FsSIcbyTx-dZXa7QMoOiGN_8L-wUqQ8C8jRGEWZUD0DxRikPxBZ3j-6aFSeiEqnvEYzqY23y0lQULUXxldZYT3ujpg3UlIn5u14vQXxyW3slbdNSbN3KqGarlSbZRD4vNYMmqT9r2JWlVvFn4Us-zLXQszk9QT16NV9NnEcy5Chp4WU0hwp6aFu0X2CPfPIdZ16jf1ojaKyRT0Hw7LTdlouUPWZWth0Ob6qUs9pB50cerwsYzVibkm8BHBeZbZCYwQNE6HuoL362hXhsPQvW3LIeWZOHr2YE9hDQiTBBBqxMMh4laPcLLndH6p15pN-IgZpfH2vZLKElIhPEZkIKh2FOV8PKw8tmrYpHqgyICfNuQn5iK9gcdf-tfFMqzH7k9A%3D%3D)

[**Peter, we must turn away from the path of least resistance and complacency at the many challenges threatening our freedom and prosperity. I am prepared to lead us in a new direction, but I must have your support to succeed.**](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=ecca04e78236481eab83794e470c5bf2&_e=sC5s9yaVz9NuYu8ocu10FsSIcbyTx-dZXa7QMoOiGN_8L-wUqQ8C8jRGEWZUD0DxRikPxBZ3j-6aFSeiEqnvEYzqY23y0lQULUXxldZYT3ujpg3UlIn5u14vQXxyW3slbdNSbN3KqGarlSbZRD4vNYMmqT9r2JWlVvFn4Us-zLXZOmAgMuEzJdZZFTOWOYI6cdVxtPuOlbDNitQ8Dukhl-pFIRv0b8Gps6V8Uv8JV1MJlo4iIVsOR9s6dXLBDcXU4LZmJGOKVIANxS5Ar1wIBaOWWiL7hS5ZqtcHwukKMnu4SZlpt5QiBJIfBbO_2kdYBNwpYyTNLoyKKqZ6_xuRtzVqeZAFHwVVKdZOccxWocRRmyJZ-EQmvaR40KlXDlSU5xfsD4XT3IftWc2Ig3DSjA%3D%3D)

[**Thank you, Peter - I hope to hear from you soon.**](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=ecca04e78236481eab83794e470c5bf2&_e=sC5s9yaVz9NuYu8ocu10FsSIcbyTx-dZXa7QMoOiGN_8L-wUqQ8C8jRGEWZUD0DxRikPxBZ3j-6aFSeiEqnvEYzqY23y0lQULUXxldZYT3ujpg3UlIn5u14vQXxyW3slbdNSbN3KqGarlSbZRD4vNYMmqT9r2JWlVvFn4Us-zLXBIzyzSdtoP-XKo60Al7hsK-BH-kqidLHU495-mVkTwjYomyu1BBPGbfy1mLONVTjjsTjW7D2wEVASRbQR99-TBHT3nko6VLFLwABaunCuZV3Pm-y9_ROJrCLqs6o9dyxUjE2gS57GrnGF-VboxW7OZw-ipuADog_P3N9sELnH0LHxTQtl_eA2D8EAZPh4gwZqczFC5Kcd-SVd_KiKk9J_4EqmFOLaLijI_no1j0VZJg%3D%3D)

name: MISSING: Vaccine Survey Response
subject: Missing your Vaccine Mandate Response
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jim Jordan for Congress
body:
I'm not seeing your name on the list of conservatives who have taken our four question vaccine mandate survey [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c6650%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=hC636YruTYUaDZ%2fe%2fZXang&sysid=1)

| [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c68603%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=ElTh9kvQBgbhAcvxVSb2ZA&sysid=1)
---

Fellow American,

In August the radical left began talking about mandating vaccines for individuals working in the United States Capitol, the military, and beyond. **Now, President Biden wants to "compel" the private sector to mandate vaccinations or face fines up to $14,000 PER VIOLATION!**

**Chances are that if you’re reading this email today you already think that the heavy hand of the federal government plays too large a role in your everyday life**. And we’d agree with you. You may not be the target of the first round of vaccine mandates, but eventually the long arm of government will come for those who aren’t vaccinated, and that isn’t their role.

**We’ve lived through 21 months of a pandemic that both ravaged our economy and put us on a path to financial ruin**. Americans have suffered enough from COVID-19 restrictions, mask mandates, and now potential forced vaccinations.

**[What we want to know from you is if you agree or not. Is it time to let Americans decide how best to mitigate their risk of becoming infected with COVID-19, or should we simply accept that one day soon the government may force you to take the jab?](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c68604%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=ABB2zFmE51JIkrBVDVLldA&sysid=1)**

| _**

[WOULD YOU SUPPORT A FEDERAL BAN ON FORCED COVID-19 VACCINATIONS??](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c68615%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=sQFRS7mW2AVvUSQmIz%2fyGQ&sysid=1)** _

SURVEY REQUEST FOR: dpwillis67@gmail.com

Response Deadline: MIDNIGHT, December 8th

[** WHERE DO YOU STAND ON MANDATORY VACCINATIONS?
LET US KNOW→**](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c68616%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=ofk9TcE6OHDe3bQQbs4YKg&sysid=1)

---

Democrats told us that the pandemic would be “defeated” when enough people were inoculated to reach herd immunity. The thing is, they keep moving the bar on us.

How can we trust a government run by folks who said that if you got vaccinated, you could take your mask off? **Then soon after, back to masks, no matter your vaccine status!** Now, if you work for a company with more than 100 employees, the government is going to try to force you to get vaccinated!

The simple answer is this: we can’t trust Democrats in DC to stick to their word.

**Democrats enact mask mandates. Then don’t wear them.**

Democrats restrict social gatherings. Then break their own mandates to host oversized gatherings where virtually no one is masked.

**Democrats want to require covid vaccine mandates but let COVID positive illegal immigrants cross the southern border.**

_Will the hypocrisy ever end?_

**[Let us hear from you today. Would you support a federal ban on forced covid-19 vaccinations?](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c68617%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=BGQuDnTPuPUs7a6lrPau3w&sysid=1)**

Thanks for letting us know -

Thank you,
[](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c68618%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=Luagrzsh5AmKfXXws%2b3JUw&sysid=1)
Jim Jordan

[** WHERE DO YOU STAND ON MANDATORY VACCINATIONS?
LET US KNOW→**](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c68616%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=ofk9TcE6OHDe3bQQbs4YKg&sysid=1)

| Paid for by Jim Jordan for Congress

PO BOX 355
Delaware, OH 43015
---

body:

---
Friend, Fauci is absolutely out of control.

He's lied about COVID from the very beginning. He lied about masks. He lied about funding gain of function research.

_Now, he's lying about ME._

This weekend, Dr. Fauci called me out personally for criticizing his absolute failures. He said that anyone criticizing him is really attacking science. He told an adoring anchor that anyone who opposes him is _"really criticizing science because I represent science."_

The absolute hubris is almost too much to take - and it's yet another reason it's time to show Fauci the door.
__
[**I AGREE: FIRE FAUCI >>**](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2z6ku426ggflpcsr234dck1fprdsa19sgqlqq7tlo_rp22sh2s8i66pj4s1g64or6cdh2bs)
__
Friend, it's truly astounding and alarming that a public health bureaucrat would even think to claim such a thing.

_"I represent science."_

It's especially insane to hear that from someone who has worked so hard to ignore the science.

name: David Palmer
subject: Our families deserve piece of mind, help me help them
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Palmer for Illinois
body:
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39476645/320016577/312490568?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDg2MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MTM5ZGMzYS03NzU4LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=AzitSmcnAv-ob7EhdMnhuMMnlpfu9hCCoHqg30nIG6A=) | Peter, With two little ones in daycare, my wife Chelsea and I know how much it takes to raise a family here in Central Illinois. Across our country, families struggle to find safe, affordable child care for their kids while they earn a living. In fact, in many states, ours included, childcare can be as costly as rent or a mortgage! **No family should have to worry about choosing to keep a roof over their head and food on the table or provide their children care.** [**I am committed to creating a future that my children would be proud of. And the first step towards that is ensuring that every family in our community can grow and thrive. Can you help me bring my plans to action by contributing to my campaign today?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39476646/320016578/694734457?refcode=CTC12821&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDg2MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MTM5ZGMzYS03NzU4LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=AzitSmcnAv-ob7EhdMnhuMMnlpfu9hCCoHqg30nIG6A=) That’s why I believe that the Child Tax Credit, introduced by President Biden as part of the American Rescue Plan this year, should be permanent. This critical resource has put dollars directly into the pockets of moms and dads across America to meet the needs of their children. **Over one million families with 2.2 million kids here in Illinois will receive tax credits totaling $547 million dollars this year. It has cut childhood poverty in half already, and that’s just in year one. Imagine what this could mean for our families long term.** [**Making the Child Tax Credit permanent will continue to be an economic boon, creating jobs in the childcare industry and sending parents back to work after a difficult parenting time during the pandemic. If you agree, invest in my plans to make that a reality and make a grassroots donation to my campaign today.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39476647/320016579/694734457?refcode=CTC12821&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDg2MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MTM5ZGMzYS03NzU4LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=AzitSmcnAv-ob7EhdMnhuMMnlpfu9hCCoHqg30nIG6A=) Together, we will build a stronger future for us all. David
---
* * *
[DONATE NOW](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39476648/320016580/312490568?refcode=footer&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDg2MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MTM5ZGMzYS03NzU4LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=AzitSmcnAv-ob7EhdMnhuMMnlpfu9hCCoHqg30nIG6A=) Email is an important way for us to keep supporters like you informed about critical issues and to build a winning grassroots campaign. name: Laura Loomer
subject: They’re doing all they can to stop me!
body:
I’ve kept quiet about this for a long, long time.
| | | [](https://libersend.loomered.com/l/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/W1JQ2aVpCTdW3aSh20iFqQ/Vg2xFfsQ76jAJMwz5Z9RGg) | | Please read the message below from our sponsor, Laura Loomer for Congress.
**We encourage you to[visit their site today](https://libersend.loomered.com/l/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/W1JQ2aVpCTdW3aSh20iFqQ/Vg2xFfsQ76jAJMwz5Z9RGg)**.
---

---
| [](https://libersend.loomered.com/l/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/W1JQ2aVpCTdW3aSh20iFqQ/Vg2xFfsQ76jAJMwz5Z9RGg)
Patriot,

[](https://libersend.loomered.com/l/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/W1JQ2aVpCTdW3aSh20iFqQ/Vg2xFfsQ76jAJMwz5Z9RGg) I’ve kept quiet about this for a long, long time.

The world of politics is tiny – especially conservative politics, and just like in business, you want to give people the benefit of the doubt and work to reconcile things – **but I’m done holding my tongue**.

So, here’s what I’m dealing with: **Ever since I announced my intent to run against a Do-Nothing Incumbent Republican, the Establishment circled their wagons to do everything they can to stop me**.

[**Help me bypass the control of the Establishment by supporting my campaign today.**](https://libersend.loomered.com/l/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/RTMwwOfQSvdqn0zhviqNoQ/Vg2xFfsQ76jAJMwz5Z9RGg)

**The world of campaigns is RUN by consultants, vendors and marketing agencies.**

Just like a gas station needs someone to deliver gas, bags of chips, sodas and process credit card payments, campaigns need a variety of services to succeed.

We need access to donors, technology platforms, voting data, and equal opportunity to attend Republican events.

**And the moment I began running against Do-Nothing Dan Webster, my campaign was put on a BLACKLIST by the companies and consultants that work for the Establishment . . . which is 95% of them.**

And trust me, they’re the “big boys” that raise hundreds of millions of dollars for candidates each election cycle. **Without them, you have to reinvent the wheel.**

So that’s what I partially did last year when I ran against Democrat Lois Frankel – but this year, it’s far different. My business is losing income each month while my campaign is having a tough time reaching new donors because it’s considered taboo to primary a Republican incumbent.

That’s why it’s so important that I don’t lose you, Patriot, and [**you continue to support my campaign so I can DOUBLE your donation by finding new donors to support my race**](https://libersend.loomered.com/l/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/RTMwwOfQSvdqn0zhviqNoQ/Vg2xFfsQ76jAJMwz5Z9RGg).

December is the end of the fundraising quarter and the end of the fundraising year, **and I have to finish BIG!**

Will you [**donate right now**](https://libersend.loomered.com/l/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/RTMwwOfQSvdqn0zhviqNoQ/Vg2xFfsQ76jAJMwz5Z9RGg) to kick off December strong with whatever amount you can contribute?

Thanks so much for all that you do, and thank you for [**_your continued support_**](https://libersend.loomered.com/l/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/RTMwwOfQSvdqn0zhviqNoQ/Vg2xFfsQ76jAJMwz5Z9RGg).

Respectfully,

Laura Loomer

Paid for by Laura Loomer for Congress Inc Contributions to Laura Loomer for Congress Inc are not tax deductible for federal income tax purposes. Contributions from corporations, labor unions, federal contractors, and foreign nationals are prohibited.

---

LAKE WORTH, FL. 33460

name: Nancy Pelosi
subject: Mitch McConnell GONE?!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DCCC | 430 South Capitol Street SE, Washington, DC 20003 | [(202) 863-1500](http://dccc
body:
| | | [](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/wm-YTZPx-qC_)
I'm completely stunned.

I just read **three** polls showing Republicans' Senate lead has EVAPORATED!

\-- We're now _**TIED**_ in Pennsylvania
\-- We're now _**TIED**_ in Wisconsin
\-- And we've taken the _**LEAD**_ in Ohio

**[Please understand: If Democrats win these Senate races, we will CLINCH control of the Senate and ensure McConnell stays out of power. This is our once-in-a-lifetime chance to save our Democratic Majorities -- but not if we fail to outraise Mitch McConnell and Congressional Republicans. I'm calling for 3,000 gifts before midnight to pull this off. Can I count on your $3 to defend our House Majority and prevent a total Republican takeover? >>](https://links.e.dccc.)**
| [MAJORITY DEFENDER CONTRIBUTION: **PENDING**
NAME: dpwillis67@gmail.com](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/d30Et6NrkKCd~)

[_Suggested Support: $3_](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/XX_)
---

I need you to heed this warning:

While we've taken the lead in the polls...

Republicans have built truly STAGGERING war chests to buy back power.

**I know they could use their cash advantage to attack our Democrats, wear down our lead, and barge back into the Majority.**

Hear me: I will not allow Republicans to ruin our best chance yet to save our Democratic Majorities.

****[But I can't win this fight without your help. That's why I'm calling for 3,000 gifts before midnight to DEFEND our critical House Majority and STOP Republicans from ushering in a complete takeover. Can I count on your $3 to help elect House Democrats and take advantage of this incredible swing in our favor? >>](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/Ka_)****
| _If you 've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

Nancy

name: Gibbons for Ohio
subject: Season's greetings from #TeamGibbons!
body:
---
| | | | | | [ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001-Mw0wIMbiRUZ0bDc0PbSScjBYIfeo9OjWoQaxRxb75mxf3ZmN4KBwKGKjvBRkonzczLIFdPEFOWoI0OT_BX1cAUsAjwG8Ber1afyOPsuG6N1aEBBPBndZJQBCaWbkCUA79XlsQyziGk1-8FJh7GXqICpB2z28q9Vr8RRS5er_S3E1J6-t4Aoww==&c=U7v92a8hAsmaXNqnV3PXs0weuy9Ii1Xkvy3KiwtiqJvBHEpE01h3tw==&ch=OD-ehMxbWSi6uTax5ACHu0JBNE8Yl2lL4OpLjKzCuJ1McrEaTRe1PQ==)
---
| Peter,
I hope you are enjoying the holiday season and staying warm! Our campaign is making great progress across the state and will continue to as we transition into 2022.
I was honored to attend a grassroots reception in Bellbrook this past week where I spoke on today's most pressing issues and how I will tackle them in the Senate. I heard from concerned Ohioans on a number of issues pertaining to securing our border, massive inflation under the failed leadership of President Biden and election security, all things I remain committed to addressing.
---
|
---
| [ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001-Mw0wIMbiRUZ0bDc0PbSScjBYIfeo9OjWoQaxRxb75mxf3ZmN4KBwGVALOQuNu2Fyp-3_WZgXUFOaSvpUf97w4DsBmOltviw9tbRhnq9Z_oN-IzxTPh6DPXampIpTDxY_yYiBgL6bDPV0XAR7JfXarYkm3lwH25No-boXkLp8If1ll36z17c1D8w-PZWfATPjdU9E5FXJBg=&c=U7v92a8hAsmaXNqnV3PXs0weuy9Ii1Xkvy3KiwtiqJvBHEpE01h3tw==&ch=OD-ehMxbWSi6uTax5ACHu0JBNE8Yl2lL4OpLjKzCuJ1McrEaTRe1PQ==)
---
| Our ad that launched last week sought to expose the truth about one of my GOP opponents and it has received a great response from the public. [Click here](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001-Mw0wIMbiRUZ0bDc0PbSScjBYIfeo9OjWoQaxRxb75mxf3ZmN4KBwGFRaHFfBTvFkcmwoKjqXb8NxTRtqrcp6fp5dtyf9k4mGboS6667d7uMR4Yl7rOBk6dxns3xpmRm4kkcHTEx9_67xgDcBmcDw6l2wGIWrvOtZLdA01A5x9XzK8RtEeOo4A==&c=U7v92a8hAsmaXNqnV3PXs0weuy9Ii1Xkvy3KiwtiqJvBHEpE01h3tw==&ch=OD-ehMxbWSi6uTax5ACHu0JBNE8Yl2lL4OpLjKzCuJ1McrEaTRe1PQ==) to watch!
This past week, I had the opportunity to sit down with several reporters and give a detailed explanation of my stance on numerous political issues. These interviews can be found on my YouTube channel below.
---
| | | [YouTube Channel](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001-Mw0wIMbiRUZ0bDc0PbSScjBYIfeo9OjWoQaxRxb75mxf3ZmN4KBwGFRaHFfBTvFnV0zXNjgFu9DCaUP5kiKBhyZNDu3z6kdrNwJz342GzOfSLz3PWh0qW2o1oDf7szTMxBICG_l8rMtDmahKl8JJXdw_r8Dwbg1-GqTSEI0CDEpa57E4SmkQf8cRO3UadGZW22XS_8d8v0=&c=U7v92a8hAsmaXNqnV3PXs0weuy9Ii1Xkvy3KiwtiqJvBHEpE01h3tw==&ch=OD-ehMxbWSi6uTax5ACHu0JBNE8Yl2lL4OpLjKzCuJ1McrEaTRe1PQ==)
---
| [ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001-Mw0wIMbiRUZ0bDc0PbSScjBYIfeo9OjWoQaxRxb75mxf3ZmN4KBwGFRaHFfBTvFw13AK2UbrDDiAAvdEY2Vk3CpHt6TKN4OyryBs1EmT5jEkgNnA5Mv_rZiziul8Imhz_MXu5WknELEPUPMUlDW98TmOWSCjYTXChhYjZbKaA4tSfLFrjzQLw==&c=U7v92a8hAsmaXNqnV3PXs0weuy9Ii1Xkvy3KiwtiqJvBHEpE01h3tw==&ch=OD-ehMxbWSi6uTax5ACHu0JBNE8Yl2lL4OpLjKzCuJ1McrEaTRe1PQ==)
---
| Lastly, our campaign presence continues to grow! We welcome Ron Tschantz, as our new Carroll County captain! We are excited to be expanding to every region in Ohio.
---
|
---
|
I hope to see you at one of our next county tour stops. We're wishing you good health, happiness and warmth during the holiday season.

Sincerely,
Mike Gibbons Candidate for U.S. Senate

| | |

name: Team Ken for Senate
subject: The countdown starts now!!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY KEN RUSSELL FOR FLORIDA
body:
Peter,
Can you believe it?? We are just eleven months out from election day 2022. Before we know it the polls will be closing. Ken is going to make a phenomenal Senator, but we need to keep this campaign moving!! Will you chip in $11 to keep the momentum up? [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/2112-q4-kr?refcode=211208-email&amount=11]
secure.actblue.com/donate/2112-q4-kr?refcode=211208-email [secure.actblue.com/donate/2112-q4-kr?refcode=211208-email]
The best thing you can do to ensure Ken replaces Marco Rubio next year is sign up to be a monthly donor! Monthly donors are SO important because they allow us to budget ahead of time. We’ll need clipboards, markers, and plenty of coffee if we want to win this election. So what do you say?
Ken has delivered for the people in South Florida, and I know that he will bring that same result-driven energy to the Senate. Florida deserves better than corporate cronies and special-interest-focused legislators. Ken believes in the will of the people, and that's why we are running a grassroots, people-powered campaign. That means we need your support. Can you commit to donating just $11.11 every month to help Ken kick Rubio out of the Senate? [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/2112-q4-kr?refcode=211208-email&amount=11.11&recurring=true]
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:
DONATE $10 >>> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2112-q4-kr-?refcode=211208-email&express_lane=true&amount=10] DONATE $25 >>> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2112-q4-kr-?refcode=211208-email&express_lane=true&amount=25]
DONATE $50 >>> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2112-q4-kr-?refcode=211208-email&express_lane=true&amount=50] DONATE $100 >>> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2112-q4-kr-?refcode=211208-email&express_lane=true&amount=100]
DONATE $250 >>> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2112-q4-kr-?refcode=211208-email&express_lane=true&amount=250] DONATE ANY AMOUNT [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2112-q4-kr?refcode=211208-email]
Before we know it we’ll be casting ballots for Ken. When next November comes around we want to send a water protecting, adventure-loving, woodworking, family man to the Senate. No more inaction!
Get on board y’all! Someone better is coming! Click here to make a monthly donation of any size and watch us ride to victory! [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/2112-q4-kr?refcode=211208-email]
-- Team Ken for Senate
Ken Russell is a Democrat running for U.S. Senate in Florida. He's a small business owner turned community activist who will clean up Washington and restore our country’s character. Support Ken with a donation today.

Hello,
We have a choice as a country.
We can just give our “thoughts and prayers” every time a school shooting happens and do nothing, knowing it’s only a matter of time until the next mass murder; or we can actually do something about it.
We can keep electing people like my opponent Chuck Grassley who unabashedly take millions from the NRA and then block even the most common-sense gun laws. Or we can elect more tough Democrats willing to stand up to the NRA.
**Allowing this gun violence epidemic to continue is a choice.**
I’m running against one of the biggest recipients of the NRA’s blood money: Republican Senator Chuck Grassley. And last week, he did their bidding yet again when he stood up to block Senator Chris Murphy’s bill requiring universal background checks.
**So today I present you with a choice:** [**Will you give today to my campaign and help me take on the NRA and defeat Chuck Grassley?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39477213/320018816/-42398318?refcode=em20211208pm-nd&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C35%2C50%2C100%2C250&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDI4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyYWMwODY3Mi03YTU4LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=z2aINtcNIJWex32K52fnnJaR7SzSdMUWEA_Cij_3nXs=)
This is a race we can win. The latest poll from the highly-respected Des Moines Register shows just 27% of Iowa voters want to reelect Chuck Grassley. His approval ratings are tubing to the lowest they’ve ever been.
But the NRA and Mitch McConnell’s Super PACs are going to spend millions of dollars trying to defeat me. I’m a hard target for them, but they’ll try mightily because Senate control is on the line.
**I’m facing my biggest deadline of the campaign yet at midnight tonight, and we’re still just short of our $20,000 goal.**[**Please, can I count on you to chip in $5 or more right now – whatever you can afford before midnight tonight – to help me defeat Chuck Grassley, turn Iowa blue, and protect our Democratic majority in the Senate?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39477214/320018817/-42398318?refcode=em20211208pm-nd&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C35%2C50%2C100%2C250&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDI4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyYWMwODY3Mi03YTU4LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=z2aINtcNIJWex32K52fnnJaR7SzSdMUWEA_Cij_3nXs=)

body:

_**DEFEND LIBERTY: REJECT COVID HYSTERIA**_ **[CHIP IN NOW >>](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z05lfdbes7m63hjapd793mf8cjtsr1v218gabo2o_rp22sh2s8i66pj4s1g64or6cdh2bs)** [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z2qa7n26ea4fmnnttp2id2kehvt9t9rcieo9nm1o_rp22sh2s8i66pj4s1g64or6cdh2bs) | |
---
Friend, the COVID hysteria has already gone on too long...

And these power-hungry bureaucrats don’t want to let go!

That’s probably why we’re hearing a lot about this new _spooky_ “omicron variant.”

But let’s be clear \- the omicron variant in South Africa, and now, California, is reported as an illness with MILD symptoms and no one has been hospitalized for it at this point.

**_But of course, Dr. Fauci and Joe Biden are using this as an excuse to take your freedoms before we even know the facts._**

We must stand strong on the side of science and refuse to allow another lockdown, more regulation, or more useless rules._If you ask me, enough is enough! If you agree, please chip in today to join my fight. _
**_By donating below, you are making an immediate contribution_**
__
[**ONE CLICK DONATE: $100 **](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2za0s0mlck1lpcv6kmpcerm07vh1llaa8878eohl0_)
[**ONE CLICK DONATE: $75 **](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z9v0be3l78vgbjecn5t9s3b5fmqc7tf15np3q31g_)
[**ONE CLICK DONATE: $50 **](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2znhtfdpkb2305bf0m0d7p1scseqtcar7p34ttpn0_)
[**ONE CLICK DONATE: $25 **](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zoer8qndi0ve0n72dvv6pfq7rb1q780787cpehig_)
**_If you've saved payment information with Revv, your donation will go through automatically._**
__
Friend, if we allow this nonsense of the "safety at all costs" narrative to continue, we're never going to be a free country again.

There's no vaccine, no law, and no regulation that will satisfy power-hungry leaders like Biden and Fauci. EVER.

No matter what “variant” they’re trying to scare us with, freedom must prevail.

That's why I'm putting my foot down. I will not believe the hype. I refuse to allow this chaos to become permanent, friend.

I have real power as a U.S. Senator to expose these bureaucrats and their endless theatrics, but I can't do it alone.

I need to show strength against the bureaucracy. [**Would you please chip in $100, $50, $25, or $10 to help out?**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zep6hj8t6s8al602jic3rfk6j482t84b42tsrcg0_rp22sh2s8i66pj4s1g64or6cdh2bs)

Together, I know you and I can stop them. And we can't give up until we do.

In Liberty,
Rand Paul
__

clean_body: | | | | Our New Ad is Here! Friend, Riding for the brand means that you are loyal, have honor, commitment, and keep your word. Liz Cheney does not ride for the brand. She has betrayed the people of Wyoming time and time again, and this is why next year Wyoming will elect a Congresswoman who will stand up for our values. Watch our new video about what it means to Ride for the Brand below! Stopping the Democrats and the radical left is the most important job Republicans have right now. Unfortunately, Liz Cheney has joined Nancy Pelosi’s team. That’s why I was endorsed by President Trump and that’s why I need your help. Wyoming is my past, present, and future. I have spent most of my career fighting for Wyoming and defending our rights from unelected, big government bureaucrats. While I fight for Wyoming, Liz Cheney fights for the DC establishment. Wyoming deserves a Congresswoman who Rides for the Brand. Join President Trump and join my campaign today! For Wyoming, Harriet Hageman | | | |

We need you all to be in this with us because we can’t do it without you. Thank you for your support! Nick Gevock Campaign Manager Ballard for Montana Jack Ballard grew up on a ranch west of Three Forks homesteaded by his grandfather in 1907. He knows how to fight for Montana and he intends to fight for you and MT-02 in Washington D.C. PAID FOR BY JACK BALLARD FOR MONTANA.

name: Wisconsin Senate Alert via SarahforWisconsin.com
subject: Another day, another Ron Johnson headline
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sarah for Wisconsin
body:
Ron Johnson is making headlines again with another ridiculous lie...

In a recent interview, he said the Build Back Better Act would hurt the middle class. Not only is the claim completely false, it's also coming straight from the mouth of a guy who's proven time and again he doesn't care about anybody but himself and his wealthy corporate donors.

This is the same person who voted against the historic infrastructure bill that will rebuild Wisconsin’s roads and bridges, expand broadband access, create good-paying union jobs, address PFAS contamination, replace lead pipes, and more. In fact, he was hoping and praying for gridlock!

Ron Johnson even tried to block crucial pandemic relief and stimulus checks because he claimed Wisconsinites didn’t need any more help. He also argued people should be forced off of their unemployment benefits as workers and families struggled to put food on the table.

Does that sound like someone who cares about what happens to the middle class? We certainly don’t think so, that’s why we’re fighting so hard to replace him with someone who does.

clean_body: Ron Johnson is making headlines again with another ridiculous lie... In a recent interview, he said the Build Back Better Act would hurt the middle class. Not only is the claim completely false, it's also coming straight from the mouth of a guy who's proven time and again he doesn't care about anybody but himself and his wealthy corporate donors. This is the same person who voted against the historic infrastructure bill that will rebuild Wisconsin’s roads and bridges, expand broadband access, create good-paying union jobs, address PFAS contamination, replace lead pipes, and more. In fact, he was hoping and praying for gridlock! Ron Johnson even tried to block crucial pandemic relief and stimulus checks because he claimed Wisconsinites didn’t need any more help. He also argued people should be forced off of their unemployment benefits as workers and families struggled to put food on the table. Friend, At first I thought this was a headline from _The Onion_ , but somehow, it’s real: “GOP senators threaten shutdown over vaccine rule” — CBS News **It’s true: last week, Republicans actually threatened to shut down the government in protest of federal vaccine requirements.** With the discovery of the new omicron COVID-19 variant spreading across the globe and positive cases growing as we move into winter, the Biden Administration is right to require vaccines: _they work, and they save lives._ Instead of listening to science and doing whatever it takes to protect the lives of their constituents, some Republicans would rather hold the government hostage for their own political agenda. clean_body: | = Friend, At first I thought this was a headline from The Onion , but somehow, it’s real: “GOP senators threaten shutdown over vaccine rule” — CBS News It’s true: last week, Republicans actually threatened to shut down the government in protest of federal vaccine requirements. With the discovery of the new omicron COVID-19 variant spreading across the globe and positive cases growing as we move into winter, the Biden Administration is right to require vaccines: they work, and they save lives. Instead of listening to science and doing whatever it takes to protect the lives of their constituents, some Republicans would rather hold the government hostage for their own political agenda. They’re playing games with people’s lives, and it’s sickening. This is exactly why we need to defend and expand our Democratic majorities in the House and Senate next year, and why flipping this seat here in PA-01 is absolutely critical. = | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = = | = = | = = I appreciate anything you can give today so we can stop headlines like this from becoming a reality. — Ashley | Ashley Ehasz is a U.S. Army veteran, Apache helicopter pilot, and Democrat running to unseat Republican Brian Fitzpatrick and represent Pennsylvania’s 1st Congressional District: to provide our communities with the services and opportunities they need to thrive, to create positive change, and to ensure the next generation will have a better future ahead of them. | = | Paid for by Ehasz for Congress Ehasz for Congress 1800 Byberry Road #1336 Bensalem, PA 19020 United States Ashley Ehasz is a former member of the U.S. Army. subject: Biden’s policies are STEALING Christmas!

body:
If you’re feeling the squeeze this holiday season, you can thank Joe Biden. Read more >>>
| | | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/282e4263e04f74c17c94c760ea83e7c0/34143/c1e0cdcf626decd6/c03a67aa5b501e32c3d6b838967d376c/34143)
---
Peter, On the heels of the most expensive Thanksgivings ever, Americans are now facing a lean Christmas thanks to Joe Biden’s economic crisis. Inflation is at a 31-year high, more than it was one year ago. Gasoline is more than a dollar per gallon more than it was last year. Groceries are more expensive, the supply chain is broken, and many families are even having a hard time heating their homes as the temperature drops. **As a businessman, it’s easy to see that it is President Biden’s economic crisis that is STEALING Christmas from millions of Americans.** It’s the massive spending and socialist policies that are causing a severe labor shortage, a supply chain breakdown, and decreased real wages in 7 out of 9 months since Biden’s first full month in office! I’m taking a stand in Congress and pushing back against Joe Biden and Nancy Pelosi and their draconian policies that are HURTING Americans this holiday season. I need your help to keep going and make a real difference. Please chip in what you can right now to help me keep this district RED, flip the House, and make sure we get America back on track!

body:

Folks,

I’d be lying to you if I said I wasn’t pretty upset about what my team just told me.

We came up well short of our November fundraising goal, and I’ve got to say that’s not good. Chuck Schumer’s going to be foaming at the mouth to take a shot at me this month, knowing that I don’t have the resources to fight back. Now I can take a punch, but I don’t want to take one if I can avoid it. **[So, if you’re able and willing to help me out, it’d mean the world to me if you’d rush what you can to support my re-election campaign for 2022.](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c68611%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=oBwEwLQyWnqVCdymRebzqA&sysid=1)** | [RUSH YOUR SUPPORT HERE](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c68612%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=ku1eSnt%2fL%2fdW9tc85BM%2baQ&sysid=1)

Your support is the only thing that keeps me in this fight to stop the Socialist Agenda.

Together, we’re going to be able to stop their attacks on our freedom and our Democracy. [RUSH YOUR SUPPORT HERE](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c68614%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=DniDWEz%2f0Om85%2ffWq8A6Qw&sysid=1)

body:
We’re building a people-powered campaign to defeat Ron Johnson in 2022. | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39478658/320024896/464806879?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTQzOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ODcwOWQ3MC04MTU4LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=DgH9983591APwzUOo6-ayiUcuZ5vEwGng5YnjrPAyu0=&emci=4dcd0e04-5558-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&emdi=78709d70-8158-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ceid=25515813) | Hey there, Over the past month, we’ve had thousands of new supporters join our campaign to defeat Ron Johnson – so I wanted to take a minute to re-introduce myself. **I’m Dr. Gillian Battino: Mother of 6, physician, advocate, and the woman who’s going to defeat Ron Johnson in 2022.** During his decade in the Senate, Ron Johnson has failed the people of Wisconsin — voting time and time again to rip health care away from his own constituents, cut taxes for the wealthy and well-connected, and stop relief checks from going to families hit hardest by the COVID-19 pandemic. It’s time for a change. I believe that people — not special interests — should be the driving force behind our political system, that health care is a human right, and that Wisconsin families deserve to have their voices championed by their representatives in the Senate. **We’re building a people-powered campaign to defeat Ron Johnson in 2022. But if we’re going to win this thing, we need to make this last month of the year our biggest yet.[Are you in? I’ve helped Wisconsinites beat breast cancer for the past 20 years, which means I know a thing or two about fighting tough battles.
But while doctors and physicians like me were saving lives and serving patients, Ron Johnson was attempting to undermine the public’s trust in science, medicine, and our democratic process in order to serve the personal interests of Donald Trump.
**Enough is enough. Wisconsin deserves better. YOU deserve better. That’s why I’m running for Senate to defeat Ron Johnson in 2022.[Can I count on you to join us? clean_body: We’re building a people-powered campaign to defeat Ron Johnson in 2022. | | Hey there, Over the past month, we’ve had thousands of new supporters join our campaign to defeat Ron Johnson – so I wanted to take a minute to re-introduce myself. I’m Dr. Gillian Battino: Mother of 6, physician, advocate, and the woman who’s going to defeat Ron Johnson in 2022. During his decade in the Senate, Ron Johnson has failed the people of Wisconsin — voting time and time again to rip health care away from his own constituents, cut taxes for the wealthy and well-connected, and stop relief checks from going to families hit hardest by the COVID-19 pandemic. It’s time for a change. I believe that people — not special interests — should be the driving force behind our political system, that health care is a human right, and that Wisconsin families deserve to have their voices championed by their representatives in the Senate. We’re building a people-powered campaign to defeat Ron Johnson in 2022. But if we’re going to win this thing, we need to make this last month of the year our biggest yet.= | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation to defeat Ron Johnson and elect the first Democratic woman physician to the U.S. Senate will go through immediately: | = | = ---|--- = | = = | = I’ve helped Wisconsinites beat breast cancer for the past 20 years, which means I know a thing or two about fighting tough battles. But while doctors and physicians like me were saving lives and serving patients, Ron Johnson was attempting to undermine the public’s trust in science, medicine, and our democratic process in order to serve the personal interests of Donald Trump. Enough is enough. Wisconsin deserves better. YOU deserve better. That’s why I’m running for Senate to defeat Ron Johnson in 2022.= With gratitude, Dr. Gillian Battino It’s time for a new kind of leadership in Wisconsin. name: Jackson Lahmeyer
subject: U.S. Senate Candidate Jackson Lahmeyer agrees to debate Senator Lankford with thousands of Oklahoma oil & gas workers
body:
| |
---
[](https://100726.trk.directiq13.com/hit?sid=9qw2d3s01oy6ce876&linkid=0&link=51be58460055492f99ab3272245963cd)
---
| **FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE**
December 08, 2021 **U.S. SENATE CANDIDATE JACKSON LAHMEYER AGREES TO DEBATE SENATOR LANKFORD, WITH THOUSANDS OF OKLAHOMA OIL & GAS WORKERS** **Calls On Lankford To Debate** Insurgent U.S. Senate and Republican challenger Jackson Lahmeyer announced today that he had accepted the invitation of the _Oil and Gas Workers Association_ ([ogwausa.com](https://100726.trk.directiq13.com/hit?sid=9qw2d3s01oy6ce876&linkid=1&link=98b88ccf7e5b4df7882500d9993f8c5a)) for a debate with Senator James Lankford, in Oklahoma City to provide "_an opportunity for both candidates to speak directly to the people whose livelihoods are supported by the booming oil & gas economy_."

The invitation by the _Oil & Gas Workers Association_ acknowledges how important Oklahoma is to the national oil & gas industry - and how critical it is to have a U.S. Senator from Oklahoma who supports their workers, stating, "_This Oklahoma Senate seat is crucial to protecting and advancing our American oil and gas industry and jobs, and Oil & Gas Workers in Oklahoma and across the country are watching this primary very closely._"

For the thousands of Oklahomans who want to make a clear choice for Senate in the primary and general elections, the _Oil & Gas Workers Association_ debate should clarify the differences between both candidates.

"_Oklahoma voters deserve a vigorous and respectful debate between those who propose to lead this country,_ " Said Lahmeyer, a pastor and businessman who has been endorsed by General Michael Flynn, President Trump's first National Security Advisor, Oklahoma Republican State Chairman John Bennett and legendary Republican strategist and Donald Trump confidant Roger Stone.

"_I am admittedly a political neophyte but I am also a concerned Christian, father, husband and constitution-supporting conservative._ " Said Lahmeyer. "_James Lankford insults the Republican voters of Oklahoma with his repeated refusals to participate in a fair and impartial debate on the issues that face the great state of Oklahoma. I will be awaiting Senator Lankford's response to accept this debate challenge_." # # # [www.JacksonLahmeyer.com](https://100726.trk.directiq13.com/hit?sid=9qw2d3s01oy6ce876&linkid=2&link=8596447238cf42dd859b06ce6d0f6145)
---

| | | Exciting news, ...

Our friends at _Tactical USA_ have some big changes in store for their company...

Which is why they’re running a **[RARE Giveaway on their best selling “invisible” Ankle Holsters.](https://links.gunsandpride.com/a/1634/click/39/56327/58a0e371c435b017cc640e5214910d33b92a9d9b/5dfe483955366f889c9e61c9b99cbd767e889850)**

Normally, these holsters cost $30...

But to clear room for new products, **[they’re giving you one today for nothing but the cost of stamps.](https://links.gunsandpride.com/a/1634/click/39/56327/58a0e371c435b017cc640e5214910d33b92a9d9b/5dfe483955366f889c9e61c9b99cbd767e889850)**

You want this holster.

It’s incredibly comfortable...

Has an ambidextrous design (right or left-handed)...

It fits 99% of modern handguns...

And it’s so good at concealing firearms... ** _it’ll make even large frame pistols disappear in plain sight._**

Plus, the fact [you can get one for $0.00](https://links.gunsandpride.com/a/1634/click/39/56327/58a0e371c435b017cc640e5214910d33b92a9d9b/5dfe483955366f889c9e61c9b99cbd767e889850) is another big selling point. ;)

Like I said...

This holster is Free for you today.

You just need to act before this liquidation giveaway closes... which I’m told could be in 12 hours (or sooner, if they run out before then).

[So grab your FREE Ankle Holster now](https://links.gunsandpride.com/a/1634/click/39/56327/58a0e371c435b017cc640e5214910d33b92a9d9b/5dfe483955366f889c9e61c9b99cbd767e889850), before they’re gone.

**Thank You.**

name: Dan Crenshaw
subject: They lied to you about the military spending bill
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dan Crenshaw for Congress
body:
---
| | | | | | |
---
|
---
| |
---
| Peter -
The FINAL military spending bill (known as the NDAA) passed last night, and guess what! There are no red flag laws in it. Just like I told you there wouldn't be.
So why have so many on our own side misled you about it? Fundraising, mostly. They want to make you outraged because then you'll click on their articles or donate money to their organizations.
It's why you've heard the lie over and over again that I "voted for red flag laws." It's BS.
Here's the truth: I'm the only member of Congress to have introduced an anti-red flag law bill. It's called HR 5417 - the Preventing Unjust Red Flag Laws Act - and you can read the bill [here](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001VCR0OUMLSDtsxpjob9ysvJJehmHDhPCcRAZ4UsJvtGDFBHO-cZbevM_cryZJrYrqDQlw8El3hSZOeqF6AkXNE62flHhmfDEG8bO9Hf-Kdrk1osoYZoqU4ymdTmHIC2zGqdDaNWjqU9TcPX6Remgu-Eyp4c7AulSgXVyLmO_5l7AtnK9j7z43TM6eoZZfKH4RWCEHSQPhpHyo4_xzRYyPxsEVeAKyi18V95grC4k_SNHqitLYHg4Dpdc532IAYs25ZogU94UkqUvUsBL6UAfmenu_Loa7VY8snlnrg8Dkc7KRnm_CEAQBnRkbKj9h8U435Tj6QSnixDlLRxitgwNbgVEUGc52nvczYf0WVvQnVZ_JlRTfpTXOAg==&c=jR2ZwHA8ywW5HaY7AQvMTb7OCCNmOwFFsBx5d-NcxfWERl0H6TKjDw==&ch=nQkU79DH-TNXdPMU5QOcFmztIGcYYhIAStK7Q9EcMuBRDxNg6B10bw==). In summary, my bill prevents all federal money from supporting any federal or state-led effort to implement red flag laws.
Watch out for the grifters, the performance artists, and the people who know how to say the right slogans to make you trust them or make you outraged. If it seems too good or crazy to be true, it usually is.
But you should support gun groups like the NRA that knew the truth and stood by the truth. They didn't use the NDAA as an opportunity to extract more fundraising dollars from you.
And if you want to support real conservative candidates, there's no better place to start than Texas Reloaded. Wesley Hunt and Morgan Luttrell are ready to lead the fight in Washington against the Biden-Pelosi socialist agenda, but we need your help to send them there. These are two leaders who we can count on from Day One in Congress to protect our freedoms and stand up for our conservative values.
---
| | | [DONATE. JOIN TEXAS RELOADED TODAY.](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001VCR0OUMLSDtsxpjob9ysvJJehmHDhPCcRAZ4UsJvtGDFBHO-cZbevM_cryZJrYrqWEbPZECP-dyzFsvwHMVdlOpzlc4A9X1HXMXKq5taKrvsP5RXdRXn_UM9-IF2m2rkjUUKdLg9Y-X5W7zremIvbRkEmlJ9E4pQKiET0AToWbd3uAWRs1Ll_Cuha_f4YuEKJWHxecxL3wwhOj3JIqZSciK8m3WOtIUpP-FAHx7FGvpGE0q0KnPGp-v2WbtCQYhj3PioMw17GvaRiGb_E13Dy--TBc6g8pPyB9qUvp4rZL4=&c=jR2ZwHA8ywW5HaY7AQvMTb7OCCNmOwFFsBx5d-NcxfWERl0H6TKjDw==&ch=nQkU79DH-TNXdPMU5QOcFmztIGcYYhIAStK7Q9EcMuBRDxNg6B10bw==)
---
| Thank you for standing with me.
In Service,

| Peter,
---
| One of the best ways you can support my campaign to take back the Senate from the Establishment Swamp is to buy some campaign merchandise!
But with the Democrats' supply crisis making it so hard to ship orders on time, we recommend ordering your merch before Thursday, December 9th so it can get to you in time for Christmas!

| | | [SHOP NOW](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001LBGNiKsUCgsb_4C7OJU7482upIiV5lE9OZWi_OONth_UmuTDWwR4aixcyDotAMcz81iZm_HrQuA36175tFKlc6QDiGYXWLCrwu3tj0uE_PlXLwS7_yN2rae2CQXA8BuoM8UfLeNetvKlTEpQOKYC045Qpl_aFQ40S42NH5x9h1HZB35Jkz7Tng==&c=y4BFNGIM_qjsXKx4_7kHo0pIfy5Cmcpx2AyK8z_4KMcXkubNWVF3rQ==&ch=PPNClAJ8GtJ69iKlyLrK9nuDDuRLHk5UQUzP7lboe9qtjEB71uH6Pg==)

| We need to stand up to CRT and the other progressive schemes of the radical Democrat establishment! The people of Pennsylvania deserve a Senator who will stand up and say "enough!"
By buying merchandise, you are not only supporting my campaign to take back Washington for We the People, but you're getting yourself a stylish way to show your support for the conservative answer for Pennsylvania!
You can really help spread the word by wearing your shirt, hat, or pins to any event you go to - and when people ask "who is Kathy Barnette?" let them know! You can even show them this QR code so they can find her!
---
|
---

Peter,

In August the radical left began talking about mandating vaccines for individuals working in the United States Capitol, the military, and beyond. **Now, President Biden wants to "compel" the private sector to mandate vaccinations or face fines up to $14,000 PER VIOLATION!**

**Chances are that if you’re reading this email today you already think that the heavy hand of the federal government plays too large a role in your everyday life**. And we’d agree with you. You may not be the target of the first round of vaccine mandates, but eventually the long arm of government will come for those who aren’t vaccinated, and that isn’t their role.

**We’ve lived through 21 months of a pandemic that both ravaged our economy and put us on a path to financial ruin**. Americans have suffered enough from COVID-19 restrictions, mask mandates, and now potential forced vaccinations.

**[What we want to know from you is if you agree or not. Is it time to let Americans decide how best to mitigate their risk of becoming infected with COVID-19, or should we simply accept that one day soon the government may force you to take the jab?](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=356053090314459ea1f9877e40d7d083&_e=jSt1-IaAnMZJtfcvai04au_TsQILgGe0ZP5cT8WcBmAgRj0maKmrl5bHMJB7eSzSrY7BfdF1jQp-91Bitfg45i4sl6ViGQo_jAUOYf1DX8j7IEhEQKz5dIEPndmaI898m5n9dNl2bSwGenUZ8B1g1Skj3VhwOTICDS0fcE0j8vWQwMpvcYkm4eccaA8LeE6B1cB-hYPJcWjODqvxuAbrojsvvror1p-dH1xJDLGvzJs4XTpfcFcnfo_texgsoN3vopJk93wKpaHcZRIRqpl0YmkGVLGNV3JlnrkVTEQKo6BeWCnhsyx6znK0OC3BDgM-46qdvFGq54FtEmmkbhUmmPScP24mIdLVyfiagtU71cwSyzTq3vF1VD0IaZ5sEbkD1d_UjrfaWDHCz_eEHG-V7jZEP2YZQKovlLo-lpGA8_BNbbTqdsJZN-W34TDlvVG2isRvmAJEZZSIZrG_2uDB4qPaZGUbosl2Fxx-BNMWtyUhJOvnv2OD_sTwvBPjulSi7-ORAnVjmh1YPVYD2Cq2Tg%3D%3D)**

| _**

[WOULD YOU SUPPORT A FEDERAL BAN ON FORCED COVID-19 VACCINATIONS??](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=356053090314459ea1f9877e40d7d083&_e=jSt1-IaAnMZJtfcvai04au_TsQILgGe0ZP5cT8WcBmAgRj0maKmrl5bHMJB7eSzSrY7BfdF1jQp-91Bitfg45i4sl6ViGQo_jAUOYf1DX8j7IEhEQKz5dIEPndmaI898m5n9dNl2bSwGenUZ8B1g1Skj3VhwOTICDS0fcE0j8vWQwMpvcYkm4eccaA8LeE6B1cB-hYPJcWjODqvxuAbrojsvvror1p-dH1xJDLGvzJs4XTpfcFcnfo_texgsoN3vopJk93wKpaHcZRIRqpl0YmkGVLGNV3JlnrkVTEQKo6BeWCnhsyx6znK0OC3BDgM-rbfSQLIrKrD6SNPxOymMQrJr35H3ZeJKjjMDCjkrgAY85FFkWRVyRUCKRaQ5BEfXYcQOip0qYkNTFoOjTCwkQw48R4VpsjGwaeJzJF3Y6Nao8fWHQiHiVlsEDsDlLFo5-4Qa92sdmzmslUrIGJVJU-M3ZSb9SozqTFMIY3MG0doXitep5PZnHNPFJO6Sg17stu-lH3nVo2U8QMYZjHvEfQ%3D%3D)** _

SURVEY REQUEST FOR: dpwillis67@gmail.com

Response Deadline: MIDNIGHT, December 8th

[** WHERE DO YOU STAND ON MANDATORY VACCINATIONS?
LET US KNOW->**](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=356053090314459ea1f9877e40d7d083&_e=jSt1-IaAnMZJtfcvai04au_TsQILgGe0ZP5cT8WcBmAgRj0maKmrl5bHMJB7eSzSrY7BfdF1jQp-91Bitfg45i4sl6ViGQo_jAUOYf1DX8j7IEhEQKz5dIEPndmaI898m5n9dNl2bSwGenUZ8B1g1Skj3VhwOTICDS0fcE0j8vWQwMpvcYkm4eccaA8LeE6B1cB-hYPJcWjODqvxuAbrojsvvror1p-dH1xJDLGvzJs4XTpfcFcnfo_texgsoN3vopJk93wKpaHcZRIRqpl0YmkGVLGNV3JlnrkVTEQKo6BeWCnhsyx6znK0OC3BDgM-zpkAk3x_cKf4etGgIQBMNp2f02zo4t2cXrz0KErk9Juz4p1Dnm8YpgPYMcJbyFtrMEWb6BMsJ6lHhO7ltn9rJXcyq7bPu3PmiD0jdfjgrz91RUuZtJy8XBu2dUUa10YWIuZft9snNMtxD2q-3jEhZWlYrQRiQ2kgBdb8vIiB1ur3baSYjoDIkurW0ELGhiS7HRHy3rO-WrxQP-N0cigYiw%3D%3D)

---

Democrats told us that the pandemic would be “defeated” when enough people were inoculated to reach herd immunity. The thing is, they keep moving the bar on us.

How can we trust a government run by folks who said that if you got vaccinated, you could take your mask off? **Then soon after, back to masks, no matter your vaccine status!** Now, if you work for a company with more than 100 employees, the government is going to try to force you to get vaccinated!

The simple answer is this: we can’t trust Democrats in DC to stick to their word.

**Democrats enact mask mandates. Then don’t wear them.**

Democrats restrict social gatherings. Then break their own mandates to host oversized gatherings where virtually no one is masked.

**Democrats want to require covid vaccine mandates but let COVID positive illegal immigrants cross the southern border.**

_Will the hypocrisy ever end?_

**[Let us hear from you today. Would you support a federal ban on forced covid-19 vaccinations?](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=356053090314459ea1f9877e40d7d083&_e=jSt1-IaAnMZJtfcvai04au_TsQILgGe0ZP5cT8WcBmAgRj0maKmrl5bHMJB7eSzSrY7BfdF1jQp-91Bitfg45i4sl6ViGQo_jAUOYf1DX8j7IEhEQKz5dIEPndmaI898m5n9dNl2bSwGenUZ8B1g1Skj3VhwOTICDS0fcE0j8vWQwMpvcYkm4eccaA8LeE6B1cB-hYPJcWjODqvxuAbrojsvvror1p-dH1xJDLGvzJs4XTpfcFcnfo_texgsoN3vopJk93wKpaHcZRIRqpl0YmkGVLGNV3JlnrkVTEQKo6BeWCnhsyx6znK0OC3BDgM-TPYFXYzZQQtLkwt68R0VnLvUDlU_8kZIdZrC3_tHN4yGeAfDWoCj5aQCXGesbVxDl_hH7gAJuH6Syx06rayyA8lDHMgS7fMa1UF4A56k0juzcFkYUJjfK2_HePSmYTDPU10XCBlbX1BbJP1ibL6UEDfMYz1lPZm3v96jcRJKN9ywOktFedA18msxCkAiLx4jKirCfiTr8zSg-E2jOpiaQA%3D%3D)**

Thanks for letting us know –

Thank you,
[](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=356053090314459ea1f9877e40d7d083&_e=jSt1-IaAnMZJtfcvai04au_TsQILgGe0ZP5cT8WcBmAgRj0maKmrl5bHMJB7eSzSrY7BfdF1jQp-91Bitfg45i4sl6ViGQo_jAUOYf1DX8j7IEhEQKz5dIEPndmaI898m5n9dNl2bSwGenUZ8B1g1Skj3VhwOTICDS0fcE0j8vWQwMpvcYkm4eccaA8LeE6B1cB-hYPJcWjODqvxuAbrojsvvror1p-dH1xJDLGvzJs4XTpfcFcnfo_texgsoN3vopJk93wKpaHcZRIRqpl0YmkGVLGNV3JlnrkVTEQKo6BeWCnhsyx6znK0OC3BDgM-rcukS8ITW_Jn3tbiyrz2T7UPTT222lf6vUYVQmv-FAB17HL8T8JaCMOgFPkt74gJuSMlGFwvV0-riDlk8IBMIp3uBe8jwFSvEE3aZWGNIASIYtUvxKKqFYpP3-fG0NtcmvxpB1hyirBCy_27imrnxkvZJwHwHN3dZagjhfEP_Zw4gnfxcGkXhNZrjXLd0ytfrpVqfJG511YmD0q75JHM2g%3D%3D)
Jim Jordan
