subject: Build Back Better doesn't "increase" burdens on Arizona
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CHANGE FOR ARIZONA 2024 PAC**
body:
It's simply untrue that voting for the landmark Build Back Better Act "increases burdens" on Arizona. | | | [](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953ylv71NjtRp9uAvapwZeG5Fwod7vf2Q19deFkSzINQB7pYO7Ed0TOwyvjuedJ39zpEnMq3REs_6qpHFEbObeQSeVtQfDWNLS6IBFr9NtQcwPODvt1JamecS69mH4UtdF4RrKaSync7cwpC9UCExbKJfRL0bppgsdSE1i2qy1enZu2Z3J6Rg-Wh1hqMYv8so0lO_XLhapZSXOlrxez3tiYYRsTUv9oNHVcMx3ZYdjpZpdGrssKN4Wa8_dtwUzdKd3UpJ6wvePDgNajnqTySqhKDtfBSt2Bv_lvR5TIf2ori_wUqSMoOdV9vbu6POGFyT1jdMlQ-_1XKtUrAf9UL39VrW0ybAd9EYI-ead1nKS8_JRbj6hbv-zOswfKXamvEpfCA/3ho/qvsECIMbTUSeNfAsxDJARw/h0/ELy5FXnO2IOfRDfocon8OLUIm1JrkHkqecY1nQF6_Ns)
Peter, Here's what Kyrsten Sinema said last week about voting on the Build Back Better Act: **"I won't support any legislation that increases burdens on Arizona."** That's outrageous. Sinema has already wasted months of everyone's time whittling down the bill and stripping out popular provisions. But every single iteration of Build Back Better has been focused on delivering the priorities that Arizona needs most: more affordable healthcare, childcare, education, and climate action. Now, after delaying the bill for the better part of a year, Sinema doesn't even have the courtesy to tell her constituents whether she will vote for the final version. Arizonans understand just how important this legislation is. That's why recent polling shows that Arizona Democrats are far more likely to support a candidate who supports the bill in full. Kyrsten Sinema needs to stop playing political games and start delivering for her constituents. She has delayed and gutted the bill enough. The time for negotiation is over. It's now time for Sinema to come out with a clear, unambiguous "YES" on Build Back Better. **[We cannot idly stand by while Sinema continues to obstruct. That's outrageous. Sinema has already wasted months of everyone's time whittling down the bill and stripping out popular provisions. But every single iteration of Build Back Better has been focused on delivering the priorities that Arizona needs most: more affordable healthcare, childcare, education, and climate action. Now, after delaying the bill for the better part of a year, Sinema doesn't even have the courtesy to tell her constituents whether she will vote for the final version. Arizonans understand just how important this legislation is. That's why recent polling shows that Arizona Democrats are far more likely to support a candidate who supports the bill in full. Kyrsten Sinema needs to stop playing political games and start delivering for her constituents. She has delayed and gutted the bill enough. The time for negotiation is over. It's now time for Sinema to come out with a clear, unambiguous "YES" on Build Back Better. (Our average donation this month is $11.79.) — Primary Sinema Project | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. I'll keep this quick, friend, because we don't have long until tonight's midnight survey deadline:
---
**I'm meeting with Marco tomorrow to go through the answers to our campaign focus group, but we're still falling just eight responses short of our goal.**
This isn't the kind of campaign extremists like Donald Trump or Kari Lake would run, where the only opinions that matter belong to megadonors. We truly care what everyday folks have to say – and you were handpicked, so we _really_ care what you have to say.
**Plus, there's this: We're up against our first official filing deadline at the end of this month, and if we don't have a winning strategy, we'll already be behind. Your feedback isn't just important – it's urgent. So please, we have to ask:**

name: Team Val via VPP
subject: Dr. Oz just jumped in Pennsylvania’s U.S. Senate race
disclaimer_text: Paid for by VPP
body:
This is bad news. We don’t need pseudoscience in the Senate.
| **Folks, former Trump advisor Dr. Oz just announced that he’s running for U.S. Senate in Pennsylvania. Pennsylvania needs a doctor who stands up for facts and science — not one who undermines them.[If you agree, rush in any amount to help elect Dr. Val Arkoosh to the U.S. Senate:](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/4165?t=6&akid=997%2E878179%2EUm7DLk)** [](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/4165?t=7&akid=997%2E878179%2EUm7DLk) If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | [CONTRIBUTE $5 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/4166?t=8&akid=997%2E878179%2EUm7DLk)
---
**TV personality Dr. Oz would be dangerous for Pennsylvania and our country — only adding to Senate Republicans' growing anti-science coalition.**

Unlike Dr. Oz, Val hasn’t spent the pandemic advising Donald Trump or elevating unproven treatments for COVID-19. Instead, she’s put facts and science at the forefront — safely leading her county through the pandemic and helping as many folks get vaccinated as possible, all while helping small businesses stay afloat.

We need a doctor who will lead with science and data – especially when it comes to getting our country through the pandemic, addressing climate change with the urgency it deserves, and protecting abortion rights as the Supreme Court hears a case that will determine the future of _Roe v. Wade._

**There’s never been a more important time to send a physician to the U.S. Senate, and better yet to elect the first woman physician to the U.S. Senate. But Dr. Oz is not that doctor. Val is.**

[If Val is the kind of doctor you want fighting for you in the U.S. Senate, help us compete with Dr. Oz’s cash and win this race by rushing in a donation of any amount: ](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/4167?t=9&akid=997%2E878179%2EUm7DLk)
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:

Thanks for helping us meet this moment with the urgency it requires.

— Team Val

(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To ending partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=997%2E878179%2EUm7DLk). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=997%2E878179%2EUm7DLk).**

body:
AOC needs to keep her opinions, her politics and her money to herself. Folks in New York may like her, but not in Virginia. I need your help to make s Today I'm asking you to help me give back to the men and women of the national guard who are stepping up to protect our communities in this time of uncertainty. Don't want to receive our emails? [Unsubscribe here.](http://links.johncastorani.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=27014576054e4b79a5e5689b2f623d9d&_s=4d7b87fac5874a5faf3c07983e5a951b&_t=nxwsqdWuFpEgQJoc_278o1dEDvsTBp0GQHS8llwhQXUSAoFhqFYTESAh3PAAT8S63DZiC-dmjW0Ql3OulFE0-K7fRUfymfY7353SmUVNwQvzwhwwREEFmE8lQG3pfO0EtdqUGdS_XA6r8QDDCpWe7lpar_4QpZP_rFqnFjk4VaY%3D) | [](http://links.johncastorani.com/u/click?_t=27014576054e4b79a5e5689b2f623d9d&_m=4d7b87fac5874a5faf3c07983e5a951b&_e=--D77jAMyxi6qOSc6oG0oZ58eLAuD207ZgCtBGneQK65Usnn-mBfVPCI9LIgT5g3bGpJDrqflj2zMOW094AX-jfZC4KMC7srrMvZzZPCdoz8qqQO_D8fPTf0oU4BpZuTBcanfQB6AEKfiN8TE-sjzkN9icSgxIyvoiRp-rD2Z8qv0V6r0W8qTcVrv6ayAywTrHeH3iXGH0cpkzo2MK3MRBO-CUk7I6JLVov8uwFriAKLfrueHejyB12b-Ca75AJ4lqD94ufOrQYJaMlDBmHWaXsq_MRt9nyI9B7IBQxDueJRPqm5RD-SKfCKlsDuOKsvSLd_zhq7ds_t3ZKcoI99NnTafRIGKiGTUYbS9otdu5u8lNeA5L8ai2OAUCXLjYnBYL3i9XAkO7LZ4KQ-75Q6xSLKca913MsrxuO9DwSd778et7eioRWl9zVgWZB1xmdg)
---

Fellow Conservative,

My name is John Castorani and I’m a 29-year-old career intelligence officer, patriot, conservative Republican and soon-to-be first time father. **If we’re going to take back the U.S. House next November, you should know my name...**

**_ Why do you need to know my name?_ **

**[Because I’m the Republican challenging Abigail Spanberger in Virginia's 7th Congressional District - one of the historically Republican districts Democrats flipped in 2018 to take the House](http://links.johncastorani.com/u/click?_t=27014576054e4b79a5e5689b2f623d9d&_m=4d7b87fac5874a5faf3c07983e5a951b&_e=--D77jAMyxi6qOSc6oG0oZ58eLAuD207ZgCtBGneQK65Usnn-mBfVPCI9LIgT5g3bGpJDrqflj2zMOW094AX-jfZC4KMC7srrMvZzZPCdoz8qqQO_D8fPTf0oU4BpZuTBcanfQB6AEKfiN8TE-sjzkN9icSgxIyvoiRp-rD2Z8qv0V6r0W8qTcVrv6ayAywTrHeH3iXGH0cpkzo2MK3MRCsTtF7CRVF1uF5YbEc-9ieO2_tmBZK1k4E34khNnF_Oczenm0kfY4KktCHrsqcTcEl7qbwSFYV0tV9qtEeCZGIPPkoWLLvlfP39DdJvh6S9RkCfUn7Y3ASobO9722hevRizjgrctHdx2kl2RYHQ4MFiCxvvuFTG-QSKzUmW5VDAAhxS-cujZ3fZSk70CRwVWMZ8IoLbhAG52odB2diQyW1Hf4w8uk0-NuWJ75pyJ6lQ)** majority.

You might recall Abigail was in the news after her close call with defeat last year when two days after the election, **she “told fellow House Democrats on a private debrief call that “we will get f*****g torn apart in 2022”** referring to Democrats’ embrace of socialism; she went on to add, “**never use the word ‘socialist’ or ‘socialism’ ever again**.”

But that was just for optics. **In the spring she took a $5,000 contribution from AOC for her reelection bid.

Abigail is a fraud**.

Democrats like Abigail don't care where their money comes from, whether it's from AOC or elsewhere. _**Why?**_ Because Republicans came damn close to ousting her from Congress last November - falling short by just **8,270** votes out of more than 450,000 cast.

**[To take back this seat -- and the House -- my team and I have to start somewhere, so we're hoping to find enough conservative donors who will chip-in $5, $10 or even $25 or more today to help us match the $5,000 contribution AOC just sent my opponent. I would be honored if you would help me fight to keep AOC from entering Virginia politics.](http://links.johncastorani.com/u/click?_t=27014576054e4b79a5e5689b2f623d9d&_m=4d7b87fac5874a5faf3c07983e5a951b&_e=--D77jAMyxi6qOSc6oG0oZ58eLAuD207ZgCtBGneQK65Usnn-mBfVPCI9LIgT5g3bGpJDrqflj2zMOW094AX-jfZC4KMC7srrMvZzZPCdoz8qqQO_D8fPTf0oU4BpZuTBcanfQB6AEKfiN8TE-sjzkN9icSgxIyvoiRp-rD2Z8qv0V6r0W8qTcVrv6ayAywTrHeH3iXGH0cpkzo2MK3MRJVkn1kGLVVD_lCbRTG-YlIYJNRjJIGiq64qtoG9A-99MsqptBcQB0tKnL4q2M6AaBhmku85XnY3Eum83Yj-lu7p4c0GDi5RRvyjV7cZ8zorcnpY49ps35fQkQYeGs5-OyZd9jo9c5tNOstyfgwVVkOTGRc_wW8BcJRGKdXqjQnw3TJUeiS9g-OreIEiDDnZlQKi0lmCGGrg9bpGzQx1692p5Ly3phASrUN2D5tuNGQN) **

| [**ELECT AN ENEMY OF THE "SQUAD"** **› › **](http://links.johncastorani.com/u/click?_t=27014576054e4b79a5e5689b2f623d9d&_m=4d7b87fac5874a5faf3c07983e5a951b&_e=--D77jAMyxi6qOSc6oG0oZ58eLAuD207ZgCtBGneQK65Usnn-mBfVPCI9LIgT5g3bGpJDrqflj2zMOW094AX-jfZC4KMC7srrMvZzZPCdoz8qqQO_D8fPTf0oU4BpZuTBcanfQB6AEKfiN8TE-sjzkN9icSgxIyvoiRp-rD2Z8qv0V6r0W8qTcVrv6ayAywTrHeH3iXGH0cpkzo2MK3MRMfwz0JvtxnckL-RSdmtjm_L9elnKIGih74xsHLxP0OJXDXcfewSW0ySsSRMAT5SNvcqOz554fAIYhBWq4riynfz3sAtOBycNfDUJHEFYcREaiNiZq0ZzESx2BKEaahNdqlYLV8_LcWp5835fiplRoohfH6ej9VTFxYnHqddFpgsYefI3ODYaMusxizT62ZgHODpwZW9UiEQBXNe1EBiDKTwv2qCGqkxpZeWPDy5uRUn)
---

You may not be from Virginia, but we’re all fighting with a common goal in mind: Taking back the House from Nancy Pelosi. Without a Republican victory in my district (it was represented by a Republican from 1971-2018), Pelosi is all but undefeatable.

Republicans need just FIVE seats to retake the House next year - and **[that simply won’t happen without defeating Abigail Spanberger](http://links.johncastorani.com/u/click?_t=27014576054e4b79a5e5689b2f623d9d&_m=4d7b87fac5874a5faf3c07983e5a951b&_e=--D77jAMyxi6qOSc6oG0oZ58eLAuD207ZgCtBGneQK65Usnn-mBfVPCI9LIgT5g3bGpJDrqflj2zMOW094AX-jfZC4KMC7srrMvZzZPCdoz8qqQO_D8fPTf0oU4BpZuTBcanfQB6AEKfiN8TE-sjzkN9icSgxIyvoiRp-rD2Z8qv0V6r0W8qTcVrv6ayAywTrHeH3iXGH0cpkzo2MK3MRO9nYRpun_ZtyC85GuL5PiCCSgfyCmyG9mfC8JQK1Tr218istfV-QHWbWSe2VFqTNf4QNTFA6XgSz8oavl2H8xN4CBFG4JonoN6E5JLpmn9PrEfX_FcR65cwEYwMMSSkUE6LZYUdYwUqEuv1d2uAICGr6C_GY2qS0GTXtJQ2d5Xrve904bnykijVvhuGhT_HG6ItkfZd5WptHSo67pt0F1fbt6mzWRDUk0CVozti60Kh)**. Democrats are going to spend more than ever before to defend “moderates” like Abigail, **perhaps more than $25 million**.

Who is she? A “moderate” who ran against an unpopular Republican in a historically bad year for our party. She claims to be a conservative Democrat, but then **votes with Pelosi and the “Squad” more than 90% of the time** ; it’s nothing new to pretend to be someone you’re not, and she’s not even that good at hiding her progressiveness.

[**SEND A PATRIOT TO CONGRESS** **› › **](http://links.johncastorani.com/u/click?_t=27014576054e4b79a5e5689b2f623d9d&_m=4d7b87fac5874a5faf3c07983e5a951b&_e=--D77jAMyxi6qOSc6oG0oZ58eLAuD207ZgCtBGneQK65Usnn-mBfVPCI9LIgT5g3bGpJDrqflj2zMOW094AX-jfZC4KMC7srrMvZzZPCdoz8qqQO_D8fPTf0oU4BpZuTBcanfQB6AEKfiN8TE-sjzkN9icSgxIyvoiRp-rD2Z8qv0V6r0W8qTcVrv6ayAywTrHeH3iXGH0cpkzo2MK3MREWuSZPfxEhMMqYWZcD4yXOeFZzktmts2r4_s1GvgZRxfJTQfFwq60YNft9mhyGWjmds1Z-ZuENglZPau21avdu4UbSJvGn8cYGAyetCZ8g2161P5D85T6_cRBgbzYYu3FRSOT0bmK0Nt-NBngBkzaXku11s4F0OefrACh43K47Ro0MO3YUDhWsaZNAiqGqts_g0UX0-sjGaUl2w6hrKBa8uaesMkA8GZI0TDgVExpYD)
---

Spanberger disguises herself as a moderate, but really, **she is a liberal playing both sides to earn the vote within a Republican district** , then abandoning her moderate reputation when it’s time to vote.

How can a self-described “moderate” go to work at the Capitol every day alongside a member of her own party, Rashida Tlaib, who hates cops and has nothing but vengeful words to say about law enforcement? **It’s beyond the pale**. My opponent is friends with a member of Congress who, on April 13th, said “ _No more policing, incarceration, and militarization. It can't be reformed_.”

We’re on the precipice, Fellow Conservative, of something truly awful. If we don’t take back the House next fall, I’m scared that Democrats really will try and pass a bill defunding police departments across the nation.

[**CHIP-IN
Stop AOC IN VA** **› › **](http://links.johncastorani.com/u/click?_t=27014576054e4b79a5e5689b2f623d9d&_m=4d7b87fac5874a5faf3c07983e5a951b&_e=--D77jAMyxi6qOSc6oG0oZ58eLAuD207ZgCtBGneQK65Usnn-mBfVPCI9LIgT5g3bGpJDrqflj2zMOW094AX-jfZC4KMC7srrMvZzZPCdoz8qqQO_D8fPTf0oU4BpZuTBcanfQB6AEKfiN8TE-sjzkN9icSgxIyvoiRp-rD2Z8qv0V6r0W8qTcVrv6ayAywTrHeH3iXGH0cpkzo2MK3MRO6RlswU8IRz0-iuQGItex7VIwXchcYrsULsEcYHPetXF7hI2m-C-e75dIf8ZYz7FUZAT1VXozIV7TMFREMYjLIwiK3_sw8I5UMdW8nH7XmxHKbRHuxfREYVNtwxg6voz7tKZapOJvaSIW18igp3QBJPdnSHcfEUM2_p6wVHbvKbVoDoV5B0LkVVhoSjh4t_-j8FyMN6WadtidGKuWyGB9dcH9BXaMOzlD9MseGICxDT)
---

**[I hope you’ll join my team today](http://links.johncastorani.com/u/click?_t=27014576054e4b79a5e5689b2f623d9d&_m=4d7b87fac5874a5faf3c07983e5a951b&_e=--D77jAMyxi6qOSc6oG0oZ58eLAuD207ZgCtBGneQK65Usnn-mBfVPCI9LIgT5g3bGpJDrqflj2zMOW094AX-jfZC4KMC7srrMvZzZPCdoz8qqQO_D8fPTf0oU4BpZuTBcanfQB6AEKfiN8TE-sjzkN9icSgxIyvoiRp-rD2Z8qv0V6r0W8qTcVrv6ayAywTrHeH3iXGH0cpkzo2MK3MRGqrBsQ01wbTSVWUSLECf5hfoKpEbvrMs-9gPE5x9h80pLUIRRacDGH1YprA6RRa2b3XuiLylPhEWzPvIrUyLZgX7PfSAReLVOKm2upfs6ZLUDcR6whJTDSrk7ZRoYV-AFpLsGsapuA-p7dA8zHSR9kYFwg0PQq9uy8p68yga1wwwNiTzpEN7oXpVdbuI7OVR3sYQmT4AKtYpr3YgCstbuJcQWL7-ozYVsrtlt8hGr9Y)**. This is going to be one of the races to watch as Republicans fight like hell to take back the House next year.

As a Special Operations Veteran, I know first hand how precarious our freedoms are -- and I’ve carried out operations in foreign nations where freedom isn’t a word you’ll find in the daily vernacular.

I owe everything I have to this nation.

Sincerely,
John Castorani
Republican Candidate for Congress

| Paid for by John Castorani for Congress

name: Allen West
subject: Let’s Make This Official
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ALLEN WEST CAMPAIGN
body:
Recently I officially filed my candidacy for Governor with the office of the Secretary of State. I am announcing today that I have just come from officially filing my candidacy for Governor with the office of the Secretary of State. |
[](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=577853e5dde340cdbe540cbbd1bf1a62&_e=vBdhhDNDJjpk1p2CbmIOSloGVualzyCXH1-R3N_LMQD787VR5T4ck8Z0GFF_r0k3HCBNlH2uZc73OhbUVg3nk2UVUiyGoulnJ0RpRfKKYfb4gSnp2b8D_76efJuCrtrCSRidmk7yjiNRMRPMvY0yh6Ps3fNFR897NgTzo3Re3Mnt9EsW7Go1WYLTy6bR-vjsWiq2Y31u_Ov_JMmYW1hvjTJfBDmq6mp4yCASwQn8JZ2sAwyoz8DO24BuFvmHWXosXREFo1bk7LMa2Tv9Ew0r2caMrmylYXAj7g1GH19qe-VwNTYOKvhnw18nm1H4Id9Tra8RpR3xQklQtJkcOw_2KrkeUNPhtUS9ePXw7j9cKLym19Jqlib8UeRkS5um-XVt)
---
Fellow American,

We have been working hard for several months to reach the voters of Texas with my winning message of strong, effective conservative leadership for our state. Recently I officially filed my candidacy for Governor with the office of the Secretary of State.

[](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=577853e5dde340cdbe540cbbd1bf1a62&_e=vBdhhDNDJjpk1p2CbmIOSloGVualzyCXH1-R3N_LMQD787VR5T4ck8Z0GFF_r0k3HCBNlH2uZc73OhbUVg3nk2UVUiyGoulnJ0RpRfKKYfb4gSnp2b8D_76efJuCrtrCSRidmk7yjiNRMRPMvY0yh6Ps3fNFR897NgTzo3Re3MmyXi407b8Kw4bxQjIz3cgrUdwuZli97LP-VoFf0uzgVA-edn6aWGLMJvmUZyEBIqJ0YmAs5DborAdKNmLZQBh2m0_5VGyLndJOGuDnjU9uH2Vnr59uSuTKJ7-chMeqEsywZO9nz1JNfB91qqIRvSBPhj7CNKjnAOGEawBULYCjsLGIZcb_zMs6izqUDy5L7jpbCH10w2B9BuodXQk2GTwn)
So, it is time to really shift this campaign into top gear and utilize the time we have to make our case to Texas Republicans that the future of our state - and this great country - are on the line in the next few months.

That is why I hope you will also take action today - join me on the ramparts of freedom - and support my campaign for Governor of Texas!

There are many ways you can do that, Fellow American - you can pray, which costs nothing but time. You can share our campaign content online and speak to friends and family about what is at stake. You can volunteer and make a difference in person.

[**And, you can make your own endorsement of my campaign - and empower us with the resources we need to build a successful foundation for the tough race ahead with a 2022 Allen West for Governor - with a generous grassroots contribution of $25, $50, $75, $100 or whatever you can afford right now.**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=577853e5dde340cdbe540cbbd1bf1a62&_e=vBdhhDNDJjpk1p2CbmIOSloGVualzyCXH1-R3N_LMQD787VR5T4ck8Z0GFF_r0k3HCBNlH2uZc73OhbUVg3nk2UVUiyGoulnJ0RpRfKKYfb4gSnp2b8D_76efJuCrtrCSRidmk7yjiNRMRPMvY0yh6Ps3fNFR897NgTzo3Re3MnwOtKHlD-e_HKVAxMtsZMAe3PNPjQrL97CRYiwpegjEaTfx-0YLveYxeI0dNMzM5mvjHk0ZFKze3AOUFcsonRXSP05TQQXnj7HG_AN4T5dO4EOEg3mXepS7NokN7BJhnqDFYmNccIvYvLyHyYR9tRdHJy-PWNy9b8PNUJhBCNO9F57v5jk1Vn7RRdkEC0muvlCKvoVPt63e_TaH83rnyyV)

clean_body: Recently I officially filed my candidacy for Governor with the office of the Secretary of State. I am announcing today that I have just come from officially filing my candidacy for Governor with the office of the Secretary of State. | Fellow American, We have been working hard for several months to reach the voters of Texas with my winning message of strong, effective conservative leadership for our state. Recently I officially filed my candidacy for Governor with the office of the Secretary of State. So, it is time to really shift this campaign into top gear and utilize the time we have to make our case to Texas Republicans that the future of our state - and this great country - are on the line in the next few months. That is why I hope you will also take action today - join me on the ramparts of freedom - and support my campaign for Governor of Texas! There are many ways you can do that, Fellow American - you can pray, which costs nothing but time. You can share our campaign content online and speak to friends and family about what is at stake. You can volunteer and make a difference in person. Can I count on your endorsement today? Steadfast and Loyal, Allen B. West Lieutenant Colonel (Ret) | | POL. ADV. Friends,

For the entirety of this administration, Joe Biden and "Border Czar" Kamala Harris have turned a blind eye to the monstrosity that is the southern border. **It has come to the point where Americans rightly feel like they are ENCOURAGING people to enter our country illegally.**

How is this ok? I'll answer for you: it's not. Joe and Kamala are blatantly ignoring a CRISIS. They are putting the lives of the American people in danger. clean_body: Joe Biden is Putting Americans in Danger | TED BUDD IS THE TRUMP-ENDORSED REPUBLICAN CANDIDATE FOR U.S. SENATE IN NORTH CAROLINA Friends, For the entirety of this administration, Joe Biden and "Border Czar" Kamala Harris have turned a blind eye to the monstrosity that is the southern border. It has come to the point where Americans rightly feel like they are ENCOURAGING people to enter our country illegally. How is this ok? I'll answer for you: it's not. Joe and Kamala are blatantly ignoring a CRISIS. They are putting the lives of the American people in danger. | As someone who was recently endorsed by the National Border Patrol Council and as a husband and father, I cannot stand to see the disrespect that this administration has shown. President Trump made great progress on sealing our border and protecting the security of this country. Joe Biden is ruining it! if you agree that our border needs to be secure. We have to stand up to the reckless endangerment of our citizens! Thank you for your support. Sincerely, Ted Budd TED BUDD IS THE TRUMP-ENDORSED REPUBLICAN CANDIDATE FOR U.S. SENATE IN NORTH CAROLINA Paid for by Ted Budd for Senate Copyright © 2021 Ted Budd for Senate, All rights reserved.

name: =?utf-8?Q?Mike=20Van=20Someren?=
subject: Thank you & Join us Saturday
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mike Van Someren for WI
body:
I hope you can make it... | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/fc66135a4fdd/i-am-running-for-congress-8600666?e=356c0699dd)
---
| | | [ ](https://MikeVanSomeren.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a8d3e4f455e56b0d81700f39a&id=df48c9cead&e=356c0699dd)
---
| | | Hey there,

I wanted to take a moment and say thank you.

Our campaign has received so much support, and I’m overcome with gratitude. Without the help of friends like you, none of this would be possible.

**I am running for Congress to do the hard work of governing. I am running to listen to the voices of those who support me — as well as those who do not. I am running to advocate for policies and programs that will actually bring real, physical benefits to this community, our state, our country, and the people who live here. **

And your support helps me spread my message and continue to build a winning coalition behind our campaign. [If you’re able, making another donation of just $50, $25, or even $10 today will go a long way in compounding the support we’ve received so far](https://MikeVanSomeren.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a8d3e4f455e56b0d81700f39a&id=2f765afd55&e=356c0699dd).

Some of you on this email list are from western Wisconsin, or live there now. Many others are in or around the 5th district in southeastern Wisconsin, or in other places around the state and around the country

But wherever you are, I want to let you know about our next campaign event and personally invite you to **join us this Saturday, December 11th from 2-5:00 PM at the Bristol Ridge Golf Club in my hometown of Somerset. **

I’m proud to be from a working-class background and to have a chance to celebrate and discuss the issues with friends and family in my hometown. More information about the event can be found in the invite below and [you can RSVP to join us by clicking here](https://MikeVanSomeren.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a8d3e4f455e56b0d81700f39a&id=3b986b6170&e=356c0699dd).
---
|
---
| [ ](https://MikeVanSomeren.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a8d3e4f455e56b0d81700f39a&id=e69c760a75&e=356c0699dd)
---
| **Join Mike Van Someren in Somerset!**
_Host Committee in formation_

**Saturday, December 11**
2:00 PM - 5:00PM
[Bristol Ridge Golf Club
1978 County Hwy C,
Somerset, WI 54025](https://MikeVanSomeren.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a8d3e4f455e56b0d81700f39a&id=63a8808c89&e=356c0699dd)

**Levels of Support:**
Champion: **$1,000** | Host: **$500** | Advocate: **$250**
Supporter: **$100** | Friend: $50
_Contributions of any amount are greatly appreciated!_

---
| [RSVP](https://MikeVanSomeren.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a8d3e4f455e56b0d81700f39a&id=eeedb8b894&e=356c0699dd "RSVP")
---
| I know we’re going to have a good time with plenty of food and refreshments and I‘m looking forward discussing ideas on how we can get Washington back to work for regular people.

If you’re in the area, [don’t forget to RSVP today](https://MikeVanSomeren.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a8d3e4f455e56b0d81700f39a&id=acf20dbcac&e=356c0699dd). You won’t want to miss it.

I hope to see many of you on Saturday,

Mike Van Someren

name: =?utf-8?Q?Mark=20Finchem?=
subject: Help me fight back against the Washington ComPost
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FINCHEM FOR SECRETARY OF STATE
body:
The ComPost attacks |
---
| | [ ](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=926ff24749&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| | Dear ,
I am writing you today with grave news. Right as the meat of the 2022 election campaign for Secretary of State candidates is heating up nation wide, the media is going on a full-blown assault against Election Integrity Patriots. [_And I need your help to fight back!_](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=6be2b29dcd&e=44b8c466b0)

**And of these races, no state is more important than what happens in the Arizona Secretary of State race, the epicenter of 2020 election fraud. [_This is why I, Mark Finchem, am doing everything I can to win this seat for Election Integrity Conservatives in 2022._](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=838b42df87&e=44b8c466b0)**

I have been leading the vanguard not only in America’s audit in Maricopa, which highlighted and revealed unprecedented election fraud which lead to President Trump’s illegal loss in his campaign for re-election, but I have also been developing foolproof safeguard measures such as watermarking ballots to secure our elections for good.

**And the mainstream media has been attacking me for a year because of this.**

**_And now they are doubling down._**
---
| [ ](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=45abaa500a&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| The _Washington Post_ just released this hit piece on me and many campaigns such as mine for election integrity.

About me, the _Washington Post_ writes:

_Bolick’s primary challenger, Mark Finchem, is a leading driver of a conspiracy theory that the election was stolen in Arizona’s second-largest county, Pima County. He is a state House lawmaker and introduced a bill to let Republican lawmakers get hold of voter data there. “I expect to see criminal prosecution out of it,” he said, without citing any evidence._

**Conspiracy theory? There is ample proof that there was fraud. The only conspiracy is to pretend there wasn’t.**

**_And of course I expect to see criminal prosecution of it! I demand PERP WALKS! _**

But this is revealing...

Logically, given that I have been one of the loudest and most active in the nation in terms of constantly providing new evidence, they say I have provided none.
This means there are only two options.
1. They have neither read nor watched literally anything that I have put out.
2. They KNOW I have provided the evidence but they are trying to brainwash into believing that it doesn’t exist.

**Now, logic would tell me that they know what I’ve said, given the main stream media’s countless hit pieces against me this year.**

_Which means this is a targeted propaganda campaign by the left._

Fortunately for us, they make their aim very clear.

_The ultimate win for them would be to put in place secretaries of state, who oversee how elections are conducted in most states and sign off on the results. More than any other category of elected official, secretaries of state could be instrumental in overturning the popular vote in their state — an unprecedented move in American history — or take other actions that throw results into question._

_Ahead of the 2022 elections, there are a number of viable Republican candidates in states that could decide the next presidential election who question whether Trump actually lost in 2020. And they are proposing big changes to how elections are run._

This is what they don’t want to have happen.

**This is their agenda:**
* Don’t let Election Integrity Conservatives oversee how elections are conducted, or sign off on them.
* They don’t want us to overthrow fraudulent elections that have been falsely and illegally declared.
* They don’t want Conservatives to decide the next Presidential Elections.
* They don’t want Conservatives to look into 2020 fraud.
* And definitely don’t want changes to the system that allowed fraud in the first place!

_They make all of this abundantly clear in the above two paragraphs._

**So right now, the question is clear. Will we let the Washington Post and Liberal-Propaganda Fake News Media dictate this election? [Or will we make sure that can never happen?](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=17d5707960&e=44b8c466b0)**

_That is exactly what I am trying to accomplish here in Arizona. [But we need the bankroll to be able to push back against attacks like this and go on the offensive.](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=8eee7aa901&e=44b8c466b0)_

**_And this takes money. [This is why we have a crucial end of quarter deadline coming up. We need to raise $50,000 to put us in a good position for 2022. Can you help with a generous donation today?](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=4db39fe4da&e=44b8c466b0)_**

[**_Donate as much as you can! $25, $50, $100, $250 or more could make the difference!_**](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=41a7fbc627&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| [Thank you and God bless you!](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=b6e23b67a1&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| [ ](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=80434d0353&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| Mark Finchem

Arizona House of Representatives – District 11
Republican for Arizona Secretary of State
Conservative
Election Integrity Patriot

PAID FOR BY FINCHEM FOR SECRETARY OF STATE
---
| |
---
| _Copyright © 2021 Mark Finchem for Secretary of State, All rights reserved._

**Our mailing address is:**
Mark Finchem for Secretary of StatePO Box 69344Oro Valley, AZ 85737
[Add us to your address book](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/vcard?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=7ec8888fbb)

Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/profile?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=7ec8888fbb&e=44b8c466b0&c=8fd68328b7) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=7ec8888fbb&e=44b8c466b0&c=8fd68328b7).
---

They don’t want us to overthrow fraudulent elections that have been falsely and illegally declared. They don’t want Conservatives to decide the next Presidential Elections. They don’t want Conservatives to look into 2020 fraud. And definitely don’t want changes to the system that allowed fraud in the first place! They make all of this abundantly clear in the above two paragraphs. So right now, the question is clear. Will we let the Washington Post and Liberal-Propaganda Fake News Media dictate this election? That is exactly what I am trying to accomplish here in Arizona. And this takes money. | | | Mark Finchem Arizona House of Representatives – District 11 Republican for Arizona Secretary of State Conservative Election Integrity Patriot PAID FOR BY FINCHEM FOR SECRETARY OF STATE | | | Copyright © 2021 Mark Finchem for Secretary of State, All rights reserved. body:
How many more children will we allow to die before enough is enough?
#

Friends,
Just days after the Oxford High School shooting in Michigan, Republican Congressman Thomas Massie posted THIS on Twitter:
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/giffords-em-dec21?refcode=em211208-1-15&t=1&refcode2=1291_3935704_lE3U_W&akid=1291%2E3935704%2ElE3U_W)
This stunt was cruel and devoid of any empathy for the Oxford, Michigan community — and all Americans who’ve lost a loved one to preventable gun violence.
This is Second Amendment extremism, plain and simple. In this season of peace and celebration, Rep. Massie chose to elevate conflict and violence. This is evidence of how far the gun lobby has corrupted politicians on the right.
We may not be able to convince someone as extreme as Rep. Massie to vote for reasonable gun safety measures. But we CAN defeat politicians like him at the ballot box and elect gun safety candidates who will take action and stand up to the gun lobby.
Will you help us do it?
[**If you’re with us, please make a donation so we can elect officials who care about saving lives and passing gun safety legislation. You can contribute here:**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/giffords-em-dec21?refcode=em211208-1-15&t=2&refcode2=1291_3935704_lE3U_W&akid=1291%2E3935704%2ElE3U_W)

---
****
| **[Other Amount](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/giffords-em-dec21?express_lane=true&refcode=em211208-1-15&t=26&refcode2=1291_3935704_lE3U_W&akid=1291%2E3935704%2ElE3U_W)**

As we have said before, we can express outrage after every shooting, but it means nothing if our politicians like Massie refuse to act. How many more children will we allow to die before enough is enough?
Sincerely,
The team at Giffords

name: Izzi Levy
subject: Can we talk?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tim Ryan for Ohio
body:
[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/46?t=1001&akid=1673%2E3611125%2EPC-cjp ][IMG]

Well folks, the pundits are at it again.

They’re saying Tim’s got no chance of flipping a Senate seat blue in a
state like Ohio. They think far-right Republican Josh Mandel will pull off
a win because, well, because they say so [1]🤷. But let’s not forget that
Josh has run for Senate twice, and *checks notes* failed both times.

Politics isn’t a game. Whether you live in a steel town or a big city,
Ohioans want leaders to fight for jobs that pay the bills, quality health
care, and good schools.

But instead of showing up for workers, Josh Mandel is pushing conspiracy
theories, lying about the results of the 2020 election, and encouraging
people to take up arms against their government.

Yikes.

Look, you and I both know this race will be tough, but it’s winnable—as
long as we have the resources to fight off the GOP’s attacks and stop Josh
and his toxic brand of politics from gaining any more ground.

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/6243?t=1007&akid=1673%2E3611125%2EPC-cjp ]We know that with YOUR help we have what it takes to overcome the GOP
mega-donors and cut workers in on the deal. Can you chip in $25—or
whatever you can—to help us win this thing?

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/6244?t=1009&amount=25&akid=1673%2E3611125%2EPC-cjp ]Donate $25
[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/6244?t=1010&amount=50&akid=1673%2E3611125%2EPC-cjp ]Donate $50

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/6244?t=1014&amount=25&akid=1673%2E3611125%2EPC-cjp ]Other Amount

Thanks a bunch.

— Izzi

subject: Here's how you can help defeat Kevin McCarthy next year
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bruno Amato for Congress
body:
This is an ambitious goal — but this is also an ambitious, people-powered campaign | | | [](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953x-UnXZEV9rwWCU4oSd5EZQK5i5bJ0D_H_09LgcZp5uFE0uIjofAduQty9vNFY-fIJx01XUjbTm2D6OW3zxZqi8wMX-4s00wP75TvOj2Wd4eKKTIUMV1szOugz6T03328KCd6xjTuJeLPE5NnHseorz_oNuh9TB3yodNPCHTtV_Z4L_8ndHgq0b0dPOTmISR0t_puoWRfjQd5xxlQioXSnvFePHHo8W98Zq_2y-6HsXYNMRZttAUAdhgFkEH4L3oIZcLw_p3w0fq_uSJ93NtqzpmTkU539otnJfCqc1LMfKQemF-MdjtTMXL7tjQI7DAEUOljMJ0Gme4bz03ql89kRe-DtWHE962B_4n-rnspiI7Q/3ho/Ze5noVDVRPWsNsaoQCwudw/h0/XGnf22KXoAb7FqQVjJxE848NwQdPc7f6EVWgBLssKtM)

I decided to run for this seat against Kevin McCarthy — one of the most powerful Republicans in Congress — because I could not stand by and watch him continue to harm the hard-working folks all across California’s 23rd District and our country. For years, he has failed to deliver for the people he represents. He has stood by and protected the interests that can keep him in power. He’s got millions of dollars from far-right billionaires and corporations who know he’ll always protect them. But I’ve got something even better: **you.** [**With folks like you in this fight, I know we’re going to take on Kevin McCarthy — and win. That’s why I’m excited to announce that we’ve set a fundraising goal of $100,000 before the year is over. Will you make a donation right now to be a part of the team to raise that money before January and help our campaign hit the ground running in Fellow American,

In August the radical left began talking about mandating vaccines for individuals working in the United States Capitol, the military, and beyond. **Now, President Biden wants to "compel" the private sector to mandate vaccinations or face fines up to $14,000 PER VIOLATION!**

**Chances are that if you’re reading this email today you already think that the heavy hand of the federal government plays too large a role in your everyday life**. And we’d agree with you. You may not be the target of the first round of vaccine mandates, but eventually the long arm of government will come for those who aren’t vaccinated, and that isn’t their role.

**We’ve lived through 21 months of a pandemic that both ravaged our economy and put us on a path to financial ruin**. Americans have suffered enough from COVID-19 restrictions, mask mandates, and now potential forced vaccinations.

**[What we want to know from you is if you agree or not. Judicial Watch announced recently that it received 221 pages of records from the Department of Health and Human Services (HHS) which include a grant application for research involving the coronavirus that was submitted in 2018.

# [Judicial Watch: New Fauci Agency COVID Records Reveal Information about NIH Research into the Coronavirus](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=57327&L=26463&F=H&)
Judicial Watch announced recently that it received 221 pages of records from the Department of Health and Human Services (HHS) which include a grant application for research involving the coronavirus that was submitted in 2018\. The grant application appears to describe “gain of function” research involving RNA extractions from bats, experiments on viruses, attempts to develop a chimeric virus and efforts to genetically manipulate the full-length bat SARSr-CoV WIV1 strain molecular clone.
[Read More](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=57327&L=26463&F=H&)

### [Sinaloa Cartel Ring Busted in U.S. 1,400 Miles from its Mexican Headquarters ](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=57327&L=26464&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvc2luYWxvYS1jYXJ0ZWwtcmluZy1idXN0ZWQtaW4tdS1zLTE0MDAtbWlsZXMtZnJvbS1pdHMtbWV4aWNhbi1oZWFkcXVhcnRlcnMvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249Y29ycnVwdGlvbitjaHJvbmljbGVzJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnM=) Judicial Watch The large-scale drug trafficking operation of an infamous cartel just got busted in a mountain state some 1,400 miles from its Mexican headquarters and only one U.S. official, a local prosecutor, has dared to acknowledge the obvious; “This poison is coming over from our southern border unchecked,” said the elected prosecutor of Colorado’s largest district. “It will not stop coming over the border from Mexico into our communities until the federal government takes that porous border seriously.” [READ MORE](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=57327&L=26464&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvc2luYWxvYS1jYXJ0ZWwtcmluZy1idXN0ZWQtaW4tdS1zLTE0MDAtbWlsZXMtZnJvbS1pdHMtbWV4aWNhbi1oZWFkcXVhcnRlcnMvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249Y29ycnVwdGlvbitjaHJvbmljbGVzJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnM=)

### [Judicial Watch Victory: Delaware Supreme Court Demands More Answers on Biden Senate Document Secrecy ](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=57327&L=26465&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvanctZGVsYXdhcmUtc2NvdHVzLWJpZGVuLXNlbmF0ZS8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj1jb3JydXB0aW9uK2Nocm9uaWNsZXMmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==) Judicial Watch Judicial Watch announced that the Delaware Supreme Court ruled yesterday that the University of Delaware must provide more information justifying its decision to keep secret its deal to house and restrict access to the U.S. Senate records of President Joe Biden. The Delaware Supreme Court reversed the Delaware Superior Court and found that the University of Delaware had not carried its burden justifying its refusal to produce records. The case returns to the Delaware Superior Court for further proceedings. clean_body: Judicial Watch announced recently that it received 221 pages of records from the Department of Health and Human Services (HHS) which include a grant application for research involving the coronavirus that was submitted in 2018. | | | Because no one is above the law! | December 08, 2021 ---|---|--- | | = = Judicial Watch announced recently that it received 221 pages of records from the Department of Health and Human Services (HHS) which include a grant application for research involving the coronavirus that was submitted in 2018\. The grant application appears to describe “gain of function” research involving RNA extractions from bats, experiments on viruses, attempts to develop a chimeric virus and efforts to genetically manipulate the full-length bat SARSr-CoV WIV1 strain molecular clone. = | | | = Judicial Watch The large-scale drug trafficking operation of an infamous cartel just got busted in a mountain state some 1,400 miles from its Mexican headquarters and only one U.S. official, a local prosecutor, has dared to acknowledge the obvious; “This poison is coming over from our southern border unchecked,” said the elected prosecutor of Colorado’s largest district. “It will not stop coming over the border from Mexico into our communities until the federal government takes that porous border seriously.” = == Judicial Watch Judicial Watch announced that the Delaware Supreme Court ruled yesterday that the University of Delaware must provide more information justifying its decision to keep secret its deal to house and restrict access to the U.S. Senate records of President Joe Biden. The Delaware Supreme Court reversed the Delaware Superior Court and found that the University of Delaware had not carried its burden justifying its refusal to produce records. The case returns to the Delaware Superior Court for further proceedings. == = National Review The trial commenced this week in Crest v. Padilla, a lawsuit filed by Judicial Watch to enjoin California from requiring that publicly held corporations headquartered in California include at least one director who “self-identifies” as a woman. Pursuant to California’s SB 826, by the end of 2021, up to three self-identified women will be required, depending on the size of the board. = | CLIPS | | | | | | Keep our investigators on the job uncovering the truth: | = | | | | ---|---|--- = = = Judicial Watch, Inc. 425 3rd St Sw Ste 800, Washington, DC 20024 202.646.5172 (C)2017-2021, All Rights Reserved = |

As our campaign prepares for the primary, we’re asking all of our fellow conservatives to step up and sign up to volunteer for Tiffany Shedd’s campaign for Attorney General. **Tiffany is the only candidate in the race for Attorney General who has the real conservative leadership we need in that office to fight back against the Democrats and aggressively stand up to their radical agenda.** **[Will you sign up to volunteer and help us get Tiffany’s message out to other conservatives and Republican primary voters by clicking here?](http://links.sheddforaz.com/u/click?_t=aef90635dd7e4e83bfd7b3a79f893ad5&_m=102fd0ba0e5a402cb577e8e50f982e3f&_e=K7mk23vELufG4YReHYnaPXlyiJicvLqgKsfT5vJVqf6ak2NrB4LUBt4fgvAcZsBdGGUQ18GxmQ5PyRAC6G6QFmyR-T_0t-ENxe41cT9r3x6PNkAptjbhyxBRDTRLauYTBf2XXsjSdDnkjeMnEfH-DA1PumeZxqe25wUVEHk8KydS57QRT_zPgqjNAhydjSH8OfBmpgN7_Q1mvrJnKSJOQUCa7lqWA_MxQ1wEz9_14MLPA6CB8B28wQyfJ3KIDg1bGBfpk-9rC0Jg47g_AdBqKYWnktsOtuOHt3C5fK1LhFxym3f6cugFUzGlvRtyTQfQKiZBOsqAqBj8nNFnJ9K8cjmr42AtsdCd8hZE86gNVAlWWLaHE_laHKzv8peml-9wbsMZyav3z8lvTfTKAJZemFECJlPGR-meOO-DVecHf9oFM-A9wgftKfNgnD2tk_D-)** ** ** **Tiffany has never worked for the government and has spent her career as an attorney fighting government overreach and burdensome regulations. As Attorney General, she is going to continue that fight and take on rogue schools that try to indoctrinate our children. _ ** ** _As a gun owner, gun range owner, and certified shotgun and pistol instructor, Tiffany has been advocating for Second Amendment rights her entire life. She is never going to give up her guns or rights and as Attorney General she is going to make sure the constitutional rights of all Arizonans are protected._ ** ** _Living on a drug and human trafficking route, Tiffany has also experienced the Obama and Biden border crises first hand. She has been advocating for border security with fellow farmers and ranchers for decades and has supported President Trump ever since he first said “wall.” She is going to fight like hell to secure our border and eradicate drug cartels in our state because it is personal to her._ ** ** **Anyone can say they are a conservative. What makes Tiffany different is she has a lifelong track record of living her conservative values and ideals. Our state doesn’t need anymore politicians, phony conservatives, or weak kneed Republicans. We need conservative leaders who we can count on.** ** ** **[If you agree, please join our team now by clicking As our campaign prepares for the primary, we’re asking all of our fellow conservatives to step up and sign up to volunteer for Tiffany Shedd’s campaign for Attorney General. Tiffany is the only candidate in the race for Attorney General who has the real conservative leadership we need in that office to fight back against the Democrats and aggressively stand up to their radical agenda. - Tiffany has never worked for the government and has spent her career as an attorney fighting government overreach and burdensome regulations. She is proud to be the conservative outsider in this race and will bring much needed private sector experience to the office of Attorney General. Most importantly, she practices what she preaches. As a former school board member and homeschool mom, Tiffany has been fighting for parental rights for over 20 years. As Attorney General, she is going to continue that fight and take on rogue schools that try to indoctrinate our children. As a gun owner, gun range owner, and certified shotgun and pistol instructor, Tiffany has been advocating for Second Amendment rights her entire life. She is never going to give up her guns or rights and as Attorney General she is going to make sure the constitutional rights of all Arizonans are protected. Living on a drug and human trafficking route, Tiffany has also experienced the Obama and Biden border crises first hand. She has been advocating for border security with fellow farmers and ranchers for decades and has supported President Trump ever since he first said “wall.” She is going to fight like hell to secure our border and eradicate drug cartels in our state because it is personal to her. Anyone can say they are a conservative. What makes Tiffany different is she has a lifelong track record of living her conservative values and ideals. Our state doesn’t need anymore politicians, phony conservatives, or weak kneed Republicans. We need conservative leaders who we can count on. We need top conservatives from all across the state to join our movement and keep Arizona BRIGHT red in 2022. Thank you, Dustin Rhodes Campaign Manager Tiffany Shedd for Attorney General Paid for by Shedd for Attorney General. Authorized by Shedd for Attorney General.

name: Team King for Maryland
subject: King's Chronicle Newsletter #5
disclaimer_text: Paid for by John King for Governor, Eliza Leighton, Treasurer
body:
The King's Chronicle: December 8, 2021
Team—
As you know, we recently launched a brand new ad campaign that tells the extraordinary story of John’s family and how it shaped his vision for the future of Maryland. We want to be sure that you saw it, and we'd really appreciate your support sharing John's message with your networks so they can see it, too.
Watch: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/king_video?refcode=newsletter5
Retweet: https://twitter.com/JohnBKing/status/1467836794746114049
Share on Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/JohnKingforGovernor/videos/701819520797301/
It's going to take all of us to elect a leader with real education authority and expertise, who will lead by listening, and who will be the best advocate for Maryland schools and students. We need John King, and we're so glad to have your support as we build this movement to elect a teacher as governor.
Onward,
-Team King

Team King Updates
FORECAST CALLS FOR WINTER MIX : As the weather gets colder, keep those ears warm with some good music and check out our Winter Mix campaign playlist! You can check it out here: https://open.spotify.com/playlist/4GAuKKswSoZHCCs3ZerEt1? or text MUSIC to 48178 .

SPREAD THE TRUTH : In order to give "Truth" the boost it needs and spread the word about why now is the right moment to elect a teacher as governor, we need your support to power our outreach efforts and help us get John’s message in front of as many Maryland voters as possible. Please, chip in to our ad fund today: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/king_truth?refcode=newsletter5

John in the News
WASHINGTON POST: John B. King Jr. raises critical race theory in first campaign ad
“The 60-second Web ad, backed by what King’s campaign said was a ‘six-figure’ media purchase, builds on his campaign theme of using education to bridge gaps in wealth, justice and health that put many of Maryland’s Black families at a disadvantage.”
READ: https://johnkingforgovernor.com/news-article/john-b-king-jr-raises-critical-race-theory-in-first-campaign-ad/
MARYLAND MATTERS: John King Hits Digital Airwaves, Parrying GOP Attacks on Critical Race Theory
“In addition to serving as a biographical spot that introduces King to voters, the ad also serves to highlight his educational bonafides and argue that King is the candidate best positioned to answer conservatives’ attacks around education and ‘Critical Race Theory’ — a quality he argues is important following Democratic losses in Virginia this year.”
READ: https://johnkingforgovernor.com/news-article/john-king-hits-digital-airwaves-parrying-gop-attacks-on-critical-race-theory/
Jonathan Martin of The New York Times had something to say about our latest ad...
SEE TWEET: https://twitter.com/jmartNYT/status/1468237998965809152
On the Road with John
On Saturday, November 20th, John spoke at a meet and greet in Prince George’s County after being endorsed by Mayor Jonathan Medlock of Capitol Heights.
On Monday, November 22nd at the Maryland Democratic Party’s Burgers and Brews forum in Waldorf, John shared his vision for bringing opportunity to rural Maryland and showed that he has the deepest grasp of the issues important to Maryland voters -- and Team King showed up in full force to support him!
On Wednesday, Dec. 8th, John visited Bowie High School to speak with young Marylanders about the issues they are concerned with and share his poignant personal connection to Maryland’s complicated history.

Upcoming Events
Interested in future events?
Text MEET to 48178 or sign up here: https://secure.ngpvan.com/Cxe21RPYHEawP0lnpsTacA2?
Silver Spring Meet and Greet
Saturday, Dec. 11 @ 3:00PM
Proof of vax required
RSVP: https://www.mobilize.us/johnkingforgovernor/event/428591/
Baltimore City Meet and Greet with Secretary John King
Tuesday, Dec. 14 @ 6:00PM
Proof of vax required
RSVP: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/090121?refcode=121421bell_em
Takoma Park Grassroots Fundraiser for John King
Friday, Dec. 16 @ 5:30PM
Proof of vax required
RSVP: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/121621jk&refcode=121621jk_em

Ways to Get Involved
We are always eager for new supporters to join us -- sign up with Team King today!
VOLUNTEER: https://secure.ngpvan.com/k4tMmAcfr0Wx2nb2-u6_IQ2?
HOST AN EVENT: https://secure.ngpvan.com/k4tMmAcfr0Wx2nb2-u6_IQ2
SHOP MERCH: https://store.johnkingforgovernor.com/
DONATE MONTHLY: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/king_truth?refcode=newsletter5&recurring=true

FACEBOOK: https://www.facebook.com/JohnKingforGovernor
TWITTER: https://twitter.com/JohnBKing
INSTAGRAM: https://www.instagram.com/johnkingforgovernor/
Paid for by John King for Governor, Eliza Leighton, Treasurer
John King for Governor
PO Box 8429
Silver Spring, MD 20107
United States
If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: https://email.ngpvan.com/unsubscribeUnique/8fd47f93-dc57-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b/c331e45d-9258-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMzMxZTQ1ZC05MjU4LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xJ_Kmwn5p2W4looAz8W7ej-IYJOQjkF4qkdWk1f9TpI=&id=128050175 .

**[_Can you or anyone you know chip in to our campaign right now?_](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xWIurlfE4kaqpZPqSu1iEihe1nomG2ZYUNtRxkTqbJuEe01elUD-BMdGOIxUmkx5l_Us6E7rWkyNajJveYouPbGrRlSMma1JzTyiNUV57QbpIXdukLLThq8Y74r4-0KToaYOm_vQrQ0c98G5aug4O7ecwwVOlWQE9O14moD1DygnkNdE40xzSyIX99lNU2w_83BjVfzhibIcGJN8dAImyZb55njJqYgFv9in2PMa1RWRef5q1fZhBFEx-9-S0txgtWz8Iy89V4Sql54dUMre3gW1MF_EFcxDHlGxfDUKrchJ6NZgZGPny1JrjP6NwSg8c/3ho/Cl5gT5BFSJ-wJaQhL1zTcA/h2/s44_uGB3dlRC49Qs4L0vA80Q_LB3fVnw9P21RqZXMCI)** We’re hustling to hit our goal in time, but we can use all the support we can get. That’s right. clean_body: Adding you to the group chat for this: | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | ---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|--- | Hey Peter, it’s Odessa! I’m adding you to the group chat so you can hear straight from Aarica and me about how our campaign for Congress is going. Odessa Helloooo! I wanted to let you know that we have less than a month left in Q4 (and in 2021!) and so we’ve got just days for us to reach our end-of-year fundraising goal. Aarica | | I’m in this race to give working folks a voice in the halls of power. It’s not easy running against a powerful incumbent like Jim Cooper, but with your help, we can do this. Odessa Thank YOU to each and every one of you working hard alongside us to elect Odessa to Congress. It’s been an amazing 8 months so far – and we’re just getting started. Aarica | | I can’t WAIT for the next phase of this race. We have so much progressive change to fight for, and you know when I’m in Congress I’ll always stand with the people. That’s why it means so much to me that so many people have my back. Odessa We’re hustling to hit our goal in time, but we can use all the support we can get. Aarica | | I’ve said it before: We won’t take one dollar from corporate PACs. That means grassroots donations from people like you are what fuel this entire campaign. Odessa That’s right. Appreciate y’all sooo much! Aarica | | Y’all, Congress ain’t ready for us! Odessa To give by check: Odessa for Congress 2817 West End Ave, Ste 126-401 Nashville, TN 37203

clean_body: Stacey Abrams just announced that she’s running for governor next year. Stacey Abrams just announced that she's running for governor next year. | Fellow American , I want to make one thing clear from the beginning of this email: Our Senate race is about the future of Georgia and the future of the United States. Democrats say the most sensationalist things to fire up their base and raise money. We know for a fact that we've put the scare in my Democrat opponent and his team because we keep seeing email after email from his campaign talking about ME! And now that Stacey Abrams is officially running for governor again, Democrats will work overtime to defeat our Republican ticket next November. We all know that Stacey Abrams has a big base of support in Atlanta - along with large checkbooks to make the big-dollar contributions she needs. That's why I'm asking you to make a gift to my campaign today. Thank you, Herschel Walker | | PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC. Don't want to receive any more of our emails? We hate to see you go, but ._

Northern Michigan / U.P. production needs to be included in the "Made in America" initiative . As the U.S. develops plans to prioritize ‘Made in American’ companies, highlights what the initiative could mean for production in a rural district. **A ‘Made in USA’ initiative must emphasize Northern Michigan / U.P. companies** [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39480192/320054420/1277889215?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjc5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiYmNiOWRkYi05NDU4LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3LeRAZXcAjQ8t-TcV1Q10Y-lGMWelVKUCRf88vKDlS0=) _**As the U.S. develops plans to prioritize ‘Made in American’ companies, it could mean a huge boost to Northern Michigan and Upper Peninsula production. To advocate for these initiatives in Congress,[I need your help](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39480193/320054421/1277889215?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjc5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiYmNiOWRkYi05NDU4LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3LeRAZXcAjQ8t-TcV1Q10Y-lGMWelVKUCRf88vKDlS0=) getting there. **_ _**If you agree, a generous contribution to the campaign will go a long way. My campaign is currently 100% funded by small, individual donors like you. Up against large corporate PAC checks and dark money, we're holding our own – but we need to maintain momentum. **_ _**Can you pitch in?**_ [HELP ME FIGHT FOR LOCAL MANUFACTURING](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39480194/320054422/1277889215?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjc5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiYmNiOWRkYi05NDU4LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3LeRAZXcAjQ8t-TcV1Q10Y-lGMWelVKUCRf88vKDlS0=) [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39480195/320054423/1277889215?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjc5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiYmNiOWRkYi05NDU4LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3LeRAZXcAjQ8t-TcV1Q10Y-lGMWelVKUCRf88vKDlS0=) [ON-CLICK IMMEDIATE $29 DONATION](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39480196/320054424/1277889215?express_lane=true&amount=29&refcode=express_lane_29&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjc5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiYmNiOWRkYi05NDU4LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3LeRAZXcAjQ8t-TcV1Q10Y-lGMWelVKUCRf88vKDlS0=) Hi Friend, A 'Made in America' initiative means a resurgence of our domestic production. Our district might be rural, but we contribute a great deal to the production of goods and materials on which Americans and the rest of the world depend. In this district, we thrive in the production of electronic circuit boards, medical devices, lumber, industrial equipment and fabrics, machinery, aerospace, raw materials, agricultural goods, and so much more. Products Made in Northern Michigan and the U.P. contribute to a better quality of life for all citizens. **In what ways?**
* Producing products in the district creates family-sustaining, well-paying jobs and enables the mutual success of workers and employers.
* Purchasing and contracting within the region keeps trade local, boosts employment rates, helps municipal tax bases, grows population naturally and gradually, and ensures regional resilience in a fluctuating global economy.
* Creating jobs in the district is an investment in our future. It leads to higher consumer spending rates, helps businesses succeed, decreases poverty, and improves the efficacy of other federal resources. Less financial stress on a community decreases crime rates, civil unrest, violence, and addiction.
* Improving the environment where Northern Michiganders and Yoopers work bolsters business productivity, boosts employee retention, and fosters a healthier community.
* Living in a community where citizens value local products and services is priceless to our culture and way of life.

**How can we do more?**
* Mobilize existing grit and talent.
* Attract new investment and talent.
* Create business-friendly communities by incubating start-ups and fostering innovation.
* Provide businesses the tools, resources, and partnerships they need to outsource within Michigan.
* Revitalize trade schools, STEM programs, and other non-traditional education programs to supply high worker demand.
* Improve infrastructure to make it possible for workers to commute, deliver and access all the necessary tools to supply consumer demand.
* Protect and improve the environment to create a place where workers want to live, work, and enjoy.

As your Representative, no matter which side of the aisle an idea originates, I will support economic 'Made in America' solutions that prevent off-shoring and enable the Northern Michigan and U.P. economy to thrive. **Let's get to work.** \- Dr. Bob And we are on a six game case winning streak overall against Biden! If you haven't already, please consider making a small contribution to help fund our fight. name: =?utf-8?Q?Mark=20Finchem?=
subject: MEDIA ADVISORY: Announcing Public Hearing on Election Integrity
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FINCHEM FOR SECRETARY OF STATE
body:
BREAKING |
---
| | [ ](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=246a4e8af0&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| |
---
| MEDIA ADVISORY

PHOENIX, December 8, 2021... FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE

House Majority Whip Representative Leo Biasiucci (LD-5), Senate Majority Whip Senator Sonny Borrelli (LD-5) and Representative Mark Finchem (LD-11), announce a Public Hearing on Election Integrity.

DATE: December 13, 2021
TIME: 0900-1700 MST
LOCATION: Hilton El Conquistador Hotel and Convention Center, 10000 N. Oracle Road, Oro Valley, AZ.
ACCESS: By ticket only, the event will be live-streamed for all to watch.

“On November 7, 2020, an anonymous report of election system fraud was made to the United States Department of Justice and ALL members of the Arizona House and Senate. The allegation that 35,000 fictitious votes had been entered into the Pima County election was related by an individual who claimed to be in the room when the plan was revealed to lower-level Pima County Democratic Party leaders.

“Over the last 12 months a few Members of the Legislature and resources from various election integrity organizations have conducted a quiet, but fruitful investigation into the substance and reliability of the allegation.

“Our elections are a system, and systems require active maintenance. Without attention to detail, the bureaucratic machine inevitably runs amok. We are elected to identify defects and fix them.” Rep. Biasiucci

“We found significant discrepancies in the Maricopa County Election through the audit, which gives us all pause to consider what has happened in other counties? To think that we would not find similar problems in other counties is not a credible position for any elected official to take.” Sen. Sonny Borrelli

“With consent of the Governed goes the right of the Governed to to examine, and if warranted, conduct an audit of the elections that they participate in. Elections belong to the People, not the government.” Rep. Finchem

On November 30, 2020, we held a Public Hearing on Election Integrity that gave the public an opportunity to present evidence and sworn testimony to the joint panel of Members of the State Legislature regarding the 2020 General Election. The mission of the Public Hearing on Election Integrity was to, “receive evidence and testimony that could serve to prove or disprove alleged discrepancies in the 2020 General Election.” Arizona citizens and expert witnesses submitted sworn affidavits, under penalty of perjury, to the panel detailing inconsistencies they encountered during the election process.

Pima County voters who have first-person knowledge of a violation of Arizona elections law, a violation of the Arizona Elections Procedure Manual, and who may have physical evidence are asked to contact Sen. Kelly Townsend (LD-16) at 602-926-4467.

[https://www.eventbrite.com/e/breaking-pima-county-public-investigative-hearing-election-integrity-tickets-218543177527](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=62909c140b&e=44b8c466b0)

This hearing will be held with the same objective. Press organizations may contact 602-826-7300 for information on access.
#### PAID FOR BY FINCHEM FOR SECRETARY OF STATE
---
| |
---
| _Copyright © 2021 Mark Finchem for Secretary of State, All rights reserved._

**Our mailing address is:**
Mark Finchem for Secretary of StatePO Box 69344Oro Valley, AZ 85737
[Add us to your address book](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/vcard?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=7ec8888fbb)

Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/profile?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=7ec8888fbb&e=44b8c466b0&c=9b86dcbddb) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=7ec8888fbb&e=44b8c466b0&c=9b86dcbddb).

name: JohnFetterman.com
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
We want to make sure our supporters know these three things.
#
Derek,
When it comes to the #1 Most Likely to Flip state in the country, numbers are really important – and there are a lot of numbers to keep track of. But for our supporters like you, there are just three numbers we need you to know:
6️⃣ 7️⃣ **Our 67 County Mobilization Plan will ensure that our campaign is able to reach each and every Pennsylvanian throughout our great Commonwealth.** We’re going to fight for every single vote. We’re going to run advertising and knock doors in every county. And of course, John is going to campaign in these places, too. $2️⃣ 4️⃣ . 0️⃣ 7️⃣ **That’s right, our average donation (including ALL donations) is just $24.07.** Unlike other campaigns in the primary, our average donation is *this* low because our campaign is grassroots-funded. John does NOT accept money from corporate PACs or shady special interests of any kind. 3️⃣ 3️⃣ 8️⃣ , 3️⃣ 6️⃣ 3️⃣ This is our favorite number, Derek – **338,363: This is the historic number of grassroots contributions we’ve received from supporters across Pennsylvania and the country, who have stepped up to support our campaign to send John to the U.S. Senate.**
---
All these numbers come back to the same core message: This is a people-powered campaign – and we wouldn’t be where we are without your support.
Running a people-powered campaign allows candidates like John to stand a chance against well-connected and self-funded candidates, *especially* in a highly competitive statewide race like this one.
Plus, it means people like you, Derek, will have a direct and immediate impact on the historic campaign we’re building. **When you make a donation to our campaign — like $24.07, our average donation — you’re taking a personal stake in our race to elect John Fetterman to the U.S. Senate in Pennsylvania.**
**[Will you make a donation of $24.07 or another amount to our campaign today? John is counting on grassroots donors like you to come through, and we wouldn’t ask if it weren’t so important.](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/38060?refcode=em20211208-3756&t=1&akid=3756%2E434096%2E7VFjOa)**
**[Contribute $24.07](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/38060?refcode=em20211208-3756&t=20&akid=3756%2E434096%2E7VFjOa)**
🙏 Thanks for sticking through those numbers with us, and THANK YOU for all you do,
Team Fetterman HQ

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-emails?refcode=em20211208-3756-footer&t=21&refcode2=3756_434096_7VFjOa&akid=3756%2E434096%2E7VFjOa)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/JohnFettermanPA/) | [](https://twitter.com/johnfetterman) | [](https://www.instagram.com/johnfetterman/)
Email us: info@johnfetterman.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Fetterman for PA, PO Box 6061, Pittsburgh PA 15211.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.johnfetterman.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.johnfetterman.com/sign/personal_info/?t=22&akid=3756%2E434096%2E7VFjOa)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.johnfetterman.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=23&akid=3756%2E434096%2E7VFjOa)

Paid for by Fetterman for PA.

name: Official Trump Alerts
subject: December 8th Update
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Save America JFC, a joint fundraising committee of Save America and Make America Great Again PAC
body:
Statements by Donald J. Trump, 45th President of the United States of America

clean_body: | | | | President Biden's botched evacuation left thousands of Americans, allies, and their families in harm's way with no plan to get them out. Hi Friend - Despite what the media and liberal Democrats would have you believe, the situation in Afghanistan is far from over. President Biden's botched evacuation left thousands of Americans, allies, and their families in harm's way with no plan to get them out. Private veterans' organizations have been picking up the slack, but they need help from the Biden Administration to accomplish their mission. | Just this week a coalition of more than 100 veterans groups organized as #AfghanEvac listed 15 steps the U.S. government can take to ensure every American gets out of the country safely. Liberal Democrats like Stephanie Murphy have let the Biden Administration completely off the hook. They have taken no action to help those still stranded in Afghanistan. Murphy is toeing the political line and pretending that all is well, while an unknown number of American citizens fear for their lives in Afghanistan. We need a full-scale Benghazi-style investigation if we are ever going to learn the truth. But Republicans have to take back control of the House first. Defeating Stephanie Murphy will put our party one seat closer. Join our campaign today to help restore the Republican majority. | Thank you for your generous support, Brady Duke Republican for Congress USE OF HIS MILITARY RANK, JOB, TITLES, AND PHOTOGRAPHS IN UNIFORM DOES NOT IMPLY ENDORSEMENT FROM THE DEPARTMENT OF DEFENSE OR THE DEPARTMENT OF THE NAVY. body:
I’m very excited to share some big news with you – We are now three for three in blocking the unconstitutional Biden vaccine mandates. A federal dist Friend, I’m very excited to share some big news with you – We are now three for three in blocking the unconstitutional Biden vaccine mandates. **A federal district court has GRANTED our motion for a preliminary injunction temporarily blocking the Biden administration from enforcing its vaccination mandate for federal contractors.** Yesterday’s ruling means we’ve stopped each of the three vaccine mandates that we have challenged - the OSHA mandate for private employers, the CMS mandate for health care providers, and now the one for federal contractors. Mandates are not the answer. The appropriate way for government to respond to COVID is to provide Kansans with the best available information and trust Kansans to make the right decisions with that information. As attorney general, I’ll keep fighting the Biden administration when it overreaches. As governor, I promise to never repeat the damaging mistakes of Governor Kelly’s COVID response. No lockdowns, no business shutdowns, no school closings. No mandates. clean_body: I’m very excited to share some big news with you – We are now three for three in blocking the unconstitutional Biden vaccine mandates. A federal dist Friend, I’m very excited to share some big news with you – We are now three for three in blocking the unconstitutional Biden vaccine mandates. A federal district court has GRANTED our motion for a preliminary injunction temporarily blocking the Biden administration from enforcing its vaccination mandate for federal contractors. Yesterday’s ruling means we’ve stopped each of the three vaccine mandates that we have challenged - the OSHA mandate for private employers, the CMS mandate for health care providers, and now the one for federal contractors. Mandates are not the answer. The appropriate way for government to respond to COVID is to provide Kansans with the best available information and trust Kansans to make the right decisions with that information. As attorney general, I’ll keep fighting the Biden administration when it overreaches. As governor, I promise to never repeat the damaging mistakes of Governor Kelly’s COVID response. No lockdowns, no business shutdowns, no school closings. No mandates. I will continue to fight for individual liberty because there is no pandemic exception to the Constitution. But I can’t do this without your support. Derek Schmidt | | PAID FOR BY DEREK SCHMIDT FOR KANSAS, INC., KELLY ARNOLD, TREASURER. | | | ---|---|---
