Fellow American,

My name is Rod Dorilás and I’m a candidate for Congress in Florida’s 21st Congressional District.

My opponent isn’t too terribly famous or even a household name. But she’s a Democrat who I’m not convinced still believes that the American Dream is alive.

**[Please take a second to watch my introduction video that I recorded several months ago and believe is worth the watch](http://links.electroddorilas.com/u/click?_t=c152dcdd0bb643e58e4146847738634b&_m=496241576e20471fbafe2d3bcd777615&_e=p228_PMda2hd8oIDhoJShnfj1vFPNU6OMGftz3dPs2bUcd7gjEV6xX1ngNQcUDtzx09vHRjtebEdHJIzaOHAwWvyOr2Mb-nuwt3hVdT3Rq5fw3BzUTDSvk4sx_-u_CInC22Ud0_UglI_YXtfbJzz7TZrCa0c9guyRzjcx09d-i_oQfi-RLl8A0FV021peklSA8JsjmlYR3LhSHsxR0IP2qAR8iG4T4pL1yrWoBJvh6ExraC9SwkjMPzQfx4-vrGPKkyahNx_sBn83iA7bsG_Rd-eJpGFTRoj4NbEgKQkxD05IWN-Pb9CpDg0gvpLa70igznJx9GzvClQzIYSvZTQeRVfxNSka6JBmDOW9BNu6EIgOQosLetBcoMZaPQOm8IyXX1GUm4JL26EinTzyl60bFUQEdUoR3jJvdOqy_JIo3SWFr13z6jzVVWJoDIdZreRJlHwHFO5lQrTD93qi-t3oaVUXjvGs-tAOjuquNCMOXQ%3D)**.

[**WATCH MY LAUNCH VIDEO >> **](http://links.electroddorilas.com/u/click?_t=c152dcdd0bb643e58e4146847738634b&_m=496241576e20471fbafe2d3bcd777615&_e=p228_PMda2hd8oIDhoJShnfj1vFPNU6OMGftz3dPs2bUcd7gjEV6xX1ngNQcUDtzx09vHRjtebEdHJIzaOHAwWvyOr2Mb-nuwt3hVdT3Rq5fw3BzUTDSvk4sx_-u_CInC22Ud0_UglI_YXtfbJzz7TZrCa0c9guyRzjcx09d-i_oQfi-RLl8A0FV021peklSA8JsjmlYR3LhSHsxR0IP2qAR8iG4T4pL1yrWoBJvh6ExraC9SwkjMPzQfx4-vrGPws8uzV4YpRQHYsJWNp45LU2terD62-y156GXMgQGsjDxLIUqp7mPWCvf0VMLyzGqBCRwjsj1Ty3cpS_Fm0ZWPLHLpW2yDH2dL9Fs8k7PYzshmc6wqhHC-UJG80ttSP8mpmcj6rYxxlNwxDsJlFLcwN2wq47vvw1TSxX_XXMAP_-mKvzLle59iAqOec_UntresfJ9Mpd23BBAgjIuvLQzqwMiHB1egw5qeL-g9YVTyLw%3D)
A few key facts about myself that you may find informative:
* I’m a first generation American, the son of two Haitian immigrants. **My parents immigrated to the United States to pick crops** in order to provide for our family.
* At 17, I enlisted in the Navy and served six years planning and executing the deployment of Tomahawk Land Attack Missiles.
* I attended Syracuse University Law School on the G.I. Bill.
* Following graduation, **I worked for the Department of Commerce under President Trump** (the honor of a lifetime!).

[**SUPPORT A BLACK
TRUMP REPUBLICAN FOR CONGRESS>> **](http://links.electroddorilas.com/u/click?_t=c152dcdd0bb643e58e4146847738634b&_m=496241576e20471fbafe2d3bcd777615&_e=p228_PMda2hd8oIDhoJShnfj1vFPNU6OMGftz3dPs2bUcd7gjEV6xX1ngNQcUDtzx09vHRjtebEdHJIzaOHAwWvyOr2Mb-nuwt3hVdT3Rq5fw3BzUTDSvk4sx_-u_CInC22Ud0_UglI_YXtfbJzz7TZrCa0c9guyRzjcx09d-i_oQfi-RLl8A0FV021peklSA8JsjmlYR3LhSHsxR0IP2qAR8iG4T4pL1yrWoBJvh6ExraC9SwkjMPzQfx4-vrGPttUhwkw4JRHhyhnNzZZPhpsxTz2dDLcYEpzp8chWxJwmneYWBCUBRQ4VKH6B0T3rCIIDWR5X86OHtbTVqnwi8RMt1e-GPIndlQftKHgq_K-OWgPEeU6Y-V-5mpRIv-y9DKc5avZY6sPT-S83Obu5e8PfrS4csyQntr1-kyYHujEuuzy0lNRs8H9OynqD9xaHflAsqCwacxFz3aJKC34QhuCW7se6AsUbn-3eXufO_ig%3D)
**With 435 members, the U.S. House is bigger than any one person**. However, my own personal story has taught me that just about anything in America is possible if you work hard enough. I believe that maxim still rings true today, and that’s why I’m asking you to send a few dollars to my campaign if you can.

For Country,

Rod Dorilás

[** I'M WITH ROD >> **](http://links.electroddorilas.com/u/click?_t=c152dcdd0bb643e58e4146847738634b&_m=496241576e20471fbafe2d3bcd777615&_e=p228_PMda2hd8oIDhoJShnfj1vFPNU6OMGftz3dPs2bUcd7gjEV6xX1ngNQcUDtzx09vHRjtebEdHJIzaOHAwWvyOr2Mb-nuwt3hVdT3Rq5fw3BzUTDSvk4sx_-u_CInC22Ud0_UglI_YXtfbJzz7TZrCa0c9guyRzjcx09d-i_oQfi-RLl8A0FV021peklSA8JsjmlYR3LhSHsxR0IP2qAR8iG4T4pL1yrWoBJvh6ExraC9SwkjMPzQfx4-vrGPvrAZlBuZjPwGYaClujcuBZYVSKbeZl__2b3x0I0bxgmyennjkA-otnD7w9IHd_dePUKXLq5VQ5vs-QLWr1v3B5NNwez7F3ApCRduSz01LKU5bj8Ff6Fz9QPcEYM7yjeIw6bNob2AfUmmnp2xBSXcXIMWrazjggLDPjhLNeoDfTWNOIcr2ibWMKhPsNS7CVSr5vRjmOlbIpAg_8B4z32qeTMAPJWYd_ZxuMqJ3_RMfaw%3D)

| _**ABOUT ROD**_

Rod Dorilás is the first-generation son of two immigrants from Haiti. His father immigrated to Florida to pick crops, and eventually his parents went on to own a small business. From a young age, his parents instilled in him the importance of hard work, integrity, and service.

At age 17, Rod enlisted in the United States Navy, serving for six years as a Petty Officer Second Class and Assistant Engagement Control Officer onboard the USS The Sullivans, stationed in Jacksonville. There, he was responsible for planning and executing the deployment of Tomahawk Land Attack Missiles on the Ballistic Missile Defense destroyer.

Upon completion of his military service, Rod attended law school at Syracuse University with the help of the G.I. Bill. After graduating, he served in President Trump's Administration in the U.S. Department of Commerce. While serving our great nation, Rod fought tirelessly to ensure that American families and businesses weren't taken advantage of by China.

Rod is a true public servant and is dedicated to serving his country and community. He wants to ensure that every American, through hard work and perseverance, can achieve the American Dream. Rod is running for Congress in South Florida to continue Trump's America First Agenda and defend our country from the Radical Left.

[**Will you stand with Rod?**](http://links.electroddorilas.com/u/click?_t=c152dcdd0bb643e58e4146847738634b&_m=496241576e20471fbafe2d3bcd777615&_e=p228_PMda2hd8oIDhoJShnfj1vFPNU6OMGftz3dPs2bUcd7gjEV6xX1ngNQcUDtzx09vHRjtebEdHJIzaOHAwWvyOr2Mb-nuwt3hVdT3Rq5fw3BzUTDSvk4sx_-u_CInC22Ud0_UglI_YXtfbJzz7TZrCa0c9guyRzjcx09d-i_oQfi-RLl8A0FV021peklSA8JsjmlYR3LhSHsxR0IP2qAR8iG4T4pL1yrWoBJvh6ExraC9SwkjMPzQfx4-vrGPi7xaWNMVS5R1gXP7HfIPjLNFw6MGTv3rqay6trhYdFFDabc4LX95eMW0jUXs3gonAuBhjiZT9-NCSyBTd__WTEPCrly1_NLkHVqsPoK5XUCRXJ5RbBg7T20D54BdqUtl96Sb2gfnCNBcPyxZYNGYRQ_9KC3zl0r7LymidZFdrR3EvhPN__Wnn9pE5zGxm8OljboVVzc2XVgH_D_YB_Rr67rq0lcw9aDux27FLSop8DQ%3D)
---

| Paid for by Rod Dorilas for Congress
---

name: Cheri Beasley
subject: What issues do you want your next Senator to prioritize?
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Cheri Beasley for North Carolina
body:
If we want to win this race, we need to run a people-focused campaign
#

2022 is just around the corner, and before we know it, the election will be here too. So we’re working hard right now to build a campaign that can win.
Critical to that effort is ensuring we run a people-focused campaign — and the only way we can do that is to hear from folks like yourself from time to time about what’s important to you. So I want to hear what’s on your mind today:
**[What issues do you want your next Senator to prioritize? Please take our December issues survey today. It only takes a couple of minutes, but it goes a long way toward shaping this campaign and letting me know what you most want me to fight for as your next Senator!](https://act.cheribeasley.com/signup/dec_issues/?source=em211208-1-t1&refcode2=113.357359.fDb6dy&t=1&akid=113%2E357359%2EfDb6dy)**
**[TAKE THE SURVEY](https://act.cheribeasley.com/signup/dec_issues/?source=em211208-1-t1&refcode2=113.357359.fDb6dy&t=2&akid=113%2E357359%2EfDb6dy)**
For me, these issue surveys are one of the best ways to hear directly from a lot of folks about what they expect from our next Senator — because our families deserve someone who will listen and fight for the people.
**[Will you please take our December issues survey today and share your thoughts with us? We’ll review the results soon, and we want to hear from as many people as possible.](https://act.cheribeasley.com/signup/dec_issues/?source=em211208-1-t1&refcode2=113.357359.fDb6dy&t=3&akid=113%2E357359%2EfDb6dy)**
Thank you in advance for your input!
\- Cheri
**[TAKE THE SURVEY](https://act.cheribeasley.com/signup/dec_issues/?source=em211208-1-t1&refcode2=113.357359.fDb6dy&t=4&akid=113%2E357359%2EfDb6dy)**

Paid For By Cheri Beasley for North Carolina
Cheri Beasley for North Carolina
PO Box 28778
Raleigh, NC 27611
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you want to receive fewer emails, you may [submit this form to get only our most important updates](https://act.cheribeasley.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/?t=5&akid=113%2E357359%2EfDb6dy). Emails like this are a critical tool for our campaign's fundraising and organizing efforts, but if you need to, you can [unsubscribe here](https://act.cheribeasley.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=6&akid=113%2E357359%2EfDb6dy). If you would like to support Cheri's campaign for the U.S. Senate in North Carolina, please consider [making a donation](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/beasley-em-2021?refcode=em-footer&t=7&refcode2=113_357359_fDb6dy&akid=113%2E357359%2EfDb6dy) today to help us make history.

| | Friend,

Watch the video above to hear why District Attorney Jason Williams and I need you to get out and **vote Darren Lombard for Clerk of Criminal District Court this Saturday, December 11th. **

As **Deputy Clerk of Criminal District Court** , Darren protected our electoral process by ensuring that elections were fair and ran smoothly.

Right now, New Orleans needs someone that knows the electoral process, so they can ensure the attempts to squander your voting rights go unsuccessful.

Learn more about Darren Lombard at [lombardforclerk.com](https://troycarter4congress.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=47f144cfbca3f0c81de469f60&id=ce4496a918&e=dd5c2df611).

Congressman Troy Carter

clean_body: Right now, New Orleans needs someone that knows the electoral process, so they can ensure the attempts to squander your voting rights go unsuccessful | | | | | | | Friend, Watch the video above to hear why District Attorney Jason Williams and I need you to get out and vote Darren Lombard for Clerk of Criminal District Court this Saturday, December 11th. As Deputy Clerk of Criminal District Court , Darren protected our electoral process by ensuring that elections were fair and ran smoothly. Right now, New Orleans needs someone that knows the electoral process, so they can ensure the attempts to squander your voting rights go unsuccessful. Learn more about Darren Lombard at . Sincerely, Congressman Troy Carter | | | Paid for By Troy Carter for Congress | | Copyright © 2021 , All rights reserved.

body:
[please, do not ignore]
| **Team: Voting in the 2022 midterm elections is the most important thing you can do to protect Joe Biden’s agenda.**

Every single year since 2002, the President’s party has lost seats in the midterm.

_Barack Obama lost 63, team, and Republicans were able to STONEWALL his agenda for years._

We need to start engaging our base NOW if we want to keep the majority in 2022. [Please, team, do not ignore this. PLEDGE TO VOTE IN THE MIDTERM ELECTION »](https://act.protectvoting.org/survey/Midterm_Pledge?refcode=VPP_20211208_EMPET_E1_T0_GMCL_RS&t=6&akid=999%2E878179%2ESfy99N) [](https://act.protectvoting.org/survey/Midterm_Pledge?refcode=VPP_20211208_EMPET_E1_T0_GMCL_RS&t=7&akid=999%2E878179%2ESfy99N) | [I WILL VOTE IN THE MIDTERMS!](https://act.protectvoting.org/survey/Midterm_Pledge?refcode=VPP_20211208_EMPET_E1_T0_GMCL_RS&t=8&akid=999%2E878179%2ESfy99N)
---
[MY OFFICIAL PLEDGE TO VOTE]

As a committed Democratic voter, I hereby pledge to support Joe Biden’s progressive agenda in the 2022 midterm election.

I recognize the importance of keeping the Democratic Majority and I will do everything in my power to protect it. _x ADD MY NAME_ | [I WILL VOTE IN THE MIDTERMS!](https://act.protectvoting.org/survey/Midterm_Pledge?refcode=VPP_20211208_EMPET_E1_T0_GMCL_RS&t=9&akid=999%2E878179%2ESfy99N)

Team VPP

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=999%2E878179%2ESfy99N). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=999%2E878179%2ESfy99N).**

clean_body: Stacey Abrams just announced that she’s running for governor next year. Stacey Abrams just announced that she's running for governor next year. | Peter , I want to make one thing clear from the beginning of this email: Our Senate race is about the future of Georgia and the future of the United States. Democrats say the most sensationalist things to fire up their base and raise money. We know for a fact that we've put the scare in my Democrat opponent and his team because we keep seeing email after email from his campaign talking about ME! And now that Stacey Abrams is officially running for governor again, Democrats will work overtime to defeat our Republican ticket next November. We all know that Stacey Abrams has a big base of support in Atlanta - along with large checkbooks to make the big-dollar contributions she needs. That's why I'm asking you to make a gift to my campaign today. Thank you, Herschel Walker | | PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC. Don't want to receive any more of our emails? We hate to see you go, but .

name: Mark Meuser
subject: LAUSD telling students to lie to their parents
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mark Meuser for U
body:
The mother of a 13-year-old student at Barack Obama Global Prep Academy says that her son came home from school with a brand new vaccine card |
[](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=27c9df1780924b0ca323808ab1558275&_e=tynJ1QBLRyzHYQSw_GoWVNmXZ02pUKOvC6l4DPX1j3YgXD96t5pW5qtD9GnnwDtfofeJKcWQvJXTxHWYeJtTPw8t425UBKfgF3B-6bspwYZMFYGA3AjtUddVC7b92V8mQCrSVkgblN4txbO_QJe0WEuAIZd0IyGsnnbwgczb5tKUzYtHaToPTMlQtLSeoBldJBvmdGCkTYucD3gEX6EOIsmodcgh9XmdB9Yj0Nk-s9sZmVaRC0ZN-ZkCqNCsvqToWc_FM81QqYTRlMRlMsZnLnhWBWt_STXLKUJr2Lo6vTBlR-CcyBB3IsrQf2B_LhWnDlwbLd-ypHP94vSirGhWew%3D%3D)

---
Fellow American-

Free pizza has gone from being a Student Body President's campaign promise to a lure used by the Los Angeles Unified School District to get students vaccinated without their parents' permission.

[ ](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=27c9df1780924b0ca323808ab1558275&_e=tynJ1QBLRyzHYQSw_GoWVNmXZ02pUKOvC6l4DPX1j3YgXD96t5pW5qtD9GnnwDtfofeJKcWQvJXTxHWYeJtTPw8t425UBKfgF3B-6bspwYZMFYGA3AjtUddVC7b92V8myCOGYdL1o_rKouhAR-6ficCiO774b9XLWFrTELID1yGniKXLwKP5XfPq42_FjMdwywyFryu3AXCIijiiEow098RRkOk7XXqxZgXbllMc7VaUZlQHtCAYPnoCH1K-9jAgI5-GD30Kb_IDLmLzwjlZgMz0BcrAYFHM5J0GNB9BPdIJIAnmpQ1-vy-CikUrW5Kzc8pp02N6tuYAGiyRITcXtQ%3D%3D)
The mother of a 13-year-old student at Barack Obama Global Prep Academy says that her son came home from school with a brand-new vaccine card. **The _minor child_ said he agreed to get the vaccine when a school employee offered him free pizza if he let her vaccinate him.**

_**The school employee then told the student not to tell his mom, or they would both get in trouble.******_

In California, a 13-year-old cannot consent to a medical procedure; the parent must authorize the treatment. **In this case, not only did the parent not consent, she was adamant that her son not get the vaccine because of his asthma and his allergy issues.**

School employees are preying on students' vulnerabilities and silencing them with snacks. They have entirely undermined the rights of parents.

**This has become more than just a mandate; this is the government forcing its way into your life.**

As I travel around the state of California, I see so many Californians fighting to restore their parental rights. It is becoming evident that 2022 will be the year of the Parent Party.

[** SUPPORT MARK TODAY**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=27c9df1780924b0ca323808ab1558275&_e=tynJ1QBLRyzHYQSw_GoWVNmXZ02pUKOvC6l4DPX1j3YgXD96t5pW5qtD9GnnwDtfofeJKcWQvJXTxHWYeJtTPw8t425UBKfgF3B-6bspwYZMFYGA3AjtUddVC7b92V8mjNKfi964qunzg_krPrsQgsiNgF_97qB5pml9INBLLWxW117brXRurHIaAF8SQhqp35nf7dBn70E7-z7ceoOBDc4fEboP012UOxEE_L7qNvszg3yDhd_BecxXvp9RsY-kq_eFtMCqcMr_JD10jA6JVVeaYr3mKcYvjTtDBxQZHbKVTuanwQVWzpkxTd2XXzqRHgS0RjBbzSJ9SVJN_7P6oQ%3D%3D)
Parents are fed up with politicians putting special interests ahead of their children. They are done with politicians playing politics with their children's education. They are over their children being pawns in the Left's political agenda.

2022 will be the year that Parents step up and hold their elected officials accountable for ensuring that their children receive a proper education and are protected from the political whims of the Left.

**I believe that parents are the only people that should make health and education decisions for their children, and I will take that belief to Washington D.C. with me.**

[**I have been fighting to protect your rights every day of my career. That won't stop when I'm elected to the Senate. Can you make a contribution to my campaign to help me defeat Senator Alex Padilla?**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=27c9df1780924b0ca323808ab1558275&_e=tynJ1QBLRyzHYQSw_GoWVNmXZ02pUKOvC6l4DPX1j3YgXD96t5pW5qtD9GnnwDtfofeJKcWQvJXTxHWYeJtTPw8t425UBKfgF3B-6bspwYZMFYGA3AjtUddVC7b92V8mnH1c77j6X0iHkEj4QsH-fHE1Vj8QibZyXzOI4J-4tCIMIzy6yNYMitq5e_y-H8EY7vaHvGyD5ULqbhRZH__LhvvCa2SYk_g6ggvy8zCMpyJYvu3QsxVok5f9o1EpiCjcv0cMNLkiTPo-N2hbH8m8NAMexq1TMrSJDcU7vnq-UG_6ErSI1CfXM_dXJd7w2BM7y3E0ieqX_oEWYgeFRraIOQ%3D%3D)

Thank you,

Mark Meuser
Republican for U.S. Senate, California

[**P.S. As you know, my team has set a very ambitious goal to find 500 patriots who will make a contribution to this campaign of at least $100 by the end of this year. We are off to a great start but we still have a long ways to go to reach 500 contributors. Can I count on your support to make a contribution today and help me reach the goal of 500 contributors this month?**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=27c9df1780924b0ca323808ab1558275&_e=tynJ1QBLRyzHYQSw_GoWVNmXZ02pUKOvC6l4DPX1j3YgXD96t5pW5qtD9GnnwDtfofeJKcWQvJXTxHWYeJtTPw8t425UBKfgF3B-6bspwYZMFYGA3AjtUddVC7b92V8m407u_TmSDFrEE_z1Z3mN8W5kPdxZweKgSSXXYFhtyszWStygiw5JUeGtjLeseSyLyeNlGaMRHMA4ejay4US1fR8tBpRu5yWue_OxSvhkEO91vXkUEfz_bqOjkkFbDZQb_Q-ghUjN9_OFzDv74YBo_PVAOyx_B3w4iY8vMUb11AdO3i28t_wT2xJtyUUrGU7i1uomyizdO20T8E_M9D2Ugg%3D%3D)

[** SUPPORT MARK TODAY**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=27c9df1780924b0ca323808ab1558275&_e=tynJ1QBLRyzHYQSw_GoWVNmXZ02pUKOvC6l4DPX1j3YgXD96t5pW5qtD9GnnwDtfofeJKcWQvJXTxHWYeJtTPw8t425UBKfgF3B-6bspwYZMFYGA3AjtUddVC7b92V8m1nwz68kAoiBvRG44MTzbYK3fjxmJya9roilu2I3G_niWLy10aNlT-6UGxeW5t3WEVMLl6xNAxd-13PPhBgthoh_OI65l89iCM_Vmw8Oxo5RzUVkMvhRASDleAoUyFeLjIklckDBsyf07dumiNQsfQovb2leOTL--5jIM5kz4qhki2otbCaMwSXub7AF_P6GTugWEwNtdHQNK_9hDaRLufA%3D%3D)

| | Paid for by Mark Meuser for U.S. Senate

name: Greg Casar
subject: Did you see the news?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Greg Casar for Congress**
body:
Now we take this fight to Congress. | | | [ ](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/atcYNHk4Eh2YdGnwBh-YDOWJY-tixsAGdZ-iepyIpgQwUlTCwVyuxkyHVyPgP75Lyg6ARx4Wcpm1esMobDSIkg7MRXc-RexytvOYIkaFydIYh5aBSDmOFIRWmGT3Iy7WiyXzJflB4RRt6fw4n-iRByug1LaeD6601aVJ29VE-or0wRGlOC6mbBb8-FiYaSmJM1ib40-b6AJc2ffGe7pTYP_q4M6FRRS7kTf-7pq1bX6zsd3FXyRbscX5zHzb1rPY/3ho/ipkwhQ8eRd6l_TjaAasAQg/h0/CR6ba3x91UUOEyRbDwiipICKfjcU_-FgxnGj39SFqlU) _Español abajo_ __We wanted to share some big news, Peter, Today I was honored to be endorsed by FIVE local labor unions in Austin and San Antonio – the first labor endorsements in the race for Texas’s 35th District! [](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xjkVm0yb0-WECUNMTVrLbqsebYAShmha20jRNLNn8DjKCIPSmwEx-3xNl7iD9OcjgerMjp66CbVMYrsvRSiVYLJ14B9O3Thch3p2RqzbONmCm1p5B8mYX95NKnp9mZWHgyZlJC8atCDQ8G2GjM9T91qoqNx4oNwdXAf9tdrmtnyc5o01gz_5h6PAyA1kUkHypuQzJ-O5nclWL7BKhmRS2bdjtdsavKRU1Q0BOUBqOk0nzsL1pyDx1YvKh23N53DUiap1Qxc-d6K-MlkZ65Eu42vew2rDqweQENeuFnM2b1Pw/3ho/ipkwhQ8eRd6l_TjaAasAQg/h1/ya7QFofLVNIM0fTd0TerpyUrR244TwFkdoDlG2agb14)
These labor unions fight tirelessly for working families every day, which is why their endorsements mean so much to me. Together with your support, I believe we can deliver on fair wages and better benefits for working families in Texas and across the country. ****[Can you pitch in $25, $30 or $50 to help us deliver for working families?](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xjkVm0yb0-WECUNMTVrLbqsebYAShmha20jRNLNn8DjFSKbw4mDplOeTISQ0dtg-8gHANxZ995iun7Saq14MUgrnKFd2bORuzEVCOJ4bJ6Rrrxv6v9L3ClVKMhlSa41y-Y4RVXEebFMOdBGNR1xZ1yKCj7fQ6V9C5l5eQC0yl4BhqKFm6vt4ovCMtCZN7XeJOzZD7q1rkDmiOmiH0qaKrzhwORxgVUFd6QLdLwqvruI2Zn5FVLWCsDZ95mf6vVyhNbhOWlqeOYIFVhulSqj7jdvA06-6Tceht23ceEvsOd99aa-gMPvsUmPTUkKz4iqs4/3ho/ipkwhQ8eRd6l_TjaAasAQg/h2/0NrbK-0Swli0CNwJw6oAlfq432Maxv13RUS0IK7Mfhg) Now more than ever, Texas deserves leaders who will fight for good jobs, fair pay, and Medicare for All. With your support, we’ve delivered on progress for local working families in Texas – and I’m ready to take that fight to Congress. With your support and the support of workers in Austin and San Antonio, I know we can win this race. We can ensure every Texan can get a good job with fair wages and good benefits. Help us get there – **[chip in $25 to support our campaign](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xjkVm0yb0-WECUNMTVrLbqsebYAShmha20jRNLNn8DjFSKbw4mDplOeTISQ0dtg-9w4usLYwPzuVvZQ5Q5xilJFjKNEcciYBa7M5Dbi-F4YzdrKRJVahroVIyP4mclAWjLfbEP5cDUL8aOkjE8EKYhrpz_Qdp98VctkdqO44_6_JNQ5uhaOIIZhTXaZFA2STcVFGB6_3kYloZLaV4zO2Lv1D5Pq_duPcvj_M-P3l8Hm0G2Fn_3cA_3c6HKtp0QVADlFsIkkuuiqtfoRdsAPwtTgkNn5KJpCBF_RTY10hMKRKWv8Temjb36k8btZqWI4Vk/3ho/ipkwhQ8eRd6l_TjaAasAQg/h3/KfJ4ul4xu2Qsd9JqrIWJfTHTM0ZrMnMUo_GElc95FRY).** Thank you for being in this fight, Greg P.S. See my [first campaign video](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xjkVm0yb0-WECUNMTVrLbqsebYAShmha20jRNLNn8DjIUUteGO8JEqovDQazdqT2H3viGAA2iQHtBFbB-uyZ-9jPuS_dq3GrdRJn28vCAyyl6A51aJX7uqzJe2ABV5WY7Ze-hkYLym939VfTmSvi1wemFyEXlUi0bfS6EPvjf5qUJuSiSAKVPKpt0rWcurWsaanZ0M2kFml-BjiHPB9hCOlgz6HJQRixfgJ2iosoANspKmKQoWp1J_0H31pJAsm7msUtJ3kxpoENkCOhox2FSBA-F1NWFY4eTe4Yzh7K8fIg/3ho/ipkwhQ8eRd6l_TjaAasAQg/h4/TV78St9x5UwkzUobcWK2pU0xA6XBetGbvCNgxX0ndl0) here, and share with your friends and family!

* * *

Queríamos compartir una gran noticia, Peter ,
Hoy tuve el honor de contar con el respaldo de CINCO sindicatos laborales en Austin y San Antonio, ¡los primeros respaldos laborales en la carrera por el distrito 35 de Texas! Estos sindicatos laborales luchan incansablemente por las familias trabajadoras todos los días, por lo cual su respaldo significa tanto para mí. Junto con su apoyo, creo que podemos brindar salarios justos y mejores beneficios para las familias trabajadoras en Texas y en todo el país. **[¿Puede aportar $25 para ayudarnos a luchar por las familias trabajadoras?](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xjkVm0yb0-WECUNMTVrLbqsebYAShmha20jRNLNn8DjFSKbw4mDplOeTISQ0dtg--hqHzW_1OOWglf21gGV7IUwYozgbL15tcBQtpcsbSDUeXNHWMOyRnIYCFOquOnuo7zTVAXXEj4_1QsO1HHTthCt_sfAuQL8iWRuLfXm54DXktHJ8-oXStU1uh24Z5uSOgSXca80SsYJn9hts4tnG1HpaUjdUwjEo7dDTP2lDZ2TCbq4bzd7HMS3SIbPjlWWj6-5OOYSymeZafuzB07lNiN2whYmC6RwvaQUiQXj5PPUenaPAFJyCjHTl3jUPPjhZ8/3ho/ipkwhQ8eRd6l_TjaAasAQg/h5/O-B8Gk-kZ7e1yWx1xKWbYwD-L7N0fnqQhF2buokbkfI)** Ahora más que nunca, Texas merece líderes que luchen por buenos trabajos, salarios justos y seguro médico para todos. Con su apoyo, hemos logrado el progreso para las familias trabajadoras locales en Texas, y estoy listo para llevar esta lucha al Congreso. Con su apoyo y el apoyo de los trabajadores en Austin y San Antonio, sé que podemos ganar esta carrera. Podemos asegurarnos de que todos los texanos puedan conseguir un buen trabajo con salarios justos y buenos beneficios. Ayúdanos a conseguirlo: **[aporta $25 para apoyar nuestra campaña.](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xjkVm0yb0-WECUNMTVrLbqsebYAShmha20jRNLNn8DjFSKbw4mDplOeTISQ0dtg--Zx05iw_INFCA4mGfWlXVqAJc0s6cv-O5qqXdpryVzyFN6DcTWzy98--rEHeLOV-4z_TbAmT-SIBSZRq1o0OPUONBbzRSPhbuWpw5GLk86zE6WDZWKslG8d0b8wXECMeVcW9ISHRF9aroZHDbzUaPQe9CO5hC7QRcxv7qDSCd3HhiaPQrnxB6U61SMdiy74_Tup5hcSfHPm1s_g3fzDbWfCo75Q8z2D_Am9mGxz1V4M6qfP938WZ6twg8omKxfSiA/3ho/ipkwhQ8eRd6l_TjaAasAQg/h6/6dA9xE_cy6ZOqRiHwv1Vma9gQLjXvaUUjkMrgu3Bqt8)** Gracias por estar en esta pelea, Greg PD. name: JusticeDemocrats.com
subject: Our slate
body:
Challenging opponents with deep pockets and big campaign war chests will be no easy task.
#
Peter,
In the last several months, we’ve seen the impact of just a few progressives standing up for working people, and fighting corporate interests head-on. **And we’re working to elect 5 new Justice Democrats to join them: Odessa Kelly, Rana Abdelhamid, Jessica Cisneros, Kina Collins, and Summer Lee.**
Odessa, Rana, Jessica, Kina, and Summer don’t have billionaires or corporate PAC money behind them. Their people-powered campaigns are fueled by the same grassroots movement that unseated corporate Democrats and elected Alexandria Ocasio Cortez, Jamaal Bowman, and Cori Bush.
The final FEC deadline of the year for our full slate is coming up at the end of the month, and we’re behind on the $200k we need to raise for our JD primary candidates by the end of the quarter. [Will you split a contribution between Odessa, Rana, Jessica, Kina, and Summer to make sure they can put up big numbers for their first FEC filing as a full slate? ](https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/86447?refcode=em20211208-20886&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=19&akid=20886%2E1203867%2EsFG0NT)
[Contribute $3](https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/86447?refcode=em20211208-20886&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=20&akid=20886%2E1203867%2EsFG0NT)**
Odessa, Rana, Jessica, Kina, and Summer are running in districts that are currently represented by incumbents who have failed to fight for the people that elected them. They’ve chosen instead to represent the interests of Wall Street, real estate developers, pharmaceutical companies, and other big corporations.
Just like AOC, Ilhan, Cori, and other Justice Democrats — our JD slate is ready to take on the tough fights to stand for working people in Congress.**But challenging opponents with deep pockets and big campaign war chests will be no easy task.**
We need to do our part to help Odessa, Rana, Jessica, Kina, and Summer put up big fundraising numbers and fuel their campaigns going into the 2022 primaries. [ Can the JD slate count on you to split a $3 contribution between their five campaigns?](https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/86447?refcode=em20211208-20886&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&akid=20886%2E1203867%2EsFG0NT)
**[Contribute $3](https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/86447?refcode=em20211208-20886&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=22&akid=20886%2E1203867%2EsFG0NT)**
In solidarity,
Justice Democrats

Do not worry if you cannot afford to make a contribution — we understand that this is a difficult time. If you’re struggling, you can find a food bank [here.](https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/28883?t=23&akid=20886%2E1203867%2EsFG0NT) We appreciate everything you do to keep our movement strong. Please stay informed and follow the most up-to-date recommendations from the [Centers for Disease Control](https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/24438?t=24&akid=20886%2E1203867%2EsFG0NT) and your state public health department.
---

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20211208-20886-footer&t=25&refcode2=20886_1203867_sFG0NT&akid=20886%2E1203867%2EsFG0NT)**
---

Federal candidates or officeholders mentioned above are not asking for more than $5,000 per calendar year from individuals or other federally permissible sources, nor are they asking for any funds from corporations, labor unions, or any other federally prohibited sources.
JusticeDemocrats.com
10629 Hardin Valley Rd, #226, Knoxville, TN 37932
Email us: [us@justicedemocrats.com](mailto:us@justicedemocrats.com)

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.

name: Bill de Blasio
subject: NYC’s private sector vaccine mandate
disclaimer_text: Paid for by New Yorkers for a Fair Future
body:
With Omicron emerging, winter forcing people inside and holiday gatherings around the corner, I announced a new, first-in-the-nation vaccine mandate
# [](https://act.billdeblasio.com/go/79?t=1&akid=133%2E39519%2E1vhWfb)

Friends -
Vaccines work.
Vaccine mandates get people vaccinated.
So with Omicron emerging, winter forcing people inside and holiday gatherings around the corner, I announced a new, first-in-the-nation vaccine mandate that will keep New Yorkers and their communities safe.
The mandate covers all private-sector workers, and requires children 5-11 to show proof of one vaccination dose for indoor dining, fitness and performance venues.
It will save lives.
And my message to every mayor, governor, and CEO: it’s time for vaccine mandates in places other than just NYC.
Do they take guts? Yes. Will you get some blowback? Yes.
But will they save lives and get us closer to the end of this COVID pandemic? Yes. Yes, they will.
Now I want to know if you agree:
[**Add your name to let me know you agree with New York City’s first-in-the-nation private sector vaccine mandate. Your feedback is important.](https://act.billdeblasio.com/signup/vaccine_mandates/?source=em-211208-15&t=2&akid=133%2E39519%2E1vhWfb)**
**[ADD YOUR NAME](https://act.billdeblasio.com/signup/vaccine_mandates/?source=em-211208-15&t=3&akid=133%2E39519%2E1vhWfb)**
I am simply not going to allow people who refuse to get vaccinated put everyone else at risk. It’s not going to happen.
In solidarity,
Bill de Blasio

Paid for by New Yorkers for a Fair Future
This email was sent to **dpwillis67@gmail.com**. If you need to, [**unsubscribe here**](https://act.billdeblasio.com/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=4&akid=133%2E39519%2E1vhWfb). We hope you'll stay, because emails are such an important part of how we organize.
clean_body: With Omicron emerging, winter forcing people inside and holiday gatherings around the corner, I announced a new, first-in-the-nation vaccine mandate Friends - Vaccines work. Vaccine mandates get people vaccinated. So with Omicron emerging, winter forcing people inside and holiday gatherings around the corner, I announced a new, first-in-the-nation vaccine mandate that will keep New Yorkers and their communities safe. The mandate covers all private-sector workers, and requires children 5-11 to show proof of one vaccination dose for indoor dining, fitness and performance venues. It will save lives. And my message to every mayor, governor, and CEO: it’s time for vaccine mandates in places other than just NYC. Do they take guts? Yes. Will you get some blowback? Yes. But will they save lives and get us closer to the end of this COVID pandemic? Yes. Yes, they will. Now I want to know if you agree: I am simply not going to allow people who refuse to get vaccinated put everyone else at risk. It’s not going to happen. In solidarity, Bill de Blasio Paid for by New Yorkers for a Fair Future

name: PramilaForCongress.com
subject: Cancel it (re: student debt)
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
With a swipe of the pen, President Biden can free millions of people from the crushing burden of $1.8 trillion in student loan debt.
#
Peter, 3 in 4 student loan borrowers say that their finances will take a hit when payments restart on February 1st.
1 in 4 borrowers say they're worried about affording rent when it happens.
**But there's a solution to this crisis: with a swipe of the pen, President Biden can free millions of people across America from the crushing burden of $1.8 trillion in student loan debt.**
[**Time is running out. Can you add your name next to Pramila's on a grassroots petition with other progressives urging the president to immediately end student loan debt?**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/9008?redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2Fpj-end-student-loan-debt-ja-20211208%3Fsource%3Dem20211208&t=1&akid=860%2E420207%2Eg8PbyO)
**[Add your name »](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/9008?redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2Fpj-end-student-loan-debt-ja-20211208%3Fsource%3Dem20211208&t=2&akid=860%2E420207%2Eg8PbyO)**
Forgiving student debt is an issue of economic justice, Peter. Women hold two-thirds of student debt, and Black borrowers owe $25,000 more on average than white borrowers.
And the burden of student loan debt is not just a pandemic problem — 1 in 4 borrowers were already behind on payments even before the very first case of COVID-19 was found in America.
After the personal and financial setbacks experienced by so many during this pandemic, now's not the time to place more burdens on people. **Working families and students are counting on the Biden administration to build us ALL back better — _it's time he delivered._**
[**As the big deadline approaches, we need to increase the pressure on President Biden to cancel student loan debt as soon as possible. Can you add your name to our petition today?**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/9008?redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2Fpj-end-student-loan-debt-ja-20211208%3Fsource%3Dem20211208&t=3&akid=860%2E420207%2Eg8PbyO)
Thanks for taking urgent action on this,
Team Jayapal

**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-footer?refcode=em20211208-860-footer&t=4&refcode2=860_420207_g8PbyO&akid=860%2E420207%2Eg8PbyO)**

Friends,

Enough is enough.

Biden, the federal government, social media, and the establishment media are trying to **rob Americans of their freedoms.**

Biden’s vaccine mandate on private employers is adding salt to the wound of businesses in Indiana and across the nation that are JUST getting back on their feet.

This is going to be an uphill battle -- and here in Indiana, we are ready to fight.

The Biden Administration has broken faith with the American people through false information, conflicting messaging, suppressing the facts, and **taking away our freedoms.**

This fight is about **freedom.** _This fight is about giving a voice to the American people who have been living in insufferable silence and fear._ | | [**NO MORE MANDATES!**](http://links.mikebraunsenate.com/u/click?_t=f3dfddd5a2ed4356955cd9c969d3b9e3&_m=3815d3d76cd94524ab890bbc39737e7c&_e=OSR0y-O-rAkgCME-ulySzjEl2Yo7l4cfJCJhw1pfkgvlabA5hOQL8KSNlsN3J3tnd94RDgJhcrL7NwGBzXN6KgtAoxGI2uIPQx__nEQVYmFs14mUDyq587gSptIfJfqhta6Mx43AzQDsgiLM2OzCgxr3ivgz90PHGKkzwbOrN2JU-OexzXJzspEGGw-VftneuvlO6WFRFNojrJO70SHlX1PJqGpuOpkv0PaBl87R_7z4uk_pSH_U83IuBasRFQx4CrnVOKu0honw43MTqNhxk6efJR0vNasYbmrIhsNrB834QaKFnD4uw3_FmIUpUULBrjKrbUuDg-PXea4rc_nV3M21YCOVA9sAbipTInJ5YrHdIrEufeNz6LpfORdNjrD0eEWaNJmJnC69oinoF2CLSftNZyTIEUX6braQEcPr9EoAiKT0k4a1W2zcLW7QcxpTqC6couQPJfYmdGzUtx8I7jPS28RPddwYAeI05qcqHrqKmgro6u2s7KDDbqULxbPs)

Friend,

Max Rose is finally out of hiding, he is no longer trying to brand himself as a pragmatist; he is out stumping for AOC’s Green New Deal to be ushered in. Staten Island voters gave Defund the Police advocate Max Rose the boot last year after he ran on the Democrats' failed agenda. Now... He is running as his true self, a Socialist Pelosi Puppet peddling ideas that will hurt the middle class and destroy America as we know it.

He knows he can’t win. I know for a fact that Max’s biggest fear is running against a **STRONG, INDEPENDENT, REPUBLICAN WOMAN!**

Rose claims to not align with AOC and the socialist wing of the Democrat party, however, he agrees with her on... **DEFUNDING THE POLICE** ... Taxing Americans to pay for a socialist spending spree, a growing government to a point that is unsustainable.

AOC and her socialist Squad are all about their socialist agenda, they are about defunding the police...So is Max Rose the so-called moderate. | [**STOP MAX ROSE AND HIS SOCIALIST ALLIES**](http://links.nicolemalliotakis.com/u/click?_t=759a85d1cba743719e64e2569e23c9b8&_m=1677bd5e0dc34e1c9301fc6c8f94836c&_e=kdL-KKH1t0o6tnEbAu2gD0sZcJofTPJzejd_7On8ojRlbswJ23WykWbhFfyDZdxZSzmD6mobucgA6XqjlAuWea9R27jBXpzURc_eME_UHH9MxN0-RSeURHEG62d4sslSJqF_1WiL3OSXg2R1lxM2nZ3E1d3_aV92IvkCh8iSMBdQktrOSLwX2YuKt2S5wIh2EGV19w71p4OryrwDmR7kUNbMvJrVbFG-ZkABed7V00uqMgGvfDFqz8Snq4mRCdm8Urrvcj6YG8gx4E3ZupZBo0Kgu5CyDiBhQ-0FziTZb9bgqdsYS7UtD4K7z9tNPZErjMABWBFIZdo1daOHNH_QJBzC0yaslRLxMZRKyB0BR2KzEamQUDIhzcn_Y-0H7sK-Tl3jKBht4Ut_GeIcgrYUmHGoX7Ukgd4jtjHuJnopIOcYRx0ZRbaypOVMXgEgQyDYg20RLQC7Owq_KteDL5VpR8uKBzCqHfhInvhNCzQA8rqFccRr9RFBOm7sxBjFq4HbSpemr0hrSFOsC3Q_lXHwFA%3D%3D)

We can’t sit by and let the Democrats push their anti-law enforcement agenda.

name: Emma Bouton, Team Matt and Cynthia
subject: I’m inviting you!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Matt Brown for Governor and Friends of Cynthia
body:
Hi folks,

Nice to meet you! My name is Emma Bouton, and I’m Matt and Cynthia’s
Finance Director.

As many of you have seen, Cynthia, Matt, and a group of community members
have been sleeping outside of the State House for more than a week to
demand that no one freezes to death this winter and that our state
government guarantees safe and dignified housing for all.

While Cynthia and Matt are sleeping outside every night, we need to
continue raising money for the campaign to hit our crucial fundraising
deadline at the end of the year.

[ https://act.mattandcynthiaforri.com/signup/grassroots-fundraising-team-signup/?t=1003&akid=311%2E43343%2E5WOWzE ]So I’m personally inviting you! Can you join our grassroots
fundraising team and help us build the grassroots movement we need to win?

[ https://act.mattandcynthiaforri.com/signup/grassroots-fundraising-team-signup/?t=1004&akid=311%2E43343%2E5WOWzE ]SIGN UP

Matt and Cynthia exemplify the type of leaders that Rhode Island needs —
leaders who will elevate the most vulnerable and fight relentlessly for
these communities.

But while they’re both taking this action, it will be difficult for them
to keep fundraising. I slept outside with Matt and Cynthia on Thursday and
Friday nights, and know how little sleep they’re both getting with
freezing temperatures, intense wind, and police waking them up multiple
times throughout the night.

[ https://act.mattandcynthiaforri.com/signup/grassroots-fundraising-team-signup/?t=1005&akid=311%2E43343%2E5WOWzE ]We need your help! Join our grassroots fundraising team, and
I’ll follow up with everything you need to get started.

[ https://act.mattandcynthiaforri.com/signup/grassroots-fundraising-team-signup/?t=1006&akid=311%2E43343%2E5WOWzE ]SIGN UP

[ https://act.mattandcynthiaforri.com/go/3154?t=1007&akid=311%2E43343%2E5WOWzE ]Can’t fundraise, but want to chip in? Here’s the secure link to
contribute.

As part of our grassroots fundraising team, we’ll provide you with the
tools and resources you need to reach out to your own community and make a
huge impact in turning our vision of a Rhode Island for all into a
reality.

This is the perfect opportunity if you’re looking to get more involved in
this campaign, and we urgently need your help.

I’ll send more updates soon, and I can’t wait to meet you!

Emma

PO Box 2574 Providence, RI 02906

[ https://act.mattandcynthiaforri.com/go/445?t=1001&akid=311%2E43343%2E5WOWzE ]www.mattandcynthiaforri.com | [ mailto:info@mattandcynthiaforri.com ]info@mattandcynthiaforri.com |
